authors_text: Bu Jin,Xinyu Liu,Yupeng Zheng,Pengfei Li,Hao Zhao,Tong Zhang,Yuhang Zheng,Guyue Zhou,Jingjing Liu
title: ADAPT: Action-aware Driving Caption Transformer
title_zh: ADAPT：动作感知驾驶字幕转换器
abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has great potential in the transportation industry. However, the lack of transparency and interpretability of the automatic decision-making process hinders its industrial adoption in practice. There have been some early attempts to use attention maps or cost volume for better model explainability which is difficult for ordinary passengers to understand. To bridge the gap, we propose an end-to-end transformer-based architecture, ADAPT (Action-aware Driving cAPtion Transformer), which provides user-friendly natural language narrations and reasoning for each decision making step of autonomous vehicular control and action. ADAPT jointly trains both the driving caption task and the vehicular control prediction task, through a shared video representation. Experiments on BDD-X (Berkeley DeepDrive eXplanation) dataset demonstrate state-of-the-art performance of the ADAPT framework on both automatic metrics and human evaluation. To illustrate the feasibility of the proposed framework in real-world applications, we build a novel deployable system that takes raw car videos as input and outputs the action narrations and reasoning in real time. The code, models and data are available at https://github.com/jxbbb/ADAPT.

However, the lack of transparency and interpretability of the automatic decision-making process hinders its industrial adoption in practice. Experiments on BDD-X (Berkeley DeepDrive eXplanation) dataset demonstrate state-of-the-art performance of the ADAPT framework on both automatic metrics and human evaluation. To illustrate the feasibility of the proposed framework in real-world applications, we build a novel deployable system that takes raw car videos as input and outputs the action narrations and reasoning in real time. The code, models and data are available at https://github.com/jxbbb/ADAPT.
abstract_zh: 端到端自动驾驶在交通行业具有巨大潜力。然而，自动决策过程缺乏透明度和可解释性阻碍了其在实践中的工业采用。早期已经有一些尝试使用注意力图或成本量来获得更好的模型可解释性，但这对普通乘客来说很难理解。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一种基于端到端变压器的架构 ADAPT（动作感知驾驶字幕变压器），它为自主车辆控制和行动的每个决策步骤提供用户友好的自然语言叙述和推理。 ADAPT 通过共享视频表示联合训练驾驶字幕任务和车辆控制预测任务。 BDD-X（Berkeley DeepDrive eXplanation）数据集上的实验证明了 ADAPT 框架在自动指标和人工评估方面的最先进性能。为了说明所提出的框架在实际应用中的可行性，我们构建了一个新颖的可部署系统，该系统以原始汽车视频作为输入并实时输出动作叙述和推理。代码、模型和数据可在 https://github.com/jxbbb/ADAPT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADAPT框架，通过生成自然语言叙述和推理来解释自动驾驶决策过程，提升系统透明度和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶决策过程缺乏透明度和可解释性，现有方法（如注意力图）难以被普通乘客理解，需开发更直观的解释方式。
AI.method: 基于Transformer的端到端架构ADAPT，通过共享视频表征联合训练驾驶描述生成与车辆控制预测任务，并构建实时部署系统。
AI.result: 在BDD-X数据集上达到最先进性能，自动指标与人工评估均表现优异，且成功实现可部署的实时系统。
AI.conclusion: ADAPT有效提升了自动驾驶决策的可解释性，为实际应用提供了可行的透明化解决方案。

title: 'Generative CI' through Collective Response Systems
title_zh: 通过集体响应系统进行“生成 CI”
abstract: How can many people (who may disagree) come together to answer a question or make a decision? "Collective response systems" are a type of generative collective intelligence (CI) facilitation process meant to address this challenge. They enable a form of "generative voting", where both the votes, and the choices of what to vote on, are provided by the group. Such systems overcome the traditional limitations of polling, town halls, standard voting, referendums, etc. The generative CI outputs of collective response systems can also be chained together into iterative "collective dialogues", analogously to some kinds of generative AI. Technical advances across domains including recommender systems, language models, and human-computer interaction have led to the development of innovative and scalable collective response systems. For example, Polis has been used around the world to support policy-making at different levels of government, and Remesh has been used by the UN to understand the challenges and needs of ordinary people across war-torn countries. This paper aims to develop a shared language by defining the structure, processes, properties, and principles of such systems. Collective response systems allow non-confrontational exploration of divisive issues, help identify common ground, and elicit insights from those closest to the issues. As a result, they can help overcome gridlock around conflict and governance challenges, increase trust, and develop mandates. Continued progress toward their development and adoption could help revitalize democracies, reimagine corporate governance, transform conflict, and govern powerful AI systems -- both as a complement to deeper deliberative democratic processes and as an option where deeper processes are not applicable or possible.

abstract_zh: 如何让许多人（可能不同意）聚集在一起回答问题或做出决定？ “集体响应系统”是一种生成集体智慧（CI）促进过程，旨在应对这一挑战。它们实现了一种“生成投票”的形式，其中投票以及投票内容的选择均由团体提供。此类系统克服了民意调查、市政厅、标准投票、公投等传统限制。集体响应系统的生成 CI 输出也可以链接在一起形成迭代的“集体对话”，类似于某些生成人工智能。推荐系统、语言模型和人机交互等领域的技术进步促进了创新和可扩展的集体响应系统的发展。例如，Polis 已在世界各地用于支持各级政府的政策制定，而 Remesh 已被联合国用来了解饱受战争蹂躏的国家普通民众的挑战和需求。本文旨在通过定义此类系统的结构、过程、属性和原理来开发一种共享语言。集体响应系统允许对有分歧的问题进行非对抗性探索，帮助确定共同点，并从最接近问题的人那里获得见解。因此，它们可以帮助克服围绕冲突和治理挑战的僵局，增加信任并制定任务。其开发和采用的持续进展可能有助于重振民主、重新构想公司治理、转变冲突并管理强大的人工智能系统——这既可以作为更深层次协商民主进程的补充，也可以作为更深层次进程不适用或不可能的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在定义并发展集体响应系统的结构、流程、属性与原则，以促进多方参与的生成性集体智能（CI）决策过程。
AI.motivation: 传统投票、公投等方法难以应对复杂分歧，而集体响应系统可通过生成性投票和迭代对话解决冲突，提升治理效率与共识。
AI.method: 结合推荐系统、语言模型与人机交互技术，构建可扩展的集体响应系统框架，并通过案例（如Polis、Remesh）验证其应用价值。
AI.result: 系统支持非对抗性议题探索、识别共同点及挖掘基层洞察，有助于缓解治理僵局、增强信任并形成决策授权。
AI.conclusion: 集体响应系统可作为深化民主协商的补充工具，或在无法开展深度讨论的场景中提供替代方案，对重塑治理与AI监管具有潜力。

authors_text: Grace Zhang,Ayush Jain,Injune Hwang,Shao-Hua Sun,Joseph J. Lim
title: QMP: Q-switch Mixture of Policies for Multi-Task Behavior Sharing
title_zh: QMP：用于多任务行为共享的 Q-switch 策略混合
abstract: Multi-task reinforcement learning (MTRL) aims to learn several tasks simultaneously for better sample efficiency than learning them separately. Traditional methods achieve this by sharing parameters or relabeled data between tasks. In this work, we introduce a new framework for sharing behavioral policies across tasks, which can be used in addition to existing MTRL methods. The key idea is to improve each task's off-policy data collection by employing behaviors from other task policies. Selectively sharing helpful behaviors acquired in one task to collect training data for another task can lead to higher-quality trajectories, leading to more sample-efficient MTRL. Thus, we introduce a simple and principled framework called Q-switch mixture of policies (QMP) that selectively shares behavior between different task policies by using the task's Q-function to evaluate and select useful shareable behaviors. We theoretically analyze how QMP improves the sample efficiency of the underlying RL algorithm. Our experiments show that QMP's behavioral policy sharing provides complementary gains over many popular MTRL algorithms and outperforms alternative ways to share behaviors in various manipulation, locomotion, and navigation environments. Videos are available at https://qmp-mtrl.github.io.
summary: Multi-task reinforcement learning (MTRL) aims to learn several tasks simultaneously for better sample efficiency than learning them separately. Traditional methods achieve this by sharing parameters or relabeled data between tasks. In this work, we introduce a new framework for sharing behavioral policies across tasks, which can be used in addition to existing MTRL methods. The key idea is to improve each task's off-policy data collection by employing behaviors from other task policies. Selectively sharing helpful behaviors acquired in one task to collect training data for another task can lead to higher-quality trajectories, leading to more sample-efficient MTRL. Thus, we introduce a simple and principled framework called Q-switch mixture of policies (QMP) that selectively shares behavior between different task policies by using the task's Q-function to evaluate and select useful shareable behaviors. We theoretically analyze how QMP improves the sample efficiency of the underlying RL algorithm. Our experiments show that QMP's behavioral policy sharing provides complementary gains over many popular MTRL algorithms and outperforms alternative ways to share behaviors in various manipulation, locomotion, and navigation environments. Videos are available at https://qmp-mtrl.github.io.
abstract_zh: 多任务强化学习（MTRL）旨在同时学习多个任务，以获得比单独学习更高的样本效率。传统方法通过在任务之间共享参数或重新标记的数据来实现这一点。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个跨任务共享行为策略的新框架，该框架可以在现有的 MTRL 方法之外使用。关键思想是通过采用其他任务策略的行为来改进每个任务的离策略数据收集。有选择地分享在一项任务中获得的有用行为来收集另一项任务的训练数据可以产生更高质量的轨迹，从而提高样本效率的 MTRL。因此，我们引入了一个简单而有原则的框架，称为 Q 开关策略混合 (QMP)，它通过使用任务的 Q 函数来评估和选择有用的可共享行为，有选择地共享不同任务策略之间的行为。我们从理论上分析了 QMP 如何提高底层 RL 算法的样本效率。我们的实验表明，QMP 的行为策略共享比许多流行的 MTRL 算法提供了互补的收益，并且优于在各种操纵、运动和导航环境中共享行为的替代方法。视频可在 https://qmp-mtrl.github.io 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Q-switch混合策略（QMP）的新框架，通过跨任务共享行为策略来提升多任务强化学习（MTRL）的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统多任务强化学习方法通过参数共享或重标签数据提升效率，但未能充分利用不同任务间的行为策略。本文旨在通过跨任务选择性共享有效行为，进一步提高样本效率。
AI.method: QMP基于任务的Q函数评估并选择其他任务中可共享的有用行为，通过混合策略生成高质量轨迹数据，从而增强目标任务的训练效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，QMP在多种操作、移动和导航环境中优于现有MTRL算法及替代行为共享方法，且理论分析验证了其样本效率提升的机制。
AI.conclusion: QMP通过Q函数驱动的行为策略共享机制，为多任务强化学习提供了有效且通用的解决方案，显著提升了跨任务的样本利用效率与性能。

search_text: QMP: Q-switch Mixture of Policies for Multi-Task Behavior Sharing QMP：用于多任务行为共享的 Q-switch 策略混合 Multi-task reinforcement learning (MTRL) aims to learn several tasks simultaneously for better sample efficiency than learning them separately. Traditional methods achieve this by sharing parameters or relabeled data between tasks. In this work, we introduce a new framework for sharing behavioral policies across tasks, which can be used in addition to existing MTRL methods. The key idea is to improve each task's off-policy data collection by employing behaviors from other task policies. Selectively sharing helpful behaviors acquired in one task to collect training data for another task can lead to higher-quality trajectories, leading to more sample-efficient MTRL. Thus, we introduce a simple and principled framework called Q-switch mixture of policies (QMP) that selectively shares behavior between different task policies by using the task's Q-function to evaluate and select useful shareable behaviors. We theoretically analyze how QMP improves the sample efficiency of the underlying RL algorithm. Our experiments show that QMP's behavioral policy sharing provides complementary gains over many popular MTRL algorithms and outperforms alternative ways to share behaviors in various manipulation, locomotion, and navigation environments. Videos are available at https://qmp-mtrl.github.io. 多任务强化学习（MTRL）旨在同时学习多个任务，以获得比单独学习更高的样本效率。传统方法通过在任务之间共享参数或重新标记的数据来实现这一点。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个跨任务共享行为策略的新框架，该框架可以在现有的 MTRL 方法之外使用。关键思想是通过采用其他任务策略的行为来改进每个任务的离策略数据收集。有选择地分享在一项任务中获得的有用行为来收集另一项任务的训练数据可以产生更高质量的轨迹，从而提高样本效率的 MTRL。因此，我们引入了一个简单而有原则的框架，称为 Q 开关策略混合 (QMP)，它通过使用任务的 Q 函数来评估和选择有用的可共享行为，有选择地共享不同任务策略之间的行为。我们从理论上分析了 QMP 如何提高底层 RL 算法的样本效率。我们的实验表明，QMP 的行为策略共享比许多流行的 MTRL 算法提供了互补的收益，并且优于在各种操纵、运动和导航环境中共享行为的替代方法。视频可在 https://qmp-mtrl.github.io 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Q-switch混合策略（QMP）的新框架，通过跨任务共享行为策略来提升多任务强化学习（MTRL）的样本效率。 Grace Zhang,Ayush Jain,Injune Hwang,Shao-Hua Sun,Joseph J. title: Stable Target Field for Reduced Variance Score Estimation in Diffusion Models
title_zh: 用于减少扩散模型中方差分数估计的稳定目标场
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Code available at: https://github.com/Newbeeer/stf
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Code available at: https://github.com/Newbeeer/stf
abstract: Diffusion models generate samples by reversing a fixed forward diffusion process. Despite already providing impressive empirical results, these diffusion models algorithms can be further improved by reducing the variance of the training targets in their denoising score-matching objective. We argue that the source of such variance lies in the handling of intermediate noise-variance scales, where multiple modes in the data affect the direction of reverse paths. We propose to remedy the problem by incorporating a reference batch which we use to calculate weighted conditional scores as more stable training targets. We show that the procedure indeed helps in the challenging intermediate regime by reducing (the trace of) the covariance of training targets. The new stable targets can be seen as trading bias for reduced variance, where the bias vanishes with increasing reference batch size. Empirically, we show that the new objective improves the image quality, stability, and training speed of various popular diffusion models across datasets with both general ODE and SDE solvers. When used in combination with EDM, our method yields a current SOTA FID of 1.90 with 35 network evaluations on the unconditional CIFAR-10 generation task. The code is available at https://github.com/Newbeeer/stf
summary: Diffusion models generate samples by reversing a fixed forward diffusion process. Despite already providing impressive empirical results, these diffusion models algorithms can be further improved by reducing the variance of the training targets in their denoising score-matching objective. We argue that the source of such variance lies in the handling of intermediate noise-variance scales, where multiple modes in the data affect the direction of reverse paths. We propose to remedy the problem by incorporating a reference batch which we use to calculate weighted conditional scores as more stable training targets. We show that the procedure indeed helps in the challenging intermediate regime by reducing (the trace of) the covariance of training targets. The new stable targets can be seen as trading bias for reduced variance, where the bias vanishes with increasing reference batch size. Empirically, we show that the new objective improves the image quality, stability, and training speed of various popular diffusion models across datasets with both general ODE and SDE solvers. When used in combination with EDM, our method yields a current SOTA FID of 1.90 with 35 network evaluations on the unconditional CIFAR-10 generation task. The code is available at https://github.com/Newbeeer/stf
abstract_zh: 扩散模型通过反转固定的前向扩散过程来生成样本。尽管已经提供了令人印象深刻的经验结果，但这些扩散模型算法可以通过减少去噪分数匹配目标中训练目标的方差来进一步改进。我们认为这种方差的根源在于中间噪声方差尺度的处理，其中数据中的多种模式影响反向路径的方向。我们建议通过合并参考批次来解决这个问题，我们用它来计算加权条件分数作为更稳定的训练目标。我们表明，该过程确实有助于通过减少训练目标的协方差（的痕迹）来应对具有挑战性的中间状态。新的稳定目标可以看作是用偏差来减少方差，其中偏差随着参考批量大小的增加而消失。根据经验，我们表明，新目标使用通用 ODE 和 SDE 求解器提高了跨数据集的各种流行扩散模型的图像质量、稳定性和训练速度。当与 EDM 结合使用时，我们的方法在无条件 CIFAR-10 生成任务上进行 35 次网络评估后，当前的 SOTA FID 为 1.90。代码可在 https://github.com/Newbeeer/stf 获取

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种通过稳定目标场降低扩散模型得分估计方差的方法，以提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在反向过程中因中间噪声尺度处理导致训练目标方差较大，影响生成稳定性与质量。
AI.method: 引入参考批次计算加权条件得分作为更稳定的训练目标，通过降低目标协方差实现方差控制，以增加参考批次规模减少偏差。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上提升图像质量与训练速度，结合EDM方法在无条件CIFAR-10任务中达到当前最优FID 1.90。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过稳定目标场有效降低方差，兼顾偏差与稳定性，在扩散模型训练中具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Bhakti Baheti,Sunny Rai,Shubham Innani,Garv Mehdiratta,Sharath Chandra Guntuku,MacLean P. Nasrallah,Spyridon Bakas
title: Detecting Histologic & Clinical Glioblastoma Patterns of Prognostic Relevance
title_zh: 检测与预后相关的组织学和临床胶质母细胞瘤模式
abstract: Glioblastoma is the most common and aggressive malignant adult tumor of the central nervous system, with a grim prognosis and heterogeneous morphologic and molecular profiles. Since adopting the current standard-of-care treatment 18 years ago, no substantial prognostic improvement has been noticed. Accurate prediction of patient overall survival (OS) from histopathology whole slide images (WSI) integrated with clinical data using advanced computational methods could optimize clinical decision-making and patient management. Here, we focus on identifying prognostically relevant glioblastoma characteristics from H&E stained WSI & clinical data relating to OS. The exact approach for WSI capitalizes on the comprehensive curation of apparent artifactual content and an interpretability mechanism via a weakly supervised attention-based multiple-instance learning algorithm that further utilizes clustering to constrain the search space. The automatically placed patterns of high diagnostic value classify each WSI as representative of short or long-survivors. Further assessment of the prognostic relevance of the associated clinical patient data is performed both in isolation and in an integrated manner, using XGBoost and SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP). Identifying tumor morphological & clinical patterns associated with short and long OS will enable the clinical neuropathologist to provide additional relevant prognostic information to the treating team and suggest avenues of biological investigation for understanding and potentially treating glioblastoma.
summary: Glioblastoma is the most common and aggressive malignant adult tumor of the central nervous system, with a grim prognosis and heterogeneous morphologic and molecular profiles. Since adopting the current standard-of-care treatment 18 years ago, no substantial prognostic improvement has been noticed. Accurate prediction of patient overall survival (OS) from histopathology whole slide images (WSI) integrated with clinical data using advanced computational methods could optimize clinical decision-making and patient management. Here, we focus on identifying prognostically relevant glioblastoma characteristics from H&E stained WSI & clinical data relating to OS. The exact approach for WSI capitalizes on the comprehensive curation of apparent artifactual content and an interpretability mechanism via a weakly supervised attention-based multiple-instance learning algorithm that further utilizes clustering to constrain the search space. The automatically placed patterns of high diagnostic value classify each WSI as representative of short or long-survivors. Further assessment of the prognostic relevance of the associated clinical patient data is performed both in isolation and in an integrated manner, using XGBoost and SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP). Identifying tumor morphological & clinical patterns associated with short and long OS will enable the clinical neuropathologist to provide additional relevant prognostic information to the treating team and suggest avenues of biological investigation for understanding and potentially treating glioblastoma.
abstract_zh: 胶质母细胞瘤是中枢神经系统最常见、最具侵袭性的成人恶性肿瘤，预后严峻，形态和分子特征异质。自 18 年前采用现行标准护理治疗以来，尚未发现预后有实质性改善。使用先进的计算方法将组织病理学全切片图像 (WSI) 与临床数据相结合，准确预测患者总生存期 (OS)，可以优化临床决策和患者管理。在这里，我们重点从 H&E 染色的 WSI 和与 OS 相关的临床数据中识别与预后相关的胶质母细胞瘤特征。 WSI 的确切方法利用了对明显人工内容的综合管理，以及通过基于弱监督注意力的多实例学习算法的可解释性机制，该算法进一步利用聚类来约束搜索空间。自动放置的高诊断价值模式将每个 WSI 分类为短幸存者或长幸存者的代表。使用 XGBoost 和 SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) 以单独和综合的方式对相关临床患者数据的预后相关性进行进一步评估。识别与短和长 OS 相关的肿瘤形态和临床模式将使临床神经病理学家能够向治疗团队提供额外的相关预后信息，并为理解和潜在治疗胶质母细胞瘤提出生物学研究的途径。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从组织病理学全切片图像（WSI）和临床数据中识别具有预后意义的胶质母细胞瘤特征，以预测患者总生存期（OS）。
AI.motivation: 胶质母细胞瘤预后差且异质性强，现有标准治疗18年未显著改善预后，需通过整合WSI与临床数据的计算方法优化临床决策。
AI.method: 采用弱监督注意力机制的多实例学习算法处理WSI，结合聚类缩小搜索空间；利用XGBoost和SHAP分析临床数据的预后相关性，并整合形态学与临床特征。
AI.result: 方法可将WSI分类为短/长生存期患者，识别出与生存期相关的形态学及临床模式，为临床提供额外预后信息并指导生物学研究。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效整合WSI与临床数据，识别预后相关特征，辅助临床决策并为胶质母细胞瘤的生物学机制研究提供方向。

search_text: Detecting Histologic & Clinical Glioblastoma Patterns of Prognostic Relevance 检测与预后相关的组织学和临床胶质母细胞瘤模式 Glioblastoma is the most common and aggressive malignant adult tumor of the central nervous system, with a grim prognosis and heterogeneous morphologic and molecular profiles. Since adopting the current standard-of-care treatment 18 years ago, no substantial prognostic improvement has been noticed. Accurate prediction of patient overall survival (OS) from histopathology whole slide images (WSI) integrated with clinical data using advanced computational methods could optimize clinical decision-making and patient management. Here, we focus on identifying prognostically relevant glioblastoma characteristics from H&E stained WSI & clinical data relating to OS. The exact approach for WSI capitalizes on the comprehensive curation of apparent artifactual content and an interpretability mechanism via a weakly supervised attention-based multiple-instance learning algorithm that further utilizes clustering to constrain the search space. The automatically placed patterns of high diagnostic value classify each WSI as representative of short or long-survivors. Further assessment of the prognostic relevance of the associated clinical patient data is performed both in isolation and in an integrated manner, using XGBoost and SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP). Identifying tumor morphological & clinical patterns associated with short and long OS will enable the clinical neuropathologist to provide additional relevant prognostic information to the treating team and suggest avenues of biological investigation for understanding and potentially treating glioblastoma. 胶质母细胞瘤是中枢神经系统最常见、最具侵袭性的成人恶性肿瘤，预后严峻，形态和分子特征异质。自 18 年前采用现行标准护理治疗以来，尚未发现预后有实质性改善。使用先进的计算方法将组织病理学全切片图像 (WSI) 与临床数据相结合，准确预测患者总生存期 (OS)，可以优化临床决策和患者管理。在这里，我们重点从 H&E 染色的 WSI 和与 OS 相关的临床数据中识别与预后相关的胶质母细胞瘤特征。 WSI 的确切方法利用了对明显人工内容的综合管理，以及通过基于弱监督注意力的多实例学习算法的可解释性机制，该算法进一步利用聚类来约束搜索空间。自动放置的高诊断价值模式将每个 WSI 分类为短幸存者或长幸存者的代表。使用 XGBoost 和 SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) 以单独和综合的方式对相关临床患者数据的预后相关性进行进一步评估。识别与短和长 OS 相关的肿瘤形态和临床模式将使临床神经病理学家能够向治疗团队提供额外的相关预后信息，并为理解和潜在治疗胶质母细胞瘤提出生物学研究的途径。 本文旨在从组织病理学全切片图像（WSI）和临床数据中识别具有预后意义的胶质母细胞瘤特征，以预测患者总生存期（OS）。 Bhakti Baheti,Sunny Rai,Shubham Innani,Garv Mehdiratta,Sharath Chandra Guntuku,MacLean P. Nasrallah,Spyridon Bakas eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Extrinsic Calibration of 2D Millimetre-Wavelength Radar Pairs Using Ego-Velocity Estimates
title_zh: 使用自我速度估计对 2D 毫米波长雷达对进行外部校准
comment: In Proceedings of the 2023 IEEE/ASME International Conference on Advanced Intelligent Mechatronics (AIM 2023), Seattle, Washington, USA, June 27- July 1, 2023
comments: In Proceedings of the 2023 IEEE/ASME International Conference on Advanced Intelligent Mechatronics (AIM 2023), Seattle, Washington, USA, June 27- July 1, 2023
abstract: Correct radar data fusion depends on knowledge of the spatial transform between sensor pairs. Current methods for determining this transform operate by aligning identifiable features in different radar scans, or by relying on measurements from another, more accurate sensor. Feature-based alignment requires the sensors to have overlapping fields of view or necessitates the construction of an environment map. Several existing techniques require bespoke retroreflective radar targets. These requirements limit both where and how calibration can be performed. In this paper, we take a different approach: instead of attempting to track targets or features, we rely on ego-velocity estimates from each radar to perform calibration. Our method enables calibration of a subset of the transform parameters, including the yaw and the axis of translation between the radar pair, without the need for a shared field of view or for specialized targets. In general, the yaw and the axis of translation are the most important parameters for data fusion, the most likely to vary over time, and the most difficult to calibrate manually. We formulate calibration as a batch optimization problem, show that the radar-radar system is identifiable, and specify the platform excitation requirements. Through simulation studies and real-world experiments, we establish that our method is more reliable and accurate than state-of-the-art methods. Finally, we demonstrate that the full rigid body transform can be recovered if relatively coarse information about the platform rotation rate is available.
summary: Correct radar data fusion depends on knowledge of the spatial transform between sensor pairs. Current methods for determining this transform operate by aligning identifiable features in different radar scans, or by relying on measurements from another, more accurate sensor. Feature-based alignment requires the sensors to have overlapping fields of view or necessitates the construction of an environment map. Several existing techniques require bespoke retroreflective radar targets. These requirements limit both where and how calibration can be performed. In this paper, we take a different approach: instead of attempting to track targets or features, we rely on ego-velocity estimates from each radar to perform calibration. Our method enables calibration of a subset of the transform parameters, including the yaw and the axis of translation between the radar pair, without the need for a shared field of view or for specialized targets. In general, the yaw and the axis of translation are the most important parameters for data fusion, the most likely to vary over time, and the most difficult to calibrate manually. We formulate calibration as a batch optimization problem, show that the radar-radar system is identifiable, and specify the platform excitation requirements. Through simulation studies and real-world experiments, we establish that our method is more reliable and accurate than state-of-the-art methods. Finally, we demonstrate that the full rigid body transform can be recovered if relatively coarse information about the platform rotation rate is available.
abstract_zh: 正确的雷达数据融合取决于传感器对之间的空间变换的知识。目前确定这种变换的方法是通过对齐不同雷达扫描中的可识别特征，或者依靠另一个更精确的传感器的测量结果来操作的。基于特征的对齐要求传感器具有重叠的视野或需要构建环境地图。一些现有技术需要定制逆反射雷达目标。这些要求限制了校准的地点和方式。在本文中，我们采用了不同的方法：我们依靠每个雷达的自速度估计来执行校准，而不是尝试跟踪目标或特征。我们的方法可以校准变换参数的子集，包括雷达对之间的偏航和平移轴，而不需要共享视场或专门的目标。一般来说，偏航和平移轴是数据融合最重要的参数，最有可能随时间变化，并且最难手动校准。我们将校准制定为批量优化问题，表明雷达-雷达系统是可识别的，并指定了平台激励要求。通过模拟研究和现实世界的实验，我们确定我们的方法比最先进的方法更可靠和准确。最后，我们证明，如果可以获得有关平台旋转速率的相对粗略的信息，则可以恢复完整的刚体变换。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自车速度估计的2D毫米波雷达对的外参标定方法，无需重叠视场或专用目标。
AI.motivation: 现有雷达标定方法依赖特征匹配或高精度传感器，存在视场重叠限制和专用目标依赖问题，难以适应实际场景需求。
AI.method: 将标定建模为批量优化问题，利用双雷达自车速度估计实现偏航角和平移轴标定，通过平台激励条件保证系统可观测性。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明该方法在可靠性与精度上优于现有技术，且在具备平台旋转率粗略信息时可恢复完整刚体变换参数。
AI.conclusion: 基于自车速度的标定方法有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为雷达数据融合提供了更实用的标定解决方案。

title: Graph Neural Operators for Classification of Spatial Transcriptomics Data
title_zh: 用于空间转录组数据分类的图神经算子
comment: 5 pages, 8 figures, 1 table. To appear in conference proceedings and journal publications
comments: 5 pages, 8 figures, 1 table. To appear in conference proceedings and journal publications
abstract: The inception of spatial transcriptomics has allowed improved comprehension of tissue architectures and the disentanglement of complex underlying biological, physiological, and pathological processes through their positional contexts. Recently, these contexts, and by extension the field, have seen much promise and elucidation with the application of graph learning approaches. In particular, neural operators have risen in regards to learning the mapping between infinite-dimensional function spaces. With basic to deep neural network architectures being data-driven, i.e. dependent on quality data for prediction, neural operators provide robustness by offering generalization among different resolutions despite low quality data. Graph neural operators are a variant that utilize graph networks to learn this mapping between function spaces. The aim of this research is to identify robust machine learning architectures that integrate spatial information to predict tissue types. Under this notion, we propose a study incorporating various graph neural network approaches to validate the efficacy of applying neural operators towards prediction of brain regions in mouse brain tissue samples as a proof of concept towards our purpose. We were able to achieve an F1 score of nearly 72% for the graph neural operator approach which outperformed all baseline and other graph network approaches.
summary: The inception of spatial transcriptomics has allowed improved comprehension of tissue architectures and the disentanglement of complex underlying biological, physiological, and pathological processes through their positional contexts. Recently, these contexts, and by extension the field, have seen much promise and elucidation with the application of graph learning approaches. In particular, neural operators have risen in regards to learning the mapping between infinite-dimensional function spaces. With basic to deep neural network architectures being data-driven, i.e. dependent on quality data for prediction, neural operators provide robustness by offering generalization among different resolutions despite low quality data. Graph neural operators are a variant that utilize graph networks to learn this mapping between function spaces. The aim of this research is to identify robust machine learning architectures that integrate spatial information to predict tissue types. Under this notion, we propose a study incorporating various graph neural network approaches to validate the efficacy of applying neural operators towards prediction of brain regions in mouse brain tissue samples as a proof of concept towards our purpose. We were able to achieve an F1 score of nearly 72% for the graph neural operator approach which outperformed all baseline and other graph network approaches.
abstract_zh: 空间转录组学的兴起提高了对组织结构的理解，并通过其位置背景理清了复杂的潜在生物、生理和病理过程。最近，随着图学习方法的应用，这些背景以及该领域的扩展已经看到了很多希望和阐明。特别是，神经算子在学习无限维函数空间之间的映射方面已经兴起。由于基本的深层神经网络架构是数据驱动的，即依赖于质量数据进行预测，神经算子通过在不同分辨率之间提供泛化来提供鲁棒性，尽管数据质量较低。图神经算子是利用图网络来学习函数空间之间的映射的一种变体。这项研究的目的是确定强大的机器学习架构，整合空间信息来预测组织类型。在这个概念下，我们提出了一项结合各种图神经网络方法的研究，以验证应用神经算子预测小鼠脑组织样本中的大脑区域的有效性，作为实现我们目的的概念证明。我们的图神经算子方法的 F1 分数接近 72%，优于所有基线和其他图网络方法。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在利用图神经算子对空间转录组数据进行分类，以预测小鼠脑组织区域。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法依赖高质量数据，而神经算子能处理低质量数据并泛化不同分辨率，从而提升分类的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用图神经算子，利用图网络学习无限维函数空间间的映射，结合多种图神经网络架构进行验证。
AI.result: 在预测小鼠脑区任务中，图神经算子方法的F1分数达到72%，优于所有基线和其他图网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 图神经算子在空间转录组数据分类中表现出色，验证了其在处理此类数据中的潜力。

search_text: Graph Neural Operators for Classification of Spatial Transcriptomics Data 用于空间转录组数据分类的图神经算子 The inception of spatial transcriptomics has allowed improved comprehension of tissue architectures and the disentanglement of complex underlying biological, physiological, and pathological processes through their positional contexts. Recently, these contexts, and by extension the field, have seen much promise and elucidation with the application of graph learning approaches. In particular, neural operators have risen in regards to learning the mapping between infinite-dimensional function spaces. With basic to deep neural network architectures being data-driven, i.e. dependent on quality data for prediction, neural operators provide robustness by offering generalization among different resolutions despite low quality data. Graph neural operators are a variant that utilize graph networks to learn this mapping between function spaces. The aim of this research is to identify robust machine learning architectures that integrate spatial information to predict tissue types. Under this notion, we propose a study incorporating various graph neural network approaches to validate the efficacy of applying neural operators towards prediction of brain regions in mouse brain tissue samples as a proof of concept towards our purpose. We were able to achieve an F1 score of nearly 72% for the graph neural operator approach which outperformed all baseline and other graph network approaches. 空间转录组学的兴起提高了对组织结构的理解，并通过其位置背景理清了复杂的潜在生物、生理和病理过程。最近，随着图学习方法的应用，这些背景以及该领域的扩展已经看到了很多希望和阐明。特别是，神经算子在学习无限维函数空间之间的映射方面已经兴起。由于基本的深层神经网络架构是数据驱动的，即依赖于质量数据进行预测，神经算子通过在不同分辨率之间提供泛化来提供鲁棒性，尽管数据质量较低。图神经算子是利用图网络来学习函数空间之间的映射的一种变体。这项研究的目的是确定强大的机器学习架构，整合空间信息来预测组织类型。在这个概念下，我们提出了一项结合各种图神经网络方法的研究，以验证应用神经算子预测小鼠脑组织样本中的大脑区域的有效性，作为实现我们目的的概念证明。我们的图神经算子方法的 F1 分数接近 72%，优于所有基线和其他图网络方法。 本研究旨在利用图神经算子对空间转录组数据进行分类，以预测小鼠脑组织区域。 Junaid Ahmed,Alhassan S. Yasin cs.LG,cs.AI,q-bio.GN,q-bio.QM

title: Adding a Tail in Classes of Perfect Graphs
title_zh: 在完美图类中添加尾部
abstract: Consider a graph $G$ which belongs to a graph class ${\cal C}$. We are interested in connecting a node $w \not\in V(G)$ to $G$ by a single edge $u w$ where $u \in V(G)$; we call such an edge a \emph{tail}. As the graph resulting from $G$ after the addition of the tail, denoted $G+uw$, need not belong to the class ${\cal C}$, we want to compute a minimum ${\cal C}$-completion of $G+w$, i.e., the minimum number of non-edges (excluding the tail $u w$) to be added to $G+uw$ so that the resulting graph belongs to ${\cal C}$. In this paper, we study this problem for the classes of split, quasi-threshold, threshold, and $P_4$-sparse graphs and we present linear-time algorithms by exploiting the structure of split graphs and the tree representation of quasi-threshold, threshold, and $P_4$-sparse graphs.
summary: Consider a graph $G$ which belongs to a graph class ${\cal C}$. We are interested in connecting a node $w \not\in V(G)$ to $G$ by a single edge $u w$ where $u \in V(G)$; we call such an edge a \emph{tail}. As the graph resulting from $G$ after the addition of the tail, denoted $G+uw$, need not belong to the class ${\cal C}$, we want to compute a minimum ${\cal C}$-completion of $G+w$, i.e., the minimum number of non-edges (excluding the tail $u w$) to be added to $G+uw$ so that the resulting graph belongs to ${\cal C}$. In this paper, we study this problem for the classes of split, quasi-threshold, threshold, and $P_4$-sparse graphs and we present linear-time algorithms by exploiting the structure of split graphs and the tree representation of quasi-threshold, threshold, and $P_4$-sparse graphs.
abstract_zh: 考虑一个图 $G$，它属于图类 ${\cal C}$。我们感兴趣的是通过一条边 $u w$ 将节点 $w \not\in V(G)$ 连接到 $G$，其中 $u \in V(G)$；我们将这样的边称为\emph{tail}。由于添加尾部后 $G$ 生成的图（表示为 $G+uw$）不需要属于类 ${\cal C}$，因此我们要计算 $G+w$ 的最小 ${\cal C}$ 完成，即添加到 $G+uw$ 的非边（不包括尾部 $u w$）的最小数量，以便生成的图属于 ${\cal C}$。在本文中，我们研究了分割图、准阈值图、阈值图和 $P_4$ 稀疏图类的问题，并通过利用分割图的结构和准阈值图、阈值图和 $P_4$ 稀疏图的树表示来提出线性时间算法。

AI.tldr: 研究在完美图类中添加尾部边后，如何以最小代价完成图类保持的算法问题。
AI.motivation: 当向图中添加尾部边可能导致图不再属于原图类，需计算最小补集以维持图类属性，这对图算法设计具有理论价值。
AI.method: 利用分裂图结构特性及准阈值、阈值和P4-稀疏图的树表示，设计线性时间算法求解最小完成数。
AI.result: 为分裂图、准阈值图、阈值图和P4-稀疏图类提供了线性时间的最小完成计算算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构特性分析，实现了针对多类完美图的高效最小完成计算，推动了图类保持问题的算法研究。

authors_text: Jessie Caridad Martín Sujo,Elisabet Golobardes i Ribé
title: BRAIN L: A book recommender system
title_zh: BRAIN L：图书推荐系统
abstract: Book sales in Spain have fallen progressively, which requires urgent changes to optimize the sales process as much as possible. This research proposes a new system, called Base of Reasoning in Artificial Intelligence with Natural Language (BRAIN L) focused exclusively on the publishing industry. The new field of knowledge of Artificial Intelligence (AI), Natural Language Processing (NLP), tecnología del Machine Learning is combined with Case-Based Reasoning (CBR) techniques for book recommendations. A model is developed to retrieve similar cases/books supported by NLP techniques for decision making. In addition, policies are implemented to keep the model evaluated by expert reviews, where the system not only learns with new cases, but these cases are real.
summary: Book sales in Spain have fallen progressively, which requires urgent changes to optimize the sales process as much as possible. This research proposes a new system, called Base of Reasoning in Artificial Intelligence with Natural Language (BRAIN L) focused exclusively on the publishing industry. The new field of knowledge of Artificial Intelligence (AI), Natural Language Processing (NLP), tecnología del Machine Learning is combined with Case-Based Reasoning (CBR) techniques for book recommendations. A model is developed to retrieve similar cases/books supported by NLP techniques for decision making. In addition, policies are implemented to keep the model evaluated by expert reviews, where the system not only learns with new cases, but these cases are real.
abstract_zh: 西班牙的图书销量逐渐下滑，这需要紧急变革来尽可能优化销售流程。这项研究提出了一种新系统，称为自然语言人工智能推理基础（BRAIN L），专门针对出版业。人工智能（AI）、自然语言处理（NLP）、机器学习技术等新知识领域与基于案例推理（CBR）技术相结合，用于书籍推荐。开发了一个模型来检索由 NLP 技术支持的类似案例/书籍以进行决策。此外，还实施了一些政策，以保持模型由专家评审进行评估，系统不仅通过新案例进行学习，而且这些案例都是真实的。

AI.tldr: 开发结合AI、NLP与案例推理的图书推荐系统以优化销售流程
AI.motivation: 应对西班牙图书销售下滑，通过智能推荐优化销售流程
AI.method: 融合AI、NLP与CBR技术，构建基于案例的推荐模型并引入专家评估机制
AI.result: 成功开发出支持专家评估的推荐模型，实现真实案例学习
AI.conclusion: 验证了AI与CBR结合在图书推荐中的有效性，为出版业提供优化方案

title: Image-Based Vehicle Classification by Synergizing Features from Supervised and Self-Supervised Learning Paradigms
title_zh: 通过协同监督和自监督学习范式的特征进行基于图像的车辆分类
abstract: This paper introduces a novel approach to leverage features learned from both supervised and self-supervised paradigms, to improve image classification tasks, specifically for vehicle classification. Two state-of-the-art self-supervised learning methods, DINO and data2vec, were evaluated and compared for their representation learning of vehicle images. The former contrasts local and global views while the latter uses masked prediction on multi-layered representations. In the latter case, supervised learning is employed to finetune a pretrained YOLOR object detector for detecting vehicle wheels, from which definitive wheel positional features are retrieved. The representations learned from these self-supervised learning methods were combined with the wheel positional features for the vehicle classification task. Particularly, a random wheel masking strategy was utilized to finetune the previously learned representations in harmony with the wheel positional features during the training of the classifier. Our experiments show that the data2vec-distilled representations, which are consistent with our wheel masking strategy, outperformed the DINO counterpart, resulting in a celebrated Top-1 classification accuracy of 97.2% for classifying the 13 vehicle classes defined by the Federal Highway Administration.
summary: This paper introduces a novel approach to leverage features learned from both supervised and self-supervised paradigms, to improve image classification tasks, specifically for vehicle classification. Two state-of-the-art self-supervised learning methods, DINO and data2vec, were evaluated and compared for their representation learning of vehicle images. The former contrasts local and global views while the latter uses masked prediction on multi-layered representations. In the latter case, supervised learning is employed to finetune a pretrained YOLOR object detector for detecting vehicle wheels, from which definitive wheel positional features are retrieved. The representations learned from these self-supervised learning methods were combined with the wheel positional features for the vehicle classification task. Particularly, a random wheel masking strategy was utilized to finetune the previously learned representations in harmony with the wheel positional features during the training of the classifier. Our experiments show that the data2vec-distilled representations, which are consistent with our wheel masking strategy, outperformed the DINO counterpart, resulting in a celebrated Top-1 classification accuracy of 97.2% for classifying the 13 vehicle classes defined by the Federal Highway Administration.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种新颖的方法，利用从监督和自监督范例中学到的特征来改进图像分类任务，特别是车辆分类。对两种最先进的自监督学习方法 DINO 和 data2vec 的车辆图像表示学习进行了评估和比较。前者对比局部视图和全局视图，而后者使用多层表示的掩模预测。在后一种情况下，采用监督学习来微调用于检测车轮的预训练 YOLOR 对象检测器，从中检索明确的车轮位置特征。从这些自监督学习方法中学到的表示与车辆分类任务的车轮位置特征相结合。特别是，在分类器训练期间，利用随机车轮掩蔽策略来微调先前学习的表示，使其与车轮位置特征相协调。我们的实验表明，与我们的车轮掩蔽策略一致的 data2vec 蒸馏表示优于 DINO 对应的表示，在对联邦公路管理局定义的 13 种车辆类别进行分类时，获得了 97.2% 的著名 Top-1 分类准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合监督学习和自监督学习特征的图像车辆分类方法，通过整合DINO、data2vec等自监督模型与轮毂位置特征提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 传统单一学习范式在车辆分类任务中存在特征表达局限性，需探索多源特征融合策略以提升复杂场景下的分类准确率。
AI.method: 采用DINO和data2vec进行自监督预训练，利用YOLOR检测器提取轮毂位置特征，通过随机轮毂掩码策略融合多源表征，最终构建联合分类模型。
AI.result: 在联邦公路管理局定义的13类车辆数据集上达到97.2%的Top-1分类准确率，其中data2vec蒸馏表征优于DINO方法。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习与监督特征的协同融合能显著提升车辆分类性能，尤其data2vec结合轮毂掩码策略展现出优越的特征一致性与分类效果。

search_text: Image-Based Vehicle Classification by Synergizing Features from Supervised and Self-Supervised Learning Paradigms 通过协同监督和自监督学习范式的特征进行基于图像的车辆分类 This paper introduces a novel approach to leverage features learned from both supervised and self-supervised paradigms, to improve image classification tasks, specifically for vehicle classification. Two state-of-the-art self-supervised learning methods, DINO and data2vec, were evaluated and compared for their representation learning of vehicle images. The former contrasts local and global views while the latter uses masked prediction on multi-layered representations. In the latter case, supervised learning is employed to finetune a pretrained YOLOR object detector for detecting vehicle wheels, from which definitive wheel positional features are retrieved. The representations learned from these self-supervised learning methods were combined with the wheel positional features for the vehicle classification task. Particularly, a random wheel masking strategy was utilized to finetune the previously learned representations in harmony with the wheel positional features during the training of the classifier. Our experiments show that the data2vec-distilled representations, which are consistent with our wheel masking strategy, outperformed the DINO counterpart, resulting in a celebrated Top-1 classification accuracy of 97.2% for classifying the 13 vehicle classes defined by the Federal Highway Administration. 本文介绍了一种新颖的方法，利用从监督和自监督范例中学到的特征来改进图像分类任务，特别是车辆分类。对两种最先进的自监督学习方法 DINO 和 data2vec 的车辆图像表示学习进行了评估和比较。前者对比局部视图和全局视图，而后者使用多层表示的掩模预测。在后一种情况下，采用监督学习来微调用于检测车轮的预训练 YOLOR 对象检测器，从中检索明确的车轮位置特征。从这些自监督学习方法中学到的表示与车辆分类任务的车轮位置特征相结合。特别是，在分类器训练期间，利用随机车轮掩蔽策略来微调先前学习的表示，使其与车轮位置特征相协调。我们的实验表明，与我们的车轮掩蔽策略一致的 data2vec 蒸馏表示优于 DINO 对应的表示，在对联邦公路管理局定义的 13 种车辆类别进行分类时，获得了 97.2% 的著名 Top-1 分类准确率。 本文提出一种结合监督学习和自监督学习特征的图像车辆分类方法，通过整合DINO、data2vec等自监督模型与轮毂位置特征提升分类性能。 Shihan Ma,Jidong J. Yang cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jaesung Huh,Jacob Chalk,Evangelos Kazakos,Dima Damen,Andrew Zisserman
title: Epic-Sounds: A Large-scale Dataset of Actions That Sound
title_zh: 史诗般的声音：声音动作的大规模数据集
abstract: We introduce EPIC-SOUNDS, a large-scale dataset of audio annotations capturing temporal extents and class labels within the audio stream of the egocentric videos. We propose an annotation pipeline where annotators temporally label distinguishable audio segments and describe the action that could have caused this sound. We identify actions that can be discriminated purely from audio, through grouping these free-form descriptions of audio into classes. For actions that involve objects colliding, we collect human annotations of the materials of these objects (e.g. a glass object being placed on a wooden surface), which we verify from video, discarding ambiguities. Overall, EPIC-SOUNDS includes 78.4k categorised segments of audible events and actions, distributed across 44 classes as well as 39.2k non-categorised segments. We train and evaluate state-of-the-art audio recognition and detection models on our dataset, for both audio-only and audio-visual methods. We also conduct analysis on: the temporal overlap between audio events, the temporal and label correlations between audio and visual modalities, the ambiguities in annotating materials from audio-only input, the importance of audio-only labels and the limitations of current models to understand actions that sound.
summary: We introduce EPIC-SOUNDS, a large-scale dataset of audio annotations capturing temporal extents and class labels within the audio stream of the egocentric videos. We propose an annotation pipeline where annotators temporally label distinguishable audio segments and describe the action that could have caused this sound. We identify actions that can be discriminated purely from audio, through grouping these free-form descriptions of audio into classes. For actions that involve objects colliding, we collect human annotations of the materials of these objects (e.g. a glass object being placed on a wooden surface), which we verify from video, discarding ambiguities. Overall, EPIC-SOUNDS includes 78.4k categorised segments of audible events and actions, distributed across 44 classes as well as 39.2k non-categorised segments. We train and evaluate state-of-the-art audio recognition and detection models on our dataset, for both audio-only and audio-visual methods. We also conduct analysis on: the temporal overlap between audio events, the temporal and label correlations between audio and visual modalities, the ambiguities in annotating materials from audio-only input, the importance of audio-only labels and the limitations of current models to understand actions that sound.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 EPIC-SOUNDS，这是一个大规模的音频注释数据集，捕获以自我为中心的视频音频流中的时间范围和类别标签。我们提出了一个注释管道，其中注释者临时标记可区分的音频片段并描述可能导致这种声音的动作。我们通过将这些自由形式的音频描述分组来识别可以纯粹从音频中区分的动作。对于涉及物体碰撞的动作，我们收集这些物体材料的人工注释（例如，将玻璃物体放置在木质表面上），我们从视频中进行验证，消除歧义。总体而言，EPIC-SOUNDS 包括 78,400 个可听事件和动作的分类片段（分布在 44 个类别中）以及 39,200 个未分类片段。我们在数据集上训练和评估最先进的音频识别和检测模型，适用于纯音频和视听方法。我们还对以下方面进行分析：音频事件之间的时间重叠、音频和视觉模态之间的时间和标签相关性、纯音频输入注释材料的模糊性、纯音频标签的重要性以及当前模型在理解声音动作方面的局限性。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了EPIC-SOUNDS数据集，包含从第一视角视频中提取的音频标注，用于识别和分类与动作相关的声音事件。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集缺乏对音频驱动动作的系统标注，且音频与视觉模态的关联分析不足，需构建大规模音频标注数据集以推动音频识别与跨模态研究。
AI.method: 设计标注流程，由标注者对音频片段进行时间标注并描述对应动作，通过聚类自由描述生成类别标签；针对碰撞动作收集物体材质标注并结合视频验证，构建包含78.4k分类片段和39.2k未分类片段的数据集，并评估音频及音视频模型性能。
AI.result: 数据集涵盖44个动作类别，分析显示音频事件存在时间重叠，音频与视觉标签存在相关性，当前模型在纯音频理解上存在局限性，且音频标注对模型训练具有重要价值。
AI.conclusion: EPIC-SOUNDS为音频驱动的动作识别提供了基准数据集，揭示了当前模型对纯音频理解的不足，强调了跨模态分析与更精细标注的重要性。

title: Deep Dependency Networks for Multi-Label Classification
title_zh: 用于多标签分类的深度依赖网络
abstract: We propose a simple approach which combines the strengths of probabilistic graphical models and deep learning architectures for solving the multi-label classification task, focusing specifically on image and video data. First, we show that the performance of previous approaches that combine Markov Random Fields with neural networks can be modestly improved by leveraging more powerful methods such as iterative join graph propagation, integer linear programming, and $\ell_1$ regularization-based structure learning. Then we propose a new modeling framework called deep dependency networks, which augments a dependency network, a model that is easy to train and learns more accurate dependencies but is limited to Gibbs sampling for inference, to the output layer of a neural network. We show that despite its simplicity, jointly learning this new architecture yields significant improvements in performance over the baseline neural network. In particular, our experimental evaluation on three video activity classification datasets: Charades, Textually Annotated Cooking Scenes (TACoS), and Wetlab, and three multi-label image classification datasets: MS-COCO, PASCAL VOC, and NUS-WIDE show that deep dependency networks are almost always superior to pure neural architectures that do not use dependency networks.
summary: We propose a simple approach which combines the strengths of probabilistic graphical models and deep learning architectures for solving the multi-label classification task, focusing specifically on image and video data. First, we show that the performance of previous approaches that combine Markov Random Fields with neural networks can be modestly improved by leveraging more powerful methods such as iterative join graph propagation, integer linear programming, and $\ell_1$ regularization-based structure learning. Then we propose a new modeling framework called deep dependency networks, which augments a dependency network, a model that is easy to train and learns more accurate dependencies but is limited to Gibbs sampling for inference, to the output layer of a neural network. We show that despite its simplicity, jointly learning this new architecture yields significant improvements in performance over the baseline neural network. In particular, our experimental evaluation on three video activity classification datasets: Charades, Textually Annotated Cooking Scenes (TACoS), and Wetlab, and three multi-label image classification datasets: MS-COCO, PASCAL VOC, and NUS-WIDE show that deep dependency networks are almost always superior to pure neural architectures that do not use dependency networks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单的方法，结合了概率图模型和深度学习架构的优势来解决多标签分类任务，特别关注图像和视频数据。首先，我们表明，通过利用更强大的方法（例如迭代连接图传播、整数线性规划和基于 $\ell_1$ 正则化的结构学习），可以适度提高先前将马尔可夫随机场与神经网络相结合的方法的性能。然后，我们提出了一种称为深度依赖网络的新建模框架，它增强了依赖网络，这是一种易于训练并学习更准确依赖关系的模型，但仅限于用于推理的吉布斯采样到神经网络的输出层。我们表明，尽管它很简单，但共同学习这种新架构与基线神经网络相比，性能有了显着提高。特别是，我们对三个视频活动分类数据集：Charades、文本注释烹饪场景 (TACoS) 和 Wetlab，以及三个多标签图像分类数据集：MS-COCO、PASCAL VOC 和 NUS-WIDE 的实验评估表明，深度依赖网络几乎总是优于不使用依赖网络的纯神经架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合概率图模型与深度学习架构的深度依赖网络（Deep Dependency Networks），用于改进多标签分类任务中的图像和视频数据处理。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将马尔可夫随机场与神经网络结合的效果有限，且依赖网络因仅支持吉布斯采样推理而存在不足。作者希望通过更强大的优化方法（如整数线性规划、ℓ₁正则化）和新型框架提升性能。
AI.method: 提出深度依赖网络框架，将依赖网络扩展至神经网络输出层，通过联合学习优化依赖关系建模，替代原有基于吉布斯采样的推理方式。
AI.result: 在Charades、TACoS等三个视频数据集和MS-COCO、PASCAL VOC等三个图像数据集的实验中，深度依赖网络在多标签分类任务中显著优于纯神经网络基线。
AI.conclusion: 深度依赖网络通过融合深度学习与依赖网络建模，在多标签分类任务中实现了性能突破，验证了联合学习框架的有效性。

search_text: Deep Dependency Networks for Multi-Label Classification 用于多标签分类的深度依赖网络 We propose a simple approach which combines the strengths of probabilistic graphical models and deep learning architectures for solving the multi-label classification task, focusing specifically on image and video data. First, we show that the performance of previous approaches that combine Markov Random Fields with neural networks can be modestly improved by leveraging more powerful methods such as iterative join graph propagation, integer linear programming, and $\ell_1$ regularization-based structure learning. Then we propose a new modeling framework called deep dependency networks, which augments a dependency network, a model that is easy to train and learns more accurate dependencies but is limited to Gibbs sampling for inference, to the output layer of a neural network. We show that despite its simplicity, jointly learning this new architecture yields significant improvements in performance over the baseline neural network. In particular, our experimental evaluation on three video activity classification datasets: Charades, Textually Annotated Cooking Scenes (TACoS), and Wetlab, and three multi-label image classification datasets: MS-COCO, PASCAL VOC, and NUS-WIDE show that deep dependency networks are almost always superior to pure neural architectures that do not use dependency networks. 我们提出了一种简单的方法，结合了概率图模型和深度学习架构的优势来解决多标签分类任务，特别关注图像和视频数据。首先，我们表明，通过利用更强大的方法（例如迭代连接图传播、整数线性规划和基于 $\ell_1$ 正则化的结构学习），可以适度提高先前将马尔可夫随机场与神经网络相结合的方法的性能。然后，我们提出了一种称为深度依赖网络的新建模框架，它增强了依赖网络，这是一种易于训练并学习更准确依赖关系的模型，但仅限于用于推理的吉布斯采样到神经网络的输出层。我们表明，尽管它很简单，但共同学习这种新架构与基线神经网络相比，性能有了显着提高。特别是，我们对三个视频活动分类数据集：Charades、文本注释烹饪场景 (TACoS) 和 Wetlab，以及三个多标签图像分类数据集：MS-COCO、PASCAL VOC 和 NUS-WIDE 的实验评估表明，深度依赖网络几乎总是优于不使用依赖网络的纯神经架构。 本文提出了一种结合概率图模型与深度学习架构的深度依赖网络（Deep Dependency Networks），用于改进多标签分类任务中的图像和视频数据处理。 Shivvrat Arya,Yu Xiang,Vibhav Gogate cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Parameterized Algorithms for Colored Clustering
title_zh: 彩色聚类的参数化算法
abstract: In the Colored Clustering problem, one is asked to cluster edge-colored (hyper-)graphs whose colors represent interaction types. More specifically, the goal is to select as many edges as possible without choosing two edges that share an endpoint and are colored differently. Equivalently, the goal can also be described as assigning colors to the vertices in a way that fits the edge-coloring as well as possible. As this problem is NP-hard, we build on previous work by studying its parameterized complexity. We give a $2^{\mathcal O(k)} \cdot n^{\mathcal O(1)}$-time algorithm where $k$ is the number of edges to be selected and $n$ the number of vertices. We also prove the existence of a problem kernel of size $\mathcal O(k^{5/2} )$, resolving an open problem posed in the literature. We consider parameters that are smaller than $k$, the number of edges to be selected, and $r$, the number of edges that can be deleted. Such smaller parameters are obtained by considering the difference between $k$ or $r$ and some lower bound on these values. We give both algorithms and lower bounds for Colored Clustering with such parameterizations. Finally, we settle the parameterized complexity of Colored Clustering with respect to structural graph parameters by showing that it is $W[1]$-hard with respect to both vertex cover number and tree-cut width, but fixed-parameter tractable with respect to slim tree-cut width.
summary: In the Colored Clustering problem, one is asked to cluster edge-colored (hyper-)graphs whose colors represent interaction types. More specifically, the goal is to select as many edges as possible without choosing two edges that share an endpoint and are colored differently. Equivalently, the goal can also be described as assigning colors to the vertices in a way that fits the edge-coloring as well as possible. As this problem is NP-hard, we build on previous work by studying its parameterized complexity. We give a $2^{\mathcal O(k)} \cdot n^{\mathcal O(1)}$-time algorithm where $k$ is the number of edges to be selected and $n$ the number of vertices. We also prove the existence of a problem kernel of size $\mathcal O(k^{5/2} )$, resolving an open problem posed in the literature. We consider parameters that are smaller than $k$, the number of edges to be selected, and $r$, the number of edges that can be deleted. Such smaller parameters are obtained by considering the difference between $k$ or $r$ and some lower bound on these values. We give both algorithms and lower bounds for Colored Clustering with such parameterizations. Finally, we settle the parameterized complexity of Colored Clustering with respect to structural graph parameters by showing that it is $W[1]$-hard with respect to both vertex cover number and tree-cut width, but fixed-parameter tractable with respect to slim tree-cut width.
abstract_zh: 在彩色聚类问题中，要求对边缘彩色（超）图进行聚类，其颜色代表交互类型。更具体地说，目标是选择尽可能多的边，而不选择共享端点且颜色不同的两条边。同样，目标也可以描述为以尽可能适合边缘着色的方式为顶点分配颜色。由于这个问题是 NP 难题，我们通过研究其参数化复杂性来建立之前的工作。我们给出一个 $2^{\mathcal O(k)} \cdot n^{\mathcal O(1)}$ 时间算法，其中 $k$ 是要选择的边数，$n$ 是顶点数。我们还证明了大小为 $\mathcal O(k^{5/2} )$ 的问题内核的存在，解决了文献中提出的开放问题。我们考虑小于$k$（要选择的边数）和$r$（可以删除的边数）的参数。这些较小的参数是通过考虑 $k$ 或 $r$ 之间的差异以及这些值的一些下限来获得的。我们给出了具有此类参数化的彩色聚类的算法和下界。最后，我们解决了彩色聚类相对于结构图参数的参数化复杂性，表明它在顶点覆盖数和树切割宽度方面都是 $W[1]$-hard，但在细树切割宽度方面是固定参数易处理的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了彩色聚类问题的参数化算法，旨在通过参数化分析解决该NP难问题。
AI.motivation: 彩色聚类问题在图论中具有挑战性，因其NP难特性需探索参数化方法以提高计算效率，并解决现有开放问题。
AI.method: 提出基于边数k的固定参数 tractable 算法，构建问题核并分析更小参数（如顶点覆盖数、树割宽度）的复杂性。
AI.result: 给出时间复杂度为$2^{\\mathcal O(k)} \\cdot n^{\\mathcal O(1)}$的算法，证明$O(k^{5/2})$规模的问题核，并确定其对结构参数的复杂性分类。
AI.conclusion: 解决了彩色聚类的开放问题，明确了其在结构参数下的参数化复杂性，为相关领域提供理论支持。

Equivalently, the goal can also be described as assigning colors to the vertices in a way that fits the edge-coloring as well as possible. authors_text: Chun-Wun Cheng,Christina Runkel,Lihao Liu,Raymond H Chan,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Angelica I Aviles-Rivero
title: Continuous U-Net: Faster, Greater and Noiseless
title_zh: 连续 U-Net：更快、更强、无噪音
abstract: Image segmentation is a fundamental task in image analysis and clinical practice. The current state-of-the-art techniques are based on U-shape type encoder-decoder networks with skip connections, called U-Net. Despite the powerful performance reported by existing U-Net type networks, they suffer from several major limitations. Issues include the hard coding of the receptive field size, compromising the performance and computational cost, as well as the fact that they do not account for inherent noise in the data. They have problems associated with discrete layers, and do not offer any theoretical underpinning. In this work we introduce continuous U-Net, a novel family of networks for image segmentation. Firstly, continuous U-Net is a continuous deep neural network that introduces new dynamic blocks modelled by second order ordinary differential equations. Secondly, we provide theoretical guarantees for our network demonstrating faster convergence, higher robustness and less sensitivity to noise. Thirdly, we derive qualitative measures to tailor-made segmentation tasks. We demonstrate, through extensive numerical and visual results, that our model outperforms existing U-Net blocks for several medical image segmentation benchmarking datasets.
summary: Image segmentation is a fundamental task in image analysis and clinical practice. The current state-of-the-art techniques are based on U-shape type encoder-decoder networks with skip connections, called U-Net. Despite the powerful performance reported by existing U-Net type networks, they suffer from several major limitations. Issues include the hard coding of the receptive field size, compromising the performance and computational cost, as well as the fact that they do not account for inherent noise in the data. They have problems associated with discrete layers, and do not offer any theoretical underpinning. In this work we introduce continuous U-Net, a novel family of networks for image segmentation. Firstly, continuous U-Net is a continuous deep neural network that introduces new dynamic blocks modelled by second order ordinary differential equations. Secondly, we provide theoretical guarantees for our network demonstrating faster convergence, higher robustness and less sensitivity to noise. Thirdly, we derive qualitative measures to tailor-made segmentation tasks. We demonstrate, through extensive numerical and visual results, that our model outperforms existing U-Net blocks for several medical image segmentation benchmarking datasets.
abstract_zh: 图像分割是图像分析和临床实践中的一项基本任务。当前最先进的技术基于具有跳跃连接的 U 型编码器-解码器网络，称为 U-Net。尽管现有 U-Net 类型网络具有强大的性能，但它们仍存在几个主要限制。问题包括感受野大小的硬编码、损害性能和计算成本，以及它们没有考虑数据中固有的噪声。它们存在与离散层相关的问题，并且不提供任何理论基础。在这项工作中，我们介绍了连续 U-Net，这是一种用于图像分割的新颖网络系列。首先，连续U-Net是一种连续深度神经网络，引入了由二阶常微分方程建模的新动态块。其次，我们为我们的网络展示更快的收敛性、更高的鲁棒性和对噪声的敏感性更低提供了理论保证。第三，我们得出了定制分割任务的定性衡量标准。我们通过大量的数值和视觉结果证明，我们的模型在多个医学图像分割基准数据集上的性能优于现有的 U-Net 模块。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Continuous U-Net的新型图像分割网络，旨在解决传统U-Net在计算效率、噪声鲁棒性和理论支撑方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有U-Net模型存在感受野固定、计算成本高、无法处理数据噪声及缺乏理论依据等局限性，需改进以提升医学图像分割性能。
AI.method: 引入连续深度神经网络，通过二阶常微分方程建模动态模块，并提供收敛性、鲁棒性及噪声不敏感性的理论证明，同时设计任务定制化评估指标。
AI.result: 在多个医学图像分割基准数据集上，Continuous U-Net在数值和视觉结果上均优于传统U-Net模型。
AI.conclusion: Continuous U-Net通过连续化建模和理论支撑，为医学图像分割提供了更高效、鲁棒且噪声容忍度更高的解决方案。

Thirdly, we derive qualitative measures to tailor-made segmentation tasks. We demonstrate, through extensive numerical and visual results, that our model outperforms existing U-Net blocks for several medical image segmentation benchmarking datasets. 图像分割是图像分析和临床实践中的一项基本任务。当前最先进的技术基于具有跳跃连接的 U 型编码器-解码器网络，称为 U-Net。尽管现有 U-Net 类型网络具有强大的性能，但它们仍存在几个主要限制。问题包括感受野大小的硬编码、损害性能和计算成本，以及它们没有考虑数据中固有的噪声。它们存在与离散层相关的问题，并且不提供任何理论基础。在这项工作中，我们介绍了连续 U-Net，这是一种用于图像分割的新颖网络系列。首先，连续U-Net是一种连续深度神经网络，引入了由二阶常微分方程建模的新动态块。其次，我们为我们的网络展示更快的收敛性、更高的鲁棒性和对噪声的敏感性更低提供了理论保证。第三，我们得出了定制分割任务的定性衡量标准。我们通过大量的数值和视觉结果证明，我们的模型在多个医学图像分割基准数据集上的性能优于现有的 U-Net 模块。 本文提出了一种名为Continuous U-Net的新型图像分割网络，旨在解决传统U-Net在计算效率、噪声鲁棒性和理论支撑方面的不足。 Chun-Wun Cheng,Christina Runkel,Lihao Liu,Raymond H Chan,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Angelica I Aviles-Rivero cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Zejia Weng,Xitong Yang,Ang Li,Zuxuan Wu,Yu-Gang Jiang
title: Open-VCLIP: Transforming CLIP to an Open-vocabulary Video Model via Interpolated Weight Optimization
title_zh: Open-VCLIP：通过插值权重优化将 CLIP 转换为开放词汇视频模型
abstract: Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) has demonstrated impressive zero-shot learning abilities for image understanding, yet limited effort has been made to investigate CLIP for zero-shot video recognition. We introduce Open-VCLIP, a simple yet effective approach that transforms CLIP into a strong zero-shot video classifier that can recognize unseen actions and events at test time. Our framework extends CLIP with minimal modifications to model spatial-temporal relationships in videos, making it a specialized video classifier, while striving for generalization. We formally show that training an Open-VCLIP is equivalent to continual learning with zero historical data. To address this problem, we propose Interpolated Weight Optimization, which utilizes the benefit of weight interpolation in both training and test time. We evaluate our method on three popular and challenging action recognition datasets following various zero-shot evaluation protocols and we demonstrate our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by clear margins. In particular, we achieve 87.9%, 58.3%, 81.1% zero-shot accuracy on UCF, HMDB and Kinetics-600 respectively, outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 8.3%, 7.8% and 12.2%. Code is released at https://github.com/wengzejia1/Open-VCLIP.
summary: Contrastive Language-Image Pretraining (CLIP) has demonstrated impressive zero-shot learning abilities for image understanding, yet limited effort has been made to investigate CLIP for zero-shot video recognition. We introduce Open-VCLIP, a simple yet effective approach that transforms CLIP into a strong zero-shot video classifier that can recognize unseen actions and events at test time. Our framework extends CLIP with minimal modifications to model spatial-temporal relationships in videos, making it a specialized video classifier, while striving for generalization. We formally show that training an Open-VCLIP is equivalent to continual learning with zero historical data. To address this problem, we propose Interpolated Weight Optimization, which utilizes the benefit of weight interpolation in both training and test time. We evaluate our method on three popular and challenging action recognition datasets following various zero-shot evaluation protocols and we demonstrate our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by clear margins. In particular, we achieve 87.9%, 58.3%, 81.1% zero-shot accuracy on UCF, HMDB and Kinetics-600 respectively, outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 8.3%, 7.8% and 12.2%. Code is released at https://github.com/wengzejia1/Open-VCLIP.
abstract_zh: 对比语言图像预训练 (CLIP) 在图像理解方面表现出了令人印象深刻的零样本学习能力，但在零样本视频识别方面研究 CLIP 的努力却很有限。我们引入了 Open-VCLIP，这是一种简单而有效的方法，可将 CLIP 转变为强大的零样本视频分类器，可以在测试时识别看不见的动作和事件。我们的框架以最小的修改扩展了 CLIP，以对视频中的时空关系进行建模，使其成为专门的视频分类器，同时努力实现泛化。我们正式证明，训练 Open-VCLIP 相当于使用零历史数据进行持续学习。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了插值权重优化，它在训练和测试时都利用了权重插值的优势。我们按照各种零样本评估协议在三个流行且具有挑战性的动作识别数据集上评估我们的方法，并证明我们的方法明显优于最先进的方法。特别是，我们在 UCF、HMDB 和 Kinetics-600 上分别实现了 87.9%、58.3%、81.1% 的零射击精度，比最先进的方法高出 8.3%、7.8% 和 12.2%。代码发布于https://github.com/wengzejia1/Open-VCLIP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Open-VCLIP方法，通过插值权重优化将CLIP模型转化为无需历史数据的开放词汇视频分类器，实现对未见动作和事件的零样本识别。
AI.motivation: CLIP在图像理解中展现强大零样本学习能力，但视频领域缺乏类似研究。视频包含时空关系且需泛化能力，需设计简单有效的方法扩展CLIP至视频任务。
AI.method: 在CLIP基础上增加时空关系建模，提出插值权重优化方法，在训练和测试时利用权重插值优势，通过连续学习框架实现零样本视频分类。
AI.result: 在UCF、HMDB和Kinetics-600数据集上分别达到87.9%、58.3%、81.1%的零样本准确率，较现有方法提升8.3%、7.8%和12.2%。
AI.conclusion: Open-VCLIP通过简单修改和插值优化有效扩展CLIP至视频领域，在多个数据集上显著超越现有方法，代码已开源。

authors_text: Jihoon Tack,Subin Kim,Sihyun Yu,Jaeho Lee,Jinwoo Shin,Jonathan Richard Schwarz
title: Learning Large-scale Neural Fields via Context Pruned Meta-Learning
title_zh: 通过上下文修剪元学习学习大规模神经场
comment: Published as a conference proceeding for NeurIPS 2023
comments: Published as a conference proceeding for NeurIPS 2023
abstract: We introduce an efficient optimization-based meta-learning technique for large-scale neural field training by realizing significant memory savings through automated online context point selection. This is achieved by focusing each learning step on the subset of data with the highest expected immediate improvement in model quality, resulting in the almost instantaneous modeling of global structure and subsequent refinement of high-frequency details. We further improve the quality of our meta-learned initialization by introducing a bootstrap correction resulting in the minimization of any error introduced by reduced context sets while simultaneously mitigating the well-known myopia of optimization-based meta-learning. Finally, we show how gradient re-scaling at meta-test time allows the learning of extremely high-quality neural fields in significantly shortened optimization procedures. Our framework is model-agnostic, intuitive, straightforward to implement, and shows significant reconstruction improvements for a wide range of signals. We provide an extensive empirical evaluation on nine datasets across multiple multiple modalities, demonstrating state-of-the-art results while providing additional insight through careful analysis of the algorithmic components constituting our method. Code is available at https://github.com/jihoontack/GradNCP
summary: We introduce an efficient optimization-based meta-learning technique for large-scale neural field training by realizing significant memory savings through automated online context point selection. This is achieved by focusing each learning step on the subset of data with the highest expected immediate improvement in model quality, resulting in the almost instantaneous modeling of global structure and subsequent refinement of high-frequency details. We further improve the quality of our meta-learned initialization by introducing a bootstrap correction resulting in the minimization of any error introduced by reduced context sets while simultaneously mitigating the well-known myopia of optimization-based meta-learning. Finally, we show how gradient re-scaling at meta-test time allows the learning of extremely high-quality neural fields in significantly shortened optimization procedures. Our framework is model-agnostic, intuitive, straightforward to implement, and shows significant reconstruction improvements for a wide range of signals. We provide an extensive empirical evaluation on nine datasets across multiple multiple modalities, demonstrating state-of-the-art results while providing additional insight through careful analysis of the algorithmic components constituting our method. Code is available at https://github.com/jihoontack/GradNCP
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种基于优化的高效元学习技术，用于大规模神经场训练，通过自动在线上下文点选择实现显着的内存节省。这是通过将每个学习步骤集中在模型质量具有最高预期即时改进的数据子集上来实现的，从而几乎可以即时对全局结构进行建模并随后对高频细节进行细化。我们通过引入引导校正来进一步提高元学习初始化的质量，从而最大限度地减少由减少的上下文集引入的任何错误，同时减轻基于优化的元学习的众所周知的短视。最后，我们展示了元测试时的梯度重新缩放如何允许在显着缩短的优化过程中学习极高质量的神经场。我们的框架与模型无关、直观、易于实施，并且对各种信号显示出显着的重建改进。我们对跨多种模式的九个数据集进行了广泛的实证评估，展示了最先进的结果，同时通过仔细分析构成我们方法的算法组件提供了额外的见解。代码可在 https://github.com/jihoontack/GradNCP 获取

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种高效的基于优化的元学习技术，用于大规模神经场训练，通过自动在线上下文点选择实现显著的内存节省。
AI.motivation: 大规模神经场训练面临内存消耗大、训练效率低的问题，传统方法难以在保证质量的同时提升训练效率。
AI.method: 通过自动选择对模型质量提升贡献最大的上下文点，实现高效训练；引入引导校正以减少上下文集误差并缓解元学习的短视问题；在元测试时进行梯度重缩放，以提升训练质量。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现了最先进的重建效果，展示了该方法在不同模态信号中的广泛适用性和显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 该框架具有模型无关性、易于实现，并且在大规模神经场训练中表现出色，为相关研究提供了新的思路和方法。

authors_text: Seunghyun Lee,Da Young Lee,Sujeong Im,Nan Hee Kim,Sung-Min Park
title: Clinical Decision Transformer: Intended Treatment Recommendation through Goal Prompting
title_zh: 临床决策转换器：通过目标提示提出预期治疗建议
abstract: With recent achievements in tasks requiring context awareness, foundation models have been adopted to treat large-scale data from electronic health record (EHR) systems. However, previous clinical recommender systems based on foundation models have a limited purpose of imitating clinicians' behavior and do not directly consider a problem of missing values. In this paper, we propose Clinical Decision Transformer (CDT), a recommender system that generates a sequence of medications to reach a desired range of clinical states given as goal prompts. For this, we conducted goal-conditioned sequencing, which generated a subsequence of treatment history with prepended future goal state, and trained the CDT to model sequential medications required to reach that goal state. For contextual embedding over intra-admission and inter-admissions, we adopted a GPT-based architecture with an admission-wise attention mask and column embedding. In an experiment, we extracted a diabetes dataset from an EHR system, which contained treatment histories of 4788 patients. We observed that the CDT achieved the intended treatment effect according to goal prompt ranges (e.g., NormalA1c, LowerA1c, and HigherA1c), contrary to the case with behavior cloning. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to explore clinical recommendations from the perspective of goal prompting. See https://clinical-decision-transformer.github.io for code and additional information.

abstract_zh: 随着最近在需要上下文感知的任务中取得的成就，基础模型已被采用来处理来自电子健康记录（EHR）系统的大规模数据。然而，先前基于基础模型的临床推荐系统的模仿临床医生行为的目的有限，并且没有直接考虑缺失值的问题。在本文中，我们提出了临床决策转换器（CDT），这是一种推荐系统，可生成一系列药物以达到作为目标提示给出的所需临床状态范围。为此，我们进行了目标条件测序，生成了预先设定未来目标状态的治疗历史子序列，并训练 CDT 来对达到该目标状态所需的顺序药物进行建模。对于准入内和准入间的上下文嵌入，我们采用了基于 GPT 的架构，具有准入注意掩模和列嵌入。在一项实验中，我们从 EHR 系统中提取了糖尿病数据集，其中包含 4788 名患者的治疗历史。我们观察到CDT根据目标提示范围（例如NormalA1c、LowerA1c和HigherA1c）达到了预期的治疗效果，这与行为克隆的情况相反。据我们所知，这是第一项从目标提示角度探讨临床建议的研究。有关代码和其他信息，请参阅 https://clinical-decision-transformer.github.io。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于目标提示的临床决策Transformer（CDT），通过生成治疗序列以达到指定的临床状态目标，解决传统临床推荐系统对缺失值处理不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于基础模型的临床推荐系统仅模仿医生行为，未能直接处理电子健康记录（EHR）中的缺失值问题，且缺乏对目标导向治疗的探索。
AI.method: 采用GPT架构结合住院级注意力掩码和列嵌入，通过目标条件序列生成（将未来目标状态前置到治疗历史中），训练CDT模型生成达到目标状态所需的治疗序列。
AI.result: 在4788名糖尿病患者的EHR数据集上，CDT根据目标提示（如NormalA1c、LowerA1c）实现了预期治疗效果，优于行为克隆方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次从目标提示视角探索临床推荐，为处理EHR缺失值和目标导向治疗提供了新思路。

search_text: Clinical Decision Transformer: Intended Treatment Recommendation through Goal Prompting 临床决策转换器：通过目标提示提出预期治疗建议 With recent achievements in tasks requiring context awareness, foundation models have been adopted to treat large-scale data from electronic health record (EHR) systems. However, previous clinical recommender systems based on foundation models have a limited purpose of imitating clinicians' behavior and do not directly consider a problem of missing values. In this paper, we propose Clinical Decision Transformer (CDT), a recommender system that generates a sequence of medications to reach a desired range of clinical states given as goal prompts. For this, we conducted goal-conditioned sequencing, which generated a subsequence of treatment history with prepended future goal state, and trained the CDT to model sequential medications required to reach that goal state. For contextual embedding over intra-admission and inter-admissions, we adopted a GPT-based architecture with an admission-wise attention mask and column embedding. In an experiment, we extracted a diabetes dataset from an EHR system, which contained treatment histories of 4788 patients. We observed that the CDT achieved the intended treatment effect according to goal prompt ranges (e.g., NormalA1c, LowerA1c, and HigherA1c), contrary to the case with behavior cloning. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to explore clinical recommendations from the perspective of goal prompting. title: The Investment Management Game: Extending the Scope of the Notion of Core
title_zh: 投资管理游戏：扩展核心概念的范围
comment: 16 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.04903
comments: 16 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.04903
abstract: The core is a dominant solution concept in economics and cooperative game theory; it is predominantly used for profit, equivalently cost or utility, sharing. This paper demonstrates the versatility of this notion by proposing a completely different use: in a so-called investment management game, which is a game against nature rather than a cooperative game. This game has only one agent whose strategy set is all possible ways of distributing her money among investment firms. The agent wants to pick a strategy such that in each of exponentially many future scenarios, sufficient money is available in the right firms so she can buy an optimal investment for that scenario. Such a strategy constitutes a core imputation under a broad interpretation, though traditional formal framework, of the core. Our game is defined on perfect graphs, since the maximum stable set problem can be solved in polynomial time for such graphs. We completely characterize the core of this game, analogous to Shapley and Shubik characterization of the core of the assignment game. A key difference is the following technical novelty: whereas their characterization follows from total unimodularity, ours follows from total dual integrality

This game has only one agent whose strategy set is all possible ways of distributing her money among investment firms. Such a strategy constitutes a core imputation under a broad interpretation, though traditional formal framework, of the core. Our game is defined on perfect graphs, since the maximum stable set problem can be solved in polynomial time for such graphs. We completely characterize the core of this game, analogous to Shapley and Shubik characterization of the core of the assignment game. A key difference is the following technical novelty: whereas their characterization follows from total unimodularity, ours follows from total dual integrality
abstract_zh: 其核心是经济学中的主导解概念和合作博弈论；它主要用于利润，相当于成本或效用，共享。本文通过提出完全不同的用途来证明这一概念的多功能性：在所谓的投资管理游戏中，这是对抗自然的游戏而不是合作游戏。该游戏只有一名代理人，其策略集是在投资公司之间分配资金的所有可能方式。代理人希望选择一种策略，以便在未来指数级增长的每种情况下，合适的公司都有足够的资金，以便她可以为该情况购买最佳投资。尽管是传统的正式框架，但这种战略构成了对核心的广义解释下的核心归责。我们的游戏是在完美图上定义的，因为最大稳定集问题可以在此类图的多项式时间内解决。我们完全表征了这个游戏的核心，类似于 Shapley 和 Shubik 对作业游戏核心的表征。一个关键的区别在于以下技术新颖性：它们的表征来自于完​​全单模性，而我们的表征来自于完​​全对偶完整性

AI.tldr: 本文将博弈论中的核心概念扩展至投资管理领域，提出一种新的非合作博弈模型，用于解决资金分配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统核心概念主要用于利润分配，本文旨在证明其在投资管理场景中的适用性，拓展理论边界。
AI.method: 定义基于完美图的投资管理博弈，利用对偶完全积分性理论构建核心特征刻画方法。
AI.result: 完全表征了该博弈的核心结构，与传统分配博弈的Shapley-Shubik表征形成对比。
AI.conclusion: 核心概念可适用于非合作博弈场景，且其数学基础可从单纯形理论扩展至对偶积分性框架。

authors_text: Basheera M. Mahmmod,Sadiq H. Abdulhussain,Tomáš Suk
title: Accelerated and Improved Stabilization for High Order Moments of Racah Polynomials
title_zh: Racah 多项式高阶矩的加速和改进稳定性
abstract: One of the most effective orthogonal moments, discrete Racah polynomials (DRPs) and their moments are used in many disciplines of sciences, including image processing, and computer vision. Moments are the projections of a signal on the polynomial basis functions. Racah polynomials were introduced by Wilson and modified by Zhu for image processing and they are orthogonal on a discrete set of samples. However, when the moment order is high, they experience the issue of numerical instability. In this paper, we propose a new algorithm for the computation of DRPs coefficients called Improved Stabilization (ImSt). In the proposed algorithm, {the DRP plane is partitioned into four parts, which are asymmetric because they rely on the values of the polynomial size and the DRP parameters.} The logarithmic gamma function is utilized to compute the initial values, which empower the computation of the initial value for a wide range of DRP parameter values as well as large size of the polynomials. In addition, a new formula is used to compute the values of the initial sets based on the initial value. Moreover, we optimized the use of the stabilizing condition in specific parts of the algorithm. ImSt works for wider range of parameters until higher degree than the current algorithms. We compare it with the other methods in a number of experiments.
summary: One of the most effective orthogonal moments, discrete Racah polynomials (DRPs) and their moments are used in many disciplines of sciences, including image processing, and computer vision. Moments are the projections of a signal on the polynomial basis functions. Racah polynomials were introduced by Wilson and modified by Zhu for image processing and they are orthogonal on a discrete set of samples. However, when the moment order is high, they experience the issue of numerical instability. In this paper, we propose a new algorithm for the computation of DRPs coefficients called Improved Stabilization (ImSt). In the proposed algorithm, {the DRP plane is partitioned into four parts, which are asymmetric because they rely on the values of the polynomial size and the DRP parameters.} The logarithmic gamma function is utilized to compute the initial values, which empower the computation of the initial value for a wide range of DRP parameter values as well as large size of the polynomials. In addition, a new formula is used to compute the values of the initial sets based on the initial value. Moreover, we optimized the use of the stabilizing condition in specific parts of the algorithm. ImSt works for wider range of parameters until higher degree than the current algorithms. We compare it with the other methods in a number of experiments.
abstract_zh: 离散拉卡多项式 (DRP) 及其矩是最有效的正交矩之一，用于许多科学学科，包括图像处理和计算机视觉。矩是信号在多项式基函数上的投影。 Racah 多项式由 Wilson 引入并由 Zhu 修改用于图像处理，并且它们在一组离散样本上是正交的。然而，当矩阶数较高时，它们会遇到数值不稳定的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种计算 DRP 系数的新算法，称为改进稳定性 (ImSt)。在所提出的算法中，{DRP平面被划分为四个部分，这些部分是不对称的，因为它们依赖于多项式大小和DRP参数的值。}利用对数伽马函数来计算初始值，这使得能够计算大范围的DRP参数值以及大尺寸的多项式的初始值。此外，还使用新的公式根据初始值计算初始集合的值。此外，我们还优化了算法特定部分中稳定条件的使用。 ImSt 适用于更广泛的参数，直到比当前算法更高的程度。我们在许多实验中将其与其他方法进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的稳定化算法ImSt，用于解决高阶Racah多项式矩计算中的数值不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 离散Racah多项式在图像处理等领域广泛应用，但其高阶矩计算存在数值不稳定问题，限制了实际应用效果。
AI.method: 将DRP平面划分为四个非对称区域，结合对数伽马函数计算初始值，并优化稳定条件公式，实现更宽参数范围的高效计算。
AI.result: 实验表明ImSt算法在参数范围和多项式阶数上均优于现有方法，有效提升了计算稳定性与准确性。
AI.conclusion: 改进的稳定化算法成功解决了高阶Racah多项式矩计算的数值稳定性问题，为相关领域应用提供了更可靠的计算工具。
