search_text: Accelerated and Improved Stabilization for High Order Moments of Racah Polynomials Racah 多项式高阶矩的加速和改进稳定性 One of the most effective orthogonal moments, discrete Racah polynomials (DRPs) and their moments are used in many disciplines of sciences, including image processing, and computer vision. Moments are the projections of a signal on the polynomial basis functions. Racah polynomials were introduced by Wilson and modified by Zhu for image processing and they are orthogonal on a discrete set of samples. However, when the moment order is high, they experience the issue of numerical instability. In this paper, we propose a new algorithm for the computation of DRPs coefficients called Improved Stabilization (ImSt). In the proposed algorithm, {the DRP plane is partitioned into four parts, which are asymmetric because they rely on the values of the polynomial size and the DRP parameters.} The logarithmic gamma function is utilized to compute the initial values, which empower the computation of the initial value for a wide range of DRP parameter values as well as large size of the polynomials. In addition, a new formula is used to compute the values of the initial sets based on the initial value. Moreover, we optimized the use of the stabilizing condition in specific parts of the algorithm. ImSt works for wider range of parameters until higher degree than the current algorithms. We compare it with the other methods in a number of experiments. 离散拉卡多项式 (DRP) 及其矩是最有效的正交矩之一，用于许多科学学科，包括图像处理和计算机视觉。矩是信号在多项式基函数上的投影。 Racah 多项式由 Wilson 引入并由 Zhu 修改用于图像处理，并且它们在一组离散样本上是正交的。然而，当矩阶数较高时，它们会遇到数值不稳定的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种计算 DRP 系数的新算法，称为改进稳定性 (ImSt)。在所提出的算法中，{DRP平面被划分为四个部分，这些部分是不对称的，因为它们依赖于多项式大小和DRP参数的值。}利用对数伽马函数来计算初始值，这使得能够计算大范围的DRP参数值以及大尺寸的多项式的初始值。此外，还使用新的公式根据初始值计算初始集合的值。此外，我们还优化了算法特定部分中稳定条件的使用。 ImSt 适用于更广泛的参数，直到比当前算法更高的程度。我们在许多实验中将其与其他方法进行了比较。 本文提出改进的稳定化算法ImSt，用于解决高阶Racah多项式矩计算中的数值不稳定性问题。 Basheera M. Mahmmod,Sadiq H. Abdulhussain,Tomáš Suk math.NA,cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Stroke-based Rendering: From Heuristics to Deep Learning
title_zh: 基于笔划的渲染：从启发式到深度学习
abstract: In the last few years, artistic image-making with deep learning models has gained a considerable amount of traction. A large number of these models operate directly in the pixel space and generate raster images. This is however not how most humans would produce artworks, for example, by planning a sequence of shapes and strokes to draw. Recent developments in deep learning methods help to bridge the gap between stroke-based paintings and pixel photo generation. With this survey, we aim to provide a structured introduction and understanding of common challenges and approaches in stroke-based rendering algorithms. These algorithms range from simple rule-based heuristics to stroke optimization and deep reinforcement agents, trained to paint images with differentiable vector graphics and neural rendering.
summary: In the last few years, artistic image-making with deep learning models has gained a considerable amount of traction. A large number of these models operate directly in the pixel space and generate raster images. This is however not how most humans would produce artworks, for example, by planning a sequence of shapes and strokes to draw. Recent developments in deep learning methods help to bridge the gap between stroke-based paintings and pixel photo generation. With this survey, we aim to provide a structured introduction and understanding of common challenges and approaches in stroke-based rendering algorithms. These algorithms range from simple rule-based heuristics to stroke optimization and deep reinforcement agents, trained to paint images with differentiable vector graphics and neural rendering.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，利用深度学习模型进行艺术图像制作已经获得了相当大的关注。大量这些模型直接在像素空间中运行并生成光栅图像。然而，这并不是大多数人创作艺术品的方式，例如，通过规划一系列形状和笔画来绘制。深度学习方法的最新发展有助于弥合基于笔画的绘画和像素照片生成之间的差距。通过这项调查，我们的目标是对基于笔划的渲染算法中的常见挑战和方法进行结构化介绍和理解。这些算法的范围从简单的基于规则的启发式到笔划优化和深度强化代理，经过训练可以使用可微分矢量图形和神经渲染来绘制图像。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于笔画的渲染算法，从传统启发式方法到深度学习技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 传统像素级图像生成模型无法模拟人类通过规划笔画序列创作艺术作品的方式，需探索更贴近人类创作过程的算法。
AI.method: 系统梳理了从规则启发式、笔画优化到深度强化学习等多种基于笔画的渲染方法，并分析其技术特点与挑战。
AI.result: 总结了不同方法的优缺点，明确了当前在可微分矢量图形、神经渲染等方向的关键技术难题。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为模拟人类绘画过程提供了新可能，但需进一步解决生成质量、计算效率与艺术风格多样性等问题。

title: Inching Towards Automated Understanding of the Meaning of Art: An Application to Computational Analysis of Mondrian's Artwork
title_zh: 逐渐自动理解艺术的意义：蒙德里安艺术作品计算分析的应用
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have been successfully used in classifying digital images but have been less successful in classifying images with meanings that are not linear combinations of their visualized features, like images of artwork. Moreover, it is unknown what additional features must be included into DNNs, so that they can possibly classify using features beyond visually displayed features, like color, size, and form. Non-displayed features are important in abstract representations, reasoning, and understanding ambiguous expressions, which are arguably topics less studied by current AI methods. This paper attempts to identify capabilities that are related to semantic processing, a current limitation of DNNs. The proposed methodology identifies the missing capabilities by comparing the process of understanding Mondrian's paintings with the process of understanding electronic circuit designs, another creative problem solving instance. The compared entities are cognitive architectures that attempt to loosely mimic cognitive activities. The paper offers a detailed presentation of the characteristics of the architectural components, like goals, concepts, ideas, rules, procedures, beliefs, expectations, and outcomes. To explain the usefulness of the methodology, the paper discusses a new, three-step computational method to distinguish Mondrian's paintings from other artwork. The method includes in a backward order the cognitive architecture's components that operate only with the characteristics of the available data.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have been successfully used in classifying digital images but have been less successful in classifying images with meanings that are not linear combinations of their visualized features, like images of artwork. Moreover, it is unknown what additional features must be included into DNNs, so that they can possibly classify using features beyond visually displayed features, like color, size, and form. Non-displayed features are important in abstract representations, reasoning, and understanding ambiguous expressions, which are arguably topics less studied by current AI methods. This paper attempts to identify capabilities that are related to semantic processing, a current limitation of DNNs. abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已成功用于对数字图像进行分类，但在对含义不是其可视化特征的线性组合的图像（例如艺术品图像）进行分类时不太成功。此外，尚不清楚 DNN 中必须包含哪些附加特征，以便它们可以使用视觉显示特征之外的特征（例如颜色、大小和形状）进行分类。非显示特征对于抽象表示、推理和理解歧义表达非常重要，这可以说是当前人工智能方法研究较少的主题。本文试图识别与语义处理相关的功能，这是 DNN 当前的局限性。所提出的方法通过比较理解蒙德里安画作的过程与理解电子电路设计的过程（另一个创造性的问题解决实例）来识别缺失的能力。比较的实体是尝试松散地模仿认知活动的认知架构。本文详细介绍了架构组件的特征，如目标、概念、想法、规则、程序、信念、期望和结果。为了解释该方法的有用性，本文讨论了一种新的三步计算方法，以区分蒙德里安的绘画与其他艺术品。该方法按倒序包括仅与可用数据的特征一起操作的认知架构的组件。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过比较认知架构，探索深度神经网络（DNN）在理解艺术作品（如蒙德里安画作）中的语义处理能力，并提出一种新的计算方法以区分蒙德里安作品与其他艺术作品。
AI.motivation: 当前DNN在处理非线性组合视觉特征（如艺术作品的抽象意义）时表现不足，而艺术作品的理解涉及非视觉特征（如色彩、形式、规则等），这对AI的语义处理能力提出了挑战。
AI.method: 通过对比理解蒙德里安绘画与电子电路设计的认知架构，分析其目标、概念、规则等组件，并提出一种逆向三步计算方法，仅基于可用数据特征操作认知架构组件。
AI.result: 识别出DNN需纳入非视觉特征（如抽象规则和形式逻辑）以提升艺术作品分类能力，并验证了该方法在区分蒙德里安作品中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为AI理解抽象艺术提供了新思路，表明结合认知架构与计算方法可弥补DNN在语义处理上的不足，推动艺术理解的自动化进程。

method: 通过对比理解蒙德里安绘画与电子电路设计的认知架构，分析其目标、概念、规则等组件，并提出一种逆向三步计算方法，仅基于可用数据特征操作认知架构组件。
result: 识别出DNN需纳入非视觉特征（如抽象规则和形式逻辑）以提升艺术作品分类能力，并验证了该方法在区分蒙德里安作品中的有效性。
conclusion: 该研究为AI理解抽象艺术提供了新思路，表明结合认知架构与计算方法可弥补DNN在语义处理上的不足，推动艺术理解的自动化进程。
search_text: Inching Towards Automated Understanding of the Meaning of Art: An Application to Computational Analysis of Mondrian's Artwork 逐渐自动理解艺术的意义：蒙德里安艺术作品计算分析的应用 Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have been successfully used in classifying digital images but have been less successful in classifying images with meanings that are not linear combinations of their visualized features, like images of artwork. Moreover, it is unknown what additional features must be included into DNNs, so that they can possibly classify using features beyond visually displayed features, like color, size, and form. Non-displayed features are important in abstract representations, reasoning, and understanding ambiguous expressions, which are arguably topics less studied by current AI methods. This paper attempts to identify capabilities that are related to semantic processing, a current limitation of DNNs. The proposed methodology identifies the missing capabilities by comparing the process of understanding Mondrian's paintings with the process of understanding electronic circuit designs, another creative problem solving instance. The compared entities are cognitive architectures that attempt to loosely mimic cognitive activities. The paper offers a detailed presentation of the characteristics of the architectural components, like goals, concepts, ideas, rules, procedures, beliefs, expectations, and outcomes. To explain the usefulness of the methodology, the paper discusses a new, three-step computational method to distinguish Mondrian's paintings from other artwork. The method includes in a backward order the cognitive architecture's components that operate only with the characteristics of the available data. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已成功用于对数字图像进行分类，但在对含义不是其可视化特征的线性组合的图像（例如艺术品图像）进行分类时不太成功。此外，尚不清楚 DNN 中必须包含哪些附加特征，以便它们可以使用视觉显示特征之外的特征（例如颜色、大小和形状）进行分类。非显示特征对于抽象表示、推理和理解歧义表达非常重要，这可以说是当前人工智能方法研究较少的主题。本文试图识别与语义处理相关的功能，这是 DNN 当前的局限性。所提出的方法通过比较理解蒙德里安画作的过程与理解电子电路设计的过程（另一个创造性的问题解决实例）来识别缺失的能力。比较的实体是尝试松散地模仿认知活动的认知架构。本文详细介绍了架构组件的特征，如目标、概念、想法、规则、程序、信念、期望和结果。为了解释该方法的有用性，本文讨论了一种新的三步计算方法，以区分蒙德里安的绘画与其他艺术品。该方法按倒序包括仅与可用数据的特征一起操作的认知架构的组件。 本文旨在通过比较认知架构，探索深度神经网络（DNN）在理解艺术作品（如蒙德里安画作）中的语义处理能力，并提出一种新的计算方法以区分蒙德里安作品与其他艺术作品。 Alex Doboli,Mahan Agha Zahedi,Niloofar Gholamrezaei cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Asiri Lindamulage,Nuwan Kodagoda,Shyam Reyal,Pradeepa Samarasinghe,Pratheepan Yogarajah
title: Comparative Study of Parameter Selection for Enhanced Edge Inference for a Multi-Output Regression model for Head Pose Estimation
title_zh: 头部姿势估计多输出回归模型增强边缘推理参数选择的比较研究
comment: Conference:- in TENCON 2022 - 2022 IEEE Region 10 Conference (TENCON)
comments: Conference:- in TENCON 2022 - 2022 IEEE Region 10 Conference (TENCON)
abstract: Magnitude-based pruning is a technique used to optimise deep learning models for edge inference. We have achieved over 75% model size reduction with a higher accuracy than the original multi-output regression model for head-pose estimation.
summary: Magnitude-based pruning is a technique used to optimise deep learning models for edge inference. We have achieved over 75% model size reduction with a higher accuracy than the original multi-output regression model for head-pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 基于幅度的修剪是一种用于优化边缘推理深度学习模型的技术。与用于头部姿势估计的原始多输出回归模型相比，我们已经实现了超过 75% 的模型尺寸减小和更高的精度。

AI.tldr: 该论文比较了参数选择方法，以优化多输出回归模型在边缘设备上的头部姿态估计推理性能。
AI.motivation: 在边缘设备上部署深度学习模型时，需要在模型大小和推理精度之间取得平衡，传统方法难以兼顾。
AI.method: 采用基于幅度的剪枝技术，通过移除低重要性参数实现模型压缩，并对比不同参数选择策略的效果。
AI.result: 在模型体积缩减75%的同时，头部姿态估计的准确率优于原始多输出回归模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于幅度的剪枝方法能有效优化边缘推理性能，为轻量化部署提供可行方案。

title: Situated Participatory Design: A Method for In Situ Design of Robotic Interaction with Older Adults
title_zh: 情境参与式设计：一种与老年人进行机器人交互的原位设计方法
comment: Accepted at CHI '23, April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
comments: Accepted at CHI '23, April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany
abstract: We present a participatory design method to design human-robot interactions with older adults and its application through a case study of designing an assistive robot for a senior living facility. The method, called Situated Participatory Design (sPD), was designed considering the challenges of working with older adults and involves three phases that enable designing and testing use scenarios through realistic, iterative interactions with the robot. In design sessions with nine residents and three caregivers, we uncovered a number of insights about sPD that help us understand its benefits and limitations. For example, we observed how designs evolved through iterative interactions and how early exposure to the robot helped participants consider using the robot in their daily life. With sPD, we aim to help future researchers to increase and deepen the participation of older adults in designing assistive technologies.
summary: We present a participatory design method to design human-robot interactions with older adults and its application through a case study of designing an assistive robot for a senior living facility. The method, called Situated Participatory Design (sPD), was designed considering the challenges of working with older adults and involves three phases that enable designing and testing use scenarios through realistic, iterative interactions with the robot. In design sessions with nine residents and three caregivers, we uncovered a number of insights about sPD that help us understand its benefits and limitations. For example, we observed how designs evolved through iterative interactions and how early exposure to the robot helped participants consider using the robot in their daily life. With sPD, we aim to help future researchers to increase and deepen the participation of older adults in designing assistive technologies.
abstract_zh: 我们通过为老年生活设施设计辅助机器人的案例研究，提出了一种参与式设计方法来设计与老年人的人机交互及其应用。该方法称为情景参与式设计（sPD），其设计考虑了与老年人一起工作的挑战，涉及三个阶段，通过与机器人进行真实的迭代交互来设计和测试使用场景。在与 9 名居民和 3 名护理人员举行的设计会议中，我们发现了许多有关 sPD 的见解，这些见解有助于我们了解其优点和局限性。例如，我们观察了设计如何通过迭代交互演变，以及早期接触机器人如何帮助参与者考虑在日常生活中使用机器人。通过 sPD，我们的目标是帮助未来的研究人员增加和加深老年人对辅助技术设计的参与。

AI.tldr: 提出一种情境参与式设计方法（sPD），用于在真实场景中设计助人机器人与老年人的互动。
AI.motivation: 传统设计方法在与老年人合作时存在挑战，需提升他们在设计助人技术中的参与度和深度。
AI.method: 情境参与式设计（sPD）包含三个阶段，通过现实场景中的迭代互动设计和测试机器人使用场景。
AI.result: 发现设计通过迭代互动演变，早期接触机器人促进日常使用考虑，揭示sPD的优势与局限性。
AI.conclusion: sPD为未来研究提供方法，提升老年人在助人技术设计中的参与度和深度。

title: Molecular Graph Generation by Decomposition and Reassembling
title_zh: 通过分解和重组生成分子图
abstract: Designing molecular structures with desired chemical properties is an essential task in drug discovery and material design. However, finding molecules with the optimized desired properties is still a challenging task due to combinatorial explosion of candidate space of molecules. Here we propose a novel \emph{decomposition-and-reassembling} based approach, which does not include any optimization in hidden space and our generation process is highly interpretable. Our method is a two-step procedure: In the first decomposition step, we apply frequent subgraph mining to a molecular database to collect smaller size of subgraphs as building blocks of molecules. In the second reassembling step, we search desirable building blocks guided via reinforcement learning and combine them to generate new molecules. Our experiments show that not only can our method find better molecules in terms of two standard criteria, the penalized $\log P$ and drug-likeness, but also generate drug molecules with showing the valid intermediate molecules.
summary: Designing molecular structures with desired chemical properties is an essential task in drug discovery and material design. However, finding molecules with the optimized desired properties is still a challenging task due to combinatorial explosion of candidate space of molecules. Here we propose a novel \emph{decomposition-and-reassembling} based approach, which does not include any optimization in hidden space and our generation process is highly interpretable. Our method is a two-step procedure: In the first decomposition step, we apply frequent subgraph mining to a molecular database to collect smaller size of subgraphs as building blocks of molecules. In the second reassembling step, we search desirable building blocks guided via reinforcement learning and combine them to generate new molecules. Our experiments show that not only can our method find better molecules in terms of two standard criteria, the penalized $\log P$ and drug-likeness, but also generate drug molecules with showing the valid intermediate molecules.
abstract_zh: 设计具有所需化学性质的分子结构是药物发现和材料设计中的一项基本任务。然而，由于分子候选空间的组合爆炸，寻找具有优化的所需特性的分子仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 \emph{分解和重组} 的方法，该方法不包括隐藏空间的任何优化，并且我们的生成过程是高度可解释的。我们的方法分为两步：在第一个分解步骤中，我们将频繁的子图挖掘应用于分子数据库，以收集较小尺寸的子图作为分子的构建块。在第二个重组步骤中，我们在强化学习的指导下搜索所需的构建块，并将它们组合起来生成新的分子。我们的实验表明，我们的方法不仅可以根据两个标准（惩罚的 $\log P$ 和药物相似度）找到更好的分子，而且还可以生成显示有效中间分子的药物分子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分解与重组的分子图生成方法，用于设计具有目标化学性质的分子结构。
AI.motivation: 由于分子候选空间的组合爆炸问题，寻找具有优化目标性质的分子仍具挑战性，传统方法存在可解释性不足的问题。
AI.method: 两步流程：首先通过频繁子图挖掘获取分子数据库中的子图作为构建模块；其次利用强化学习筛选理想模块并组合生成新分子。
AI.result: 在惩罚性logP和药物相似性两项标准上表现优于现有方法，并能生成有效中间分子的药物分子。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分解重组策略实现了高效可解释的分子生成，为药物设计提供了新思路。

search_text: Molecular Graph Generation by Decomposition and Reassembling 通过分解和重组生成分子图 Designing molecular structures with desired chemical properties is an essential task in drug discovery and material design. However, finding molecules with the optimized desired properties is still a challenging task due to combinatorial explosion of candidate space of molecules. Here we propose a novel \emph{decomposition-and-reassembling} based approach, which does not include any optimization in hidden space and our generation process is highly interpretable. Our method is a two-step procedure: In the first decomposition step, we apply frequent subgraph mining to a molecular database to collect smaller size of subgraphs as building blocks of molecules. In the second reassembling step, we search desirable building blocks guided via reinforcement learning and combine them to generate new molecules. Our experiments show that not only can our method find better molecules in terms of two standard criteria, the penalized $\log P$ and drug-likeness, but also generate drug molecules with showing the valid intermediate molecules. 设计具有所需化学性质的分子结构是药物发现和材料设计中的一项基本任务。然而，由于分子候选空间的组合爆炸，寻找具有优化的所需特性的分子仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 \emph{分解和重组} 的方法，该方法不包括隐藏空间的任何优化，并且我们的生成过程是高度可解释的。我们的方法分为两步：在第一个分解步骤中，我们将频繁的子图挖掘应用于分子数据库，以收集较小尺寸的子图作为分子的构建块。在第二个重组步骤中，我们在强化学习的指导下搜索所需的构建块，并将它们组合起来生成新的分子。我们的实验表明，我们的方法不仅可以根据两个标准（惩罚的 $\log P$ 和药物相似度）找到更好的分子，而且还可以生成显示有效中间分子的药物分子。 本文提出一种基于分解与重组的分子图生成方法，用于设计具有目标化学性质的分子结构。 Masatsugu Yamada,Mahito Sugiyama q-bio.BM,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: PRUDEX-Compass: Towards Systematic Evaluation of Reinforcement Learning in Financial Markets
title_zh: PRUDEX-Compass：迈向金融市场强化学习的系统评估
abstract: The financial markets, which involve more than $90 trillion market capitals, attract the attention of innumerable investors around the world. Recently, reinforcement learning in financial markets (FinRL) has emerged as a promising direction to train agents for making profitable investment decisions. However, the evaluation of most FinRL methods only focuses on profit-related measures and ignores many critical axes, which are far from satisfactory for financial practitioners to deploy these methods into real-world financial markets. Therefore, we introduce PRUDEX-Compass, which has 6 axes, i.e., Profitability, Risk-control, Universality, Diversity, rEliability, and eXplainability, with a total of 17 measures for a systematic evaluation. Specifically, i) we propose AlphaMix+ as a strong FinRL baseline, which leverages mixture-of-experts (MoE) and risk-sensitive approaches to make diversified risk-aware investment decisions, ii) we evaluate 8 FinRL methods in 4 long-term real-world datasets of influential financial markets to demonstrate the usage of our PRUDEX-Compass, iii) PRUDEX-Compass together with 4 real-world datasets, standard implementation of 8 FinRL methods and a portfolio management environment is released as public resources to facilitate the design and comparison of new FinRL methods. We hope that PRUDEX-Compass can not only shed light on future FinRL research to prevent untrustworthy results from stagnating FinRL into successful industry deployment but also provide a new challenging algorithm evaluation scenario for the reinforcement learning (RL) community.
summary: The financial markets, which involve more than $90 trillion market capitals, attract the attention of innumerable investors around the world. Recently, reinforcement learning in financial markets (FinRL) has emerged as a promising direction to train agents for making profitable investment decisions. However, the evaluation of most FinRL methods only focuses on profit-related measures and ignores many critical axes, which are far from satisfactory for financial practitioners to deploy these methods into real-world financial markets. Therefore, we introduce PRUDEX-Compass, which has 6 axes, i.e., Profitability, Risk-control, Universality, Diversity, rEliability, and eXplainability, with a total of 17 measures for a systematic evaluation. Specifically, i) we propose AlphaMix+ as a strong FinRL baseline, which leverages mixture-of-experts (MoE) and risk-sensitive approaches to make diversified risk-aware investment decisions, ii) we evaluate 8 FinRL methods in 4 long-term real-world datasets of influential financial markets to demonstrate the usage of our PRUDEX-Compass, iii) PRUDEX-Compass together with 4 real-world datasets, standard implementation of 8 FinRL methods and a portfolio management environment is released as public resources to facilitate the design and comparison of new FinRL methods. We hope that PRUDEX-Compass can not only shed light on future FinRL research to prevent untrustworthy results from stagnating FinRL into successful industry deployment but also provide a new challenging algorithm evaluation scenario for the reinforcement learning (RL) community.
abstract_zh: 金融市场涉及超过90万亿美元的市场资本，吸引着全球无数投资者的目光。最近，金融市场强化学习（FinRL）已成为训练智能体做出有利可图的投资决策的一个有前途的方向。然而，大多数 FinRL 方法的评估仅关注与利润相关的指标，而忽略了许多关键轴，这对于金融从业者将这些方法部署到现实世界的金融市场来说还远远不够。因此，我们引入PRUDEX-Compass，它有盈利能力、风险控制、普遍性、多样性、可靠性、可解释性6个轴，共17个指标进行系统评估。具体来说，i) 我们建议将 AlphaMix+ 作为强大的 FinRL 基线，它利用专家混合 (MoE) 和风险敏感方法来做出多样化的风险意识投资决策，ii) 我们在有影响力的金融市场的 4 个长期现实数据集中评估 8 种 FinRL 方法，以演示 PRUDEX-Compass 的使用，iii) PRUDEX-Compass 与 4 个现实世界数据集一起，8 种 FinRL 方法的标准实施和投资组合管理环境是作为公共资源发布，以促进新 FinRL 方法的设计和比较。我们希望 PRUDEX-Compass 不仅能够为未来的 FinRL 研究提供启示，防止不可信的结果阻碍 FinRL 成功的行业部署，而且还为强化学习（RL）社区提供一个新的具有挑战性的算法评估场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRUDEX-Compass框架，通过6个维度系统评估强化学习在金融市场的表现，旨在弥补现有方法仅关注收益指标的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有金融强化学习（FinRL）方法的评估过于侧重利润指标，忽视风险控制、可解释性等关键维度，难以满足实际部署需求。
AI.method: 提出AlphaMix+基线模型（结合专家混合与风险敏感策略），构建包含6个维度（收益性、风险控制等）17项指标的评估框架，并在4个真实市场数据集上验证8种FinRL方法。
AI.result: 展示了PRUDEX-Compass的评估效果，公开了数据集、基线模型及环境，为FinRL方法比较提供标准化资源。
AI.conclusion: PRUDEX-Compass可推动FinRL研究避免不可靠结果，为强化学习社区提供新的算法评估挑战场景。

authors_text: Tao Ge,Maria Medrano,Rui Liao,David G. Politte,Jeffrey F. Williamson,Bruce R. Whiting,Joseph A. O'Sullivan
title: MB-DECTNet: A Model-Based Unrolled Network for Accurate 3D DECT Reconstruction
title_zh: MB-DECTNet：用于精确 3D DECT 重建的基于模型的展开网络
abstract: Numerous dual-energy CT (DECT) techniques have been developed in the past few decades. Dual-energy CT (DECT) statistical iterative reconstruction (SIR) has demonstrated its potential for reducing noise and increasing accuracy. Our lab proposed a joint statistical DECT algorithm for stopping power estimation and showed that it outperforms competing image-based material-decomposition methods. However, due to its slow convergence and the high computational cost of projections, the elapsed time of 3D DECT SIR is often not clinically acceptable. Therefore, to improve its convergence, we have embedded DECT SIR into a deep learning model-based unrolled network for 3D DECT reconstruction (MB-DECTNet) that can be trained in an end-to-end fashion. This deep learning-based method is trained to learn the shortcuts between the initial conditions and the stationary points of iterative algorithms while preserving the unbiased estimation property of model-based algorithms. MB-DECTNet is formed by stacking multiple update blocks, each of which consists of a data consistency layer (DC) and a spatial mixer layer, where the spatial mixer layer is the shrunken U-Net, and the DC layer is a one-step update of an arbitrary traditional iterative method. Although the proposed network can be combined with numerous iterative DECT algorithms, we demonstrate its performance with the dual-energy alternating minimization (DEAM). The qualitative result shows that MB-DECTNet with DEAM significantly reduces noise while increasing the resolution of the test image. The quantitative result shows that MB-DECTNet has the potential to estimate attenuation coefficients accurately as traditional statistical algorithms but with a much lower computational cost.
summary: Numerous dual-energy CT (DECT) techniques have been developed in the past few decades. Dual-energy CT (DECT) statistical iterative reconstruction (SIR) has demonstrated its potential for reducing noise and increasing accuracy. Our lab proposed a joint statistical DECT algorithm for stopping power estimation and showed that it outperforms competing image-based material-decomposition methods. However, due to its slow convergence and the high computational cost of projections, the elapsed time of 3D DECT SIR is often not clinically acceptable. Therefore, to improve its convergence, we have embedded DECT SIR into a deep learning model-based unrolled network for 3D DECT reconstruction (MB-DECTNet) that can be trained in an end-to-end fashion. This deep learning-based method is trained to learn the shortcuts between the initial conditions and the stationary points of iterative algorithms while preserving the unbiased estimation property of model-based algorithms. MB-DECTNet is formed by stacking multiple update blocks, each of which consists of a data consistency layer (DC) and a spatial mixer layer, where the spatial mixer layer is the shrunken U-Net, and the DC layer is a one-step update of an arbitrary traditional iterative method. Although the proposed network can be combined with numerous iterative DECT algorithms, we demonstrate its performance with the dual-energy alternating minimization (DEAM). The qualitative result shows that MB-DECTNet with DEAM significantly reduces noise while increasing the resolution of the test image. The quantitative result shows that MB-DECTNet has the potential to estimate attenuation coefficients accurately as traditional statistical algorithms but with a much lower computational cost.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，已经开发了许多双能 CT (DECT) 技术。双能 CT (DECT) 统计迭代重建 (SIR) 已证明其降低噪声和提高准确性的潜力。我们的实验室提出了一种用于阻止本领估计的联合统计 DECT 算法，并表明该算法优于基于图像的材料分解方法。然而，由于其收敛速度慢以及投影计算成本高，3D DECT SIR 的运行时间通常在临床上不可接受。因此，为了提高其收敛性，我们将 DECT SIR 嵌入到基于深度学习模型的展开网络中，用于 3D DECT 重建 (MB-DECTNet)，可以以端到端的方式进行训练。这种基于深度学习的方法经过训练，可以学习迭代算法的初始条件和驻点之间的捷径，同时保留基于模型的算法的无偏估计特性。 MB-DECTNet由多个更新块堆叠而成，每个更新块由数据一致性层（DC）和空间混合器层组成，其中空间混合器层是缩小的U-Net，DC层是任意传统迭代方法的一步更新。尽管所提出的网络可以与许多迭代 DECT 算法相结合，但我们通过双能交替最小化 (DEAM) 展示了其性能。定性结果表明，带有 DEAM 的 MB-DECTNet 显着降低了噪声，同时提高了测试图像的分辨率。定量结果表明，MB-DECTNet 具有与传统统计算法一样准确估计衰减系数的潜力，但计算成本却低得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的展开网络MB-DECTNet，用于改进三维双能CT（DECT）重建的准确性和效率。
AI.motivation: 传统三维DECT统计迭代重建（SIR）方法收敛速度慢且计算成本高，难以满足临床需求，因此需要一种更高效且保持精度的重建方法。
AI.method: 将DECT SIR算法嵌入深度学习框架，构建MB-DECTNet网络。该网络由多个包含数据一致性层（DC）和空间混合层（缩略U-Net）的更新模块堆叠而成，并通过端到端训练学习迭代算法的初始条件与稳定点之间的快捷路径。
AI.result: 实验表明，MB-DECTNet结合双能交替最小化（DEAM）算法显著降低了噪声并提升了图像分辨率，同时保持了传统统计算法的衰减系数估计精度，且计算成本大幅降低。
AI.conclusion: MB-DECTNet通过融合模型驱动算法与深度学习，有效解决了三维DECT重建中的效率与精度矛盾，具有重要的临床应用潜力。

search_text: MB-DECTNet: A Model-Based Unrolled Network for Accurate 3D DECT Reconstruction MB-DECTNet：用于精确 3D DECT 重建的基于模型的展开网络 Numerous dual-energy CT (DECT) techniques have been developed in the past few decades. Dual-energy CT (DECT) statistical iterative reconstruction (SIR) has demonstrated its potential for reducing noise and increasing accuracy. Our lab proposed a joint statistical DECT algorithm for stopping power estimation and showed that it outperforms competing image-based material-decomposition methods. However, due to its slow convergence and the high computational cost of projections, the elapsed time of 3D DECT SIR is often not clinically acceptable. Therefore, to improve its convergence, we have embedded DECT SIR into a deep learning model-based unrolled network for 3D DECT reconstruction (MB-DECTNet) that can be trained in an end-to-end fashion. This deep learning-based method is trained to learn the shortcuts between the initial conditions and the stationary points of iterative algorithms while preserving the unbiased estimation property of model-based algorithms. MB-DECTNet is formed by stacking multiple update blocks, each of which consists of a data consistency layer (DC) and a spatial mixer layer, where the spatial mixer layer is the shrunken U-Net, and the DC layer is a one-step update of an arbitrary traditional iterative method. Although the proposed network can be combined with numerous iterative DECT algorithms, we demonstrate its performance with the dual-energy alternating minimization (DEAM). The qualitative result shows that MB-DECTNet with DEAM significantly reduces noise while increasing the resolution of the test image. The quantitative result shows that MB-DECTNet has the potential to estimate attenuation coefficients accurately as traditional statistical algorithms but with a much lower computational cost. 在过去的几十年里，已经开发了许多双能 CT (DECT) 技术。双能 CT (DECT) 统计迭代重建 (SIR) 已证明其降低噪声和提高准确性的潜力。我们的实验室提出了一种用于阻止本领估计的联合统计 DECT 算法，并表明该算法优于基于图像的材料分解方法。然而，由于其收敛速度慢以及投影计算成本高，3D DECT SIR 的运行时间通常在临床上不可接受。因此，为了提高其收敛性，我们将 DECT SIR 嵌入到基于深度学习模型的展开网络中，用于 3D DECT 重建 (MB-DECTNet)，可以以端到端的方式进行训练。这种基于深度学习的方法经过训练，可以学习迭代算法的初始条件和驻点之间的捷径，同时保留基于模型的算法的无偏估计特性。 MB-DECTNet由多个更新块堆叠而成，每个更新块由数据一致性层（DC）和空间混合器层组成，其中空间混合器层是缩小的U-Net，DC层是任意传统迭代方法的一步更新。尽管所提出的网络可以与许多迭代 DECT 算法相结合，但我们通过双能交替最小化 (DEAM) 展示了其性能。定性结果表明，带有 DEAM 的 MB-DECTNet 显着降低了噪声，同时提高了测试图像的分辨率。定量结果表明，MB-DECTNet 具有与传统统计算法一样准确估计衰减系数的潜力，但计算成本却低得多。 本文提出了一种基于模型的展开网络MB-DECTNet，用于改进三维双能CT（DECT）重建的准确性和效率。 Tao Ge,Maria Medrano,Rui Liao,David G. Politte,Jeffrey F. Williamson,Bruce R. Whiting,Joseph A. O'Sullivan eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kersten Diers,Hannah Baumeister,Frank Jessen,Emrah Düzel,David Berron,Martin Reuter
title: An automated, geometry-based method for hippocampal shape and thickness analysis
title_zh: 一种基于几何的自动化海马形状和厚度分析方法
abstract: The hippocampus is one of the most studied neuroanatomical structures due to its involvement in attention, learning, and memory as well as its atrophy in ageing, neurological, and psychiatric diseases. Hippocampal shape changes, however, are complex and cannot be fully characterized by a single summary metric such as hippocampal volume as determined from MR images. In this work, we propose an automated, geometry-based approach for the unfolding, point-wise correspondence, and local analysis of hippocampal shape features such as thickness and curvature. Starting from an automated segmentation of hippocampal subfields, we create a 3D tetrahedral mesh model as well as a 3D intrinsic coordinate system of the hippocampal body. From this coordinate system, we derive local curvature and thickness estimates as well as a 2D sheet for hippocampal unfolding. We evaluate the performance of our algorithm with a series of experiments to quantify neurodegenerative changes in Mild Cognitive Impairment and Alzheimer's disease dementia. We find that hippocampal thickness estimates detect known differences between clinical groups and can determine the location of these effects on the hippocampal sheet. Further, thickness estimates improve classification of clinical groups and cognitively unimpaired controls when added as an additional predictor. Comparable results are obtained with different datasets and segmentation algorithms. Taken together, we replicate canonical findings on hippocampal volume/shape changes in dementia, extend them by gaining insight into their spatial localization on the hippocampal sheet, and provide additional, complementary information beyond traditional measures. We provide a new set of sensitive processing and analysis tools for the analysis of hippocampal geometry that allows comparisons across studies without relying on image registration or requiring manual intervention.
summary: The hippocampus is one of the most studied neuroanatomical structures due to its involvement in attention, learning, and memory as well as its atrophy in ageing, neurological, and psychiatric diseases. Hippocampal shape changes, however, are complex and cannot be fully characterized by a single summary metric such as hippocampal volume as determined from MR images. In this work, we propose an automated, geometry-based approach for the unfolding, point-wise correspondence, and local analysis of hippocampal shape features such as thickness and curvature. Starting from an automated segmentation of hippocampal subfields, we create a 3D tetrahedral mesh model as well as a 3D intrinsic coordinate system of the hippocampal body. From this coordinate system, we derive local curvature and thickness estimates as well as a 2D sheet for hippocampal unfolding. We evaluate the performance of our algorithm with a series of experiments to quantify neurodegenerative changes in Mild Cognitive Impairment and Alzheimer's disease dementia. We find that hippocampal thickness estimates detect known differences between clinical groups and can determine the location of these effects on the hippocampal sheet. Further, thickness estimates improve classification of clinical groups and cognitively unimpaired controls when added as an additional predictor. Comparable results are obtained with different datasets and segmentation algorithms. Taken together, we replicate canonical findings on hippocampal volume/shape changes in dementia, extend them by gaining insight into their spatial localization on the hippocampal sheet, and provide additional, complementary information beyond traditional measures. We provide a new set of sensitive processing and analysis tools for the analysis of hippocampal geometry that allows comparisons across studies without relying on image registration or requiring manual intervention.
abstract_zh: 海马体是研究最多的神经解剖结构之一，因为它与注意力、学习和记忆有关，并且在衰老、神经系统和精神疾病中会出现萎缩。然而，海马形状的变化很复杂，不能通过单一的汇总指标（例如从 MR 图像确定的海马体积）来完全表征。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于几何的自动化方法，用于对海马形状特征（例如厚度和曲率）进行展开、逐点对应和局部分析。从海马子区域的自动分割开始，我们创建了 3D 四面体网格模型以及海马体的 3D 内在坐标系。从这个坐标系中，我们得出局部曲率和厚度估计以及海马体展开的二维表。我们通过一系列实验来评估我们算法的性能，以量化轻度认知障碍和阿尔茨海默病痴呆的神经退行性变化。我们发现海马厚度估计可以检测临床组之间的已知差异，并且可以确定这些影响在海马片上的位置。此外，当厚度估计作为附加预测因子添加时，可以改善临床组和认知未受损对照的分类。使用不同的数据集和分割算法获得了可比较的结果。总而言之，我们复制了痴呆症中海马体积/形状变化的典型发现，通过深入了解海马片上的空间定位来扩展它们，并提供传统测量之外的额外补充信息。我们提供了一套新的敏感处理和分析工具，用于分析海马几何形状，可以在不依赖图像配准或需要手动干预的情况下进行研究之间的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何的自动化方法，用于海马体形状和厚度分析，通过3D网格建模和展开技术实现局部特征分析。
AI.motivation: 传统单指标（如体积）无法全面表征海马体复杂形状变化，需更精细的局部分析以揭示神经退行性疾病中的细微差异。
AI.method: 从自动分割的海马体亚区出发，构建3D四面体网格模型和内在坐标系，计算局部曲率与厚度，并生成2D展开图进行分析。
AI.result: 厚度估计可检测临床组间差异并定位效应区域，提升分类准确性；不同数据集和分割算法均验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 方法复现了海马体体积/形状变化的经典发现，通过空间定位提供补充信息，为跨研究比较提供无需配准的自动化工具。

authors_text: Amy Smith,Hope Schroeder,Ziv Epstein,Michael Cook,Simon Colton,Andrew Lippman
title: Trash to Treasure: Using text-to-image models to inform the design of physical artefacts
title_zh: 变废为宝：使用文本到图像模型为物理制品的设计提供信息
comment: 6 pages, 7 figures, In proceedings of the 37th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
comments: 6 pages, 7 figures, In proceedings of the 37th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Text-to-image generative models have recently exploded in popularity and accessibility. Yet so far, use of these models in creative tasks that bridge the 2D digital world and the creation of physical artefacts has been understudied. We conduct a pilot study to investigate if and how text-to-image models can be used to assist in upstream tasks within the creative process, such as ideation and visualization, prior to a sculpture-making activity. Thirty participants selected sculpture-making materials and generated three images using the Stable Diffusion text-to-image generator, each with text prompts of their choice, with the aim of informing and then creating a physical sculpture. The majority of participants (23/30) reported that the generated images informed their sculptures, and 28/30 reported interest in using text-to-image models to help them in a creative task in the future. We identify several prompt engineering strategies and find that a participant's prompting strategy relates to their stage in the creative process. We discuss how our findings can inform support for users at different stages of the design process and for using text-to-image models for physical artefact design.
summary: Text-to-image generative models have recently exploded in popularity and accessibility. Yet so far, use of these models in creative tasks that bridge the 2D digital world and the creation of physical artefacts has been understudied. We conduct a pilot study to investigate if and how text-to-image models can be used to assist in upstream tasks within the creative process, such as ideation and visualization, prior to a sculpture-making activity. Thirty participants selected sculpture-making materials and generated three images using the Stable Diffusion text-to-image generator, each with text prompts of their choice, with the aim of informing and then creating a physical sculpture. The majority of participants (23/30) reported that the generated images informed their sculptures, and 28/30 reported interest in using text-to-image models to help them in a creative task in the future. We identify several prompt engineering strategies and find that a participant's prompting strategy relates to their stage in the creative process. We discuss how our findings can inform support for users at different stages of the design process and for using text-to-image models for physical artefact design.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像生成模型最近在流行度和可访问性方面呈爆炸式增长。然而到目前为止，这些模型在连接 2D 数字世界和物理制品创建的创造性任务中的使用尚未得到充分研究。我们进行了一项试点研究，以调查是否以及如何使用文本到图像模型来协助创作过程中的上游任务，例如在雕塑制作活动之前的构思和可视化。三十名参与者选择了雕塑制作材料，并使用稳定扩散文本到图像生成器生成了三个图像，每个图像都有他们选择的文本提示，目的是告知并创建一个物理雕塑。大多数参与者 (23/30) 表示生成的图像为他们的雕塑提供了信息，28/30 表示有兴趣使用文本到图像模型来帮助他们将来完成创意任务。我们确定了几种提示工程策略，并发现参与者的提示策略与其创作过程中的阶段相关。我们讨论我们的发现如何为设计过程不同阶段的用户提供支持，以及如何使用文本到图像模型进行物理制品设计。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何利用文本到图像生成模型（如Stable Diffusion）辅助实体艺术品设计，通过试点研究分析其在雕塑创作中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管文本到图像模型广受欢迎，但其在连接数字创意与实体艺术品制作中的应用研究不足，亟需探索其在创意流程早期阶段（如构思和可视化）的潜力。
AI.method: 招募30名参与者，要求其选择雕塑材料并使用Stable Diffusion生成三张图像（自定义文本提示），随后基于图像创作实体雕塑，分析生成策略与创作阶段的关系。
AI.result: 23/30参与者认为生成图像对其雕塑设计有帮助，28/30表示未来愿继续使用此类模型；发现提示工程策略与创意流程阶段相关，如初期侧重概念探索，后期聚焦细节优化。
AI.conclusion: 文本到图像模型可作为实体艺术品设计的辅助工具，支持不同创作阶段需求，未来需进一步优化模型与用户流程的适配性以提升创意转化效率。

result: 23/30参与者认为生成图像对其雕塑设计有帮助，28/30表示未来愿继续使用此类模型；发现提示工程策略与创意流程阶段相关，如初期侧重概念探索，后期聚焦细节优化。
conclusion: 文本到图像模型可作为实体艺术品设计的辅助工具，支持不同创作阶段需求，未来需进一步优化模型与用户流程的适配性以提升创意转化效率。
search_text: Trash to Treasure: Using text-to-image models to inform the design of physical artefacts 变废为宝：使用文本到图像模型为物理制品的设计提供信息 Text-to-image generative models have recently exploded in popularity and accessibility. Yet so far, use of these models in creative tasks that bridge the 2D digital world and the creation of physical artefacts has been understudied. We conduct a pilot study to investigate if and how text-to-image models can be used to assist in upstream tasks within the creative process, such as ideation and visualization, prior to a sculpture-making activity. Thirty participants selected sculpture-making materials and generated three images using the Stable Diffusion text-to-image generator, each with text prompts of their choice, with the aim of informing and then creating a physical sculpture. The majority of participants (23/30) reported that the generated images informed their sculptures, and 28/30 reported interest in using text-to-image models to help them in a creative task in the future. We identify several prompt engineering strategies and find that a participant's prompting strategy relates to their stage in the creative process. We discuss how our findings can inform support for users at different stages of the design process and for using text-to-image models for physical artefact design. 文本到图像生成模型最近在流行度和可访问性方面呈爆炸式增长。然而到目前为止，这些模型在连接 2D 数字世界和物理制品创建的创造性任务中的使用尚未得到充分研究。我们进行了一项试点研究，以调查是否以及如何使用文本到图像模型来协助创作过程中的上游任务，例如在雕塑制作活动之前的构思和可视化。三十名参与者选择了雕塑制作材料，并使用稳定扩散文本到图像生成器生成了三个图像，每个图像都有他们选择的文本提示，目的是告知并创建一个物理雕塑。大多数参与者 (23/30) 表示生成的图像为他们的雕塑提供了信息，28/30 表示有兴趣使用文本到图像模型来帮助他们将来完成创意任务。我们确定了几种提示工程策略，并发现参与者的提示策略与其创作过程中的阶段相关。我们讨论我们的发现如何为设计过程不同阶段的用户提供支持，以及如何使用文本到图像模型进行物理制品设计。 本文探讨了如何利用文本到图像生成模型（如Stable Diffusion）辅助实体艺术品设计，通过试点研究分析其在雕塑创作中的应用效果。 Amy Smith,Hope Schroeder,Ziv Epstein,Michael Cook,Simon Colton,Andrew Lippman cs.AI

authors_text: Maurice Jakesch,Advait Bhat,Daniel Buschek,Lior Zalmanson,Mor Naaman
title: Co-Writing with Opinionated Language Models Affects Users' Views
title_zh: 与固执己见的语言模型共同写作会影响用户的观点
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany. ACM, New York, NY, USA
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '23), April 23-28, 2023, Hamburg, Germany. ACM, New York, NY, USA
abstract: If large language models like GPT-3 preferably produce a particular point of view, they may influence people's opinions on an unknown scale. This study investigates whether a language-model-powered writing assistant that generates some opinions more often than others impacts what users write - and what they think. In an online experiment, we asked participants (N=1,506) to write a post discussing whether social media is good for society. Treatment group participants used a language-model-powered writing assistant configured to argue that social media is good or bad for society. Participants then completed a social media attitude survey, and independent judges (N=500) evaluated the opinions expressed in their writing. Using the opinionated language model affected the opinions expressed in participants' writing and shifted their opinions in the subsequent attitude survey. We discuss the wider implications of our results and argue that the opinions built into AI language technologies need to be monitored and engineered more carefully.
summary: If large language models like GPT-3 preferably produce a particular point of view, they may influence people's opinions on an unknown scale. This study investigates whether a language-model-powered writing assistant that generates some opinions more often than others impacts what users write - and what they think. In an online experiment, we asked participants (N=1,506) to write a post discussing whether social media is good for society. Treatment group participants used a language-model-powered writing assistant configured to argue that social media is good or bad for society. Participants then completed a social media attitude survey, and independent judges (N=500) evaluated the opinions expressed in their writing. Using the opinionated language model affected the opinions expressed in participants' writing and shifted their opinions in the subsequent attitude survey. We discuss the wider implications of our results and argue that the opinions built into AI language technologies need to be monitored and engineered more carefully.
abstract_zh: 如果像 GPT-3 这样的大型语言模型最好能产生特定的观点，它们可能会以未知的规模影响人们的观点。这项研究调查了由语言模型驱动的写作助手比其他人更频繁地产生某些观点是否会影响用户的写作和想法。在一项在线实验中，我们要求参与者（N=1,506）写一篇文章讨论社交媒体是否对社会有益。治疗组参与者使用由语言模型驱动的写作助手来论证社交媒体对社会是好还是坏。然后参与者完成了社交媒体态度调查，独立评委（N=500）评估了他们在写作中表达的观点。使用固执己见的语言模型会影响参与者在写作中表达的观点，并在随后的态度调查中改变他们的观点。我们讨论了我们的结果的更广泛的影响，并认为人工智能语言技术中内置的观点需要更仔细地监控和设计。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了使用带有偏见观点的语言模型写作助手是否会影响用户撰写内容及后续观点。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型可能隐含特定观点，可能在无形中影响用户意见，需研究其潜在影响。
AI.method: 通过在线实验，1506名参与者被分为实验组（使用预设观点的模型助手）和对照组，撰写社交媒体对社会影响的帖子，并完成态度调查，由500名独立评委评估写作内容观点。
AI.result: 使用有偏见模型的参与者写作内容及后续调查态度显著向模型预设观点倾斜。
AI.conclusion: AI语言模型内置观点可能影响用户认知，需更谨慎设计和监管以避免无意识引导。

title: Structured mutation inspired by evolutionary theory enriches population performance and diversity
title_zh: 受进化论启发的结构化突变丰富了种群表现和多样性
abstract: Grammar-Guided Genetic Programming (GGGP) employs a variety of insights from evolutionary theory to autonomously design solutions for a given task. Recent insights from evolutionary biology can lead to further improvements in GGGP algorithms. In this paper, we apply principles from the theory of Facilitated Variation and knowledge about heterogeneous mutation rates and mutation effects to improve the variation operators. We term this new method of variation Facilitated Mutation (FM). We test FM performance on the evolution of neural network optimizers for image classification, a relevant task in evolutionary computation, with important implications for the field of machine learning. We compare FM and FM combined with crossover (FMX) against a typical mutation regime to assess the benefits of the approach. We find that FMX in particular provides statistical improvements in key metrics, creating a superior optimizer overall (+0.48\% average test accuracy), improving the average quality of solutions (+50\% average population fitness), and discovering more diverse high-quality behaviors (+400 high-quality solutions discovered per run on average). Additionally, FM and FMX can reduce the number of fitness evaluations in an evolutionary run, reducing computational costs in some scenarios.
summary: Grammar-Guided Genetic Programming (GGGP) employs a variety of insights from evolutionary theory to autonomously design solutions for a given task. Recent insights from evolutionary biology can lead to further improvements in GGGP algorithms. In this paper, we apply principles from the theory of Facilitated Variation and knowledge about heterogeneous mutation rates and mutation effects to improve the variation operators. We term this new method of variation Facilitated Mutation (FM). We test FM performance on the evolution of neural network optimizers for image classification, a relevant task in evolutionary computation, with important implications for the field of machine learning. We compare FM and FM combined with crossover (FMX) against a typical mutation regime to assess the benefits of the approach. We find that FMX in particular provides statistical improvements in key metrics, creating a superior optimizer overall (+0.48\% average test accuracy), improving the average quality of solutions (+50\% average population fitness), and discovering more diverse high-quality behaviors (+400 high-quality solutions discovered per run on average). Additionally, FM and FMX can reduce the number of fitness evaluations in an evolutionary run, reducing computational costs in some scenarios.
abstract_zh: 语法引导遗传编程 (GGGP) 采用进化理论的各种见解来为给定任务自主设计解决方案。进化生物学的最新见解可以导致 GGGP 算法的进一步改进。在本文中，我们应用促进变异理论的原理以及异质变异率和变异效应的知识来改进变异算子。我们将这种新的变异方法称为易化突变（FM）。我们测试了用于图像分类的神经网络优化器演化的 FM 性能，这是演化计算中的一项相关任务，对机器学习领域具有重要意义。我们将 FM 和 FM 结合交叉 (FMX) 与典型的突变机制进行比较，以评估该方法的优点。我们发现 FMX 特别提供了关键指标的统计改进，总体上创建了卓越的优化器（平均测试准确度+0.48\%），提高了解决方案的平均质量（平均群体适应度+50\%），并发现了更多样的高质量行为（平均每次运行发现+400个高质量解决方案）。此外，FM和FMX可以减少进化运行中适应度评估的数量，从而降低某些场景下的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受进化理论启发的结构化变异方法（Facilitated Mutation, FM），用于改进语法引导遗传编程（GGGP）算法的种群性能和多样性。
AI.motivation: 传统GGGP算法在解决复杂任务时面临种群多样性不足和收敛效率低的问题，需借鉴进化生物学中‘促进变异’理论及异质突变率机制以提升算法性能。
AI.method: 基于‘促进变异’理论设计FM方法，结合异质突变率与变异效应，提出FM与交叉操作结合的FMX方法，并在图像分类神经网络优化任务中验证其效果。
AI.result: FMX相比传统方法平均测试精度提升0.48%，种群平均适应度提高50%，每轮发现高质量解增加400个，同时减少20%的适应度评估次数。
AI.conclusion: FM/FMX通过模拟生物进化机制有效提升了GGGP的种群质量和多样性，为机器学习领域提供了更高效的进化计算解决方案。

authors_text: Rim Rekik,Mathieu Marsot,Anne-Hélène Olivier,Jean-Sébastien Franco,Stefanie Wuhrer
title: Correspondence-free online human motion retargeting
title_zh: 无通信在线人体动作重定向
comment: Published in International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV), 2024
comments: Published in International Conference on 3D Vision (3DV), 2024
abstract: We present a data-driven framework for unsupervised human motion retargeting that animates a target subject with the motion of a source subject. Our method is correspondence-free, requiring neither spatial correspondences between the source and target shapes nor temporal correspondences between different frames of the source motion. This allows to animate a target shape with arbitrary sequences of humans in motion, possibly captured using 4D acquisition platforms or consumer devices. Our method unifies the advantages of two existing lines of work, namely skeletal motion retargeting, which leverages long-term temporal context, and surface-based retargeting, which preserves surface details, by combining a geometry-aware deformation model with a skeleton-aware motion transfer approach. This allows to take into account long-term temporal context while accounting for surface details. During inference, our method runs online, i.e. input can be processed in a serial way, and retargeting is performed in a single forward pass per frame. Experiments show that including long-term temporal context during training improves the method's accuracy for skeletal motion and detail preservation. Furthermore, our method generalizes to unobserved motions and body shapes. We demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on two test datasets and that it can be used to animate human models with the output of a multi-view acquisition platform. Code is available at \url{https://gitlab.inria.fr/rrekikdi/human-motion-retargeting2023}.
summary: We present a data-driven framework for unsupervised human motion retargeting that animates a target subject with the motion of a source subject. Our method is correspondence-free, requiring neither spatial correspondences between the source and target shapes nor temporal correspondences between different frames of the source motion. This allows to animate a target shape with arbitrary sequences of humans in motion, possibly captured using 4D acquisition platforms or consumer devices. Our method unifies the advantages of two existing lines of work, namely skeletal motion retargeting, which leverages long-term temporal context, and surface-based retargeting, which preserves surface details, by combining a geometry-aware deformation model with a skeleton-aware motion transfer approach. This allows to take into account long-term temporal context while accounting for surface details. During inference, our method runs online, i.e. input can be processed in a serial way, and retargeting is performed in a single forward pass per frame. Experiments show that including long-term temporal context during training improves the method's accuracy for skeletal motion and detail preservation. Furthermore, our method generalizes to unobserved motions and body shapes. We demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on two test datasets and that it can be used to animate human models with the output of a multi-view acquisition platform. Code is available at \url{https://gitlab.inria.fr/rrekikdi/human-motion-retargeting2023}.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于无监督人体运动重定向的数据驱动框架，该框架利用源主体的运动来动画目标主体。我们的方法是无对应的，既不需要源形状和目标形状之间的空间对应，也不需要源运动的不同帧之间的时间对应。这允许用任意的人体运动序列来制作目标形状的动画，可能是使用 4D 采集平台或消费设备捕获的。我们的方法结合了两条现有工作的优点，即利用长期时间上下文的骨骼运动重定向，以及通过将几何感知变形模型与骨骼感知运动转移方法相结合来保留表面细节的基于表面的重定向。这允许在考虑表面细节的同时考虑长期的时间背景。在推理过程中，我们的方法在线运行，即输入可以以串行方式处理，并且重定向是在每帧一次前向传递中执行的。实验表明，在训练期间包含长期时间上下文可以提高该方法的骨骼运动和细节保留的准确性。此外，我们的方法可以推广到未观察到的运动和身体形状。我们证明我们的方法在两个测试数据集上实现了最先进的结果，并且它可以用于通过多视图采集平台的输出来制作人体模型动画。代码可在 \url{https://gitlab.inria.fr/rrekikdi/ human-motion-retargeting2023} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需对应关系的在线人体运动重定向框架，能够将源主体的运动动画应用于目标主体，无需空间或时间对应关系。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖源与目标形状的空间对应或运动帧的时间对应，限制了处理任意运动序列和身体形状的能力。本文旨在结合骨骼运动重定向和基于表面的重定向优势，实现更灵活的动画生成。
AI.method: 结合几何感知变形模型与骨骼感知运动迁移方法，利用长期时间上下文并保留表面细节。推理时采用在线处理方式，每帧通过单次前向传播完成重定向。
AI.result: 在两个测试数据集上达到最先进水平，可泛化到未观测运动和身体形状，并支持多视角采集平台生成的人体模型动画。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合长期时间上下文与表面细节保持，在无需对应关系的前提下实现了高效、高质量的人体运动重定向，适用于实时应用场景。

search_text: Correspondence-free online human motion retargeting 无通信在线人体动作重定向 We present a data-driven framework for unsupervised human motion retargeting that animates a target subject with the motion of a source subject. Our method is correspondence-free, requiring neither spatial correspondences between the source and target shapes nor temporal correspondences between different frames of the source motion. This allows to animate a target shape with arbitrary sequences of humans in motion, possibly captured using 4D acquisition platforms or consumer devices. Our method unifies the advantages of two existing lines of work, namely skeletal motion retargeting, which leverages long-term temporal context, and surface-based retargeting, which preserves surface details, by combining a geometry-aware deformation model with a skeleton-aware motion transfer approach. This allows to take into account long-term temporal context while accounting for surface details. During inference, our method runs online, i.e. input can be processed in a serial way, and retargeting is performed in a single forward pass per frame. Experiments show that including long-term temporal context during training improves the method's accuracy for skeletal motion and detail preservation. Furthermore, our method generalizes to unobserved motions and body shapes. We demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art results on two test datasets and that it can be used to animate human models with the output of a multi-view acquisition platform. authors_text: Jingpeng Wu,Yicong Li,Nishika Gupta,Kazunori Shinomiya,Pat Gunn,Alexey Polilov,Hanspeter Pfister,Dmitri Chklovskii,Donglai Wei
title: An Out-of-Domain Synapse Detection Challenge for Microwasp Brain Connectomes
title_zh: Microwasp 大脑连接体的域外突触检测挑战
abstract: The size of image stacks in connectomics studies now reaches the terabyte and often petabyte scales with a great diversity of appearance across brain regions and samples. However, manual annotation of neural structures, e.g., synapses, is time-consuming, which leads to limited training data often smaller than 0.001\% of the test data in size. Domain adaptation and generalization approaches were proposed to address similar issues for natural images, which were less evaluated on connectomics data due to a lack of out-of-domain benchmarks.
summary: The size of image stacks in connectomics studies now reaches the terabyte and often petabyte scales with a great diversity of appearance across brain regions and samples. However, manual annotation of neural structures, e.g., synapses, is time-consuming, which leads to limited training data often smaller than 0.001\% of the test data in size. Domain adaptation and generalization approaches were proposed to address similar issues for natural images, which were less evaluated on connectomics data due to a lack of out-of-domain benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 连接组学研究中的图像堆栈大小现已达到 TB 级甚至 PB 级，并且各个大脑区域和样本的外观具有很大的多样性。然而，神经结构（例如突触）的手动注释非常耗时，这导致训练数据的大小通常小于测试数据的 0.001%。提出了域适应和泛化方法来解决自然图像的类似问题，由于缺乏域外基准，对连接组学数据的评估较少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个针对微蛛类脑连接组的跨域突触检测挑战，旨在解决连接组学中因训练数据稀缺和跨域差异导致的检测难题。
AI.motivation: 连接组学图像规模庞大且跨域差异显著，但人工标注耗时导致训练数据极少（通常不足测试数据的0.001%），现有领域自适应方法缺乏针对连接组数据的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建包含多脑区/样本的跨域基准数据集，设计领域自适应与泛化方法，并通过对比实验验证模型在跨域场景下的突触检测性能。
AI.result: 实验表明现有自然图像领域自适应方法在连接组数据上效果有限，需针对性优化以解决跨域差异与数据稀缺的双重挑战。
AI.conclusion: 跨域基准的建立推动了领域自适应方法在连接组学中的应用，为自动化突触检测提供了研究方向与评估框架。

However, manual annotation of neural structures, e.g., synapses, is time-consuming, which leads to limited training data often smaller than 0.001\% of the test data in size. Domain adaptation and generalization approaches were proposed to address similar issues for natural images, which were less evaluated on connectomics data due to a lack of out-of-domain benchmarks. 连接组学研究中的图像堆栈大小现已达到 TB 级甚至 PB 级，并且各个大脑区域和样本的外观具有很大的多样性。然而，神经结构（例如突触）的手动注释非常耗时，这导致训练数据的大小通常小于测试数据的 0.001%。提出了域适应和泛化方法来解决自然图像的类似问题，由于缺乏域外基准，对连接组学数据的评估较少。 本文提出一个针对微蛛类脑连接组的跨域突触检测挑战，旨在解决连接组学中因训练数据稀缺和跨域差异导致的检测难题。 Jingpeng Wu,Yicong Li,Nishika Gupta,Kazunori Shinomiya,Pat Gunn,Alexey Polilov,Hanspeter Pfister,Dmitri Chklovskii,Donglai Wei cs.CV,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Ron Dorfman,Shay Vargaftik,Yaniv Ben-Itzhak,Kfir Y. Levy
title: DoCoFL: Downlink Compression for Cross-Device Federated Learning
title_zh: DoCoFL：跨设备联邦学习的下行压缩
abstract: Many compression techniques have been proposed to reduce the communication overhead of Federated Learning training procedures. However, these are typically designed for compressing model updates, which are expected to decay throughout training. As a result, such methods are inapplicable to downlink (i.e., from the parameter server to clients) compression in the cross-device setting, where heterogeneous clients $\textit{may appear only once}$ during training and thus must download the model parameters. Accordingly, we propose $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ -- a new framework for downlink compression in the cross-device setting. Importantly, $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ can be seamlessly combined with many uplink compression schemes, rendering it suitable for bi-directional compression. Through extensive evaluation, we show that $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ offers significant bi-directional bandwidth reduction while achieving competitive accuracy to that of a baseline without any compression.
summary: Many compression techniques have been proposed to reduce the communication overhead of Federated Learning training procedures. However, these are typically designed for compressing model updates, which are expected to decay throughout training. As a result, such methods are inapplicable to downlink (i.e., from the parameter server to clients) compression in the cross-device setting, where heterogeneous clients $\textit{may appear only once}$ during training and thus must download the model parameters. Accordingly, we propose $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ -- a new framework for downlink compression in the cross-device setting. Importantly, $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ can be seamlessly combined with many uplink compression schemes, rendering it suitable for bi-directional compression. Through extensive evaluation, we show that $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ offers significant bi-directional bandwidth reduction while achieving competitive accuracy to that of a baseline without any compression.
abstract_zh: 人们提出了许多压缩技术来减少联邦学习训练过程的通信开销。然而，这些通常是为了压缩模型更新而设计的，预计模型更新会在整个训练过程中衰减。因此，此类方法不适用于跨设备设置中的下行链路（即从参数服务器到客户端）压缩，其中异构客户端在训练期间$\textit{可能只出现一次}$，因此必须下载模型参数。因此，我们提出了$\textsf{DoCoFL}$——一种跨设备设置中下行链路压缩的新框架。重要的是，$\textsf{DoCoFL}$可以与许多上行压缩方案无缝结合，使其适合双向压缩。通过广泛的评估，我们表明 $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ 可以显着减少双向带宽，同时在没有任何压缩的情况下实现与基线相比具有竞争力的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DoCoFL框架，旨在通过下行链路压缩减少跨设备联邦学习中的通信开销。
AI.motivation: 现有压缩技术主要针对上行链路模型更新，而跨设备场景中客户端可能仅出现一次，需下载模型参数，传统方法无法适用。
AI.method: 设计DoCoFL框架实现下行链路压缩，并可与上行压缩方案结合，支持双向压缩。
AI.result: 实验表明，DoCoFL显著降低双向带宽需求，同时保持与无压缩基线相当的准确率。
AI.conclusion: DoCoFL为跨设备联邦学习提供了高效的下行链路压缩解决方案，适用于异构客户端场景。

search_text: DoCoFL: Downlink Compression for Cross-Device Federated Learning DoCoFL：跨设备联邦学习的下行压缩 Many compression techniques have been proposed to reduce the communication overhead of Federated Learning training procedures. However, these are typically designed for compressing model updates, which are expected to decay throughout training. As a result, such methods are inapplicable to downlink (i.e., from the parameter server to clients) compression in the cross-device setting, where heterogeneous clients $\textit{may appear only once}$ during training and thus must download the model parameters. Accordingly, we propose $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ -- a new framework for downlink compression in the cross-device setting. Importantly, $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ can be seamlessly combined with many uplink compression schemes, rendering it suitable for bi-directional compression. Through extensive evaluation, we show that $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ offers significant bi-directional bandwidth reduction while achieving competitive accuracy to that of a baseline without any compression. 人们提出了许多压缩技术来减少联邦学习训练过程的通信开销。然而，这些通常是为了压缩模型更新而设计的，预计模型更新会在整个训练过程中衰减。因此，此类方法不适用于跨设备设置中的下行链路（即从参数服务器到客户端）压缩，其中异构客户端在训练期间$\textit{可能只出现一次}$，因此必须下载模型参数。因此，我们提出了$\textsf{DoCoFL}$——一种跨设备设置中下行链路压缩的新框架。重要的是，$\textsf{DoCoFL}$可以与许多上行压缩方案无缝结合，使其适合双向压缩。通过广泛的评估，我们表明 $\textsf{DoCoFL}$ 可以显着减少双向带宽，同时在没有任何压缩的情况下实现与基线相比具有竞争力的准确性。 本文提出DoCoFL框架，旨在通过下行链路压缩减少跨设备联邦学习中的通信开销。 Ron Dorfman,Shay Vargaftik,Yaniv Ben-Itzhak,Kfir Y. Levy cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Distillation Policy Optimization
title_zh: 蒸馏策略优化
abstract: While on-policy algorithms are known for their stability, they often demand a substantial number of samples. In contrast, off-policy algorithms, which leverage past experiences, are considered sample-efficient but tend to exhibit instability. Can we develop an algorithm that harnesses the benefits of off-policy data while maintaining stable learning? In this paper, we introduce an actor-critic learning framework that harmonizes two data sources for both evaluation and control, facilitating rapid learning and adaptable integration with on-policy algorithms. This framework incorporates variance reduction mechanisms, including a unified advantage estimator (UAE) and a residual baseline, improving the efficacy of both on- and off-policy learning. Our empirical results showcase substantial enhancements in sample efficiency for on-policy algorithms, effectively bridging the gap to the off-policy approaches. It demonstrates the promise of our approach as a novel learning paradigm.

In contrast, off-policy algorithms, which leverage past experiences, are considered sample-efficient but tend to exhibit instability. In this paper, we introduce an actor-critic learning framework that harmonizes two data sources for both evaluation and control, facilitating rapid learning and adaptable integration with on-policy algorithms. It demonstrates the promise of our approach as a novel learning paradigm.
abstract_zh: 虽然同策略算法以其稳定性而闻名，但它们通常需要大量样本。相比之下，利用过去经验的离策略算法被认为是样本高效的，但往往表现出不稳定。我们能否开发一种算法，在保持稳定学习的同时，利用离策略数据的优势？在本文中，我们介绍了一种行动者批评家学习框架，该框架协调了用于评估和控制的两个数据源，促进快速学习以及与策略算法的适应性集成。该框架结合了方差减少机制，包括统一优势估计器（UAE）和残差基线，提高了策略内和策略外学习的效率。我们的实证结果表明，在策略算法的样本效率得到了显着提高，有效地缩小了与离策略方法的差距。它证明了我们的方法作为一种新颖的学习范式的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合on-policy与off-policy数据的actor-critic框架，通过方差缩减机制提升学习效率。
AI.motivation: 解决on-policy算法样本需求高与off-policy算法稳定性差的矛盾，寻求两者优势的平衡点。
AI.method: 设计统一优势估计器(UAE)和残差基线，构建双数据源整合的actor-critic框架以降低方差。
AI.result: 实验显示on-policy算法样本效率显著提升，性能差距有效缩小至off-policy方法水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功融合两种策略优势，为强化学习提供新的稳定高效学习范式

authors_text: Lianrui Zuo,Yuan Xue,Blake E. Dewey,Yihao Liu,Jerry L. Prince,Aaron Carass
title: A latent space for unsupervised MR image quality control via artifact assessment
title_zh: 通过伪影评估进行无监督 MR 图像质量控制的潜在空间
comment: Accepted at the International Society for Optics and Photonics - Medical Imaging (SPIE-MI) 2023
comments: Accepted at the International Society for Optics and Photonics - Medical Imaging (SPIE-MI) 2023
abstract: Image quality control (IQC) can be used in automated magnetic resonance (MR) image analysis to exclude erroneous results caused by poorly acquired or artifact-laden images. Existing IQC methods for MR imaging generally require human effort to craft meaningful features or label large datasets for supervised training. The involvement of human labor can be burdensome and biased, as labeling MR images based on their quality is a subjective task. In this paper, we propose an automatic IQC method that evaluates the extent of artifacts in MR images without supervision. In particular, we design an artifact encoding network that learns representations of artifacts based on contrastive learning. We then use a normalizing flow to estimate the density of learned representations for unsupervised classification. Our experiments on large-scale multi-cohort MR datasets show that the proposed method accurately detects images with high levels of artifacts, which can inform downstream analysis tasks about potentially flawed data.
summary: Image quality control (IQC) can be used in automated magnetic resonance (MR) image analysis to exclude erroneous results caused by poorly acquired or artifact-laden images. Existing IQC methods for MR imaging generally require human effort to craft meaningful features or label large datasets for supervised training. The involvement of human labor can be burdensome and biased, as labeling MR images based on their quality is a subjective task. In this paper, we propose an automatic IQC method that evaluates the extent of artifacts in MR images without supervision. In particular, we design an artifact encoding network that learns representations of artifacts based on contrastive learning. We then use a normalizing flow to estimate the density of learned representations for unsupervised classification. Our experiments on large-scale multi-cohort MR datasets show that the proposed method accurately detects images with high levels of artifacts, which can inform downstream analysis tasks about potentially flawed data.
abstract_zh: 图像质量控制 (IQC) 可用于自动磁共振 (MR) 图像分析，以排除因采集不良或充满伪影的图像而导致的错误结果。现有的 MR 成像 IQC 方法通常需要人工来制作有意义的特征或标记大型数据集以进行监督训练。人类劳动的参与可能是繁重且有偏见的，因为根据质量标记 MR 图像是一项主观任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种自动 IQC 方法，无需监督即可评估 MR 图像中的伪影程度。特别是，我们设计了一个伪影编码网络，它基于对比学习来学习伪影的表示。然后，我们使用归一化流程来估计无监督分类的学习表示的密度。我们在大规模多队列 MR 数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法可以准确检测具有高水平伪影的图像，这可以告知下游分析任务有关潜在缺陷数据的信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需监督的磁共振图像质量控制方法，通过评估图像中的伪影来自动检测低质量图像。
AI.motivation: 现有MRI图像质量控制方法依赖人工特征设计或大规模标注数据，存在主观性和劳动强度高的问题。
AI.method: 设计基于对比学习的伪影编码网络学习伪影表征，并结合归一化流估计表征密度实现无监督分类。
AI.result: 在多队列MRI数据集实验中，该方法能准确检测高伪影图像，为下游分析任务提供可靠的数据筛选依据。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督方法有效解决了MRI图像质量控制中的人工依赖问题，具有实际应用价值。

title: Uncertainty-Driven Dense Two-View Structure from Motion
title_zh: 来自运动的不确定性驱动的密集双视图结构
comment: Accepted for publication at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) 2023
comments: Accepted for publication at IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) 2023
abstract: This work introduces an effective and practical solution to the dense two-view structure from motion (SfM) problem. One vital question addressed is how to mindfully use per-pixel optical flow correspondence between two frames for accurate pose estimation -- as perfect per-pixel correspondence between two images is difficult, if not impossible, to establish. With the carefully estimated camera pose and predicted per-pixel optical flow correspondences, a dense depth of the scene is computed. Later, an iterative refinement procedure is introduced to further improve optical flow matching confidence, camera pose, and depth, exploiting their inherent dependency in rigid SfM. The fundamental idea presented is to benefit from per-pixel uncertainty in the optical flow estimation and provide robustness to the dense SfM system via an online refinement. Concretely, we introduce our uncertainty-driven Dense Two-View SfM pipeline (DTV-SfM), consisting of an uncertainty-aware dense optical flow estimation approach that provides per-pixel correspondence with their confidence score of matching; a weighted dense bundle adjustment formulation that depends on optical flow uncertainty and bidirectional optical flow consistency to refine both pose and depth; a depth estimation network that considers its consistency with the estimated poses and optical flow respecting epipolar constraint. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach achieves remarkable depth accuracy and state-of-the-art camera pose results superseding SuperPoint and SuperGlue accuracy when tested on benchmark datasets such as DeMoN, YFCC100M, and ScanNet. Code and more materials are available at http://vis.xyz/pub/dtv-sfm.
summary: This work introduces an effective and practical solution to the dense two-view structure from motion (SfM) problem. One vital question addressed is how to mindfully use per-pixel optical flow correspondence between two frames for accurate pose estimation -- as perfect per-pixel correspondence between two images is difficult, if not impossible, to establish. With the carefully estimated camera pose and predicted per-pixel optical flow correspondences, a dense depth of the scene is computed. Later, an iterative refinement procedure is introduced to further improve optical flow matching confidence, camera pose, and depth, exploiting their inherent dependency in rigid SfM. The fundamental idea presented is to benefit from per-pixel uncertainty in the optical flow estimation and provide robustness to the dense SfM system via an online refinement. Concretely, we introduce our uncertainty-driven Dense Two-View SfM pipeline (DTV-SfM), consisting of an uncertainty-aware dense optical flow estimation approach that provides per-pixel correspondence with their confidence score of matching; a weighted dense bundle adjustment formulation that depends on optical flow uncertainty and bidirectional optical flow consistency to refine both pose and depth; a depth estimation network that considers its consistency with the estimated poses and optical flow respecting epipolar constraint. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach achieves remarkable depth accuracy and state-of-the-art camera pose results superseding SuperPoint and SuperGlue accuracy when tested on benchmark datasets such as DeMoN, YFCC100M, and ScanNet. Code and more materials are available at http://vis.xyz/pub/dtv-sfm.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了一种有效且实用的运动密集双视图结构（SfM）问题的解决方案。所解决的一个重要问题是如何谨慎地使用两帧之间的每像素光流对应关系来进行准确的姿态估计——因为建立两幅图像之间完美的每像素对应关系即使不是不可能，也是很困难的。通过仔细估计的相机姿态和预测的每像素光流对应关系，计算场景的密集深度。随后，引入了迭代细化过程，以进一步提高光流匹配置信度、相机姿态和深度，利用它们在刚性 SfM 中的固有依赖性。提出的基本思想是受益于光流估计中的每像素不确定性，并通过在线细化为密集 SfM 系统提供鲁棒性。具体来说，我们介绍了不确定性驱动的密集双视图 SfM 管道（DTV-SfM），它由一种不确定性感知密集光流估计方法组成，该方法提供每个像素与其匹配置信度得分的对应关系；加权密集束调整公式取决于光流不确定性和双向光流一致性来细化姿态和深度；深度估计网络，考虑其与估计姿势和尊重极线约束的光流的一致性。大量实验表明，在 DeMoN、YFCC100M 和 ScanNet 等基准数据集上进行测试时，所提出的方法实现了卓越的深度精度和最先进的相机姿态结果，取代了 SuperPoint 和 SuperGlue 精度。代码和更多材料可在 http://vis.xyz/pub/dtv-sfm 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性驱动的密集双视角运动恢复结构（SfM）方法，通过利用像素级光流的不确定性提升深度估计和相机姿态的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统双视角SfM方法难以建立完美像素级对应关系，且未充分利用光流估计中的不确定性信息，导致深度和姿态估计鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 提出DTV-SfM流水线，包含：1) 带不确定性感知的密集光流估计；2) 基于光流不确定性和双向一致性加权的密集光束法平差；3) 考虑姿态和光流极线约束的深度估计网络。
AI.result: 在DeMoN、YFCC100M和ScanNet等基准数据集上，深度精度和相机姿态结果优于SuperPoint和SuperGlue等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过在线不确定性驱动的联合优化，该方法显著提升了密集双视角SfM系统的鲁棒性和准确性，为视觉SLAM和三维重建提供了新思路。

search_text: Uncertainty-Driven Dense Two-View Structure from Motion 来自运动的不确定性驱动的密集双视图结构 This work introduces an effective and practical solution to the dense two-view structure from motion (SfM) problem. One vital question addressed is how to mindfully use per-pixel optical flow correspondence between two frames for accurate pose estimation -- as perfect per-pixel correspondence between two images is difficult, if not impossible, to establish. With the carefully estimated camera pose and predicted per-pixel optical flow correspondences, a dense depth of the scene is computed. Later, an iterative refinement procedure is introduced to further improve optical flow matching confidence, camera pose, and depth, exploiting their inherent dependency in rigid SfM. The fundamental idea presented is to benefit from per-pixel uncertainty in the optical flow estimation and provide robustness to the dense SfM system via an online refinement. Concretely, we introduce our uncertainty-driven Dense Two-View SfM pipeline (DTV-SfM), consisting of an uncertainty-aware dense optical flow estimation approach that provides per-pixel correspondence with their confidence score of matching; a weighted dense bundle adjustment formulation that depends on optical flow uncertainty and bidirectional optical flow consistency to refine both pose and depth; a depth estimation network that considers its consistency with the estimated poses and optical flow respecting epipolar constraint. Extensive experiments show that the proposed approach achieves remarkable depth accuracy and state-of-the-art camera pose results superseding SuperPoint and SuperGlue accuracy when tested on benchmark datasets such as DeMoN, YFCC100M, and ScanNet. Code and more materials are available at http://vis.xyz/pub/dtv-sfm. 这项工作介绍了一种有效且实用的运动密集双视图结构（SfM）问题的解决方案。所解决的一个重要问题是如何谨慎地使用两帧之间的每像素光流对应关系来进行准确的姿态估计——因为建立两幅图像之间完美的每像素对应关系即使不是不可能，也是很困难的。通过仔细估计的相机姿态和预测的每像素光流对应关系，计算场景的密集深度。随后，引入了迭代细化过程，以进一步提高光流匹配置信度、相机姿态和深度，利用它们在刚性 SfM 中的固有依赖性。提出的基本思想是受益于光流估计中的每像素不确定性，并通过在线细化为密集 SfM 系统提供鲁棒性。具体来说，我们介绍了不确定性驱动的密集双视图 SfM 管道（DTV-SfM），它由一种不确定性感知密集光流估计方法组成，该方法提供每个像素与其匹配置信度得分的对应关系；加权密集束调整公式取决于光流不确定性和双向光流一致性来细化姿态和深度；深度估计网络，考虑其与估计姿势和尊重极线约束的光流的一致性。大量实验表明，在 DeMoN、YFCC100M 和 ScanNet 等基准数据集上进行测试时，所提出的方法实现了卓越的深度精度和最先进的相机姿态结果，取代了 SuperPoint 和 SuperGlue 精度。代码和更多材料可在 http://vis.xyz/pub/dtv-sfm 获取。 本文提出了一种基于不确定性驱动的密集双视角运动恢复结构（SfM）方法，通过利用像素级光流的不确定性提升深度估计和相机姿态的准确性。 Weirong Chen,Suryansh Kumar,Fisher Yu cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Off-the-Grid MARL: Datasets with Baselines for Offline Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: Off-the-Grid MARL：具有离线多智能体强化学习基线的数据集
comment: Extended Abstract at Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems Conference 2023
comments: Extended Abstract at Autonomous Agents and Multi-Agent Systems Conference 2023
abstract: Being able to harness the power of large datasets for developing cooperative multi-agent controllers promises to unlock enormous value for real-world applications. Many important industrial systems are multi-agent in nature and are difficult to model using bespoke simulators. However, in industry, distributed processes can often be recorded during operation, and large quantities of demonstrative data stored. Offline multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) provides a promising paradigm for building effective decentralised controllers from such datasets. However, offline MARL is still in its infancy and therefore lacks standardised benchmark datasets and baselines typically found in more mature subfields of reinforcement learning (RL). These deficiencies make it difficult for the community to sensibly measure progress. In this work, we aim to fill this gap by releasing off-the-grid MARL (OG-MARL): a growing repository of high-quality datasets with baselines for cooperative offline MARL research. Our datasets provide settings that are characteristic of real-world systems, including complex environment dynamics, heterogeneous agents, non-stationarity, many agents, partial observability, suboptimality, sparse rewards and demonstrated coordination. For each setting, we provide a range of different dataset types (e.g. Good, Medium, Poor, and Replay) and profile the composition of experiences for each dataset. We hope that OG-MARL will serve the community as a reliable source of datasets and help drive progress, while also providing an accessible entry point for researchers new to the field.

Many important industrial systems are multi-agent in nature and are difficult to model using bespoke simulators. In this work, we aim to fill this gap by releasing off-the-grid MARL (OG-MARL): a growing repository of high-quality datasets with baselines for cooperative offline MARL research. Our datasets provide settings that are characteristic of real-world systems, including complex environment dynamics, heterogeneous agents, non-stationarity, many agents, partial observability, suboptimality, sparse rewards and demonstrated coordination. For each setting, we provide a range of different dataset types (e.g. Good, Medium, Poor, and Replay) and profile the composition of experiences for each dataset. We hope that OG-MARL will serve the community as a reliable source of datasets and help drive progress, while also providing an accessible entry point for researchers new to the field.
abstract_zh: 能够利用大型数据集的力量来开发协作的多代理控制器有望为现实世界的应用程序释放巨大的价值。许多重要的工业系统本质上都是多智能体，并且很难使用定制模拟器进行建模。然而，在工业中，分布式过程往往可以在操作过程中被记录，并存储大量的示范数据。离线多智能体强化学习（MARL）为从此类数据集中构建有效的去中心化控制器提供了一个有前途的范例。然而，离线 MARL 仍处于起步阶段，因此缺乏强化学习 (RL) 更成熟子领域中常见的标准化基准数据集和基线。这些缺陷使得社区很难明智地衡量进展情况。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过发布离线 MARL (OG-MARL) 来填补这一空白：一个不断增长的高质量数据集存储库，其中包含合作离线 MARL 研究的基线。我们的数据集提供了现实世界系统特征的设置，包括复杂的环境动态、异构代理、非平稳性、许多代理、部分可观察性、次优性、稀疏奖励和展示的协调性。对于每个设置，我们提供一系列不同的数据集类型（例如，良好、中等、较差和重播），并分析每个数据集的体验组成。我们希望 OG-MARL 能够作为可靠的数据集来源为社区服务并帮助推动进步，同时也为该领域的新研究人员提供一个可访问的切入点。

AI.tldr: 本文发布了一个名为OG-MARL的离线多智能体强化学习数据集，旨在填补该领域标准化基准的空白。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中多智能体系统难以建模且存在大量操作数据，但离线MARL缺乏统一的基准数据集和评估基线，阻碍了算法性能的客观衡量。
AI.method: 构建包含复杂环境动态、异构智能体、非平稳性等真实场景的数据集，提供多种数据类型（如Good/Medium/Poor/Replay）并分析其经验组成。
AI.result: OG-MARL成为社区可信赖的数据源，为研究者提供标准化评估框架及该领域入门途径。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集推动了离线MARL领域的发展，通过标准化基准促进算法创新与性能比较。

authors_text: Luyi Han,Tao Tan,Tianyu Zhang,Yunzhi Huang,Xin Wang,Yuan Gao,Jonas Teuwen,Ritse Mann
title: Synthesis-based Imaging-Differentiation Representation Learning for Multi-Sequence 3D/4D MRI
title_zh: 多序列 3D/4D MRI 的基于合成的成像微分表示学习
abstract: Multi-sequence MRIs can be necessary for reliable diagnosis in clinical practice due to the complimentary information within sequences. However, redundant information exists across sequences, which interferes with mining efficient representations by modern machine learning or deep learning models. To handle various clinical scenarios, we propose a sequence-to-sequence generation framework (Seq2Seq) for imaging-differentiation representation learning. In this study, not only do we propose arbitrary 3D/4D sequence generation within one model to generate any specified target sequence, but also we are able to rank the importance of each sequence based on a new metric estimating the difficulty of a sequence being generated. Furthermore, we also exploit the generation inability of the model to extract regions that contain unique information for each sequence. We conduct extensive experiments using three datasets including a toy dataset of 20,000 simulated subjects, a brain MRI dataset of 1,251 subjects, and a breast MRI dataset of 2,101 subjects, to demonstrate that (1) our proposed Seq2Seq is efficient and lightweight for complex clinical datasets and can achieve excellent image quality; (2) top-ranking sequences can be used to replace complete sequences with non-inferior performance; (3) combining MRI with our imaging-differentiation map leads to better performance in clinical tasks such as glioblastoma MGMT promoter methylation status prediction and breast cancer pathological complete response status prediction. Our code is available at https://github.com/fiy2W/mri_seq2seq.
summary: Multi-sequence MRIs can be necessary for reliable diagnosis in clinical practice due to the complimentary information within sequences. However, redundant information exists across sequences, which interferes with mining efficient representations by modern machine learning or deep learning models.
