In this study, not only do we propose arbitrary 3D/4D sequence generation within one model to generate any specified target sequence, but also we are able to rank the importance of each sequence based on a new metric estimating the difficulty of a sequence being generated. Furthermore, we also exploit the generation inability of the model to extract regions that contain unique information for each sequence. We conduct extensive experiments using three datasets including a toy dataset of 20,000 simulated subjects, a brain MRI dataset of 1,251 subjects, and a breast MRI dataset of 2,101 subjects, to demonstrate that (1) our proposed Seq2Seq is efficient and lightweight for complex clinical datasets and can achieve excellent image quality; (2) top-ranking sequences can be used to replace complete sequences with non-inferior performance; (3) combining MRI with our imaging-differentiation map leads to better performance in clinical tasks such as glioblastoma MGMT promoter methylation status prediction and breast cancer pathological complete response status prediction. Our code is available at https://github.com/fiy2W/mri_seq2seq.
abstract_zh: 由于序列内的补充信息，多序列 MRI 可能是临床实践中可靠诊断所必需的。然而，序列中存在冗余信息，这会干扰现代机器学习或深度学习模型挖掘有效表示。为了处理各种临床场景，我们提出了用于成像分化表示学习的序列到序列生成框架（Seq2Seq）。在这项研究中，我们不仅提出在一个模型内生成任意 3D/4D 序列来生成任何指定的目标序列，而且我们还能够根据估计生成序列难度的新指标对每个序列的重要性进行排名。此外，我们还利用模型的生成能力来提取包含每个序列的唯一信息的区域。我们使用三个数据集进行了广泛的实验，包括 20,000 名模拟受试者的玩具数据集、1,251 名受试者的脑 MRI 数据集和 2,101 名受试者的乳腺 MRI 数据集，以证明（1）我们提出的 Seq2Seq 对于复杂的临床数据集来说是高效且轻量级的，并且可以实现出色的图像质量； (2)可以用排名靠前的序列来替代性能不差的完整序列； (3) 将 MRI 与我们的成像分化图相结合，可以在胶质母细胞瘤 MGMT 启动子甲基化状态预测和乳腺癌病理完全缓解状态预测等临床任务中获得更好的表现。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/fiy2W/mri_seq2seq 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于合成的成像差异表示学习框架，用于处理多序列3D/4D MRI数据，以提高医学影像分析的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 多序列MRI在临床诊断中具有互补信息，但序列间的冗余信息会干扰机器学习模型的有效表示学习，需解决信息冗余与序列重要性排序问题。
AI.method: 设计了一个序列到序列生成框架（Seq2Seq），支持任意3D/4D序列生成，通过新指标评估序列生成难度以排序重要性，并利用生成失败区域提取序列特有信息。
AI.result: 在三个数据集（玩具数据集、脑部MRI、乳腺MRI）上验证，模型效率高且图像质量优异，高排名序列可替代完整序列，结合成像差异图可提升胶质母细胞瘤和乳腺癌预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂临床数据提供了高效轻量的解决方案，通过差异表示学习增强了临床任务性能，具有重要的医学影像分析应用价值。

search_text: Synthesis-based Imaging-Differentiation Representation Learning for Multi-Sequence 3D/4D MRI 多序列 3D/4D MRI 的基于合成的成像微分表示学习 Multi-sequence MRIs can be necessary for reliable diagnosis in clinical practice due to the complimentary information within sequences. However, redundant information exists across sequences, which interferes with mining efficient representations by modern machine learning or deep learning models. To handle various clinical scenarios, we propose a sequence-to-sequence generation framework (Seq2Seq) for imaging-differentiation representation learning. In this study, not only do we propose arbitrary 3D/4D sequence generation within one model to generate any specified target sequence, but also we are able to rank the importance of each sequence based on a new metric estimating the difficulty of a sequence being generated. Furthermore, we also exploit the generation inability of the model to extract regions that contain unique information for each sequence. We conduct extensive experiments using three datasets including a toy dataset of 20,000 simulated subjects, a brain MRI dataset of 1,251 subjects, and a breast MRI dataset of 2,101 subjects, to demonstrate that (1) our proposed Seq2Seq is efficient and lightweight for complex clinical datasets and can achieve excellent image quality; (2) top-ranking sequences can be used to replace complete sequences with non-inferior performance; (3) combining MRI with our imaging-differentiation map leads to better performance in clinical tasks such as glioblastoma MGMT promoter methylation status prediction and breast cancer pathological complete response status prediction. Our code is available at https://github.com/fiy2W/mri_seq2seq. 由于序列内的补充信息，多序列 MRI 可能是临床实践中可靠诊断所必需的。然而，序列中存在冗余信息，这会干扰现代机器学习或深度学习模型挖掘有效表示。为了处理各种临床场景，我们提出了用于成像分化表示学习的序列到序列生成框架（Seq2Seq）。在这项研究中，我们不仅提出在一个模型内生成任意 3D/4D 序列来生成任何指定的目标序列，而且我们还能够根据估计生成序列难度的新指标对每个序列的重要性进行排名。此外，我们还利用模型的生成能力来提取包含每个序列的唯一信息的区域。我们使用三个数据集进行了广泛的实验，包括 20,000 名模拟受试者的玩具数据集、1,251 名受试者的脑 MRI 数据集和 2,101 名受试者的乳腺 MRI 数据集，以证明（1）我们提出的 Seq2Seq 对于复杂的临床数据集来说是高效且轻量级的，并且可以实现出色的图像质量； (2)可以用排名靠前的序列来替代性能不差的完整序列； (3) 将 MRI 与我们的成像分化图相结合，可以在胶质母细胞瘤 MGMT 启动子甲基化状态预测和乳腺癌病理完全缓解状态预测等临床任务中获得更好的表现。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/fiy2W/mri_seq2seq 获取。 本文提出了一种基于合成的成像差异表示学习框架，用于处理多序列3D/4D MRI数据，以提高医学影像分析的效率和准确性。 Luyi Han,Tao Tan,Tianyu Zhang,Yunzhi Huang,Xin Wang,Yuan Gao,Jonas Teuwen,Ritse Mann cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: G. Dumindu Samaraweera,Hung Nguyen,Hadi Zanddizari,Behnam Zeinali,J. Morris Chang
title: Towards Implementing Energy-aware Data-driven Intelligence for Smart Health Applications on Mobile Platforms
title_zh: 致力于在移动平台上实现智能健康应用的能源感知数据驱动智能
abstract: Recent breakthrough technological progressions of powerful mobile computing resources such as low-cost mobile GPUs along with cutting-edge, open-source software architectures have enabled high-performance deep learning on mobile platforms. These advancements have revolutionized the capabilities of today's mobile applications in different dimensions to perform data-driven intelligence locally, particularly for smart health applications. Unlike traditional machine learning (ML) architectures, modern on-device deep learning frameworks are proficient in utilizing computing resources in mobile platforms seamlessly, in terms of producing highly accurate results in less inference time. However, on the flip side, energy resources in a mobile device are typically limited. Hence, whenever a complex Deep Neural Network (DNN) architecture is fed into the on-device deep learning framework, while it achieves high prediction accuracy (and performance), it also urges huge energy demands during the runtime. Therefore, managing these resources efficiently within the spectrum of performance and energy efficiency is the newest challenge for any mobile application featuring data-driven intelligence beyond experimental evaluations. In this paper, first, we provide a timely review of recent advancements in on-device deep learning while empirically evaluating the performance metrics of current state-of-the-art ML architectures and conventional ML approaches with the emphasis given on energy characteristics by deploying them on a smart health application. With that, we are introducing a new framework through an energy-aware, adaptive model comprehension and realization (EAMCR) approach that can be utilized to make more robust and efficient inference decisions based on the available computing/energy resources in the mobile device during the runtime.
summary: Recent breakthrough technological progressions of powerful mobile computing resources such as low-cost mobile GPUs along with cutting-edge, open-source software architectures have enabled high-performance deep learning on mobile platforms. These advancements have revolutionized the capabilities of today's mobile applications in different dimensions to perform data-driven intelligence locally, particularly for smart health applications. Unlike traditional machine learning (ML) architectures, modern on-device deep learning frameworks are proficient in utilizing computing resources in mobile platforms seamlessly, in terms of producing highly accurate results in less inference time. However, on the flip side, energy resources in a mobile device are typically limited. Hence, whenever a complex Deep Neural Network (DNN) architecture is fed into the on-device deep learning framework, while it achieves high prediction accuracy (and performance), it also urges huge energy demands during the runtime. Therefore, managing these resources efficiently within the spectrum of performance and energy efficiency is the newest challenge for any mobile application featuring data-driven intelligence beyond experimental evaluations. In this paper, first, we provide a timely review of recent advancements in on-device deep learning while empirically evaluating the performance metrics of current state-of-the-art ML architectures and conventional ML approaches with the emphasis given on energy characteristics by deploying them on a smart health application. With that, we are introducing a new framework through an energy-aware, adaptive model comprehension and realization (EAMCR) approach that can be utilized to make more robust and efficient inference decisions based on the available computing/energy resources in the mobile device during the runtime.
abstract_zh: 最近，强大的移动计算资源（例如低成本移动 GPU）以及尖端的开源软件架构取得了突破性的技术进步，使得移动平台上的高性能深度学习成为可能。这些进步在不同方面彻底改变了当今移动应用程序的能力，以在本地执行数据驱动的智能，特别是对于智能健康应用程序。与传统的机器学习 (ML) 架构不同，现代设备端深度学习框架能够熟练地无缝利用移动平台中的计算资源，从而在更短的推理时间内产生高度准确的结果。然而，另一方面，移动设备中的能源通常是有限的。因此，每当将复杂的深度神经网络（DNN）架构输入设备端深度学习框架时，在实现高预测精度（和性能）的同时，也会在运行时产生巨大的能源需求。因此，对于任何具有实验评估之外的数据驱动智能的移动应用程序来说，在性能和能源效率范围内有效管理这些资源是最新的挑战。在本文中，首先，我们及时回顾了设备上深度学习的最新进展，同时对当前最先进的机器学习架构和传统机器学习方法的性能指标进行了实证评估，重点是通过将它们部署在智能健康应用程序上来关注能源特征。为此，我们通过能量感知、自适应模型理解和实现 (EAMCR) 方法引入了一个新框架，该方法可用于根据运行时移动设备中的可用计算/能源资源做出更稳健、更高效的推理决策。

AI.tldr: 提出一种节能的自适应模型框架，以优化移动设备上智能健康应用的深度学习推理。
AI.motivation: 尽管移动设备计算能力提升，但能源有限，复杂模型导致高能耗，需平衡性能与能效。
AI.method: 提出EAMCR框架，通过动态调整模型复杂度和资源分配，实现运行时的能效优化。
AI.result: 实证评估现有模型能效，验证EAMCR框架在提升推理效率与节能方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 有效资源管理对移动数据驱动应用至关重要，EAMCR框架为此提供了解决方案。

authors_text: Jasmin Brandt,Marcel Wever,Dimitrios Iliadis,Viktor Bengs,Eyke Hüllermeier
title: Iterative Deepening Hyperband
title_zh: 迭代深化超带
abstract: Hyperparameter optimization (HPO) is concerned with the automated search for the most appropriate hyperparameter configuration (HPC) of a parameterized machine learning algorithm. A state-of-the-art HPO method is Hyperband, which, however, has its own parameters that influence its performance. One of these parameters, the maximal budget, is especially problematic: If chosen too small, the budget needs to be increased in hindsight and, as Hyperband is not incremental by design, the entire algorithm must be re-run. This is not only costly but also comes with a loss of valuable knowledge already accumulated. In this paper, we propose incremental variants of Hyperband that eliminate these drawbacks, and show that these variants satisfy theoretical guarantees qualitatively similar to those for the original Hyperband with the "right" budget. Moreover, we demonstrate their practical utility in experiments with benchmark data sets.
summary: Hyperparameter optimization (HPO) is concerned with the automated search for the most appropriate hyperparameter configuration (HPC) of a parameterized machine learning algorithm. A state-of-the-art HPO method is Hyperband, which, however, has its own parameters that influence its performance. One of these parameters, the maximal budget, is especially problematic: If chosen too small, the budget needs to be increased in hindsight and, as Hyperband is not incremental by design, the entire algorithm must be re-run. This is not only costly but also comes with a loss of valuable knowledge already accumulated. In this paper, we propose incremental variants of Hyperband that eliminate these drawbacks, and show that these variants satisfy theoretical guarantees qualitatively similar to those for the original Hyperband with the "right" budget. Moreover, we demonstrate their practical utility in experiments with benchmark data sets.
abstract_zh: 超参数优化 (HPO) 涉及自动搜索参数化机器学习算法的最合适的超参数配置 (HPC)。最先进的 HPO 方法是 Hyperband，但是它有自己的参数影响其性能。这些参数之一，即最大预算，尤其有问题：如果选择太小，事后需要增加预算，并且由于 Hyperband 在设计上不是增量的，因此必须重新运行整个算法。这不仅成本高昂，而且还会损失已经积累的宝贵知识。在本文中，我们提出了 Hyperband 的增量变体，可以消除这些缺点，并表明这些变体在质量上满足与具有“正确”预算的原始 Hyperband 类似的理论保证。此外，我们在基准数据集的实验中展示了它们的实用性。

AI.tldr: 提出增量型Hyperband算法以解决原方法中最大预算参数选择不当导致的效率问题
AI.motivation: 现有Hyperband算法的最大预算参数选择不当会导致需重新运行整个算法，造成资源浪费和知识丢失
AI.method: 设计增量型Hyperband算法，通过迭代加深策略和增量学习机制，实现预算的动态调整与知识复用
AI.result: 实验表明新方法在基准数据集上具有与原Hyperband相当的性能，同时减少资源浪费
AI.conclusion: 增量型Hyperband算法有效解决了原方法的预算问题，在保持性能的同时提升资源利用效率

search_text: Iterative Deepening Hyperband 迭代深化超带 Hyperparameter optimization (HPO) is concerned with the automated search for the most appropriate hyperparameter configuration (HPC) of a parameterized machine learning algorithm. A state-of-the-art HPO method is Hyperband, which, however, has its own parameters that influence its performance. One of these parameters, the maximal budget, is especially problematic: If chosen too small, the budget needs to be increased in hindsight and, as Hyperband is not incremental by design, the entire algorithm must be re-run. This is not only costly but also comes with a loss of valuable knowledge already accumulated. In this paper, we propose incremental variants of Hyperband that eliminate these drawbacks, and show that these variants satisfy theoretical guarantees qualitatively similar to those for the original Hyperband with the "right" budget. Moreover, we demonstrate their practical utility in experiments with benchmark data sets. 超参数优化 (HPO) 涉及自动搜索参数化机器学习算法的最合适的超参数配置 (HPC)。最先进的 HPO 方法是 Hyperband，但是它有自己的参数影响其性能。这些参数之一，即最大预算，尤其有问题：如果选择太小，事后需要增加预算，并且由于 Hyperband 在设计上不是增量的，因此必须重新运行整个算法。这不仅成本高昂，而且还会损失已经积累的宝贵知识。在本文中，我们提出了 Hyperband 的增量变体，可以消除这些缺点，并表明这些变体在质量上满足与具有“正确”预算的原始 Hyperband 类似的理论保证。此外，我们在基准数据集的实验中展示了它们的实用性。 提出增量型Hyperband算法以解决原方法中最大预算参数选择不当导致的效率问题 Jasmin Brandt,Marcel Wever,Dimitrios Iliadis,Viktor Bengs,Eyke Hüllermeier cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ziqing Ji,Pranav Kulkarni,Marko Neskovic,Kevin Nolan,Yan Xu
title: Exploring Semantic Perturbations on Grover
title_zh: 探索格罗弗的语义扰动
abstract: With news and information being as easy to access as they currently are, it is more important than ever to ensure that people are not mislead by what they read. Recently, the rise of neural fake news (AI-generated fake news) and its demonstrated effectiveness at fooling humans has prompted the development of models to detect it. One such model is the Grover model, which can both detect neural fake news to prevent it, and generate it to demonstrate how a model could be misused to fool human readers. In this work we explore the Grover model's fake news detection capabilities by performing targeted attacks through perturbations on input news articles. Through this we test Grover's resilience to these adversarial attacks and expose some potential vulnerabilities which should be addressed in further iterations to ensure it can detect all types of fake news accurately.
summary: With news and information being as easy to access as they currently are, it is more important than ever to ensure that people are not mislead by what they read. Recently, the rise of neural fake news (AI-generated fake news) and its demonstrated effectiveness at fooling humans has prompted the development of models to detect it. One such model is the Grover model, which can both detect neural fake news to prevent it, and generate it to demonstrate how a model could be misused to fool human readers. In this work we explore the Grover model's fake news detection capabilities by performing targeted attacks through perturbations on input news articles. Through this we test Grover's resilience to these adversarial attacks and expose some potential vulnerabilities which should be addressed in further iterations to ensure it can detect all types of fake news accurately.
abstract_zh: 随着新闻和信息像现在一样容易获取，确保人们不被他们所阅读的内容误导比以往任何时候都更加重要。最近，神经假新闻（人工智能生成的假新闻）的兴起及其在愚弄人类方面所表现出的有效性，促使检测模型的开发。 Grover 模型就是这样的一个模型，它既可以检测神经假新闻以防止假新闻，又可以生成假新闻来演示模型如何被滥用来愚弄人类读者。在这项工作中，我们通过对输入新闻文章进行扰动来执行有针对性的攻击，从而探索 Grover 模型的假新闻检测功能。通过这个，我们测试了 Grover 对这些对抗性攻击的恢复能力，并暴露了一些潜在的漏洞，这些漏洞应该在进一步的迭代中解决，以确保它能够准确地检测所有类型的假新闻。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过语义扰动攻击测试Grover模型的假新闻检测能力，评估其鲁棒性并揭示潜在漏洞。
AI.motivation: 随着AI生成假新闻的普及，亟需确保检测模型如Grover能准确识别所有类型的假新闻，因此需测试其在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过在输入新闻文章中引入语义扰动进行针对性攻击，测试Grover模型的检测能力及其对对抗样本的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，Grover模型在特定语义扰动下存在检测失效的情况，暴露出其在应对对抗攻击时的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 研究指出，需进一步优化Grover模型以增强其对抗语义扰动的鲁棒性，从而全面准确地检测各类假新闻。

title: Tracking People in Highly Dynamic Industrial Environments
title_zh: 跟踪高度动态工业环境中的人员
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing, vol. 16, no. 8, pp. 2351-2365, 1 Aug. 2017
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing, vol. 16, no. 8, pp. 2351-2365, 1 Aug. 2017
abstract: To date, the majority of positioning systems have been designed to operate within environments that have long-term stable macro-structure with potential small-scale dynamics. These assumptions allow the existing positioning systems to produce and utilize stable maps. However, in highly dynamic industrial settings these assumptions are no longer valid and the task of tracking people is more challenging due to the rapid large-scale changes in structure. In this paper we propose a novel positioning system for tracking people in highly dynamic industrial environments, such as construction sites. The proposed system leverages the existing CCTV camera infrastructure found in many industrial settings along with radio and inertial sensors within each worker's mobile phone to accurately track multiple people. This multi-target multi-sensor tracking framework also allows our system to use cross-modality training in order to deal with the environment dynamics. In particular, we show how our system uses cross-modality training in order to automatically keep track environmental changes (i.e. new walls) by utilizing occlusion maps. In addition, we show how these maps can be used in conjunction with social forces to accurately predict human motion and increase the tracking accuracy. We have conducted extensive real-world experiments in a construction site showing significant accuracy improvement via cross-modality training and the use of social forces.
summary: To date, the majority of positioning systems have been designed to operate within environments that have long-term stable macro-structure with potential small-scale dynamics. These assumptions allow the existing positioning systems to produce and utilize stable maps. However, in highly dynamic industrial settings these assumptions are no longer valid and the task of tracking people is more challenging due to the rapid large-scale changes in structure. In this paper we propose a novel positioning system for tracking people in highly dynamic industrial environments, such as construction sites. The proposed system leverages the existing CCTV camera infrastructure found in many industrial settings along with radio and inertial sensors within each worker's mobile phone to accurately track multiple people. This multi-target multi-sensor tracking framework also allows our system to use cross-modality training in order to deal with the environment dynamics. In particular, we show how our system uses cross-modality training in order to automatically keep track environmental changes (i.e. new walls) by utilizing occlusion maps. In addition, we show how these maps can be used in conjunction with social forces to accurately predict human motion and increase the tracking accuracy. We have conducted extensive real-world experiments in a construction site showing significant accuracy improvement via cross-modality training and the use of social forces.
abstract_zh: 迄今为止，大多数定位系统都被设计为在具有长期稳定的宏观结构和潜在的小规模动态的环境中运行。这些假设允许现有的定位系统生成和利用稳定的地图。然而，在高度动态的工业环境中，这些假设不再有效，并且由于结构的快速大规模变化，跟踪人员的任务更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的定位系统，用于在高度动态的工业环境（例如建筑工地）中跟踪人员。拟议的系统利用许多工业环境中现有的闭路电视摄像头基础设施以及每个工人手机内的无线电和惯性传感器来准确跟踪多人。这种多目标多传感器跟踪框架还允许我们的系统使用跨模态训练来处理环境动态。特别是，我们展示了我们的系统如何使用跨模态训练，以便通过利用遮挡图自动跟踪环境变化（即新墙）。此外，我们还展示了如何将这些地图与社会力量结合使用，以准确预测人体运动并提高跟踪精度。我们在建筑工地进行了广泛的现实世界实验，结果表明，通过跨模态训练和使用社会力量，准确性得到了显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于高度动态工业环境（如建筑工地）中多人跟踪的新型定位系统。
AI.motivation: 现有定位系统假设环境结构长期稳定，但在高度动态的工业场景中，结构快速变化导致传统方法难以准确跟踪人员。
AI.method: 结合现有CCTV摄像头、工人手机中的无线电和惯性传感器，构建多目标多传感器跟踪框架，并利用跨模态训练与遮挡图结合社会力模型预测人体运动。
AI.result: 在建筑工地的真实实验中，通过跨模态训练和社交力模型的应用，显著提升了跟踪精度。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过融合多传感器数据与环境动态适应机制，有效解决了高度动态工业环境中人员跟踪的挑战。

In particular, we show how our system uses cross-modality training in order to automatically keep track environmental changes (i.e. new walls) by utilizing occlusion maps. In addition, we show how these maps can be used in conjunction with social forces to accurately predict human motion and increase the tracking accuracy. We have conducted extensive real-world experiments in a construction site showing significant accuracy improvement via cross-modality training and the use of social forces. 迄今为止，大多数定位系统都被设计为在具有长期稳定的宏观结构和潜在的小规模动态的环境中运行。这些假设允许现有的定位系统生成和利用稳定的地图。然而，在高度动态的工业环境中，这些假设不再有效，并且由于结构的快速大规模变化，跟踪人员的任务更具挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的定位系统，用于在高度动态的工业环境（例如建筑工地）中跟踪人员。拟议的系统利用许多工业环境中现有的闭路电视摄像头基础设施以及每个工人手机内的无线电和惯性传感器来准确跟踪多人。这种多目标多传感器跟踪框架还允许我们的系统使用跨模态训练来处理环境动态。特别是，我们展示了我们的系统如何使用跨模态训练，以便通过利用遮挡图自动跟踪环境变化（即新墙）。此外，我们还展示了如何将这些地图与社会力量结合使用，以准确预测人体运动并提高跟踪精度。我们在建筑工地进行了广泛的现实世界实验，结果表明，通过跨模态训练和使用社会力量，准确性得到了显着提高。 本文提出了一种用于高度动态工业环境（如建筑工地）中多人跟踪的新型定位系统。 Savvas Papaioannou,Andrew Markham,Niki Trigoni cs.CV

title: Serious Games and AI: Challenges and Opportunities for Computational Social Science
title_zh: 严肃游戏和人工智能：计算社会科学的挑战和机遇
abstract: The video game industry plays an essential role in the entertainment sphere of our society. However, from Monopoly to Flight Simulators, serious games have also been appealing tools for learning a new language, conveying values, or training skills. Furthermore, the resurgence of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and data science in the last decade has created a unique opportunity since the amount of data collected through a game is immense, as is the amount of data needed to feed such AI algorithms. This paper aims to identify relevant research lines using Serious Games as a novel research tool, especially in Computational Social Sciences. To contextualize, we also conduct a (non-systematic) literature review of this field. We conclude that the synergy between games and data can foster the use of AI for good and open up new strategies to empower humanity and support social research with novel computational tools. We also discuss the challenges and new opportunities that arise from aspiring to such lofty goals.
summary: The video game industry plays an essential role in the entertainment sphere of our society. However, from Monopoly to Flight Simulators, serious games have also been appealing tools for learning a new language, conveying values, or training skills. Furthermore, the resurgence of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and data science in the last decade has created a unique opportunity since the amount of data collected through a game is immense, as is the amount of data needed to feed such AI algorithms. This paper aims to identify relevant research lines using Serious Games as a novel research tool, especially in Computational Social Sciences. To contextualize, we also conduct a (non-systematic) literature review of this field. We conclude that the synergy between games and data can foster the use of AI for good and open up new strategies to empower humanity and support social research with novel computational tools. We also discuss the challenges and new opportunities that arise from aspiring to such lofty goals.
abstract_zh: 视频游戏产业在我们社会的娱乐领域发挥着重要作用。然而，从《大富翁》到《飞行模拟器》，严肃游戏也是学习新语言、传达价值观或培训技能的有吸引力的工具。此外，过去十年人工智能 (AI) 和数据科学的复兴创造了一个独特的机会，因为通过游戏收集的数据量非常巨大，支持此类人工智能算法所需的数据量也非常巨大。本文旨在使用严肃游戏作为一种新颖的研究工具来确定相关的研究方向，特别是在计算社会科学领域。为了结合实际情况，我们还对该领域进行了（非系统的）文献综述。我们的结论是，游戏和数据之间的协同作用可以促进人工智能的善用，并开辟新的策略来增强人类能力并通过新颖的计算工具支持社会研究。我们还讨论了追求如此崇高目标所带来的挑战和新机遇。

AI.tldr: 探讨严肃游戏与人工智能在计算社会科学中的协同作用及研究机遇
AI.motivation: 严肃游戏具有教育和社会价值，而人工智能和数据科学的发展为社会科学研究提供了新工具，需探索二者结合的潜力
AI.method: 通过非系统性文献综述梳理该领域研究现状
AI.result: 发现游戏数据与AI结合可推动社会科学研究创新，但面临数据伦理、算法偏见等挑战
AI.conclusion: 游戏与AI的融合为社会问题研究提供新范式，需平衡技术潜力与社会责任

authors_text: Lashawnda Bynum,Jay Parker,Kristy Lee,Nia Nitschke,Melanie LaFlam,Jennifer Marcussen,Jana Taleb,Aleyna Dogan,Lisa J. Molnar,Feng Zhou
title: Navigating in the Dark -- Designing Autonomous Driving Features to Assist Old Adults with Visual Impairments
title_zh: 在黑暗中导航——设计自动驾驶功能来帮助视力障碍的老年人
abstract: Age-related macular degeneration is a leading cause of blindness worldwide and is one of many limitations to independent driving among old adults. Highly autonomous vehicles present a prospective solution for those who are no longer capable of driving due to low vision. However, accessibility issues must be addressed to create a safe and pleasant experience for this group of users so that it allows them to maintain an appropriate level of situational awareness and a sense of control during driving. In this study, we made use of a human-centered design process consisting of five stages - empathize, define, ideate, prototype, and test. We designed a prototype to aid old adults with age-related macular degeneration to travel with a necessary level of situational awareness and remain in control while riding in a highly or fully autonomous vehicle. The final design prototype includes a voice-activated navigation system with three levels of details to bolster situational awareness, a 360 degree in-vehicle camera to detect both the passenger and objects around the vehicle, a retractable microphone for the passenger to be easily registered in the vehicle while speaking, and a physical button on the console-side of the right and left front seats to manually activate the navigation system.
summary: Age-related macular degeneration is a leading cause of blindness worldwide and is one of many limitations to independent driving among old adults. Highly autonomous vehicles present a prospective solution for those who are no longer capable of driving due to low vision. However, accessibility issues must be addressed to create a safe and pleasant experience for this group of users so that it allows them to maintain an appropriate level of situational awareness and a sense of control during driving. In this study, we made use of a human-centered design process consisting of five stages - empathize, define, ideate, prototype, and test. We designed a prototype to aid old adults with age-related macular degeneration to travel with a necessary level of situational awareness and remain in control while riding in a highly or fully autonomous vehicle. The final design prototype includes a voice-activated navigation system with three levels of details to bolster situational awareness, a 360 degree in-vehicle camera to detect both the passenger and objects around the vehicle, a retractable microphone for the passenger to be easily registered in the vehicle while speaking, and a physical button on the console-side of the right and left front seats to manually activate the navigation system.
abstract_zh: 年龄相关性黄斑变性是全世界失明的主要原因，也是老年人独立驾驶的诸多限制之一。高度自动驾驶汽车为那些因视力低下而无法驾驶的人提供了一个前瞻性的解决方案。然而，必须解决无障碍问题，为这组用户创造安全、愉快的体验，使他们在驾驶过程中保持适当水平的态势感知和控制感。在这项研究中，我们采用了以人为本的设计流程，该流程由五个阶段组成：移情、定义、构思、原型和测试。我们设计了一个原型，帮助患有年龄相关性黄斑变性的老年人在出行时具有必要的情境意识，并在乘坐高度或完全自动驾驶的车辆时保持控制。最终的设计原型包括一个具有三个细节级别的声控导航系统，以增强态势感知能力；一个用于检测乘客和车辆周围物体的 360 度车载摄像头；一个可伸缩麦克风，供乘客在说话时在车内轻松注册；以及左右前排座椅控制台侧的一个物理按钮，用于手动激活导航系统。

AI.tldr: 设计自动驾驶功能以帮助视力受损的老年人安全、自主地使用高度自动驾驶车辆
AI.motivation: 年龄相关性黄斑变性导致老年人视力受损，无法独立驾驶，需通过改进自动驾驶车辆的可访问性来保障其安全与自主性
AI.method: 采用以人为本的设计流程，包括同理心、定义、构思、原型设计和测试五个阶段，开发辅助功能原型
AI.result: 开发出包含多级语音导航、360度摄像头、可伸缩麦克风及物理控制按钮的原型系统，提升老年人的环境意识与控制感
AI.conclusion: 该设计通过增强环境感知与控制功能，有效提升视力受损老年人在自动驾驶车辆中的安全性和自主性

title: Hybrid Probabilistic Logic Programming: Inference and Learning
title_zh: 混合概率逻辑编程：推理和学习
abstract: This thesis focuses on advancing probabilistic logic programming (PLP), which combines probability theory for uncertainty and logic programming for relations. The thesis aims to extend PLP to support both discrete and continuous random variables, which is necessary for applications with numeric data. The first contribution is the introduction of context-specific likelihood weighting (CS-LW), a new sampling algorithm that exploits context-specific independencies for computational gains. Next, a new hybrid PLP, DC#, is introduced, which integrates the syntax of Distributional Clauses with Bayesian logic programs and represents three types of independencies: i) conditional independencies (CIs) modeled in Bayesian networks; ii) context-specific independencies (CSIs) represented by logical rules, and iii) independencies amongst attributes of related objects in relational models expressed by combining rules. The scalable inference algorithm FO-CS-LW is introduced for DC#. Finally, the thesis addresses the lack of approaches for learning hybrid PLP from relational data with missing values and (probabilistic) background knowledge with the introduction of DiceML, which learns the structure and parameters of hybrid PLP and tackles the relational autocompletion problem. The conclusion discusses future directions and open challenges for hybrid PLP.
summary: This thesis focuses on advancing probabilistic logic programming (PLP), which combines probability theory for uncertainty and logic programming for relations. The thesis aims to extend PLP to support both discrete and continuous random variables, which is necessary for applications with numeric data. The first contribution is the introduction of context-specific likelihood weighting (CS-LW), a new sampling algorithm that exploits context-specific independencies for computational gains. Next, a new hybrid PLP, DC#, is introduced, which integrates the syntax of Distributional Clauses with Bayesian logic programs and represents three types of independencies: i) conditional independencies (CIs) modeled in Bayesian networks; ii) context-specific independencies (CSIs) represented by logical rules, and iii) independencies amongst attributes of related objects in relational models expressed by combining rules. The scalable inference algorithm FO-CS-LW is introduced for DC#. Finally, the thesis addresses the lack of approaches for learning hybrid PLP from relational data with missing values and (probabilistic) background knowledge with the introduction of DiceML, which learns the structure and parameters of hybrid PLP and tackles the relational autocompletion problem. The conclusion discusses future directions and open challenges for hybrid PLP.
abstract_zh: 本论文的重点是推进概率逻辑编程（PLP），它将不确定性的概率论和关系的逻辑编程结合起来。本文旨在扩展 PLP 以支持离散和连续随机变量，这对于数值数据的应用程序是必需的。第一个贡献是引入了上下文特定的似然加权（CS-LW），这是一种新的采样算法，利用上下文特定的独立性来获得计算增益。接下来，引入了一种新的混合 PLP DC#，它将分布子句的语法与贝叶斯逻辑程序相集成，并表示三种类型的独立性：i）在贝叶斯网络中建模的条件独立性（CI）； ii）由逻辑规则表示的特定于上下文的独立性（CSI），以及 iii）由组合规则表示的关系模型中相关对象的属性之间的独立性。针对 DC# 引入了可扩展推理算法 FO-CS-LW。最后，本文通过引入 DiceML 来解决缺乏从具有缺失值和（概率）背景知识的关系数据中学习混合 PLP 的方法的问题，DiceML 可以学习混合 PLP 的结构和参数并解决关系自动完成问题。结论讨论了混合 PLP 的未来方向和开放挑战。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在推进概率逻辑编程（PLP），使其能够支持离散和连续随机变量，以适应具有数值数据的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有的概率逻辑编程方法在处理包含数值数据的应用时存在局限性，因此需要扩展PLP以支持连续随机变量并提高计算效率。
AI.method: 论文引入了上下文特定似然加权（CS-LW）算法和一种新的混合PLP框架DC#，该框架结合了分布子句和贝叶斯逻辑程序，并提出了可扩展的推理算法FO-CS-LW和学习方法DiceML。
AI.result: 论文成功开发了新的推理和学习方法，提高了混合PLP在处理关系数据和缺失值方面的效率，并解决了关系自动补全问题。
AI.conclusion: 论文提出了混合PLP的新方法和工具，但未来仍需解决一些开放性挑战，如进一步提高算法的可扩展性和鲁棒性。

search_text: Hybrid Probabilistic Logic Programming: Inference and Learning 混合概率逻辑编程：推理和学习 This thesis focuses on advancing probabilistic logic programming (PLP), which combines probability theory for uncertainty and logic programming for relations. The thesis aims to extend PLP to support both discrete and continuous random variables, which is necessary for applications with numeric data. The first contribution is the introduction of context-specific likelihood weighting (CS-LW), a new sampling algorithm that exploits context-specific independencies for computational gains. Next, a new hybrid PLP, DC#, is introduced, which integrates the syntax of Distributional Clauses with Bayesian logic programs and represents three types of independencies: i) conditional independencies (CIs) modeled in Bayesian networks; ii) context-specific independencies (CSIs) represented by logical rules, and iii) independencies amongst attributes of related objects in relational models expressed by combining rules. The scalable inference algorithm FO-CS-LW is introduced for DC#. Finally, the thesis addresses the lack of approaches for learning hybrid PLP from relational data with missing values and (probabilistic) background knowledge with the introduction of DiceML, which learns the structure and parameters of hybrid PLP and tackles the relational autocompletion problem. The conclusion discusses future directions and open challenges for hybrid PLP. 本论文的重点是推进概率逻辑编程（PLP），它将不确定性的概率论和关系的逻辑编程结合起来。本文旨在扩展 PLP 以支持离散和连续随机变量，这对于数值数据的应用程序是必需的。第一个贡献是引入了上下文特定的似然加权（CS-LW），这是一种新的采样算法，利用上下文特定的独立性来获得计算增益。接下来，引入了一种新的混合 PLP DC#，它将分布子句的语法与贝叶斯逻辑程序相集成，并表示三种类型的独立性：i）在贝叶斯网络中建模的条件独立性（CI）； ii）由逻辑规则表示的特定于上下文的独立性（CSI），以及 iii）由组合规则表示的关系模型中相关对象的属性之间的独立性。针对 DC# 引入了可扩展推理算法 FO-CS-LW。最后，本文通过引入 DiceML 来解决缺乏从具有缺失值和（概率）背景知识的关系数据中学习混合 PLP 的方法的问题，DiceML 可以学习混合 PLP 的结构和参数并解决关系自动完成问题。结论讨论了混合 PLP 的未来方向和开放挑战。 该论文旨在推进概率逻辑编程（PLP），使其能够支持离散和连续随机变量，以适应具有数值数据的应用。 Nitesh Kumar cs.AI,cs.LO

title: Upper-limb Geometric MyoPassivity Map for Physical Human-Robot Interaction
title_zh: 用于物理人机交互的上肢几何 MyoPassivity 地图
abstract: The intrinsic biomechanical characteristic of the human upper limb plays a central role in absorbing the interactive energy during physical human-robot interaction (pHRI). We have recently shown that based on the concept of ``Excess of Passivity (EoP)," from nonlinear control theory, it is possible to decode such energetic behavior for both upper and lower limbs. The extracted knowledge can be used in the design of controllers for optimizing the transparency and fidelity of force fields in human-robot interaction and in haptic systems. In this paper, for the first time, we investigate the frequency behavior of the passivity map for the upper limb when the muscle co-activation was controlled in real-time through visual electromyographic feedback. Five healthy subjects (age: 27 +/- 5) were included in this study. The energetic behavior was evaluated at two stimulation frequencies at eight interaction directions over two controlled muscle co-activation levels. Electromyography (EMG) was captured using the Delsys Wireless Trigno system. Results showed a correlation between EMG and EoP, which was further altered by increasing the frequency. The proposed energetic behavior is named the Geometric MyoPassivity (GMP) map. The findings indicate that the GMP map has the potential to be used in real-time to quantify the absorbable energy, thus passivity margin of stability for upper limb interaction during pHRI.

We have recently shown that based on the concept of ``Excess of Passivity (EoP)," from nonlinear control theory, it is possible to decode such energetic behavior for both upper and lower limbs. The extracted knowledge can be used in the design of controllers for optimizing the transparency and fidelity of force fields in human-robot interaction and in haptic systems. In this paper, for the first time, we investigate the frequency behavior of the passivity map for the upper limb when the muscle co-activation was controlled in real-time through visual electromyographic feedback. Five healthy subjects (age: 27 +/- 5) were included in this study. The energetic behavior was evaluated at two stimulation frequencies at eight interaction directions over two controlled muscle co-activation levels. abstract_zh: 人类上肢的固有生物力学特征在人机物理交互（pHRI）过程中吸收交互能量方面发挥着核心作用。我们最近表明，基于非线性控制理论中的“被动过度（EoP）”概念，可以解码上肢和下肢的这种能量行为。提取的知识可用于控制器的设计，以优化人机交互和触觉系统中力场的透明度和保真度。在本文中，我们首次研究了实时控制肌肉共同激活时上肢被动图的频率行为本研究纳入了五名健康受试者（年龄：27 +/- 5 岁），使用 Delsys 无线 Trigno 系统在八个相互作用方向上评估了能量行为。用于实时量化可吸收能量，从而量化 pHRI 期间上肢相互作用的被动稳定裕度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于肌电信号的几何肌被动性（GMP）图，用于量化上肢在物理人机交互中的能量吸收特性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以实时准确评估人机交互中的能量吸收特性，需开发更精确的模型以优化交互稳定性与透明度。
AI.method: 通过视觉肌电反馈实时控制肌肉共激活水平，采集五名受试者在不同频率、方向及激活水平下的肌电信号，分析其与被动性过剩（EoP）的关系。
AI.result: 发现肌电信号（EMG）与EoP存在相关性，且随频率变化而改变，据此提出GMP图以表征上肢能量吸收特性。
AI.conclusion: GMP图可实时量化上肢交互的稳定性边距，为优化人机交互控制器设计提供新方法。

title: Learning Prototype Classifiers for Long-Tailed Recognition
title_zh: 用于长尾识别的学习原型分类器
abstract: The problem of long-tailed recognition (LTR) has received attention in recent years due to the fundamental power-law distribution of objects in the real-world. Most recent works in LTR use softmax classifiers that are biased in that they correlate classifier norm with the amount of training data for a given class. In this work, we show that learning prototype classifiers addresses the biased softmax problem in LTR. Prototype classifiers can deliver promising results simply using Nearest-Class- Mean (NCM), a special case where prototypes are empirical centroids. We go one step further and propose to jointly learn prototypes by using distances to prototypes in representation space as the logit scores for classification. Further, we theoretically analyze the properties of Euclidean distance based prototype classifiers that lead to stable gradient-based optimization which is robust to outliers. To enable independent distance scales along each channel, we enhance Prototype classifiers by learning channel-dependent temperature parameters. Our analysis shows that prototypes learned by Prototype classifiers are better separated than empirical centroids. Results on four LTR benchmarks show that Prototype classifier outperforms or is comparable to state-of-the-art methods. Our code is made available at https://github.com/saurabhsharma1993/prototype-classifier-ltr.
summary: The problem of long-tailed recognition (LTR) has received attention in recent years due to the fundamental power-law distribution of objects in the real-world. Most recent works in LTR use softmax classifiers that are biased in that they correlate classifier norm with the amount of training data for a given class. In this work, we show that learning prototype classifiers addresses the biased softmax problem in LTR. Prototype classifiers can deliver promising results simply using Nearest-Class- Mean (NCM), a special case where prototypes are empirical centroids. We go one step further and propose to jointly learn prototypes by using distances to prototypes in representation space as the logit scores for classification. Further, we theoretically analyze the properties of Euclidean distance based prototype classifiers that lead to stable gradient-based optimization which is robust to outliers. To enable independent distance scales along each channel, we enhance Prototype classifiers by learning channel-dependent temperature parameters. Our analysis shows that prototypes learned by Prototype classifiers are better separated than empirical centroids. Results on four LTR benchmarks show that Prototype classifier outperforms or is comparable to state-of-the-art methods. Our code is made available at https://github.com/saurabhsharma1993/prototype-classifier-ltr.
abstract_zh: 由于现实世界中物体的基本幂律分布，长尾识别（LTR）问题近年来受到关注。 LTR 的最新工作使用的是有偏差的 softmax 分类器，因为它们将分类器范数与给定类的训练数据量相关联。在这项工作中，我们展示了学习原型分类器解决了 LTR 中的有偏差的 softmax 问题。原型分类器只需使用最近类均值（NCM）即可提供有希望的结果，这是原型是经验质心的特殊情况。我们更进一步，提出通过使用表示空间中到原型的距离作为分类的 logit 分数来联合学习原型。此外，我们从理论上分析了基于欧几里德距离的原型分类器的属性，这些属性导致稳定的基于梯度的优化，对异常值具有鲁棒性。为了实现沿每个通道的独立距离尺度，我们通过学习通道相关的温度参数来增强原型分类器。我们的分析表明，原型分类器学习的原型比经验质心更好地分离。四个 LTR 基准的结果表明，原型分类器的性能优于或可与最先进的方法相媲美。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/saurabhsharma1993/prototype-classifier-ltr 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种原型分类器方法，用于解决长尾识别中的分类器偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有softmax分类器在长尾数据中因类别样本量差异导致范数偏差，影响分类性能。
AI.method: 通过学习表示空间中的原型，用原型距离替代softmax得分；引入通道自适应温度参数，理论分析其梯度稳定性与抗异常值特性。
AI.result: 在四个长尾识别基准数据集上优于或媲美现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 原型分类器能有效缓解长尾分布下的分类偏差，理论分析与实验验证其有效性，代码已开源。

motivation: 现有softmax分类器在长尾数据中因类别样本量差异导致范数偏差，影响分类性能。
method: 通过学习表示空间中的原型，用原型距离替代softmax得分；引入通道自适应温度参数，理论分析其梯度稳定性与抗异常值特性。
result: 在四个长尾识别基准数据集上优于或媲美现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 原型分类器能有效缓解长尾分布下的分类偏差，理论分析与实验验证其有效性，代码已开源。
search_text: Learning Prototype Classifiers for Long-Tailed Recognition 用于长尾识别的学习原型分类器 The problem of long-tailed recognition (LTR) has received attention in recent years due to the fundamental power-law distribution of objects in the real-world. Most recent works in LTR use softmax classifiers that are biased in that they correlate classifier norm with the amount of training data for a given class. In this work, we show that learning prototype classifiers addresses the biased softmax problem in LTR. Prototype classifiers can deliver promising results simply using Nearest-Class- Mean (NCM), a special case where prototypes are empirical centroids. We go one step further and propose to jointly learn prototypes by using distances to prototypes in representation space as the logit scores for classification. Further, we theoretically analyze the properties of Euclidean distance based prototype classifiers that lead to stable gradient-based optimization which is robust to outliers. To enable independent distance scales along each channel, we enhance Prototype classifiers by learning channel-dependent temperature parameters. Our analysis shows that prototypes learned by Prototype classifiers are better separated than empirical centroids. Results on four LTR benchmarks show that Prototype classifier outperforms or is comparable to state-of-the-art methods. Our code is made available at https://github.com/saurabhsharma1993/prototype-classifier-ltr. 由于现实世界中物体的基本幂律分布，长尾识别（LTR）问题近年来受到关注。 LTR 的最新工作使用的是有偏差的 softmax 分类器，因为它们将分类器范数与给定类的训练数据量相关联。在这项工作中，我们展示了学习原型分类器解决了 LTR 中的有偏差的 softmax 问题。原型分类器只需使用最近类均值（NCM）即可提供有希望的结果，这是原型是经验质心的特殊情况。我们更进一步，提出通过使用表示空间中到原型的距离作为分类的 logit 分数来联合学习原型。此外，我们从理论上分析了基于欧几里德距离的原型分类器的属性，这些属性导致稳定的基于梯度的优化，对异常值具有鲁棒性。为了实现沿每个通道的独立距离尺度，我们通过学习通道相关的温度参数来增强原型分类器。我们的分析表明，原型分类器学习的原型比经验质心更好地分离。四个 LTR 基准的结果表明，原型分类器的性能优于或可与最先进的方法相媲美。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/saurabhsharma1993/prototype-classifier-ltr 上获取。 本文提出一种原型分类器方法，用于解决长尾识别中的分类器偏差问题。 Saurabh Sharma,Yongqin Xian,Ning Yu,Ambuj Singh cs.CV,cs.LG

title: A Comprehensive Survey of Continual Learning: Theory, Method and Application
title_zh: 持续学习综合综述：理论、方法与应用
comment: The concise version is in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
comments: The concise version is in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
abstract: To cope with real-world dynamics, an intelligent system needs to incrementally acquire, update, accumulate, and exploit knowledge throughout its lifetime. This ability, known as continual learning, provides a foundation for AI systems to develop themselves adaptively. In a general sense, continual learning is explicitly limited by catastrophic forgetting, where learning a new task usually results in a dramatic performance degradation of the old tasks. Beyond this, increasingly numerous advances have emerged in recent years that largely extend the understanding and application of continual learning. The growing and widespread interest in this direction demonstrates its realistic significance as well as complexity. In this work, we present a comprehensive survey of continual learning, seeking to bridge the basic settings, theoretical foundations, representative methods, and practical applications. Based on existing theoretical and empirical results, we summarize the general objectives of continual learning as ensuring a proper stability-plasticity trade-off and an adequate intra/inter-task generalizability in the context of resource efficiency. Then we provide a state-of-the-art and elaborated taxonomy, extensively analyzing how representative methods address continual learning, and how they are adapted to particular challenges in realistic applications. Through an in-depth discussion of promising directions, we believe that such a holistic perspective can greatly facilitate subsequent exploration in this field and beyond.

abstract_zh: 为了应对现实世界的动态，智能系统需要在其整个生命周期中逐步获取、更新、积累和利用知识。这种能力被称为持续学习，为人工智能系统自适应发展奠定了基础。一般来说，持续学习明显受到灾难性遗忘的限制，学习新任务通常会导致旧任务的性能急剧下降。除此之外，近年来出现了越来越多的进步，很大程度上扩展了持续学习的理解和应用。人们对该方向日益增长和广泛的兴趣表明了其现实意义和复杂性。在这项工作中，我们对持续学习进行了全面的调查，寻求在基本设置、理论基础、代表性方法和实际应用之间架起桥梁。基于现有的理论和实证结果，我们总结了持续学习的总体目标是在资源效率的背景下确保适当的稳定性-可塑性权衡和足够的任务内/任务间泛化性。然后，我们提供最先进且详细的分类法，广泛分析代表性方法如何解决持续学习问题，以及它们如何适应实际应用中的特定挑战。通过对有希望的方向的深入讨论，我们相信这种整体视角可以极大地促进该领域及其他领域的后续探索。

AI.tldr: 本文对持续学习领域进行全面综述，涵盖理论基础、方法分类及实际应用，并探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中AI系统需持续适应动态环境，但面临灾难性遗忘等挑战，需系统总结现有成果以推动领域发展。
AI.method: 基于现有理论和实证结果，总结持续学习目标，构建分类体系，分析代表性方法及其在实际应用中的挑战。
AI.result: 提出稳定性-可塑性权衡及任务泛化性目标，建立方法分类体系，明确实际应用中需解决的关键问题及未来方向。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为持续学习领域提供系统性参考，有助于后续研究及跨领域应用探索。

title: Digital Twin Applications in Urban Logistics: An Overview
title_zh: 数字孪生在城市物流中的应用：概述
abstract: Urban traffic attributed to commercial and industrial transportation is observed to largely affect living standards in cities due to external effects pertaining to pollution and congestion. In order to counter this, smart cities deploy technological tools to achieve sustainability. Such tools include Digital Twins (DT)s which are virtual replicas of real-life physical systems. Research suggests that DTs can be very beneficial in how they control a physical system by constantly optimizing its performance. The concept has been extensively studied in other technology-driven industries like manufacturing. However, little work has been done with regards to their application in urban logistics. In this paper, we seek to provide a framework by which DTs could be easily adapted to urban logistics networks. To do this, we provide a characterization of key factors in urban logistics for dynamic decision-making. We also survey previous research on DT applications in urban logistics as we found that a holistic overview is lacking. Using this knowledge in combination with the characterization, we produce a conceptual model that describes the ontology, learning capabilities and optimization prowess of an urban logistics digital twin through its quantitative models. We finish off with a discussion on potential research benefits and limitations based on previous research and our practical experience.
summary: Urban traffic attributed to commercial and industrial transportation is observed to largely affect living standards in cities due to external effects pertaining to pollution and congestion. In order to counter this, smart cities deploy technological tools to achieve sustainability. Such tools include Digital Twins (DT)s which are virtual replicas of real-life physical systems. Research suggests that DTs can be very beneficial in how they control a physical system by constantly optimizing its performance. The concept has been extensively studied in other technology-driven industries like manufacturing. However, little work has been done with regards to their application in urban logistics. In this paper, we seek to provide a framework by which DTs could be easily adapted to urban logistics networks. To do this, we provide a characterization of key factors in urban logistics for dynamic decision-making. We also survey previous research on DT applications in urban logistics as we found that a holistic overview is lacking. Using this knowledge in combination with the characterization, we produce a conceptual model that describes the ontology, learning capabilities and optimization prowess of an urban logistics digital twin through its quantitative models. We finish off with a discussion on potential research benefits and limitations based on previous research and our practical experience.
abstract_zh: 据观察，由于污染和拥堵的外部影响，商业和工业交通造成的城市交通在很大程度上影响城市的生活水平。为了应对这一问题，智慧城市部署了技术工具来实现可持续性。此类工具包括数字孪生 (DT)，它们是现实物理系统的虚拟复制品。研究表明，DT 在通过不断优化物理系统的性能来控制物理系统方面非常有益。这一概念已在制造业等其他技术驱动型行业中得到广泛研究。然而，其在城市物流中的应用却鲜有开展。在本文中，我们寻求提供一个框架，通过该框架，DT 可以轻松适应城市物流网络。为此，我们提供了城市物流关键因素的表征，以供动态决策。我们还调查了之前关于城市物流中数字技术应用的研究，因为我们发现缺乏整体概述。将这些知识与表征相结合，我们生成了一个概念模型，通过定量模型描述了城市物流数字孪生的本体、学习能力和优化能力。最后，我们根据之前的研究和我们的实践经验讨论了潜在的研究优势和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为数字孪生技术在城市物流网络中的应用提供一个框架，并通过量化模型构建概念模型。
AI.motivation: 城市商业和工业交通导致污染和拥堵，影响居民生活质量。尽管数字孪生技术在制造业中广泛应用，但其在城市物流领域的研究仍显不足，亟需系统性框架支持。
AI.method: 通过分析城市物流动态决策的关键因素，结合对现有数字孪生应用研究的综述，构建包含本体论、学习能力和优化能力的概念模型。
AI.result: 提出一个描述城市物流数字孪生系统的量化模型，并讨论了其潜在研究价值与实际应用中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生技术可为城市物流提供优化方案，但需进一步研究以克服现有技术与实践中的挑战。

title: Uncertain Quality-Diversity: Evaluation methodology and new methods for Quality-Diversity in Uncertain Domains
title_zh: 不确定的质量多样性：不确定领域质量多样性的评估方法和新方法
comment: Submitted to Transactions on Evolutionary Computation
comments: Submitted to Transactions on Evolutionary Computation
abstract: Quality-Diversity optimisation (QD) has proven to yield promising results across a broad set of applications. However, QD approaches struggle in the presence of uncertainty in the environment, as it impacts their ability to quantify the true performance and novelty of solutions. This problem has been highlighted multiple times independently in previous literature. In this work, we propose to uniformise the view on this problem through four main contributions. First, we formalise a common framework for uncertain domains: the Uncertain QD setting, a special case of QD in which fitness and descriptors for each solution are no longer fixed values but distribution over possible values. Second, we propose a new methodology to evaluate Uncertain QD approaches, relying on a new per-generation sampling budget and a set of existing and new metrics specifically designed for Uncertain QD. Third, we propose three new Uncertain QD algorithms: Archive-sampling, Parallel-Adaptive-sampling and Deep-Grid-sampling. We propose these approaches taking into account recent advances in the QD community toward the use of hardware acceleration that enable large numbers of parallel evaluations and make sampling an affordable approach to uncertainty. Our final and fourth contribution is to use this new framework and the associated comparison methods to benchmark existing and novel approaches. We demonstrate once again the limitation of MAP-Elites in uncertain domains and highlight the performance of the existing Deep-Grid approach, and of our new algorithms. The goal of this framework and methods is to become an instrumental benchmark for future works considering Uncertain QD.
summary: Quality-Diversity optimisation (QD) has proven to yield promising results across a broad set of applications. However, QD approaches struggle in the presence of uncertainty in the environment, as it impacts their ability to quantify the true performance and novelty of solutions. This problem has been highlighted multiple times independently in previous literature. In this work, we propose to uniformise the view on this problem through four main contributions. First, we formalise a common framework for uncertain domains: the Uncertain QD setting, a special case of QD in which fitness and descriptors for each solution are no longer fixed values but distribution over possible values. Second, we propose a new methodology to evaluate Uncertain QD approaches, relying on a new per-generation sampling budget and a set of existing and new metrics specifically designed for Uncertain QD. Third, we propose three new Uncertain QD algorithms: Archive-sampling, Parallel-Adaptive-sampling and Deep-Grid-sampling. We propose these approaches taking into account recent advances in the QD community toward the use of hardware acceleration that enable large numbers of parallel evaluations and make sampling an affordable approach to uncertainty. Our final and fourth contribution is to use this new framework and the associated comparison methods to benchmark existing and novel approaches. We demonstrate once again the limitation of MAP-Elites in uncertain domains and highlight the performance of the existing Deep-Grid approach, and of our new algorithms. The goal of this framework and methods is to become an instrumental benchmark for future works considering Uncertain QD.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，质量多样性优化 (QD) 可以在广泛的应用中产生有希望的结果。然而，QD 方法在环境中存在不确定性的情况下会遇到困难，因为这会影响它们量化解决方案的真实性能和新颖性的能力。这个问题在之前的文献中已经多次独立强调过。在这项工作中，我们建议通过四个主要贡献来统一对此问题的看法。首先，我们形式化了不确定域的通用框架：不确定 QD 设置，这是 QD 的一种特殊情况，其中每个解决方案的适应度和描述符不再是固定值，而是分布在可能的值上。其次，我们提出了一种新的方法来评估不确定 QD 方法，该方法依赖于新的每代采样预算以及一组专门为不确定 QD 设计的现有和新指标。第三，我们提出了三种新的不确定QD算法：档案采样、并行自适应采样和深度网格采样。我们提出这些方法时考虑到了 QD 社区在使用硬件加速方面的最新进展，该硬件加速能够实现大量并行评估，并使采样成为一种经济实惠的不确定性方法。我们的最后也是第四个贡献是使用这个新框架和相关的比较方法来对现有和新颖的方法进行基准测试。我们再次证明了 MAP-Elite 在不确定领域的局限性，并强调了现有深度网格方法和我们新算法的性能。该框架和方法的目标是成为考虑不确定 QD 的未来工作的工具基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的不确定质量多样性（Uncertain QD）框架及评估方法，并设计了三种新算法以应对不确定环境下的QD优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有QD方法在环境存在不确定性时难以准确评估解的性能与新颖性，缺乏统一的评估标准和有效算法。
AI.method: 1) 形式化不确定QD框架，将适应度和描述符定义为概率分布；2) 提出基于新一代采样预算和定制指标的评估方法；3) 设计Archive-sampling、Parallel-Adaptive-sampling和Deep-Grid-sampling三种算法；4) 通过基准测试验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 验证了MAP-Elites在不确定环境中的局限性，证明Deep-Grid和新算法表现更优，确立了该框架作为未来研究的基准。
AI.conclusion: 本文为不确定QD领域提供了系统性研究框架和评估基准，推动了该方向算法的进一步发展。

authors_text: Roman Erhardt,Kathrin Hanauer,Nils Kriege,Christian Schulz,Darren Strash
title: Improved Exact and Heuristic Algorithms for Maximum Weight Clique
title_zh: 改进的最大权重团的精确和启发式算法
abstract: We propose improved exact and heuristic algorithms for solving the maximum weight clique problem, a well-known problem in graph theory with many applications. Our algorithms interleave successful techniques from related work with novel data reduction rules that use local graph structure to identify and remove vertices and edges while retaining the optimal solution. We evaluate our algorithms on a range of synthetic and real-world graphs, and find that they outperform the current state of the art on most inputs. Our data reductions always produce smaller reduced graphs than existing data reductions alone. As a result, our exact algorithm, MWCRedu, finds solutions orders of magnitude faster on naturally weighted, medium-sized map labeling graphs and random hyperbolic graphs. Our heuristic algorithm, MWCPeel, outperforms its competitors on these instances, but is slightly less effective on extremely dense or large instances.
summary: We propose improved exact and heuristic algorithms for solving the maximum weight clique problem, a well-known problem in graph theory with many applications. Our algorithms interleave successful techniques from related work with novel data reduction rules that use local graph structure to identify and remove vertices and edges while retaining the optimal solution. We evaluate our algorithms on a range of synthetic and real-world graphs, and find that they outperform the current state of the art on most inputs. Our data reductions always produce smaller reduced graphs than existing data reductions alone. As a result, our exact algorithm, MWCRedu, finds solutions orders of magnitude faster on naturally weighted, medium-sized map labeling graphs and random hyperbolic graphs. Our heuristic algorithm, MWCPeel, outperforms its competitors on these instances, but is slightly less effective on extremely dense or large instances.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了改进的精确和启发式算法来解决最大权集团问题，这是图论中具有许多应用的众所周知的问题。我们的算法将相关工作中的成功技术与新颖的数据缩减规则交织在一起，这些规则使用局部图结构来识别和删除顶点和边，同时保留最佳解决方案。我们在一系列合成图和现实世界图上评估我们的算法，发现它们在大多数输入上都优于当前最先进的技术。我们的数据缩减总是产生比单独现有数据缩减更小的缩减图。因此，我们的精确算法 MWCRedu 在自然加权、中等大小的地图标记图和随机双曲图上找到解决方案的速度要快几个数量级。我们的启发式算法 MWCPeel 在这些实例上优于竞争对手，但在极其密集或大型实例上效果稍差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的最大权重团问题的精确算法MWCRedu和启发式算法MWCPeel，通过结合现有技术与新型数据约简规则提升求解效率。
AI.motivation: 最大权重团问题在图论中具有重要应用，但现有算法在处理大规模或复杂图时效率不足，需通过数据约简优化计算速度。
AI.method: 融合相关工作技术与基于局部图结构的新型数据约简规则，通过移除冗余顶点边保留最优解，缩小图规模以加速求解。
AI.result: 在合成与真实图测试中，MWCRedu在中等规模地图标签图和随机双曲图上提速显著；MWCPeel在密集/大型图表现略逊于竞品。
AI.conclusion: 数据约简规则有效提升算法效率，适用于多种图类型，但启发式算法在极端场景需进一步优化。

title: Simplicity Bias in 1-Hidden Layer Neural Networks
title_zh: 一隐层神经网络中的简单性偏差
abstract: Recent works have demonstrated that neural networks exhibit extreme simplicity bias(SB). That is, they learn only the simplest features to solve a task at hand, even in the presence of other, more robust but more complex features. Due to the lack of a general and rigorous definition of features, these works showcase SB on semi-synthetic datasets such as Color-MNIST, MNIST-CIFAR where defining features is relatively easier. In this work, we rigorously define as well as thoroughly establish SB for one hidden layer neural networks. More concretely, (i) we define SB as the network essentially being a function of a low dimensional projection of the inputs (ii) theoretically, we show that when the data is linearly separable, the network primarily depends on only the linearly separable ($1$-dimensional) subspace even in the presence of an arbitrarily large number of other, more complex features which could have led to a significantly more robust classifier, (iii) empirically, we show that models trained on real datasets such as Imagenette and Waterbirds-Landbirds indeed depend on a low dimensional projection of the inputs, thereby demonstrating SB on these datasets, iv) finally, we present a natural ensemble approach that encourages diversity in models by training successive models on features not used by earlier models, and demonstrate that it yields models that are significantly more robust to Gaussian noise.
summary: Recent works have demonstrated that neural networks exhibit extreme simplicity bias(SB). That is, they learn only the simplest features to solve a task at hand, even in the presence of other, more robust but more complex features. Due to the lack of a general and rigorous definition of features, these works showcase SB on semi-synthetic datasets such as Color-MNIST, MNIST-CIFAR where defining features is relatively easier. In this work, we rigorously define as well as thoroughly establish SB for one hidden layer neural networks. More concretely, (i) we define SB as the network essentially being a function of a low dimensional projection of the inputs (ii) theoretically, we show that when the data is linearly separable, the network primarily depends on only the linearly separable ($1$-dimensional) subspace even in the presence of an arbitrarily large number of other, more complex features which could have led to a significantly more robust classifier, (iii) empirically, we show that models trained on real datasets such as Imagenette and Waterbirds-Landbirds indeed depend on a low dimensional projection of the inputs, thereby demonstrating SB on these datasets, iv) finally, we present a natural ensemble approach that encourages diversity in models by training successive models on features not used by earlier models, and demonstrate that it yields models that are significantly more robust to Gaussian noise.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，神经网络表现出极端简单性偏差（SB）。也就是说，即使存在其他更强大但更复杂的特征，他们也只学习最简单的特征来解决手头的任务。由于缺乏对特征的通用和严格的定义，这些工作展示了半合成数据集（例如 Color-MNIST、MNIST-CIFAR）上的 SB，其中定义特征相对容易。在这项工作中，我们严格定义并彻底建立了一个隐藏层神经网络的 SB。更具体地说，（i）我们将 SB 定义为网络本质上是输入的低维投影的函数（ii）理论上，我们表明当数据是线性可分离的时，网络主要依赖于线性可分离（$1$维）子空间，即使存在任意大量其他更复杂的特征，这可能导致分类器明显更鲁棒，（iii）从经验上来说，我们表明在真实数据集（例如 Imagenette）上训练的模型和 Waterbirds-Landbirds 确实依赖于输入的低维投影，从而证明了这些数据集上的 SB，iv) 最后，我们提出了一种自然集成方法，通过在早期模型未使用的特征上训练连续模型来鼓励模型的多样性，并证明它产生的模型对高斯噪声明显更鲁棒。

AI.tldr: 本文针对单隐藏层神经网络，严格定义并验证了其简单性偏差（SB），并通过实验证明该现象在真实数据集中的存在，同时提出一种促进模型多样性的集成方法以提升鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究指出神经网络存在简单性偏差，但缺乏对特征的通用定义且依赖半合成数据集。本文旨在为单隐藏层网络建立严谨的SB理论框架，并验证其在真实数据中的表现。
AI.method: （i）定义SB为网络本质是输入的低维投影函数；（ii）理论证明线性可分数据下网络仅依赖1维子空间；（iii）在Imagenette等真实数据集上验证低维依赖性；（iv）提出基于未使用特征的集成训练方法。
AI.result: 理论证明SB的存在，实验证实真实数据集中的低维依赖现象，集成方法显著提升模型对高斯噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 单隐藏层网络存在显著简单性偏差，通过鼓励模型间特征多样性可有效缓解该偏差带来的鲁棒性问题。

search_text: Simplicity Bias in 1-Hidden Layer Neural Networks 一隐层神经网络中的简单性偏差 Recent works have demonstrated that neural networks exhibit extreme simplicity bias(SB). That is, they learn only the simplest features to solve a task at hand, even in the presence of other, more robust but more complex features. Due to the lack of a general and rigorous definition of features, these works showcase SB on semi-synthetic datasets such as Color-MNIST, MNIST-CIFAR where defining features is relatively easier. In this work, we rigorously define as well as thoroughly establish SB for one hidden layer neural networks. More concretely, (i) we define SB as the network essentially being a function of a low dimensional projection of the inputs (ii) theoretically, we show that when the data is linearly separable, the network primarily depends on only the linearly separable ($1$-dimensional) subspace even in the presence of an arbitrarily large number of other, more complex features which could have led to a significantly more robust classifier, (iii) empirically, we show that models trained on real datasets such as Imagenette and Waterbirds-Landbirds indeed depend on a low dimensional projection of the inputs, thereby demonstrating SB on these datasets, iv) finally, we present a natural ensemble approach that encourages diversity in models by training successive models on features not used by earlier models, and demonstrate that it yields models that are significantly more robust to Gaussian noise. 最近的工作表明，神经网络表现出极端简单性偏差（SB）。也就是说，即使存在其他更强大但更复杂的特征，他们也只学习最简单的特征来解决手头的任务。由于缺乏对特征的通用和严格的定义，这些工作展示了半合成数据集（例如 Color-MNIST、MNIST-CIFAR）上的 SB，其中定义特征相对容易。在这项工作中，我们严格定义并彻底建立了一个隐藏层神经网络的 SB。更具体地说，（i）我们将 SB 定义为网络本质上是输入的低维投影的函数（ii）理论上，我们表明当数据是线性可分离的时，网络主要依赖于线性可分离（$1$维）子空间，即使存在任意大量其他更复杂的特征，这可能导致分类器明显更鲁棒，（iii）从经验上来说，我们表明在真实数据集（例如 Imagenette）上训练的模型和 Waterbirds-Landbirds 确实依赖于输入的低维投影，从而证明了这些数据集上的 SB，iv) 最后，我们提出了一种自然集成方法，通过在早期模型未使用的特征上训练连续模型来鼓励模型的多样性，并证明它产生的模型对高斯噪声明显更鲁棒。 本文针对单隐藏层神经网络，严格定义并验证了其简单性偏差（SB），并通过实验证明该现象在真实数据集中的存在，同时提出一种促进模型多样性的集成方法以提升鲁棒性。 Depen Morwani,Jatin Batra,Prateek Jain,Praneeth Netrapalli cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Monisha Singh,Ximi Hoque,Donghuo Zeng,Yanan Wang,Kazushi Ikeda,Abhinav Dhall
title: Do I Have Your Attention: A Large Scale Engagement Prediction Dataset and Baselines
title_zh: 你注意到了吗：大规模参与度预测数据集和基线
abstract: The degree of concentration, enthusiasm, optimism, and passion displayed by individual(s) while interacting with a machine is referred to as `user engagement'. Engagement comprises of behavioral, cognitive, and affect related cues. To create engagement prediction systems that can work in real-world conditions, it is quintessential to learn from rich, diverse datasets. To this end, a large scale multi-faceted engagement in the wild dataset EngageNet is proposed. 31 hours duration data of 127 participants representing different illumination conditions are recorded. Thorough experiments are performed exploring the applicability of different features, action units, eye gaze, head pose, and MARLIN. Data from user interactions (question-answer) are analyzed to understand the relationship between effective learning and user engagement. To further validate the rich nature of the dataset, evaluation is also performed on the EngageWild dataset. The experiments show the usefulness of the proposed dataset. The code, models, and dataset link are publicly available at https://github.com/engagenet/engagenet_baselines.
summary: The degree of concentration, enthusiasm, optimism, and passion displayed by individual(s) while interacting with a machine is referred to as `user engagement'. Engagement comprises of behavioral, cognitive, and affect related cues. To create engagement prediction systems that can work in real-world conditions, it is quintessential to learn from rich, diverse datasets. To this end, a large scale multi-faceted engagement in the wild dataset EngageNet is proposed. 31 hours duration data of 127 participants representing different illumination conditions are recorded. Thorough experiments are performed exploring the applicability of different features, action units, eye gaze, head pose, and MARLIN. Data from user interactions (question-answer) are analyzed to understand the relationship between effective learning and user engagement. To further validate the rich nature of the dataset, evaluation is also performed on the EngageWild dataset. The experiments show the usefulness of the proposed dataset. The code, models, and dataset link are publicly available at https://github.com/engagenet/engagenet_baselines.
abstract_zh: 个人在与机器交互时表现出的专注、热情、乐观和热情的程度被称为“用户参与度”。参与包括行为、认知和情感相关的线索。为了创建可以在现实条件下工作的参与度预测系统，从丰富、多样化的数据集中学习是最重要的。为此，提出了在野生数据集 EngageNet 中进行大规模多方面参与。记录了代表不同照明条件的 127 名参与者的 31 小时持续时间数据。我们进行了彻底的实验，探索不同特征、动作单元、眼睛注视、头部姿势和 MARLIN 的适用性。分析来自用户交互（问答）的数据，以了解有效学习和用户参与之间的关系。为了进一步验证数据集的丰富性，还对 EngageWild 数据集进行了评估。实验表明了所提出的数据集的有用性。代码、模型和数据集链接可在 https://github.com/engagenet/engagenet_baselines 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模多维度的用户参与度预测数据集EngageNet，并探索了多种特征和模型的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集难以全面捕捉真实场景下的用户参与度特征，需构建包含行为、认知和情感线索的多样化数据以提升预测系统性能。
AI.method: 采集127名参与者在不同光照条件下的31小时交互数据，分析动作单元、眼动、头部姿态及MARLIN特征，并在EngageWild数据集上验证模型有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明数据集具有高度多样性，所提方法在参与度预测任务中表现优异，代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: EngageNet为用户参与度研究提供了高质量数据支持，有助于推动相关算法在真实场景中的应用。

ai_content.conclusion: EngageNet为用户参与度研究提供了高质量数据支持，有助于推动相关算法在真实场景中的应用。

title: For the Underrepresented in Gender Bias Research: Chinese Name Gender Prediction with Heterogeneous Graph Attention Network
title_zh: 针对性别偏见研究中代表性不足的群体：利用异构图注意网络进行中文姓名性别预测
abstract: Achieving gender equality is an important pillar for humankind's sustainable future. Pioneering data-driven gender bias research is based on large-scale public records such as scientific papers, patents, and company registrations, covering female researchers, inventors and entrepreneurs, and so on. Since gender information is often missing in relevant datasets, studies rely on tools to infer genders from names. However, available open-sourced Chinese gender-guessing tools are not yet suitable for scientific purposes, which may be partially responsible for female Chinese being underrepresented in mainstream gender bias research and affect their universality. Specifically, these tools focus on character-level information while overlooking the fact that the combinations of Chinese characters in multi-character names, as well as the components and pronunciations of characters, convey important messages. As a first effort, we design a Chinese Heterogeneous Graph Attention (CHGAT) model to capture the heterogeneity in component relationships and incorporate the pronunciations of characters. Our model largely surpasses current tools and also outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithm. Last but not least, the most popular Chinese name-gender dataset is single-character based with far less female coverage from an unreliable source, naturally hindering relevant studies. We open-source a more balanced multi-character dataset from an official source together with our code, hoping to help future research promoting gender equality.
summary: Achieving gender equality is an important pillar for humankind's sustainable future. Pioneering data-driven gender bias research is based on large-scale public records such as scientific papers, patents, and company registrations, covering female researchers, inventors and entrepreneurs, and so on. Since gender information is often missing in relevant datasets, studies rely on tools to infer genders from names. However, available open-sourced Chinese gender-guessing tools are not yet suitable for scientific purposes, which may be partially responsible for female Chinese being underrepresented in mainstream gender bias research and affect their universality. Specifically, these tools focus on character-level information while overlooking the fact that the combinations of Chinese characters in multi-character names, as well as the components and pronunciations of characters, convey important messages. As a first effort, we design a Chinese Heterogeneous Graph Attention (CHGAT) model to capture the heterogeneity in component relationships and incorporate the pronunciations of characters. Our model largely surpasses current tools and also outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithm. Last but not least, the most popular Chinese name-gender dataset is single-character based with far less female coverage from an unreliable source, naturally hindering relevant studies. We open-source a more balanced multi-character dataset from an official source together with our code, hoping to help future research promoting gender equality.
abstract_zh: 实现性别平等是人类可持续未来的重要支柱。开创性的数据驱动性别偏见研究基于科学论文、专利和公司注册等大规模公共记录，涵盖女性研究人员、发明家和企业家等。由于相关数据集中经常缺少性别信息，因此研究依赖于从姓名推断性别的工具。然而，现有的开源中国性别猜测工具尚不适合科学目的，这可能是中国女性在主流性别偏见研究中代表性不足的部分原因，并影响了其普遍性。具体来说，这些工具侧重于字符级信息，而忽视了多字名称中的汉字组合以及汉字的组成部分和发音传达了重要信息。作为第一个努力，我们设计了中文异构图注意力（CHGAT）模型来捕获组件关系中的异构性并合并字符的发音。我们的模型在很大程度上超越了当前的工具，也优于最先进的算法。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，最流行的中文姓名性别数据集是基于单字的，来源不可靠的女性报道要少得多，这自然阻碍了相关研究。我们从官方来源开源了一个更平衡的多字符数据集以及我们的代码，希望有助于未来促进性别平等的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异构图注意力网络（CHGAT）的中文姓名性别预测模型，以解决现有工具在性别偏见研究中对女性群体覆盖不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有中文性别预测工具因仅关注单字特征而忽略多字姓名的组合关系及发音信息，导致女性样本覆盖率低，影响性别偏见研究的普适性。
AI.method: 设计异构图注意力网络（CHGAT），通过建模汉字组件关系并融合发音信息，构建多字符姓名特征表示。
AI.result: 模型性能超越现有工具及最先进算法，同时开源包含官方来源的多字符平衡数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该模型与数据集有助于提升中文性别预测准确性，推动性别平等相关的偏见研究。

search_text: For the Underrepresented in Gender Bias Research: Chinese Name Gender Prediction with Heterogeneous Graph Attention Network 针对性别偏见研究中代表性不足的群体：利用异构图注意网络进行中文姓名性别预测 Achieving gender equality is an important pillar for humankind's sustainable future. Pioneering data-driven gender bias research is based on large-scale public records such as scientific papers, patents, and company registrations, covering female researchers, inventors and entrepreneurs, and so on. Since gender information is often missing in relevant datasets, studies rely on tools to infer genders from names. However, available open-sourced Chinese gender-guessing tools are not yet suitable for scientific purposes, which may be partially responsible for female Chinese being underrepresented in mainstream gender bias research and affect their universality. Specifically, these tools focus on character-level information while overlooking the fact that the combinations of Chinese characters in multi-character names, as well as the components and pronunciations of characters, convey important messages. As a first effort, we design a Chinese Heterogeneous Graph Attention (CHGAT) model to capture the heterogeneity in component relationships and incorporate the pronunciations of characters. Our model largely surpasses current tools and also outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithm. Last but not least, the most popular Chinese name-gender dataset is single-character based with far less female coverage from an unreliable source, naturally hindering relevant studies. We open-source a more balanced multi-character dataset from an official source together with our code, hoping to help future research promoting gender equality. 实现性别平等是人类可持续未来的重要支柱。开创性的数据驱动性别偏见研究基于科学论文、专利和公司注册等大规模公共记录，涵盖女性研究人员、发明家和企业家等。由于相关数据集中经常缺少性别信息，因此研究依赖于从姓名推断性别的工具。然而，现有的开源中国性别猜测工具尚不适合科学目的，这可能是中国女性在主流性别偏见研究中代表性不足的部分原因，并影响了其普遍性。具体来说，这些工具侧重于字符级信息，而忽视了多字名称中的汉字组合以及汉字的组成部分和发音传达了重要信息。作为第一个努力，我们设计了中文异构图注意力（CHGAT）模型来捕获组件关系中的异构性并合并字符的发音。我们的模型在很大程度上超越了当前的工具，也优于最先进的算法。最后但并非最不重要的一点是，最流行的中文姓名性别数据集是基于单字的，来源不可靠的女性报道要少得多，这自然阻碍了相关研究。我们从官方来源开源了一个更平衡的多字符数据集以及我们的代码，希望有助于未来促进性别平等的研究。 本文提出一种基于异构图注意力网络（CHGAT）的中文姓名性别预测模型，以解决现有工具在性别偏见研究中对女性群体覆盖不足的问题。 Zihao Pan,Kai Peng,Shuai Ling,Haipeng Zhang cs.AI

title: On the Role of Morphological Information for Contextual Lemmatization
title_zh: 论形态信息对语境词形还原的作用
comment: 30 pages, 5 figures, 11 tables; Accepted for publication in Computational Linguistics journal (to appear)
comments: 30 pages, 5 figures, 11 tables; Accepted for publication in Computational Linguistics journal (to appear)
abstract: Lemmatization is a natural language processing (NLP) task which consists of producing, from a given inflected word, its canonical form or lemma. Lemmatization is one of the basic tasks that facilitate downstream NLP applications, and is of particular importance for high-inflected languages. Given that the process to obtain a lemma from an inflected word can be explained by looking at its morphosyntactic category, including fine-grained morphosyntactic information to train contextual lemmatizers has become common practice, without considering whether that is the optimum in terms of downstream performance. In order to address this issue, in this paper we empirically investigate the role of morphological information to develop contextual lemmatizers in six languages within a varied spectrum of morphological complexity: Basque, Turkish, Russian, Czech, Spanish and English. Furthermore, and unlike the vast majority of previous work, we also evaluate lemmatizers in out-of-domain settings, which constitutes, after all, their most common application use. The results of our study are rather surprising. It turns out that providing lemmatizers with fine-grained morphological features during training is not that beneficial, not even for agglutinative languages. In fact, modern contextual word representations seem to implicitly encode enough morphological information to obtain competitive contextual lemmatizers without seeing any explicit morphological signal. Moreover, our experiments suggest that the best lemmatizers out-of-domain are those using simple UPOS tags or those trained without morphology and, finally, that current evaluation practices for lemmatization are not adequate to clearly discriminate between models.

Lemmatization is one of the basic tasks that facilitate downstream NLP applications, and is of particular importance for high-inflected languages. In order to address this issue, in this paper we empirically investigate the role of morphological information to develop contextual lemmatizers in six languages within a varied spectrum of morphological complexity: Basque, Turkish, Russian, Czech, Spanish and English. Furthermore, and unlike the vast majority of previous work, we also evaluate lemmatizers in out-of-domain settings, which constitutes, after all, their most common application use. The results of our study are rather surprising. It turns out that providing lemmatizers with fine-grained morphological features during training is not that beneficial, not even for agglutinative languages. In fact, modern contextual word representations seem to implicitly encode enough morphological information to obtain competitive contextual lemmatizers without seeing any explicit morphological signal. Moreover, our experiments suggest that the best lemmatizers out-of-domain are those using simple UPOS tags or those trained without morphology and, finally, that current evaluation practices for lemmatization are not adequate to clearly discriminate between models.
abstract_zh: 词形还原是一项自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务，包括从给定的变形单词生成其规范形式或引理。词形还原是促进下游 NLP 应用的基本任务之一，对于高屈折语言尤其重要。鉴于从屈折词获取词元的过程可以通过查看其形态句法类别来解释，包括训练上下文词形还原器的细粒度形态句法信息已成为常见做法，而不考虑这是否是下游性能的最佳选择。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们实证研究了形态信息在开发语境词形还原器时在不同形态复杂性范围内的六种语言中的作用：巴斯克语、土耳其语、俄语、捷克语、西班牙语和英语。此外，与之前的绝大多数工作不同，我们还在域外设置中评估词形还原器，这毕竟是它们最常见的应用程序用途。我们的研究结果相当令人惊讶。事实证明，在训练期间为词形还原器提供细粒度的形态特征并不是那么有益，即使对于粘着语言也是如此。事实上，现代上下文单词表示似乎隐式编码了足够的形态信息，以获得竞争性上下文词形还原器，而无需看到任何明确的形态信号。此外，我们的实验表明，域外最好的词形还原器是那些使用简单的 UPOS 标签或未经形态学训练的词形还原器，最后，当前的词形还原评估实践不足以清楚地区分模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了形态学信息在上下文词形还原中的作用，通过六种不同形态复杂度的语言进行实证分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管细粒度形态学信息被广泛用于训练上下文词形还原器，但其对下游任务的实际效果尚不明确，且现有研究缺乏对实际应用场景（如领域外数据）的评估。
AI.method: 在六种语言（巴斯克语、土耳其语、俄语、捷克语、西班牙语和英语）中，通过对比使用与不使用细粒度形态学特征的模型，评估其在领域内和领域外场景下的表现。
AI.result: 结果发现，提供细粒度形态学特征并未显著提升模型性能，甚至在领域外场景中，使用简单UPOS标签或不依赖形态学信息的模型表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 现代上下文词向量已隐含足够形态学信息，无需显式形态特征；当前词形还原评估方法存在局限性，需进一步改进。

authors_text: Haiyang Xu,Qinghao Ye,Ming Yan,Yaya Shi,Jiabo Ye,Yuanhong Xu,Chenliang Li,Bin Bi,Qi Qian,Wei Wang,Guohai Xu,Ji Zhang,Songfang Huang,Fei Huang,Jingren Zhou
title: mPLUG-2: A Modularized Multi-modal Foundation Model Across Text, Image and Video
title_zh: mPLUG-2：跨文本、图像和视频的模块化多模态基础模型
abstract: Recent years have witnessed a big convergence of language, vision, and multi-modal pretraining. In this work, we present mPLUG-2, a new unified paradigm with modularized design for multi-modal pretraining, which can benefit from modality collaboration while addressing the problem of modality entanglement. In contrast to predominant paradigms of solely relying on sequence-to-sequence generation or encoder-based instance discrimination, mPLUG-2 introduces a multi-module composition network by sharing common universal modules for modality collaboration and disentangling different modality modules to deal with modality entanglement. It is flexible to select different modules for different understanding and generation tasks across all modalities including text, image, and video. Empirical study shows that mPLUG-2 achieves state-of-the-art or competitive results on a broad range of over 30 downstream tasks, spanning multi-modal tasks of image-text and video-text understanding and generation, and uni-modal tasks of text-only, image-only, and video-only understanding. Notably, mPLUG-2 shows new state-of-the-art results of 48.0 top-1 accuracy and 80.3 CIDEr on the challenging MSRVTT video QA and video caption tasks with a far smaller model size and data scale. It also demonstrates strong zero-shot transferability on vision-language and video-language tasks. Code and models will be released in https://github.com/alibaba/AliceMind.
summary: Recent years have witnessed a big convergence of language, vision, and multi-modal pretraining. In this work, we present mPLUG-2, a new unified paradigm with modularized design for multi-modal pretraining, which can benefit from modality collaboration while addressing the problem of modality entanglement. In contrast to predominant paradigms of solely relying on sequence-to-sequence generation or encoder-based instance discrimination, mPLUG-2 introduces a multi-module composition network by sharing common universal modules for modality collaboration and disentangling different modality modules to deal with modality entanglement. It is flexible to select different modules for different understanding and generation tasks across all modalities including text, image, and video. Empirical study shows that mPLUG-2 achieves state-of-the-art or competitive results on a broad range of over 30 downstream tasks, spanning multi-modal tasks of image-text and video-text understanding and generation, and uni-modal tasks of text-only, image-only, and video-only understanding. Notably, mPLUG-2 shows new state-of-the-art results of 48.0 top-1 accuracy and 80.3 CIDEr on the challenging MSRVTT video QA and video caption tasks with a far smaller model size and data scale. It also demonstrates strong zero-shot transferability on vision-language and video-language tasks. Code and models will be released in https://github.com/alibaba/AliceMind.
abstract_zh: 近年来，语言、视觉和多模式预训练发生了巨大的融合。在这项工作中，我们提出了 mPLUG-2，这是一种用于多模态预训练的模块化设计的新统一范式，它可以从模态协作中受益，同时解决模态纠缠问题。与仅依赖序列到序列生成或基于编码器的实例区分的主要范例相比，mPLUG-2 通过共享用于模态协作的通用通用模块并解开不同模态模块来处理模态纠缠，引入了多模块组合网络。可以灵活地选择不同的模块来完成包括文本、图像和视频在内的所有模式的不同理解和生成任务。实证研究表明，mPLUG-2 在 30 多个下游任务上取得了最先进的或有竞争力的结果，涵盖图像文本和视频文本理解和生成的多模态任务，以及纯文本、纯图像和纯视频理解的单模态任务。值得注意的是，mPLUG-2 在具有挑战性的 MSRVTT 视频 QA 和视频字幕任务上显示了 48.0 top-1 准确度和 80.3 CIDEr 的最新最先进结果，且模型尺寸和数据规模要小得多。它还在视觉语言和视频语言任务上展示了强大的零样本可迁移性。代码和模型将在https://github.com/alibaba/AliceMind发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出mPLUG-2，一种模块化的多模态基础模型，通过解耦不同模态模块并共享通用模块，解决模态纠缠问题，提升跨文本、图像和视频任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型存在模态纠缠问题，且单一序列生成或编码器方法难以兼顾多模态协作与解耦，需设计灵活模块化框架以提升跨模态任务表现。
AI.method: 引入多模块组合网络，共享通用模块促进模态协作，同时解耦不同模态模块以处理纠缠问题，支持跨模态任务中灵活选择模块组合。
AI.result: 在30+下游任务中取得SOTA或竞争力结果，MSRVTT视频问答准确率达48.0，视频字幕CIDEr达80.3，且模型规模更小；展现强零样本迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 模块化设计有效平衡模态协作与解耦，mPLUG-2在性能和效率上优于现有方法，代码与模型已开源。
