search_text: mPLUG-2: A Modularized Multi-modal Foundation Model Across Text, Image and Video mPLUG-2：跨文本、图像和视频的模块化多模态基础模型 Recent years have witnessed a big convergence of language, vision, and multi-modal pretraining. In this work, we present mPLUG-2, a new unified paradigm with modularized design for multi-modal pretraining, which can benefit from modality collaboration while addressing the problem of modality entanglement. In contrast to predominant paradigms of solely relying on sequence-to-sequence generation or encoder-based instance discrimination, mPLUG-2 introduces a multi-module composition network by sharing common universal modules for modality collaboration and disentangling different modality modules to deal with modality entanglement. It is flexible to select different modules for different understanding and generation tasks across all modalities including text, image, and video. Empirical study shows that mPLUG-2 achieves state-of-the-art or competitive results on a broad range of over 30 downstream tasks, spanning multi-modal tasks of image-text and video-text understanding and generation, and uni-modal tasks of text-only, image-only, and video-only understanding. Notably, mPLUG-2 shows new state-of-the-art results of 48.0 top-1 accuracy and 80.3 CIDEr on the challenging MSRVTT video QA and video caption tasks with a far smaller model size and data scale. It also demonstrates strong zero-shot transferability on vision-language and video-language tasks. Code and models will be released in https://github.com/alibaba/AliceMind. 近年来，语言、视觉和多模式预训练发生了巨大的融合。在这项工作中，我们提出了 mPLUG-2，这是一种用于多模态预训练的模块化设计的新统一范式，它可以从模态协作中受益，同时解决模态纠缠问题。与仅依赖序列到序列生成或基于编码器的实例区分的主要范例相比，mPLUG-2 通过共享用于模态协作的通用通用模块并解开不同模态模块来处理模态纠缠，引入了多模块组合网络。可以灵活地选择不同的模块来完成包括文本、图像和视频在内的所有模式的不同理解和生成任务。实证研究表明，mPLUG-2 在 30 多个下游任务上取得了最先进的或有竞争力的结果，涵盖图像文本和视频文本理解和生成的多模态任务，以及纯文本、纯图像和纯视频理解的单模态任务。值得注意的是，mPLUG-2 在具有挑战性的 MSRVTT 视频 QA 和视频字幕任务上显示了 48.0 top-1 准确度和 80.3 CIDEr 的最新最先进结果，且模型尺寸和数据规模要小得多。它还在视觉语言和视频语言任务上展示了强大的零样本可迁移性。代码和模型将在https://github.com/alibaba/AliceMind发布。 本文提出mPLUG-2，一种模块化的多模态基础模型，通过解耦不同模态模块并共享通用模块，解决模态纠缠问题，提升跨文本、图像和视频任务的性能。 Haiyang Xu,Qinghao Ye,Ming Yan,Yaya Shi,Jiabo Ye,Yuanhong Xu,Chenliang Li,Bin Bi,Qi Qian,Wei Wang,Guohai Xu,Ji Zhang,Songfang Huang,Fei Huang,Jingren Zhou cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.MM

title: Chatbots for Robotic Process Automation: Investigating Perceived Trust and User Satisfaction
title_zh: 用于机器人流程自动化的聊天机器人：调查感知信任和用户满意度
abstract: Driven by ongoing improvements in machine learning, chatbots have increasingly grown from experimental interface prototypes to reliable and robust tools for process automation. Building on these advances, companies have identified various application scenarios, where the automated processing of human language can help foster task efficiency. To this end, the use of chatbots may not only decrease costs, but it is also said to boost user satisfaction. People's intention to use and/or reuse said technology, however, is often dependent on less utilitarian factors. Particularly trust and respective task satisfaction count as relevant usage predictors. In this paper, we thus present work that aims to shed some light on these two variable constructs. We report on an experimental study ($n=277$), investigating four different human-chatbot interaction tasks. After each task, participants were asked to complete survey items on perceived trust, perceived task complexity and perceived task satisfaction. Results show that task complexity impacts negatively on both trust and satisfaction. To this end, higher complexity was associated particularly with those conversations that relied on broad, descriptive chatbot answers, while conversations that span over several short steps were perceived less complex, even when the overall conversation was eventually longer.
summary: Driven by ongoing improvements in machine learning, chatbots have increasingly grown from experimental interface prototypes to reliable and robust tools for process automation. Building on these advances, companies have identified various application scenarios, where the automated processing of human language can help foster task efficiency. To this end, the use of chatbots may not only decrease costs, but it is also said to boost user satisfaction. People's intention to use and/or reuse said technology, however, is often dependent on less utilitarian factors. Particularly trust and respective task satisfaction count as relevant usage predictors. In this paper, we thus present work that aims to shed some light on these two variable constructs. We report on an experimental study ($n=277$), investigating four different human-chatbot interaction tasks. After each task, participants were asked to complete survey items on perceived trust, perceived task complexity and perceived task satisfaction. Results show that task complexity impacts negatively on both trust and satisfaction. To this end, higher complexity was associated particularly with those conversations that relied on broad, descriptive chatbot answers, while conversations that span over several short steps were perceived less complex, even when the overall conversation was eventually longer.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习不断改进的推动下，聊天机器人已逐渐从实验性界面原型发展成为可靠且强大的流程自动化工具。基于这些进步，公司已经确定了各种应用场景，其中人类语言的自动化处理可以帮助提高任务效率。为此，聊天机器人的使用不仅可以降低成本，而且据说还可以提高用户满意度。然而，人们使用和/或重复使用所述技术的意图通常取决于不太功利的因素。特别是信任和各自的任务满意度被视为相关的使用预测因素。因此，在本文中，我们提出的工作旨在阐明这两个变量结构。我们报告了一项实验研究 ($n=277$)，调查了四种不同的人机聊天机器人交互任务。每项任务完成后，参与者被要求完成关于感知信任、感知任务复杂性和感知任务满意度的调查项目。结果表明，任务复杂性会对信任和满意度产生负面影响。为此，较高的复杂性尤其与那些依赖于广泛的、描述性的聊天机器人答案的对话相关，而跨越几个短步骤的对话被认为不太复杂，即使整个对话最终更长。

AI.tldr: 研究聊天机器人在流程自动化中的应用对用户信任和满意度的影响
AI.motivation: 随着聊天机器人技术发展，企业希望利用其提升效率，但用户是否信任并满意是关键因素
AI.method: 通过277人的实验研究，分析四个聊天机器人交互任务后用户对信任度、任务复杂性和满意度的反馈
AI.result: 任务复杂性显著降低信任和满意度，广泛描述性回答增加复杂感，分步骤交互虽总时长更长但感知复杂度更低
AI.conclusion: 任务复杂性直接影响用户体验，优化交互流程设计可提升聊天机器人在自动化场景中的接受度

title: Delayed Feedback in Kernel Bandits
title_zh: 内核 Bandits 中的延迟反馈
abstract: Black box optimisation of an unknown function from expensive and noisy evaluations is a ubiquitous problem in machine learning, academic research and industrial production. An abstraction of the problem can be formulated as a kernel based bandit problem (also known as Bayesian optimisation), where a learner aims at optimising a kernelized function through sequential noisy observations. The existing work predominantly assumes feedback is immediately available; an assumption which fails in many real world situations, including recommendation systems, clinical trials and hyperparameter tuning. We consider a kernel bandit problem under stochastically delayed feedback, and propose an algorithm with $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{Γ_k(T)T}+\mathbb{E}[τ])$ regret, where $T$ is the number of time steps, $Γ_k(T)$ is the maximum information gain of the kernel with $T$ observations, and $τ$ is the delay random variable. This represents a significant improvement over the state of the art regret bound of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(Γ_k(T)\sqrt{T}+\mathbb{E}[τ]Γ_k(T))$ reported in Verma et al. (2022). In particular, for very non-smooth kernels, the information gain grows almost linearly in time, trivializing the existing results. We also validate our theoretical results with simulations.
summary: Black box optimisation of an unknown function from expensive and noisy evaluations is a ubiquitous problem in machine learning, academic research and industrial production. An abstraction of the problem can be formulated as a kernel based bandit problem (also known as Bayesian optimisation), where a learner aims at optimising a kernelized function through sequential noisy observations. The existing work predominantly assumes feedback is immediately available; an assumption which fails in many real world situations, including recommendation systems, clinical trials and hyperparameter tuning. We consider a kernel bandit problem under stochastically delayed feedback, and propose an algorithm with $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{Γ_k(T)T}+\mathbb{E}[τ])$ regret, where $T$ is the number of time steps, $Γ_k(T)$ is the maximum information gain of the kernel with $T$ observations, and $τ$ is the delay random variable. This represents a significant improvement over the state of the art regret bound of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(Γ_k(T)\sqrt{T}+\mathbb{E}[τ]Γ_k(T))$ reported in Verma et al. (2022). In particular, for very non-smooth kernels, the information gain grows almost linearly in time, trivializing the existing results. We also validate our theoretical results with simulations.
abstract_zh: 通过昂贵且嘈杂的评估对未知函数进行黑盒优化是机器学习、学术研究和工业生产中普遍存在的问题。该问题的抽象可以表述为基于内核的老虎机问题（也称为贝叶斯优化），其中学习者旨在通过连续的噪声观察来优化内核化函数。现有的工作主要假设反馈是立即可用的；这一假设在许多现实世界的情况下都失败了，包括推荐系统、临床试验和超参数调整。我们考虑随机延迟反馈下的核强盗问题，并提出了一种带有 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{Γ_k(T)T}+\mathbb{E}[τ])$ 遗憾的算法，其中 $T$ 是时间步数，$Γ_k(T)$ 是具有 $T$ 观测值的核的最大信息增益，$τ$ 是延迟随机变量。这代表着对 Verma 等人报告的 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(Γ_k(T)\sqrt{T}+\mathbb{E}[τ]Γ_k(T))$ 的最先进遗憾界限的显着改进。 （2022）。特别是，对于非常不光滑的内核，信息增益几乎随时间线性增长，从而使现有结果变得微不足道。我们还通过模拟验证了我们的理论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在核带宽问题中存在随机延迟反馈的情况，提出了一种改进的算法以降低遗憾度。
AI.motivation: 现有核带宽问题研究假设反馈立即可用，但现实场景如推荐系统和临床试验中常存在延迟反馈，需改进算法以适应此类情况。
AI.method: 提出一种适用于随机延迟反馈的核带宽算法，其遗憾度界为$\	ilde{\\mathcal{O}}(\\sqrt{Γ_k(T)T}+\\mathbb{E}[τ])$，优于现有结果。
AI.result: 理论分析表明新算法在非常非光滑核情况下表现更优，且仿真验证了理论结果的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了延迟反馈问题，为实际应用中常见的延迟场景提供了更优的优化方法。

search_text: Delayed Feedback in Kernel Bandits 内核 Bandits 中的延迟反馈 Black box optimisation of an unknown function from expensive and noisy evaluations is a ubiquitous problem in machine learning, academic research and industrial production. An abstraction of the problem can be formulated as a kernel based bandit problem (also known as Bayesian optimisation), where a learner aims at optimising a kernelized function through sequential noisy observations. The existing work predominantly assumes feedback is immediately available; an assumption which fails in many real world situations, including recommendation systems, clinical trials and hyperparameter tuning. We consider a kernel bandit problem under stochastically delayed feedback, and propose an algorithm with $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{Γ_k(T)T}+\mathbb{E}[τ])$ regret, where $T$ is the number of time steps, $Γ_k(T)$ is the maximum information gain of the kernel with $T$ observations, and $τ$ is the delay random variable. This represents a significant improvement over the state of the art regret bound of $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(Γ_k(T)\sqrt{T}+\mathbb{E}[τ]Γ_k(T))$ reported in Verma et al. (2022). In particular, for very non-smooth kernels, the information gain grows almost linearly in time, trivializing the existing results. We also validate our theoretical results with simulations. 通过昂贵且嘈杂的评估对未知函数进行黑盒优化是机器学习、学术研究和工业生产中普遍存在的问题。该问题的抽象可以表述为基于内核的老虎机问题（也称为贝叶斯优化），其中学习者旨在通过连续的噪声观察来优化内核化函数。现有的工作主要假设反馈是立即可用的；这一假设在许多现实世界的情况下都失败了，包括推荐系统、临床试验和超参数调整。我们考虑随机延迟反馈下的核强盗问题，并提出了一种带有 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\sqrt{Γ_k(T)T}+\mathbb{E}[τ])$ 遗憾的算法，其中 $T$ 是时间步数，$Γ_k(T)$ 是具有 $T$ 观测值的核的最大信息增益，$τ$ 是延迟随机变量。这代表着对 Verma 等人报告的 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(Γ_k(T)\sqrt{T}+\mathbb{E}[τ]Γ_k(T))$ 的最先进遗憾界限的显着改进。 （2022）。特别是，对于非常不光滑的内核，信息增益几乎随时间线性增长，从而使现有结果变得微不足道。我们还通过模拟验证了我们的理论结果。 本文研究了在核带宽问题中存在随机延迟反馈的情况，提出了一种改进的算法以降低遗憾度。 Sattar Vakili,Danyal Ahmed,Alberto Bernacchia,Ciara Pike-Burke stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Lala Shakti Swarup Ray,Bo Zhou,Sungho Suh,Paul Lukowicz
title: PresSim: An End-to-end Framework for Dynamic Ground Pressure Profile Generation from Monocular Videos Using Physics-based 3D Simulation
title_zh: PresSim：使用基于物理的 3D 仿真从单目视频生成动态地面压力剖面的端到端框架
abstract: Ground pressure exerted by the human body is a valuable source of information for human activity recognition (HAR) in unobtrusive pervasive sensing. While data collection from pressure sensors to develop HAR solutions requires significant resources and effort, we present a novel end-to-end framework, PresSim, to synthesize sensor data from videos of human activities to reduce such effort significantly. PresSim adopts a 3-stage process: first, extract the 3D activity information from videos with computer vision architectures; then simulate the floor mesh deformation profiles based on the 3D activity information and gravity-included physics simulation; lastly, generate the simulated pressure sensor data with deep learning models. We explored two approaches for the 3D activity information: inverse kinematics with mesh re-targeting, and volumetric pose and shape estimation. We validated PresSim with an experimental setup with a monocular camera to provide input and a pressure-sensing fitness mat (80x28 spatial resolution) to provide the sensor ground truth, where nine participants performed a set of predefined yoga sequences.
summary: Ground pressure exerted by the human body is a valuable source of information for human activity recognition (HAR) in unobtrusive pervasive sensing. While data collection from pressure sensors to develop HAR solutions requires significant resources and effort, we present a novel end-to-end framework, PresSim, to synthesize sensor data from videos of human activities to reduce such effort significantly. PresSim adopts a 3-stage process: first, extract the 3D activity information from videos with computer vision architectures; then simulate the floor mesh deformation profiles based on the 3D activity information and gravity-included physics simulation; lastly, generate the simulated pressure sensor data with deep learning models. We explored two approaches for the 3D activity information: inverse kinematics with mesh re-targeting, and volumetric pose and shape estimation. We validated PresSim with an experimental setup with a monocular camera to provide input and a pressure-sensing fitness mat (80x28 spatial resolution) to provide the sensor ground truth, where nine participants performed a set of predefined yoga sequences.
abstract_zh: 人体施加的地面压力是不引人注目的普适传感中人类活动识别 (HAR) 的宝贵信息来源。虽然从压力传感器收集数据来开发 HAR 解决方案需要大量资源和精力，但我们提出了一种新颖的端到端框架 PresSim，可以从人类活动视频中合成传感器数据，从而显着减少此类工作量。 PresSim 采用 3 阶段流程：首先，利用计算机视觉架构从视频中提取 3D 活动信息；然后根据 3D 活动信息和包含重力的物理模拟来模拟地板网格变形轮廓；最后，利用深度学习模型生成模拟压力传感器数据。我们探索了两种获取 3D 活动信息的方法：具有网格重新定位的逆运动学，以及体积姿态和形状估计。我们通过实验设置验证了 PresSim，其中单目摄像头提供输入，压力感应健身垫（80x28 空间分辨率）提供传感器地面实况，其中 9 名参与者执行了一组预定义的瑜伽序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PresSim框架，利用单目视频和物理模拟生成动态地面压力分布，用于无接触人体活动识别。
AI.motivation: 传统压力传感器数据采集成本高且侵入性强，通过视频生成合成数据可降低资源消耗并推动无干扰活动识别技术发展。
AI.method: 采用三阶段流程：1) 计算机视觉提取3D动作信息；2) 基于物理模拟生成地板变形轮廓；3) 深度学习生成压力数据。包含逆运动学网格重定向和体积姿态估计两种3D信息获取方法。
AI.result: 实验验证显示，使用单目摄像头和压力垫（80x28分辨率）采集九名参与者瑜伽动作数据，框架能有效生成与真实传感器数据匹配的压力分布。
AI.conclusion: PresSim成功实现了从视频到压力数据的端到端生成，为无传感器环境下的活动识别提供了新方法和数据合成工具。

authors_text: Susie Xi Rao,Peter H. Egger,Ce Zhang
title: Hierarchical Classification of Research Fields in the "Web of Science" Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 利用深度学习对“Web of Science”研究领域进行层次分类
abstract: This paper presents a hierarchical classification system that automatically categorizes a scholarly publication using its abstract into a three-tier hierarchical label set (discipline, field, subfield) in a multi-class setting. This system enables a holistic categorization of research activities in the mentioned hierarchy in terms of knowledge production through articles and impact through citations, permitting those activities to fall into multiple categories. The classification system distinguishes 44 disciplines, 718 fields and 1,485 subfields among 160 million abstract snippets in Microsoft Academic Graph (version 2018-05-17). We used batch training in a modularized and distributed fashion to address and allow for interdisciplinary and interfield classifications in single-label and multi-label settings. In total, we have conducted 3,140 experiments in all considered models (Convolutional Neural Networks, Recurrent Neural Networks, Transformers). The classification accuracy is > 90% in 77.13% and 78.19% of the single-label and multi-label classifications, respectively. We examine the advantages of our classification by its ability to better align research texts and output with disciplines, to adequately classify them in an automated way, and to capture the degree of interdisciplinarity. The proposed system (a set of pre-trained models) can serve as a backbone to an interactive system for indexing scientific publications in the future.
summary: This paper presents a hierarchical classification system that automatically categorizes a scholarly publication using its abstract into a three-tier hierarchical label set (discipline, field, subfield) in a multi-class setting. This system enables a holistic categorization of research activities in the mentioned hierarchy in terms of knowledge production through articles and impact through citations, permitting those activities to fall into multiple categories. The classification system distinguishes 44 disciplines, 718 fields and 1,485 subfields among 160 million abstract snippets in Microsoft Academic Graph (version 2018-05-17). We used batch training in a modularized and distributed fashion to address and allow for interdisciplinary and interfield classifications in single-label and multi-label settings. In total, we have conducted 3,140 experiments in all considered models (Convolutional Neural Networks, Recurrent Neural Networks, Transformers). The classification accuracy is > 90% in 77.13% and 78.19% of the single-label and multi-label classifications, respectively. We examine the advantages of our classification by its ability to better align research texts and output with disciplines, to adequately classify them in an automated way, and to capture the degree of interdisciplinarity. The proposed system (a set of pre-trained models) can serve as a backbone to an interactive system for indexing scientific publications in the future.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种层次分类系统，该系统使用学术出版物的摘要自动将其分类为多类设置中的三层层次标签集（学科、领域、子领域）。该系统可以根据文章的知识生产和引用的影响对上述层次结构中的研究活动进行整体分类，从而使这些活动可以分为多个类别。该分类系统在 Microsoft Academy Graph（版本 2018-05-17）中的 1.6 亿个摘要片段中区分了 44 个学科、718 个领域和 1,485 个子领域。我们以模块化和分布式方式使用批量训练来解决并允许单标签和多标签设置中的跨学科和跨领域分类。总共，我们在所有考虑的模型（卷积神经网络、循环神经网络、Transformers）中进行了 3,140 次实验。单标签和多标签分类的分类准确率分别为 77.13% 和 78.19%，分类准确率 > 90%。我们通过其能够更好地使研究文本和输出与学科保持一致、以自动化方式对其进行充分分类以及捕捉跨学科程度的能力来检验分类的优势。所提出的系统（一组预先训练的模型）可以作为未来科学出版物索引交互式系统的骨干。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的三层研究领域层次分类系统，能够自动将学术论文的摘要分类到学科、领域和子领域中。
AI.motivation: 传统分类方法难以高效处理跨学科研究，且无法满足大规模学术文献的自动化分类需求，需构建多标签分类系统以提升分类精度与灵活性。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）、循环神经网络（RNN）和Transformer等模型，在微软学术图谱（含1.6亿摘要片段）上进行模块化分布式批量训练，支持单标签与多标签分类。
AI.result: 单标签分类准确率超过90%的占比77.13%，多标签分类为78.19%，系统可有效捕捉跨学科特性并实现自动化分类。
AI.conclusion: 该预训练模型体系可作为学术出版物索引系统的底层框架，为未来交互式分类工具提供高效、精准的解决方案。

We used batch training in a modularized and distributed fashion to address and allow for interdisciplinary and interfield classifications in single-label and multi-label settings. In total, we have conducted 3,140 experiments in all considered models (Convolutional Neural Networks, Recurrent Neural Networks, Transformers). The classification accuracy is > 90% in 77.13% and 78.19% of the single-label and multi-label classifications, respectively. We examine the advantages of our classification by its ability to better align research texts and output with disciplines, to adequately classify them in an automated way, and to capture the degree of interdisciplinarity. The proposed system (a set of pre-trained models) can serve as a backbone to an interactive system for indexing scientific publications in the future. 本文提出了一种层次分类系统，该系统使用学术出版物的摘要自动将其分类为多类设置中的三层层次标签集（学科、领域、子领域）。该系统可以根据文章的知识生产和引用的影响对上述层次结构中的研究活动进行整体分类，从而使这些活动可以分为多个类别。该分类系统在 Microsoft Academy Graph（版本 2018-05-17）中的 1.6 亿个摘要片段中区分了 44 个学科、718 个领域和 1,485 个子领域。我们以模块化和分布式方式使用批量训练来解决并允许单标签和多标签设置中的跨学科和跨领域分类。总共，我们在所有考虑的模型（卷积神经网络、循环神经网络、Transformers）中进行了 3,140 次实验。单标签和多标签分类的分类准确率分别为 77.13% 和 78.19%，分类准确率 > 90%。我们通过其能够更好地使研究文本和输出与学科保持一致、以自动化方式对其进行充分分类以及捕捉跨学科程度的能力来检验分类的优势。所提出的系统（一组预先训练的模型）可以作为未来科学出版物索引交互式系统的骨干。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的三层研究领域层次分类系统，能够自动将学术论文的摘要分类到学科、领域和子领域中。 Susie Xi Rao,Peter H. Egger,Ce Zhang cs.DL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Muhammad Arslan Manzoor,Sarah Albarri,Ziting Xian,Zaiqiao Meng,Preslav Nakov,Shangsong Liang
title: Multimodality Representation Learning: A Survey on Evolution, Pretraining and Its Applications
title_zh: 多模态表示学习：进化、预训练及其应用综述
abstract: Multimodality Representation Learning, as a technique of learning to embed information from different modalities and their correlations, has achieved remarkable success on a variety of applications, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), Natural Language for Visual Reasoning (NLVR), and Vision Language Retrieval (VLR). Among these applications, cross-modal interaction and complementary information from different modalities are crucial for advanced models to perform any multimodal task, e.g., understand, recognize, retrieve, or generate optimally. Researchers have proposed diverse methods to address these tasks. The different variants of transformer-based architectures performed extraordinarily on multiple modalities. This survey presents the comprehensive literature on the evolution and enhancement of deep learning multimodal architectures to deal with textual, visual and audio features for diverse cross-modal and modern multimodal tasks. This study summarizes the (i) recent task-specific deep learning methodologies, (ii) the pretraining types and multimodal pretraining objectives, (iii) from state-of-the-art pretrained multimodal approaches to unifying architectures, and (iv) multimodal task categories and possible future improvements that can be devised for better multimodal learning. Moreover, we prepare a dataset section for new researchers that covers most of the benchmarks for pretraining and finetuning. Finally, major challenges, gaps, and potential research topics are explored. A constantly-updated paperlist related to our survey is maintained at https://github.com/marslanm/multimodality-representation-learning.
summary: Multimodality Representation Learning, as a technique of learning to embed information from different modalities and their correlations, has achieved remarkable success on a variety of applications, such as Visual Question Answering (VQA), Natural Language for Visual Reasoning (NLVR), and Vision Language Retrieval (VLR). Among these applications, cross-modal interaction and complementary information from different modalities are crucial for advanced models to perform any multimodal task, e.g., understand, recognize, retrieve, or generate optimally. Researchers have proposed diverse methods to address these tasks. The different variants of transformer-based architectures performed extraordinarily on multiple modalities. This survey presents the comprehensive literature on the evolution and enhancement of deep learning multimodal architectures to deal with textual, visual and audio features for diverse cross-modal and modern multimodal tasks. This study summarizes the (i) recent task-specific deep learning methodologies, (ii) the pretraining types and multimodal pretraining objectives, (iii) from state-of-the-art pretrained multimodal approaches to unifying architectures, and (iv) multimodal task categories and possible future improvements that can be devised for better multimodal learning. Moreover, we prepare a dataset section for new researchers that covers most of the benchmarks for pretraining and finetuning. Finally, major challenges, gaps, and potential research topics are explored. A constantly-updated paperlist related to our survey is maintained at https://github.com/marslanm/multimodality-representation-learning.
abstract_zh: 多模态表示学习作为一种学习嵌入来自不同模态及其相关性的信息的技术，在视觉问答（VQA）、视觉推理自然语言（NLVR）和视觉语言检索（VLR）等各种应用中取得了显着的成功。在这些应用中，跨模态交互和来自不同模态的补充信息对于高级模型执行任何多模态任务（例如理解、识别、检索或最佳生成）至关重要。研究人员提出了多种方法来解决这些任务。基于 Transformer 的架构的不同变体在多种模式上表现出色。这项调查提供了关于深度学习多模态架构的演变和增强的综合文献，以处理各种跨模态和现代多模态任务的文本、视觉和音频特征。这项研究总结了（i）最近的特定任务深度学习方法，（ii）预训练类型和多模态预训练目标，（iii）从最先进的预训练多模态方法到统一架构，以及（iv）多模态任务类别和未来可能的改进，可以设计出更好的多模态学习。此外，我们为新研究人员准备了一个数据集部分，涵盖了预训练和微调的大部分基准。最后，探讨了主要挑战、差距和潜在的研究主题。与我们的调查相关的不断更新的论文列表保存在 https://github.com/marslanm/multimodality-representation-learning。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了多模态表征学习的发展历程、预训练方法及其在视觉问答、视觉推理等任务中的应用。
AI.motivation: 多模态任务需融合不同模态信息，但现有方法在跨模态交互和互补性利用上仍存在挑战，需系统梳理技术演进与未来方向。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，分类总结多模态深度学习方法、预训练目标、统一架构设计及任务类别，并整理相关数据集与基准。
AI.result: 系统归纳了任务特定方法、预训练类型、主流架构及任务分类，分析了当前技术差距并提出未来改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 多模态学习需进一步解决模态对齐、小样本学习等挑战，未来研究应关注更高效的预训练策略与跨模态生成能力。

authors_text: Kaiheng Weng,Xiangxiang Chu,Xiaoming Xu,Junshi Huang,Xiaoming Wei
title: EfficientRep:An Efficient Repvgg-style ConvNets with Hardware-aware Neural Network Design
title_zh: EfficientRep：具有硬件感知神经网络设计的高效 Repvgg 式 ConvNet
abstract: We present a hardware-efficient architecture of convolutional neural network, which has a repvgg-like architecture. Flops or parameters are traditional metrics to evaluate the efficiency of networks which are not sensitive to hardware including computing ability and memory bandwidth. Thus, how to design a neural network to efficiently use the computing ability and memory bandwidth of hardware is a critical problem. This paper proposes a method how to design hardware-aware neural network. Based on this method, we designed EfficientRep series convolutional networks, which are high-computation hardware(e.g. GPU) friendly and applied in YOLOv6 object detection framework. YOLOv6 has published YOLOv6N/YOLOv6S/YOLOv6M/YOLOv6L models in v1 and v2 versions.
summary: We present a hardware-efficient architecture of convolutional neural network, which has a repvgg-like architecture. Flops or parameters are traditional metrics to evaluate the efficiency of networks which are not sensitive to hardware including computing ability and memory bandwidth. Thus, how to design a neural network to efficiently use the computing ability and memory bandwidth of hardware is a critical problem. This paper proposes a method how to design hardware-aware neural network. Based on this method, we designed EfficientRep series convolutional networks, which are high-computation hardware(e.g. GPU) friendly and applied in YOLOv6 object detection framework. YOLOv6 has published YOLOv6N/YOLOv6S/YOLOv6M/YOLOv6L models in v1 and v2 versions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种硬件高效的卷积神经网络架构，它具有类似repvgg的架构。触发器或参数是评估网络效率的传统指标，对硬件（包括计算能力和内存带宽）不敏感。因此，如何设计一个神经网络来有效地利用硬件的计算能力和内存带宽是一个关键问题。本文提出了一种设计硬件感知神经网络的方法。基于该方法，我们设计了EfficientRep系列卷积网络，该网络对高计算硬件（例如GPU）友好，并应用于YOLOv6目标检测框架中。 YOLOv6已经发布了v1和v2版本的YOLOv6N/YOLOv6S/YOLOv6M/YOLOv6L模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种硬件感知的高效卷积神经网络设计方法，基于RepVGG结构开发了EfficientRep系列网络，并应用于YOLOv6目标检测框架。
AI.motivation: 传统网络效率评估指标（如FLOPs和参数量）未考虑硬件计算能力与内存带宽特性，导致设计的网络难以有效利用硬件资源。
AI.method: 提出硬件感知的神经网络设计方法，通过优化计算能力与内存带宽利用效率，构建RepVGG风格的EfficientRep系列网络架构。
AI.result: 设计的EfficientRep网络在GPU等高性能硬件上表现优异，成功集成于YOLOv6框架的N/S/M/L等多个版本模型中。
AI.conclusion: 硬件感知设计方法能显著提升网络在实际硬件上的效率，EfficientRep系列验证了该方法在目标检测任务中的有效性。

title: Alphazzle: Jigsaw Puzzle Solver with Deep Monte-Carlo Tree Search
title_zh: Alphazzle：具有深度蒙特卡罗树搜索的拼图解算器
abstract: Solving jigsaw puzzles requires to grasp the visual features of a sequence of patches and to explore efficiently a solution space that grows exponentially with the sequence length. Therefore, visual deep reinforcement learning (DRL) should answer this problem more efficiently than optimization solvers coupled with neural networks. Based on this assumption, we introduce Alphazzle, a reassembly algorithm based on single-player Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). A major difference with DRL algorithms lies in the unavailability of game reward for MCTS, and we show how to estimate it from the visual input with neural networks. This constraint is induced by the puzzle-solving task and dramatically adds to the task complexity (and interest!). We perform an in-deep ablation study that shows the importance of MCTS and the neural networks working together. We achieve excellent results and get exciting insights into the combination of DRL and visual feature learning.
summary: Solving jigsaw puzzles requires to grasp the visual features of a sequence of patches and to explore efficiently a solution space that grows exponentially with the sequence length. Therefore, visual deep reinforcement learning (DRL) should answer this problem more efficiently than optimization solvers coupled with neural networks. Based on this assumption, we introduce Alphazzle, a reassembly algorithm based on single-player Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). A major difference with DRL algorithms lies in the unavailability of game reward for MCTS, and we show how to estimate it from the visual input with neural networks. This constraint is induced by the puzzle-solving task and dramatically adds to the task complexity (and interest!). We perform an in-deep ablation study that shows the importance of MCTS and the neural networks working together. We achieve excellent results and get exciting insights into the combination of DRL and visual feature learning.
abstract_zh: 解决拼图游戏需要掌握一系列补丁的视觉特征，并有效地探索随着序列长度呈指数增长的解决方案空间。因此，视觉深度强化学习（DRL）应该比结合神经网络的优化求解器更有效地解决这个问题。基于这个假设，我们引入了Alphazzle，一种基于单人蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）的重组算法。 DRL 算法的一个主要区别在于 MC​​TS 无法获得游戏奖励，我们展示了如何使用神经网络根据视觉输入来估计它。这种约束是由解谜任务引起的，并极大地增加了任务的复杂性（和兴趣！）。我们进行了一项深入的消融研究，显示了 MCTS 和神经网络协同工作的重要性。我们取得了优异的成果，并对 DRL 和视觉特征学习的结合获得了令人兴奋的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Alphazzle算法，结合深度蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与神经网络，解决拼图问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优化算法难以高效处理拼图问题的指数级解空间，而深度强化学习（DRL）因缺乏明确奖励信号面临挑战，需探索新方法。
AI.method: 基于单人MCTS框架，利用神经网络从视觉输入中估计奖励信号，替代传统DRL的奖励机制，并通过消融实验证明MCTS与神经网络协同的重要性。
AI.result: 在拼图任务中取得优异性能，验证了MCTS与视觉特征学习结合的有效性，并获得关于DRL与视觉学习融合的新见解。
AI.conclusion: Alphazzle通过MCTS与神经网络的协同，成功解决拼图问题，展示了深度强化学习在视觉任务中的潜力，为相关研究提供新方向。

search_text: Alphazzle: Jigsaw Puzzle Solver with Deep Monte-Carlo Tree Search Alphazzle：具有深度蒙特卡罗树搜索的拼图解算器 Solving jigsaw puzzles requires to grasp the visual features of a sequence of patches and to explore efficiently a solution space that grows exponentially with the sequence length. Therefore, visual deep reinforcement learning (DRL) should answer this problem more efficiently than optimization solvers coupled with neural networks. Based on this assumption, we introduce Alphazzle, a reassembly algorithm based on single-player Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS). A major difference with DRL algorithms lies in the unavailability of game reward for MCTS, and we show how to estimate it from the visual input with neural networks. This constraint is induced by the puzzle-solving task and dramatically adds to the task complexity (and interest!). We perform an in-deep ablation study that shows the importance of MCTS and the neural networks working together. We achieve excellent results and get exciting insights into the combination of DRL and visual feature learning. 解决拼图游戏需要掌握一系列补丁的视觉特征，并有效地探索随着序列长度呈指数增长的解决方案空间。因此，视觉深度强化学习（DRL）应该比结合神经网络的优化求解器更有效地解决这个问题。基于这个假设，我们引入了Alphazzle，一种基于单人蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）的重组算法。 DRL 算法的一个主要区别在于 MC​​TS 无法获得游戏奖励，我们展示了如何使用神经网络根据视觉输入来估计它。这种约束是由解谜任务引起的，并极大地增加了任务的复杂性（和兴趣！）。我们进行了一项深入的消融研究，显示了 MCTS 和神经网络协同工作的重要性。我们取得了优异的成果，并对 DRL 和视觉特征学习的结合获得了令人兴奋的见解。 本文提出Alphazzle算法，结合深度蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与神经网络，解决拼图问题。 Marie-Morgane Paumard,Hedi Tabia,David Picard cs.CV

authors_text: Mohit Sharma,Talha Bin Masood,Signe S. Thygesen,Mathieu Linares,Ingrid Hotz,Vijay Natarajan
title: Continuous Scatterplot Operators for Bivariate Analysis and Study of Electronic Transitions
title_zh: 用于电子跃迁双变量分析和研究的连续散点图运算符
abstract: Electronic transitions in molecules due to the absorption or emission of light is a complex quantum mechanical process. Their study plays an important role in the design of novel materials. A common yet challenging task in the study is to determine the nature of electronic transitions, namely which subgroups of the molecule are involved in the transition by donating or accepting electrons, followed by an investigation of the variation in the donor-acceptor behavior for different transitions or conformations of the molecules. In this paper, we present a novel approach for the analysis of a bivariate field and show its applicability to the study of electronic transitions. This approach is based on two novel operators, the continuous scatterplot (CSP) lens operator and the CSP peel operator, that enable effective visual analysis of bivariate fields. Both operators can be applied independently or together to facilitate analysis. The operators motivate the design of control polygon inputs to extract fiber surfaces of interest in the spatial domain. The CSPs are annotated with a quantitative measure to further support the visual analysis. We study different molecular systems and demonstrate how the CSP peel and CSP lens operators help identify and study donor and acceptor characteristics in molecular systems.
summary: Electronic transitions in molecules due to the absorption or emission of light is a complex quantum mechanical process. Their study plays an important role in the design of novel materials. A common yet challenging task in the study is to determine the nature of electronic transitions, namely which subgroups of the molecule are involved in the transition by donating or accepting electrons, followed by an investigation of the variation in the donor-acceptor behavior for different transitions or conformations of the molecules. In this paper, we present a novel approach for the analysis of a bivariate field and show its applicability to the study of electronic transitions. This approach is based on two novel operators, the continuous scatterplot (CSP) lens operator and the CSP peel operator, that enable effective visual analysis of bivariate fields. Both operators can be applied independently or together to facilitate analysis. The operators motivate the design of control polygon inputs to extract fiber surfaces of interest in the spatial domain. The CSPs are annotated with a quantitative measure to further support the visual analysis. We study different molecular systems and demonstrate how the CSP peel and CSP lens operators help identify and study donor and acceptor characteristics in molecular systems.
abstract_zh: 由于吸收或发射光而导致的分子中的电子跃迁是一个复杂的量子力学过程。他们的研究在新型材料的设计中发挥着重要作用。研究中一个常见但具有挑战性的任务是确定电子跃迁的性质，即分子的哪些亚组通过给予或接受电子参与跃迁，然后研究分子不同跃迁或构象的供体-受体行为的变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种分析双变量场的新方法，并展示了其在电子跃迁研究中的适用性。该方法基于两个新颖的算子：连续散点图 (CSP) 透镜算子和 CSP 剥离算子，可以对双变量场进行有效的视觉分析。两个运算符可以单独应用，也可以一起应用以方便分析。算子激发控制多边形输入的设计，以提取空间域中感兴趣的光纤表面。 CSP 通过定量测量进行注释，以进一步支持可视化分析。我们研究不同的分子系统，并演示 CSP 剥离和 CSP 透镜操作器如何帮助识别和研究分子系统中的供体和受体特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于连续散点图（CSP）算子的双变量场分析方法，用于研究分子电子跃迁中的供体-受体特性。
AI.motivation: 电子跃迁研究对新材料设计至关重要，但现有方法难以有效分析分子中不同子群的供体-受体行为及其随跃迁或构象的变化。
AI.method: 设计CSP lens和CSP peel两种算子，结合控制多边形输入提取空间纤维表面，并通过定量指标标注CSP以支持可视化分析。
AI.result: 通过多种分子系统验证，CSP算子能有效识别并分析不同跃迁状态下的供体-受体特性变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为电子跃迁的可视化分析提供了新工具，有助于深入理解分子电子行为并指导材料设计。

title: Test-Time Amendment with a Coarse Classifier for Fine-Grained Classification
title_zh: 使用粗分类器进行细粒度分类的测试时修正
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables, Accepted at NeurIPS 2023
comments: 8 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables, Accepted at NeurIPS 2023
abstract: We investigate the problem of reducing mistake severity for fine-grained classification. Fine-grained classification can be challenging, mainly due to the requirement of domain expertise for accurate annotation. However, humans are particularly adept at performing coarse classification as it requires relatively low levels of expertise. To this end, we present a novel approach for Post-Hoc Correction called Hierarchical Ensembles (HiE) that utilizes label hierarchy to improve the performance of fine-grained classification at test-time using the coarse-grained predictions. By only requiring the parents of leaf nodes, our method significantly reduces avg. mistake severity while improving top-1 accuracy on the iNaturalist-19 and tieredImageNet-H datasets, achieving a new state-of-the-art on both benchmarks. We also investigate the efficacy of our approach in the semi-supervised setting. Our approach brings notable gains in top-1 accuracy while significantly decreasing the severity of mistakes as training data decreases for the fine-grained classes. The simplicity and post-hoc nature of HiE renders it practical to be used with any off-the-shelf trained model to improve its predictions further.
summary: We investigate the problem of reducing mistake severity for fine-grained classification. Fine-grained classification can be challenging, mainly due to the requirement of domain expertise for accurate annotation. However, humans are particularly adept at performing coarse classification as it requires relatively low levels of expertise. To this end, we present a novel approach for Post-Hoc Correction called Hierarchical Ensembles (HiE) that utilizes label hierarchy to improve the performance of fine-grained classification at test-time using the coarse-grained predictions. By only requiring the parents of leaf nodes, our method significantly reduces avg. mistake severity while improving top-1 accuracy on the iNaturalist-19 and tieredImageNet-H datasets, achieving a new state-of-the-art on both benchmarks. We also investigate the efficacy of our approach in the semi-supervised setting. Our approach brings notable gains in top-1 accuracy while significantly decreasing the severity of mistakes as training data decreases for the fine-grained classes. The simplicity and post-hoc nature of HiE renders it practical to be used with any off-the-shelf trained model to improve its predictions further.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了降低细粒度分类错误严重性的问题。细粒度分类可能具有挑战性，主要是因为需要领域专业知识来进行准确注释。然而，人类特别擅长执行粗分类，因为它需要相对较低的专业知识水平。为此，我们提出了一种称为分层集成（HiE）的事后校正的新颖方法，该方法利用标签层次结构来使用粗粒度预测来提高测试时细粒度分类的性能。通过只需要叶节点的父节点，我们的方法显着减少了 avg。错误严重性，同时提高 iNaturalist-19 和 tieredImageNet-H 数据集上的 top-1 准确度，在两个基准测试中实现了新的最先进水平。我们还研究了我们的方法在半监督环境中的有效性。我们的方法显着提高了 top-1 准确度，同时随着细粒度类的训练数据减少，显着降低了错误的严重性。 HiE 的简单性和事后性质使其可以与任何现成的训练模型一起使用，以进一步改进其预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种测试时利用粗分类器修正细粒度分类错误的新方法HiE。
AI.motivation: 细粒度分类需专业知识且易出错，而人类擅长粗分类。通过利用标签层次结构，用粗分类结果辅助细分类可降低错误严重性。
AI.method: 提出分层集成方法HiE，仅需叶节点父标签信息，在测试时结合粗分类预测修正细粒度分类结果。
AI.result: 在iNaturalist-19和tieredImageNet-H数据集上，HiE显著降低平均错误严重性并提升top-1准确率，半监督场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: HiE方法简单且无需额外训练，可有效提升任意预训练模型的细粒度分类性能，具有广泛实用性。

motivation: 细粒度分类需专业知识且易出错，而人类擅长粗分类。通过利用标签层次结构，用粗分类结果辅助细分类可降低错误严重性。
method: 提出分层集成方法HiE，仅需叶节点父标签信息，在测试时结合粗分类预测修正细粒度分类结果。
result: 在iNaturalist-19和tieredImageNet-H数据集上，HiE显著降低平均错误严重性并提升top-1准确率，半监督场景下表现更优。
conclusion: HiE方法简单且无需额外训练，可有效提升任意预训练模型的细粒度分类性能，具有广泛实用性。
search_text: Test-Time Amendment with a Coarse Classifier for Fine-Grained Classification 使用粗分类器进行细粒度分类的测试时修正 We investigate the problem of reducing mistake severity for fine-grained classification. Fine-grained classification can be challenging, mainly due to the requirement of domain expertise for accurate annotation. However, humans are particularly adept at performing coarse classification as it requires relatively low levels of expertise. To this end, we present a novel approach for Post-Hoc Correction called Hierarchical Ensembles (HiE) that utilizes label hierarchy to improve the performance of fine-grained classification at test-time using the coarse-grained predictions. By only requiring the parents of leaf nodes, our method significantly reduces avg. mistake severity while improving top-1 accuracy on the iNaturalist-19 and tieredImageNet-H datasets, achieving a new state-of-the-art on both benchmarks. We also investigate the efficacy of our approach in the semi-supervised setting. Our approach brings notable gains in top-1 accuracy while significantly decreasing the severity of mistakes as training data decreases for the fine-grained classes. The simplicity and post-hoc nature of HiE renders it practical to be used with any off-the-shelf trained model to improve its predictions further. 我们研究了降低细粒度分类错误严重性的问题。细粒度分类可能具有挑战性，主要是因为需要领域专业知识来进行准确注释。然而，人类特别擅长执行粗分类，因为它需要相对较低的专业知识水平。为此，我们提出了一种称为分层集成（HiE）的事后校正的新颖方法，该方法利用标签层次结构来使用粗粒度预测来提高测试时细粒度分类的性能。通过只需要叶节点的父节点，我们的方法显着减少了 avg。错误严重性，同时提高 iNaturalist-19 和 tieredImageNet-H 数据集上的 top-1 准确度，在两个基准测试中实现了新的最先进水平。我们还研究了我们的方法在半监督环境中的有效性。我们的方法显着提高了 top-1 准确度，同时随着细粒度类的训练数据减少，显着降低了错误的严重性。 HiE 的简单性和事后性质使其可以与任何现成的训练模型一起使用，以进一步改进其预测。 本文提出一种测试时利用粗分类器修正细粒度分类错误的新方法HiE。 Kanishk Jain,Shyamgopal Karthik,Vineet Gandhi cs.CV,cs.LG

title: The YODO algorithm: An efficient computational framework for sensitivity analysis in Bayesian networks
title_zh: YODO 算法：贝叶斯网络灵敏度分析的高效计算框架
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.08687
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2206.08687
abstract: Sensitivity analysis measures the influence of a Bayesian network's parameters on a quantity of interest defined by the network, such as the probability of a variable taking a specific value. Various sensitivity measures have been defined to quantify such influence, most commonly some function of the quantity of interest's partial derivative with respect to the network's conditional probabilities. However, computing these measures in large networks with thousands of parameters can become computationally very expensive. We propose an algorithm combining automatic differentiation and exact inference to efficiently calculate the sensitivity measures in a single pass. It first marginalizes the whole network once, using e.g. variable elimination, and then backpropagates this operation to obtain the gradient with respect to all input parameters. Our method can be used for one-way and multi-way sensitivity analysis and the derivation of admissible regions. Simulation studies highlight the efficiency of our algorithm by scaling it to massive networks with up to 100'000 parameters and investigate the feasibility of generic multi-way analyses. Our routines are also showcased over two medium-sized Bayesian networks: the first modeling the country-risks of a humanitarian crisis, the second studying the relationship between the use of technology and the psychological effects of forced social isolation during the COVID-19 pandemic. An implementation of the methods using the popular machine learning library PyTorch is freely available.
summary: Sensitivity analysis measures the influence of a Bayesian network's parameters on a quantity of interest defined by the network, such as the probability of a variable taking a specific value. Various sensitivity measures have been defined to quantify such influence, most commonly some function of the quantity of interest's partial derivative with respect to the network's conditional probabilities. However, computing these measures in large networks with thousands of parameters can become computationally very expensive. We propose an algorithm combining automatic differentiation and exact inference to efficiently calculate the sensitivity measures in a single pass. It first marginalizes the whole network once, using e.g. variable elimination, and then backpropagates this operation to obtain the gradient with respect to all input parameters. Our method can be used for one-way and multi-way sensitivity analysis and the derivation of admissible regions. Simulation studies highlight the efficiency of our algorithm by scaling it to massive networks with up to 100'000 parameters and investigate the feasibility of generic multi-way analyses. Our routines are also showcased over two medium-sized Bayesian networks: the first modeling the country-risks of a humanitarian crisis, the second studying the relationship between the use of technology and the psychological effects of forced social isolation during the COVID-19 pandemic. An implementation of the methods using the popular machine learning library PyTorch is freely available.
abstract_zh: 敏感性分析衡量贝叶斯网络参数对网络定义的感兴趣量的影响，例如变量取特定值的概率。已经定义了各种敏感性测量来量化这种影响，最常见的是兴趣量相对于网络条件概率的偏导数的一些函数。然而，在具有数千个参数的大型网络中计算这些度量可能会变得非常昂贵。我们提出了一种结合自动微分和精确推理的算法，以在单次传递中有效地计算灵敏度度量。它首先将整个网络边缘化一次，例如使用变量消除，然后反向传播该操作以获得关于所有输入参数的梯度。我们的方法可用于单向和多向敏感性分析以及可接受区域的推导。模拟研究通过将算法扩展到具有多达 100,000 个参数的大规模网络来强调算法的效率，并研究通用多路分析的可行性。我们的日常工作还通过两个中型贝叶斯网络进行展示：第一个对人道主义危机的国家风险进行建模，第二个研究在 COVID-19 大流行期间技术的使用与强制社会隔离的心理影响之间的关系。使用流行的机器学习库 PyTorch 实现这些方法是免费的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为YODO的算法，用于在贝叶斯网络中高效计算敏感性分析。
AI.motivation: 在大型贝叶斯网络中，计算敏感性指标通常计算成本很高，因此需要一种更高效的算法。
AI.method: 该算法结合了自动微分和精确推理，通过一次网络边际化和反向传播操作来高效计算所有输入参数的梯度。
AI.result: 该方法在大规模网络（最多100,000个参数）上展示了其效率，并通过两个中等规模的贝叶斯网络进行了验证。
AI.conclusion: YODO算法为贝叶斯网络中的单向和多向敏感性分析提供了一种高效且可扩展的解决方案。

title: A Flexible Framework for Virtual Omnidirectional Vision to Improve Operator Situation Awareness
title_zh: 虚拟全向视觉的灵活框架可提高操作员的态势感知
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Mobile Robots (ECMR) 2021. Video link: https://youtu.be/7pocpdsMxOM Project page: https://tu-darmstadt-ros-pkg.github.io/omnidirectional_vision
comments: Accepted to European Conference on Mobile Robots (ECMR) 2021. Video link: https://youtu.be/7pocpdsMxOM Project page: https://tu-darmstadt-ros-pkg.github.io/omnidirectional_vision
abstract: During teleoperation of a mobile robot, providing good operator situation awareness is a major concern as a single mistake can lead to mission failure. Camera streams are widely used for teleoperation but offer limited field-of-view. In this paper, we present a flexible framework for virtual projections to increase situation awareness based on a novel method to fuse multiple cameras mounted anywhere on the robot. Moreover, we propose a complementary approach to improve scene understanding by fusing camera images and geometric 3D Lidar data to obtain a colorized point cloud. The implementation on a compact omnidirectional camera reduces system complexity considerably and solves multiple use-cases on a much smaller footprint compared to traditional approaches such as actuated pan-tilt units. Finally, we demonstrate the generality of the approach by application to the multi-camera system of the Boston Dynamics Spot. The software implementation is available as open-source ROS packages on the project page https://tu-darmstadt-ros-pkg.github.io/omnidirectional_vision.
summary: During teleoperation of a mobile robot, providing good operator situation awareness is a major concern as a single mistake can lead to mission failure. Camera streams are widely used for teleoperation but offer limited field-of-view. In this paper, we present a flexible framework for virtual projections to increase situation awareness based on a novel method to fuse multiple cameras mounted anywhere on the robot. Moreover, we propose a complementary approach to improve scene understanding by fusing camera images and geometric 3D Lidar data to obtain a colorized point cloud. The implementation on a compact omnidirectional camera reduces system complexity considerably and solves multiple use-cases on a much smaller footprint compared to traditional approaches such as actuated pan-tilt units. Finally, we demonstrate the generality of the approach by application to the multi-camera system of the Boston Dynamics Spot. The software implementation is available as open-source ROS packages on the project page https://tu-darmstadt-ros-pkg.github.io/omnidirectional_vision.
abstract_zh: 在移动机器人的远程操作过程中，为操作员提供良好的态势感知是一个主要问题，因为一个错误就可能导致任务失败。摄像机流广泛用于远程操作，但提供的视野有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种灵活的虚拟投影框架，以基于融合安装在机器人上任何位置的多个摄像机的新颖方法来提高态势感知能力。此外，我们提出了一种补充方法，通过融合相机图像和几何 3D 激光雷达数据来获得彩色点云，从而提高场景理解。与驱动云台等传统方法相比，紧凑型全向摄像机的实施大大降低了系统复杂性，并以更小的占地面积解决了多个用例。最后，我们通过应用于 Boston Dynamics Spot 的多摄像头系统来展示该方法的通用性。该软件实现可作为开源 ROS 包在项目页面 https://tu-darmstadt-ros-pkg.github.io/omnidirective_vision 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种灵活的虚拟全景视觉框架，通过融合多摄像头和3D激光雷达数据，提升远程操作机器人的操作员态势感知能力。
AI.motivation: 传统摄像头视野有限，难以满足远程操作机器人对环境全面感知的需求，可能导致任务失败，需更高效的多传感器数据融合方案。
AI.method: 设计基于多摄像头虚拟投影的融合方法，结合几何3D激光雷达数据生成彩色点云，并采用紧凑型全景摄像头替代传统云台装置，降低系统复杂度。
AI.result: 在波士顿动力Spot多摄像头系统上验证了方法的通用性，实现了更小体积的系统部署，并开源了ROS软件包。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过多模态数据融合有效提升了态势感知能力，且具有良好的工程适用性和可扩展性。

title: Faster maximal clique enumeration in large real-world link streams
title_zh: 在大型现实世界链接流中更快地进行最大集团枚举
abstract: Link streams offer a good model for representing interactions over time. They consist of links $(b,e,u,v)$, where $u$ and $v$ are vertices interacting during the whole time interval $[b,e]$. In this paper, we deal with the problem of enumerating maximal cliques in link streams. A clique is a pair $(C,[t_0,t_1])$, where $C$ is a set of vertices that all interact pairwise during the full interval $[t_0,t_1]$. It is maximal when neither its set of vertices nor its time interval can be increased. Some of the main works solving this problem are based on the famous Bron-Kerbosch algorithm for enumerating maximal cliques in graphs. We take this idea as a starting point to propose a new algorithm which matches the cliques of the instantaneous graphs formed by links existing at a given time $t$ to the maximal cliques of the link stream. We prove its validity and compute its complexity, which is better than the state-of-the art ones in many cases of interest. We also study the output-sensitive complexity, which is close to the output size, thereby showing that our algorithm is efficient. To confirm this, we perform experiments on link streams used in the state of the art, and on massive link streams, up to 100 million links. In all cases our algorithm is faster, mostly by a factor of at least 10 and up to a factor of $10^4$. Moreover, it scales to massive link streams for which the existing algorithms are not able to provide the solution.

abstract_zh: 链接流提供了一个很好的模型来表示随时间变化的交互。它们由链接 $(b,e,u,v)$ 组成，其中 $u$ 和 $v$ 是在整个时间间隔 $[b,e]$ 期间相互作用的顶点。在本文中，我们处理枚举链接流中最大派系的问题。团是一对 $(C,[t_0,t_1])$，其中 $C$ 是一组在整个区间 $[t_0,t_1]$ 期间成对交互的顶点。当它的顶点集和时间间隔都不能增加时，它是最大的。解决这个问题的一些主要工作基于著名的 Bron-Kerbosch 算法，用于枚举图中的最大团。我们以此想法为起点，提出一种新算法，将给定时间 $t$ 存在的链接形成的瞬时图的派系与链接流的最大派系相匹配。我们证明了它的有效性并计算了它的复杂性，在许多感兴趣的情况下，这比最先进的方法要好。我们还研究了输出敏感的复杂度，它接近于输出大小，从而表明我们的算法是有效的。为了证实这一点，我们对现有技术中使用的链接流以及高达 1 亿个链接的海量链接流进行了实验。在所有情况下，我们的算法都更快，大部分至少快 10 倍，最多 10^4$ 倍。此外，它还可以扩展到现有算法无法提供解决方案的海量链接流。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在大规模真实世界链接流中更快枚举最大团的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理大规模链接流时效率低下，无法满足实际需求，需改进以提高计算速度和可扩展性。
AI.method: 基于Bron-Kerbosch算法，将瞬时图的最大团与链接流中的时间区间匹配，设计新算法并证明其有效性，分析其复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，新算法在多种数据集上比现有方法快10倍至10^4倍，且能处理1亿条链接的超大规模数据。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在效率和可扩展性上优于现有方法，适用于大规模真实世界链接流的最大团枚举问题。

authors_text: Mert Kilickaya,Joost van de Weijer,Yuki M. Asano
title: Towards Label-Efficient Incremental Learning: A Survey
title_zh: 迈向标签高效的增量学习：一项调查
abstract: The current dominant paradigm when building a machine learning model is to iterate over a dataset over and over until convergence. Such an approach is non-incremental, as it assumes access to all images of all categories at once. However, for many applications, non-incremental learning is unrealistic. To that end, researchers study incremental learning, where a learner is required to adapt to an incoming stream of data with a varying distribution while preventing forgetting of past knowledge. Significant progress has been made, however, the vast majority of works focus on the fully supervised setting, making these algorithms label-hungry thus limiting their real-life deployment. To that end, in this paper, we make the first attempt to survey recently growing interest in label-efficient incremental learning. We identify three subdivisions, namely semi-, few-shot- and self-supervised learning to reduce labeling efforts. Finally, we identify novel directions that can further enhance label-efficiency and improve incremental learning scalability. Project website: https://github.com/kilickaya/label-efficient-il.
summary: The current dominant paradigm when building a machine learning model is to iterate over a dataset over and over until convergence. Such an approach is non-incremental, as it assumes access to all images of all categories at once. However, for many applications, non-incremental learning is unrealistic. To that end, researchers study incremental learning, where a learner is required to adapt to an incoming stream of data with a varying distribution while preventing forgetting of past knowledge. Significant progress has been made, however, the vast majority of works focus on the fully supervised setting, making these algorithms label-hungry thus limiting their real-life deployment. To that end, in this paper, we make the first attempt to survey recently growing interest in label-efficient incremental learning. We identify three subdivisions, namely semi-, few-shot- and self-supervised learning to reduce labeling efforts. Finally, we identify novel directions that can further enhance label-efficiency and improve incremental learning scalability. Project website: https://github.com/kilickaya/label-efficient-il.
abstract_zh: 当前构建机器学习模型时的主导范例是一遍又一遍地迭代数据集直到收敛。这种方法是非增量的，因为它假设同时访问所有类别的所有图像。然而，对于许多应用来说，非增量学习是不现实的。为此，研究人员研究了增量学习，其中学习者需要适应具有不同分布的传入数据流，同时防止忘记过去的知识。已经取得了重大进展，然而，绝大多数工作都集中在完全监督的设置上，使得这些算法需要标签，从而限制了它们在现实生活中的部署。为此，在本文中，我们首次尝试调查最近对标签高效增量学习日益增长的兴趣。我们确定了三个细分，即半监督学习、少样本学习和自监督学习，以减少标记工作。最后，我们确定了可以进一步提高标签效率并提高增量学习可扩展性的新方向。项目网站：https://github.com/kilickaya/label-efficient-il。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了标签高效增量学习的最新进展，旨在减少传统增量学习对大量标签的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统增量学习方法依赖全监督数据，导致标签需求高，限制了实际应用。需探索减少标签消耗的方法以提升实用性。
AI.method: 通过分类总结半监督学习、小样本学习和自监督学习三类标签高效方法，并提出增强标签效率的新方向。
AI.result: 系统梳理了标签高效增量学习的现有技术框架，明确了未来研究可聚焦于提升可扩展性和标签效率的关键路径。
AI.conclusion: 标签高效增量学习可通过减少对人工标注的依赖推动实际应用，未来需进一步探索跨领域适应与持续学习的协同优化。

title: Flip-width: Cops and Robber on dense graphs
title_zh: Flip-width：密集图上的警察和强盗
abstract: We define new graph parameters, called flip-width, that generalize treewidth, degeneracy, and generalized coloring numbers for sparse graphs, and clique-width and twin-width for dense graphs. The flip-width parameters are defined using variants of the Cops and Robber game, in which the robber has speed bounded by a fixed constant $r\in\mathbb N\cup\{\infty\}$, and the cops perform flips (or perturbations) of the considered graph. We then propose a new notion of tameness of a graph class, called bounded flip-width, which is a dense counterpart of classes of bounded expansion of Nešetril and Ossona de Mendez, and includes classes of bounded twin-width of Bonnet, Kim, Thomass{é}, and Watrigant. This unifies Sparsity Theory and Twin-width Theory, providing a common language for studying the central notions of the two theories, such as weak coloring numbers and twin-width -- corresponding to winning strategies of one player -- or dense shallow minors, rich divisions, or well-linked sets, corresponding to winning strategies of the other player. We prove that boundedness of flip-width is preserved by first-order interpretations, or transductions, generalizing previous results concerning classes of bounded expansion and bounded twin-width. We provide an algorithm approximating the flip-width of a given graph, which runs in slicewise polynomial time (XP) in the size of the graph. Finally, we propose a more general notion of tameness, called almost bounded flip-width, which is a dense counterpart of nowhere dense classes. We conjecture, and provide evidence, that classes with almost bounded flip-width coincide with monadically dependent (or monadically NIP) classes, introduced by Shelah in model theory. We also provide evidence that classes of almost bounded flip-width characterise the hereditary graph classes for which the model-checking problem is fixed-parameter tractable.

We conjecture, and provide evidence, that classes with almost bounded flip-width coincide with monadically dependent (or monadically NIP) classes, introduced by Shelah in model theory. We also provide evidence that classes of almost bounded flip-width characterise the hereditary graph classes for which the model-checking problem is fixed-parameter tractable.
abstract_zh: 我们定义了新的图参数，称为翻转宽度，它概括了稀疏图的树宽、简并性和广义着色数，以及密集图的团宽度和孪生宽度。翻转宽度参数是使用警察和强盗游戏的变体来定义的，其中强盗的速度受固定常数 $r\in\mathbb N\cup\{\infty\}$ 的限制，而警察则对所考虑的图执行翻转（或扰动）。然后，我们提出了图类驯化的新概念，称为有界翻转宽度，它是 Nešetril 和 Ossona de Mendez 的有界扩展类的密集对应物，并且包括 Bonnet、Kim、Thomass{é} 和 Watrigant 的有界孪生宽度类。这统一了稀疏理论和双宽度理论，为研究这两种理论的中心概念提供了一种共同语言，例如弱着色数和双宽度（对应于一个玩家的获胜策略）或密集的浅次要、丰富的划分或紧密连接的集合（对应于另一玩家的获胜策略）。我们证明翻转宽度的有界性通过一阶解释或转换得以保留，概括了先前有关有界扩展和有界孪生宽度类的结果。我们提供了一种近似给定图的翻转宽度的算法，该算法以图大小的切片多项式时间 (XP) 运行。最后，我们提出了一个更通用的驯服概念，称为几乎有界翻转宽度，它是无处密集类的密集对应物。我们推测并提供证据，具有几乎有界翻转宽度的类与 Shelah 在模型理论中引入的单子依赖（或单子 NIP）类一致。我们还提供了证据，表明几乎有界翻转宽度的类表征了模型检查问题是固定参数可处理的遗传图类。

AI.tldr: 本文定义了新的图参数'flip-width'，通过扩展Cops and Robber游戏模型，统一稀疏图与稠密图的理论框架，并研究其在图类分类中的应用。
AI.motivation: 为解决稀疏图与稠密图理论的割裂问题，需建立统一的参数化框架，以涵盖现有参数（如treewidth、twin-width）并拓展其应用范围。
AI.method: 基于Cops and Robber游戏变体定义flip-width，结合图类的'boundedness'性质，分析其在逻辑解释、算法近似及模型检测中的表现。
AI.result: 提出flip-width参数的算法近似方法，证明其在逻辑解释下的封闭性，并猜想'almost bounded flip-width'类与模型论中的单调依赖类存在对应关系。
AI.conclusion: flip-width为稀疏与稠密图理论提供了统一语言，可能成为刻画图类模型检测可解性的重要工具，但需进一步验证其与单调依赖类的等价性猜想。

search_text: Flip-width: Cops and Robber on dense graphs Flip-width：密集图上的警察和强盗 We define new graph parameters, called flip-width, that generalize treewidth, degeneracy, and generalized coloring numbers for sparse graphs, and clique-width and twin-width for dense graphs. The flip-width parameters are defined using variants of the Cops and Robber game, in which the robber has speed bounded by a fixed constant $r\in\mathbb N\cup\{\infty\}$, and the cops perform flips (or perturbations) of the considered graph. We then propose a new notion of tameness of a graph class, called bounded flip-width, which is a dense counterpart of classes of bounded expansion of Nešetril and Ossona de Mendez, and includes classes of bounded twin-width of Bonnet, Kim, Thomass{é}, and Watrigant. This unifies Sparsity Theory and Twin-width Theory, providing a common language for studying the central notions of the two theories, such as weak coloring numbers and twin-width -- corresponding to winning strategies of one player -- or dense shallow minors, rich divisions, or well-linked sets, corresponding to winning strategies of the other player. We prove that boundedness of flip-width is preserved by first-order interpretations, or transductions, generalizing previous results concerning classes of bounded expansion and bounded twin-width. We provide an algorithm approximating the flip-width of a given graph, which runs in slicewise polynomial time (XP) in the size of the graph. Finally, we propose a more general notion of tameness, called almost bounded flip-width, which is a dense counterpart of nowhere dense classes. We conjecture, and provide evidence, that classes with almost bounded flip-width coincide with monadically dependent (or monadically NIP) classes, introduced by Shelah in model theory. We also provide evidence that classes of almost bounded flip-width characterise the hereditary graph classes for which the model-checking problem is fixed-parameter tractable. 我们定义了新的图参数，称为翻转宽度，它概括了稀疏图的树宽、简并性和广义着色数，以及密集图的团宽度和孪生宽度。翻转宽度参数是使用警察和强盗游戏的变体来定义的，其中强盗的速度受固定常数 $r\in\mathbb N\cup\{\infty\}$ 的限制，而警察则对所考虑的图执行翻转（或扰动）。然后，我们提出了图类驯化的新概念，称为有界翻转宽度，它是 Nešetril 和 Ossona de Mendez 的有界扩展类的密集对应物，并且包括 Bonnet、Kim、Thomass{é} 和 Watrigant 的有界孪生宽度类。这统一了稀疏理论和双宽度理论，为研究这两种理论的中心概念提供了一种共同语言，例如弱着色数和双宽度（对应于一个玩家的获胜策略）或密集的浅次要、丰富的划分或紧密连接的集合（对应于另一玩家的获胜策略）。我们证明翻转宽度的有界性通过一阶解释或转换得以保留，概括了先前有关有界扩展和有界孪生宽度类的结果。我们提供了一种近似给定图的翻转宽度的算法，该算法以图大小的切片多项式时间 (XP) 运行。最后，我们提出了一个更通用的驯服概念，称为几乎有界翻转宽度，它是无处密集类的密集对应物。我们推测并提供证据，具有几乎有界翻转宽度的类与 Shelah 在模型理论中引入的单子依赖（或单子 NIP）类一致。我们还提供了证据，表明几乎有界翻转宽度的类表征了模型检查问题是固定参数可处理的遗传图类。 本文定义了新的图参数'flip-width'，通过扩展Cops and Robber游戏模型，统一稀疏图与稠密图的理论框架，并研究其在图类分类中的应用。 Szymon Toruńczyk math.CO,cs.DM,cs.DS,cs.LO

title: Anderson Acceleration For Bioinformatics-Based Machine Learning
title_zh: 基于生物信息学的机器学习的安德森加速
comment: Accepted in KDH-2023: Knowledge Discovery in Healthcare Data (IJCAI Workshop)
comments: Accepted in KDH-2023: Knowledge Discovery in Healthcare Data (IJCAI Workshop)
abstract: Anderson acceleration (AA) is a well-known method for accelerating the convergence of iterative algorithms, with applications in various fields including deep learning and optimization. Despite its popularity in these areas, the effectiveness of AA in classical machine learning classifiers has not been thoroughly studied. Tabular data, in particular, presents a unique challenge for deep learning models, and classical machine learning models are known to perform better in these scenarios. However, the convergence analysis of these models has received limited attention. To address this gap in research, we implement a support vector machine (SVM) classifier variant that incorporates AA to speed up convergence. We evaluate the performance of our SVM with and without Anderson acceleration on several datasets from the biology domain and demonstrate that the use of AA significantly improves convergence and reduces the training loss as the number of iterations increases. Our findings provide a promising perspective on the potential of Anderson acceleration in the training of simple machine learning classifiers and underscore the importance of further research in this area. By showing the effectiveness of AA in this setting, we aim to inspire more studies that explore the applications of AA in classical machine learning.
summary: Anderson acceleration (AA) is a well-known method for accelerating the convergence of iterative algorithms, with applications in various fields including deep learning and optimization. Despite its popularity in these areas, the effectiveness of AA in classical machine learning classifiers has not been thoroughly studied. Tabular data, in particular, presents a unique challenge for deep learning models, and classical machine learning models are known to perform better in these scenarios. However, the convergence analysis of these models has received limited attention. To address this gap in research, we implement a support vector machine (SVM) classifier variant that incorporates AA to speed up convergence. We evaluate the performance of our SVM with and without Anderson acceleration on several datasets from the biology domain and demonstrate that the use of AA significantly improves convergence and reduces the training loss as the number of iterations increases. Our findings provide a promising perspective on the potential of Anderson acceleration in the training of simple machine learning classifiers and underscore the importance of further research in this area. By showing the effectiveness of AA in this setting, we aim to inspire more studies that explore the applications of AA in classical machine learning.
abstract_zh: 安德森加速（AA）是一种众所周知的加速迭代算法收敛的方法，在深度学习和优化等各个领域都有应用。尽管 AA 在这些领域很受欢迎，但它在经典机器学习分类器中的有效性尚未得到彻底研究。尤其是表格数据，给深度学习模型带来了独特的挑战，而众所周知，经典的机器学习模型在这些场景中表现更好。然而，这些模型的收敛性分析受到的关注有限。为了解决研究中的这一差距，我们实现了支持向量机 (SVM) 分类器变体，其中结合了 AA 来加速收敛。我们在生物学领域的多个数据集上评估了有和没有安德森加速的 SVM 的性能，并证明随着迭代次数的增加，AA 的使用显着提高了收敛性并减少了训练损失。我们的研究结果为安德森加速在简单机器学习分类器训练中的潜力提供了一个有前景的视角，并强调了该领域进一步研究的重要性。通过展示 AA 在这种情况下的有效性，我们的目标是激发更多的研究来探索 AA 在经典机器学习中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文将安德森加速法（AA）应用于经典机器学习中的支持向量机（SVM），以加速其收敛过程，并在生物信息学数据集上验证效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管安德森加速在深度学习中广泛应用，但其在经典机器学习分类器（尤其是处理表格数据的场景）中的效果研究不足，而经典模型在生物信息学领域表现更优。
AI.method: 实现一个集成安德森加速的支持向量机分类器变体，并在多个生物领域数据集上对比有无AA的SVM性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，引入AA后SVM的收敛速度显著提升，训练损失随迭代次数增加而降低。
AI.conclusion: 安德森加速在经典机器学习训练中具有潜力，未来需进一步探索其在更多场景下的应用价值。

title: Attention Link: An Efficient Attention-Based Low Resource Machine Translation Architecture
title_zh: 注意力链接：一种高效的基于注意力的低资源机器翻译架构
abstract: Transformers have achieved great success in machine translation, but transformer-based NMT models often require millions of bilingual parallel corpus for training. In this paper, we propose a novel architecture named as attention link (AL) to help improve transformer models' performance, especially in low training resources. We theoretically demonstrate the superiority of our attention link architecture in low training resources. Besides, we have done a large number of experiments, including en-de, de-en, en-fr, en-it, it-en, en-ro translation tasks on the IWSLT14 dataset as well as real low resources scene on bn-gu and gu-ta translation tasks on the CVIT PIB dataset. All the experiment results show our attention link is powerful and can lead to a significant improvement. In addition, we achieve a 37.9 BLEU score, a new sota, on the IWSLT14 de-en task by combining our attention link and other advanced methods.
summary: Transformers have achieved great success in machine translation, but transformer-based NMT models often require millions of bilingual parallel corpus for training. In this paper, we propose a novel architecture named as attention link (AL) to help improve transformer models' performance, especially in low training resources. We theoretically demonstrate the superiority of our attention link architecture in low training resources. Besides, we have done a large number of experiments, including en-de, de-en, en-fr, en-it, it-en, en-ro translation tasks on the IWSLT14 dataset as well as real low resources scene on bn-gu and gu-ta translation tasks on the CVIT PIB dataset. All the experiment results show our attention link is powerful and can lead to a significant improvement. In addition, we achieve a 37.9 BLEU score, a new sota, on the IWSLT14 de-en task by combining our attention link and other advanced methods.
abstract_zh: Transformers 在机器翻译方面取得了巨大成功，但基于 Transformer 的 NMT 模型往往需要数百万双语平行语料库进行训练。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为注意力链接（AL）的新颖架构，以帮助提高 Transformer 模型的性能，特别是在训练资源较少的情况下。我们从理论上证明了我们的注意力链接架构在低训练资源下的优越性。此外，我们还做了大量的实验，包括IWSLT14数据集上的en-de、de-en、en-fr、en-it、it-en、en-ro翻译任务以及CVIT PIB数据集上bn-gu和gu-ta翻译任务的真实低资源场景。所有的实验结果都表明我们的注意力链接是强大的并且可以带来显着的改进。此外，通过结合我们的注意力链接和其他高级方法，我们在 IWSLT14 de-en 任务上获得了 37.9 BLEU 分数，一个新的分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Attention Link（AL）的新架构，以提高低资源环境下Transformer模型在机器翻译任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 虽然Transformer模型在机器翻译中表现优异，但它们通常需要大量双语平行语料进行训练。在低资源环境下，这种需求难以满足，因此需要一种更高效的架构来提升模型性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为Attention Link（AL）的新型架构，通过理论分析和大量实验验证其在低资源条件下的有效性，并结合其他先进方法进一步提升了翻译效果。
AI.result: 在IWSLT14和CVIT PIB数据集上进行了多种翻译任务的实验，结果表明Attention Link架构显著提升了翻译性能，并在IWSLT14 de-en任务中达到了37.9的BLEU分数，刷新了新的SOTA。
AI.conclusion: Attention Link架构在低资源环境下表现出色，能够有效提升Transformer模型的性能，并且结合其他先进技术可以实现更优的翻译结果。

search_text: Attention Link: An Efficient Attention-Based Low Resource Machine Translation Architecture 注意力链接：一种高效的基于注意力的低资源机器翻译架构 Transformers have achieved great success in machine translation, but transformer-based NMT models often require millions of bilingual parallel corpus for training. In this paper, we propose a novel architecture named as attention link (AL) to help improve transformer models' performance, especially in low training resources. We theoretically demonstrate the superiority of our attention link architecture in low training resources. Besides, we have done a large number of experiments, including en-de, de-en, en-fr, en-it, it-en, en-ro translation tasks on the IWSLT14 dataset as well as real low resources scene on bn-gu and gu-ta translation tasks on the CVIT PIB dataset. All the experiment results show our attention link is powerful and can lead to a significant improvement. In addition, we achieve a 37.9 BLEU score, a new sota, on the IWSLT14 de-en task by combining our attention link and other advanced methods. Transformers 在机器翻译方面取得了巨大成功，但基于 Transformer 的 NMT 模型往往需要数百万双语平行语料库进行训练。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为注意力链接（AL）的新颖架构，以帮助提高 Transformer 模型的性能，特别是在训练资源较少的情况下。我们从理论上证明了我们的注意力链接架构在低训练资源下的优越性。此外，我们还做了大量的实验，包括IWSLT14数据集上的en-de、de-en、en-fr、en-it、it-en、en-ro翻译任务以及CVIT PIB数据集上bn-gu和gu-ta翻译任务的真实低资源场景。所有的实验结果都表明我们的注意力链接是强大的并且可以带来显着的改进。此外，通过结合我们的注意力链接和其他高级方法，我们在 IWSLT14 de-en 任务上获得了 37.9 BLEU 分数，一个新的分数。 本文提出了一种名为Attention Link（AL）的新架构，以提高低资源环境下Transformer模型在机器翻译任务中的性能。 Zeping Min cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Abhishek Sharma,Arpit Jain,Shubhangi Sharma,Ashutosh Gupta,Prateek Jain,Saraju P. Mohanty
title: iPAL: A Machine Learning Based Smart Healthcare Framework For Automatic Diagnosis Of Attention Deficit/Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD)
title_zh: iPAL：基于机器学习的智能医疗框架，用于自动诊断注意力缺陷/多动症 (ADHD)
abstract: ADHD is a prevalent disorder among the younger population. Standard evaluation techniques currently use evaluation forms, interviews with the patient, and more. However, its symptoms are similar to those of many other disorders like depression, conduct disorder, and oppositional defiant disorder, and these current diagnosis techniques are not very effective. Thus, a sophisticated computing model holds the potential to provide a promising diagnosis solution to this problem. This work attempts to explore methods to diagnose ADHD using combinations of multiple established machine learning techniques like neural networks and SVM models on the ADHD200 dataset and explore the field of neuroscience. In this work, multiclass classification is performed on phenotypic data using an SVM model. The better results have been analyzed on the phenotypic data compared to other supervised learning techniques like Logistic regression, KNN, AdaBoost, etc. In addition, neural networks have been implemented on functional connectivity from the MRI data of a sample of 40 subjects provided to achieve high accuracy without prior knowledge of neuroscience. It is combined with the phenotypic classifier using the ensemble technique to get a binary classifier. It is further trained and tested on 400 out of 824 subjects from the ADHD200 data set and achieved an accuracy of 92.5% for binary classification The training and testing accuracy has been achieved upto 99% using ensemble classifier.
summary: ADHD is a prevalent disorder among the younger population. Standard evaluation techniques currently use evaluation forms, interviews with the patient, and more. However, its symptoms are similar to those of many other disorders like depression, conduct disorder, and oppositional defiant disorder, and these current diagnosis techniques are not very effective. Thus, a sophisticated computing model holds the potential to provide a promising diagnosis solution to this problem. This work attempts to explore methods to diagnose ADHD using combinations of multiple established machine learning techniques like neural networks and SVM models on the ADHD200 dataset and explore the field of neuroscience. In this work, multiclass classification is performed on phenotypic data using an SVM model. The better results have been analyzed on the phenotypic data compared to other supervised learning techniques like Logistic regression, KNN, AdaBoost, etc. In addition, neural networks have been implemented on functional connectivity from the MRI data of a sample of 40 subjects provided to achieve high accuracy without prior knowledge of neuroscience. It is combined with the phenotypic classifier using the ensemble technique to get a binary classifier. It is further trained and tested on 400 out of 824 subjects from the ADHD200 data set and achieved an accuracy of 92.5% for binary classification The training and testing accuracy has been achieved upto 99% using ensemble classifier.
abstract_zh: ADHD 是年轻人中普遍存在的疾病。目前的标准评估技术使用评估表、患者访谈等。然而，它的症状与许多其他疾病相似，如抑郁症、行为障碍和对立违抗障碍，而目前的诊断技术并不是很有效。因此，复杂的计算模型有可能为该问题提供有希望的诊断解决方案。这项工作试图探索结合多种已建立的机器学习技术（例如 ADHD200 数据集上的神经网络和 SVM 模型）来诊断 ADHD 的方法，并探索神经科学领域。在这项工作中，使用 SVM 模型对表型数据进行多类分类。与 Logistic 回归、KNN、AdaBoost 等其他监督学习技术相比，在表型数据上分析出更好的结果。此外，神经网络已在 40 名受试者样本的 MRI 数据的功能连接上实现，无需先验神经科学知识即可实现高精度。使用集成技术将其与表型分类器相结合以获得二元分类器。它在 ADHD200 数据集中的 824 名受试者中的 400 名上进行了进一步的训练和测试，二元分类的准确率达到了 92.5%。使用集成分类器，训练和测试的准确率已达到 99%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的智能医疗框架iPAL，用于自动诊断注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD），结合多种机器学习技术对ADHD200数据集进行分析。
AI.motivation: 当前ADHD诊断方法依赖主观评估，存在症状与其他疾病相似导致诊断效果不佳的问题，需开发更高效的自动诊断方案。
AI.method: 采用支持向量机（SVM）对表型数据进行多分类，利用神经网络分析MRI功能连接数据，并通过集成技术融合两种模型实现二分类诊断。
AI.result: 在400个样本的二分类任务中达到92.5%的准确率，集成分类器训练测试准确率高达99%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过机器学习技术显著提升了ADHD诊断的准确性，为智能医疗提供了可行方案。

title: Learning Functional Transduction
title_zh: 学习功能转导
abstract: Research in machine learning has polarized into two general approaches for regression tasks: Transductive methods construct estimates directly from available data but are usually problem unspecific. Inductive methods can be much more specific but generally require compute-intensive solution searches. In this work, we propose a hybrid approach and show that transductive regression principles can be meta-learned through gradient descent to form efficient in-context neural approximators by leveraging the theory of vector-valued Reproducing Kernel Banach Spaces (RKBS). We apply this approach to function spaces defined over finite and infinite-dimensional spaces (function-valued operators) and show that once trained, the Transducer can almost instantaneously capture an infinity of functional relationships given a few pairs of input and output examples and return new image estimates. We demonstrate the benefit of our meta-learned transductive approach to model complex physical systems influenced by varying external factors with little data at a fraction of the usual deep learning training computational cost for partial differential equations and climate modeling applications.
summary: Research in machine learning has polarized into two general approaches for regression tasks: Transductive methods construct estimates directly from available data but are usually problem unspecific. Inductive methods can be much more specific but generally require compute-intensive solution searches. In this work, we propose a hybrid approach and show that transductive regression principles can be meta-learned through gradient descent to form efficient in-context neural approximators by leveraging the theory of vector-valued Reproducing Kernel Banach Spaces (RKBS). We apply this approach to function spaces defined over finite and infinite-dimensional spaces (function-valued operators) and show that once trained, the Transducer can almost instantaneously capture an infinity of functional relationships given a few pairs of input and output examples and return new image estimates. We demonstrate the benefit of our meta-learned transductive approach to model complex physical systems influenced by varying external factors with little data at a fraction of the usual deep learning training computational cost for partial differential equations and climate modeling applications.
abstract_zh: 机器学习的研究已经两极分化为两种用于回归任务的通用方法： 传导方法直接从可用数据构建估计，但通常问题不具体。归纳方法可以更加具体，但通常需要计算密集型解决方案搜索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种混合方法，并表明转导回归原理可以通过梯度下降进行元学习，以利用向量值再生核巴纳空间（RKBS）的理论形成有效的上下文神经逼近器。我们将这种方法应用于在有限和无限维空间（函数值运算符）上定义的函数空间，并表明一旦经过训练，传感器几乎可以在给定几对输入和输出示例的情况下立即捕获无限的函数关系，并返回新的图像估计。我们展示了元学习转导方法的优势，可以用很少的数据来模拟受不同外部因素影响的复杂物理系统，而成本仅为偏微分方程和气候建模应用的通常深度学习训练计算成本的一小部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合方法，结合直推法与归纳法优势，利用向量值再生核Banach空间理论构建高效函数空间建模框架。
AI.motivation: 传统直推法缺乏问题特异性，归纳法需高昂计算成本，现有方法难以兼顾效率与泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过梯度下降元学习直推回归原则，构建基于RKBS理论的神经逼近器，适用于有限/无限维函数空间建模。
AI.result: 训练后的Transducer可快速捕捉无限函数关系，应用于偏微分方程与气候模型，在少量数据下实现计算成本降低。
AI.conclusion: 该方法融合直推与归纳优势，在保持效率的同时提升复杂系统建模能力，为数据稀缺场景提供新解决方案。

motivation: 传统直推法缺乏问题特异性，归纳法需高昂计算成本，现有方法难以兼顾效率与泛化能力。
method: 通过梯度下降元学习直推回归原则，构建基于RKBS理论的神经逼近器，适用于有限/无限维函数空间建模。
result: 训练后的Transducer可快速捕捉无限函数关系，应用于偏微分方程与气候模型，在少量数据下实现计算成本降低。
conclusion: 该方法融合直推与归纳优势，在保持效率的同时提升复杂系统建模能力，为数据稀缺场景提供新解决方案。
search_text: Learning Functional Transduction 学习功能转导 Research in machine learning has polarized into two general approaches for regression tasks: Transductive methods construct estimates directly from available data but are usually problem unspecific. Inductive methods can be much more specific but generally require compute-intensive solution searches. In this work, we propose a hybrid approach and show that transductive regression principles can be meta-learned through gradient descent to form efficient in-context neural approximators by leveraging the theory of vector-valued Reproducing Kernel Banach Spaces (RKBS). We apply this approach to function spaces defined over finite and infinite-dimensional spaces (function-valued operators) and show that once trained, the Transducer can almost instantaneously capture an infinity of functional relationships given a few pairs of input and output examples and return new image estimates. We demonstrate the benefit of our meta-learned transductive approach to model complex physical systems influenced by varying external factors with little data at a fraction of the usual deep learning training computational cost for partial differential equations and climate modeling applications. 机器学习的研究已经两极分化为两种用于回归任务的通用方法： 传导方法直接从可用数据构建估计，但通常问题不具体。归纳方法可以更加具体，但通常需要计算密集型解决方案搜索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种混合方法，并表明转导回归原理可以通过梯度下降进行元学习，以利用向量值再生核巴纳空间（RKBS）的理论形成有效的上下文神经逼近器。我们将这种方法应用于在有限和无限维空间（函数值运算符）上定义的函数空间，并表明一旦经过训练，传感器几乎可以在给定几对输入和输出示例的情况下立即捕获无限的函数关系，并返回新的图像估计。我们展示了元学习转导方法的优势，可以用很少的数据来模拟受不同外部因素影响的复杂物理系统，而成本仅为偏微分方程和气候建模应用的通常深度学习训练计算成本的一小部分。 本文提出一种混合方法，结合直推法与归纳法优势，利用向量值再生核Banach空间理论构建高效函数空间建模框架。 Mathieu Chalvidal,Thomas Serre,Rufin VanRullen cs.LG,cs.NE

title: Privacy Dashboards for Citizens and corresponding GDPR Services for Small Data Holders: A Literature Review
title_zh: 公民隐私仪表板和针对小数据持有者的相应 GDPR 服务：文献综述
abstract: Citizens have gained many rights with the GDPR, e.g. the right to get a copy of their personal data. In practice, however, this is fraught with problems for citizens and small data holders. We present a literature review on solutions promising relief in the form of privacy dashboards for citizens and GDPR services for small data holders. Covered topics are analyzed, categorized and compared. This is ought to be a step towards both enabling citizens to exercise their GDPR rights and supporting small data holders to comply with their GDPR duties.
summary: Citizens have gained many rights with the GDPR, e.g. the right to get a copy of their personal data. In practice, however, this is fraught with problems for citizens and small data holders. We present a literature review on solutions promising relief in the form of privacy dashboards for citizens and GDPR services for small data holders. Covered topics are analyzed, categorized and compared. This is ought to be a step towards both enabling citizens to exercise their GDPR rights and supporting small data holders to comply with their GDPR duties.
abstract_zh: 公民通过 GDPR 获得了许多权利，例如获取其个人数据副本的权利。然而，实际上，这对公民和小数据持有者来说充满了问题。我们对解决方案进行了文献综述，承诺以公民隐私仪表板和小数据持有者的 GDPR 服务的形式缓解压力。对所涵盖的主题进行分析、分类和比较。这应该是朝着使公民能够行使其 GDPR 权利并支持小数据持有者遵守其 GDPR 义务迈出的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文通过文献综述分析隐私仪表板和GDPR服务，以帮助公民行使权利并支持小型数据持有者合规。
AI.motivation: GDPR赋予公民数据权利，但实际操作中存在困难，需寻找解决方案以促进合规和权利行使。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，对现有解决方案进行分类和比较分析。
AI.result: 识别并比较了现有隐私仪表板和GDPR服务的关键解决方案，明确了其优缺点。
AI.conclusion: 现有解决方案为GDPR实施提供了可行路径，但需进一步研究和开发以提高实用性。
