title: An Evaluation of Persian-English Machine Translation Datasets with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformers 对波斯语-英语机器翻译数据集进行评估
abstract: Nowadays, many researchers are focusing their attention on the subject of machine translation (MT). However, Persian machine translation has remained unexplored despite a vast amount of research being conducted in languages with high resources, such as English. Moreover, while a substantial amount of research has been undertaken in statistical machine translation for some datasets in Persian, there is currently no standard baseline for transformer-based text2text models on each corpus. This study collected and analysed the most popular and valuable parallel corpora, which were used for Persian-English translation. Furthermore, we fine-tuned and evaluated two state-of-the-art attention-based seq2seq models on each dataset separately (48 results). We hope this paper will assist researchers in comparing their Persian to English and vice versa machine translation results to a standard baseline.
summary: Nowadays, many researchers are focusing their attention on the subject of machine translation (MT). However, Persian machine translation has remained unexplored despite a vast amount of research being conducted in languages with high resources, such as English. Moreover, while a substantial amount of research has been undertaken in statistical machine translation for some datasets in Persian, there is currently no standard baseline for transformer-based text2text models on each corpus. This study collected and analysed the most popular and valuable parallel corpora, which were used for Persian-English translation. Furthermore, we fine-tuned and evaluated two state-of-the-art attention-based seq2seq models on each dataset separately (48 results). We hope this paper will assist researchers in comparing their Persian to English and vice versa machine translation results to a standard baseline.
abstract_zh: 如今，许多研究人员将注意力集中在机器翻译（MT）这一主题上。然而，尽管对英语等资源丰富的语言进行了大量研究，但波斯语机器翻译仍未得到探索。此外，虽然对波斯语某些数据集的统计机器翻译进行了大量研究，但目前每个语料库上都没有基于 Transformer 的 text2text 模型的标准基线。本研究收集并分析了最流行和最有价值的平行语料库，用于波斯语-英语翻译。此外，我们分别在每个数据集上微调和评估了两个最先进的基于注意力的 seq2seq 模型（48 个结果）。我们希望本文能够帮助研究人员将波斯语和英语的机器翻译结果与标准基线进行比较，反之亦然。

AI.tldr: 本论文评估了波斯语-英语机器翻译数据集，使用Transformer模型进行微调和比较。
AI.motivation: 尽管英语等高资源语言的机器翻译研究较多，但波斯语机器翻译领域缺乏基于Transformer的标准基线。
AI.method: 收集分析主流波斯语-英语平行语料库，对两个先进序列到序列模型进行独立微调与评估（共48组结果）。
AI.result: 提供了各数据集的模型性能基准，为后续研究提供对比标准。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了波斯语机器翻译领域基线缺失的空白，助力未来模型效果的标准化评估。

authors_text: Seong-Eun Moon,Ji Won Yoon,Shinyoung Joo,Yoohyung Kim,Jae Hyun Bae,Seokho Yoon,Haanju Yoo,Young Min Cho
title: Development of deep biological ages aware of morbidity and mortality based on unsupervised and semi-supervised deep learning approaches
title_zh: 基于无监督和半监督深度学习方法，发展了解发病率和死亡率的深度生物学时代
abstract: Background: While deep learning technology, which has the capability of obtaining latent representations based on large-scale data, can be a potential solution for the discovery of a novel aging biomarker, existing deep learning methods for biological age estimation usually depend on chronological ages and lack of consideration of mortality and morbidity that are the most significant outcomes of aging. Methods: This paper proposes a novel deep learning model to learn latent representations of biological aging in regard to subjects' morbidity and mortality. The model utilizes health check-up data in addition to morbidity and mortality information to learn the complex relationships between aging and measured clinical attributes. Findings: The proposed model is evaluated on a large dataset of general populations compared with KDM and other learning-based models. Results demonstrate that biological ages obtained by the proposed model have superior discriminability of subjects' morbidity and mortality.
summary: Background: While deep learning technology, which has the capability of obtaining latent representations based on large-scale data, can be a potential solution for the discovery of a novel aging biomarker, existing deep learning methods for biological age estimation usually depend on chronological ages and lack of consideration of mortality and morbidity that are the most significant outcomes of aging. Methods: This paper proposes a novel deep learning model to learn latent representations of biological aging in regard to subjects' morbidity and mortality. The model utilizes health check-up data in addition to morbidity and mortality information to learn the complex relationships between aging and measured clinical attributes. Findings: The proposed model is evaluated on a large dataset of general populations compared with KDM and other learning-based models. Results demonstrate that biological ages obtained by the proposed model have superior discriminability of subjects' morbidity and mortality.
abstract_zh: 背景：虽然深度学习技术能够基于大规模数据获取潜在表示，可以成为发现新型衰老生物标志物的潜在解决方案，但现有的生物年龄估计深度学习方法通​​常依赖于实际年龄，而缺乏对死亡率和发病率这一衰老最重要结果的考虑。方法：本文提出了一种新颖的深度学习模型，用于学习生物衰老在受试者发病率和死亡率方面的潜在表征。该模型利用健康检查数据以及发病率和死亡率信息来了解衰老与测量的临床属性之间的复杂关系。结果：与 KDM 和其他基于学习的模型相比，所提出的模型在一般人群的大型数据集上进行了评估。结果表明，通过所提出的模型获得的生物学年龄对受试者的发病率和死亡率具有优异的辨别力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无监督和半监督深度学习的新型模型，用于开发能反映疾病和死亡率的深度生物年龄指标。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习生物年龄模型过度依赖日历年龄，忽视了衰老最显著的结局——疾病和死亡率，导致生物年龄的临床相关性不足。
AI.method: 整合健康体检数据与疾病/死亡率信息，通过无监督和半监督学习挖掘临床指标与衰老的复杂关联，构建反映健康结局的生物年龄模型。
AI.result: 在大规模人群数据集上验证表明，该模型生成的生物年龄在区分个体疾病和死亡风险方面显著优于KDM等现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 纳入疾病死亡率信息的深度学习框架能更准确捕捉生物年龄的临床意义，为衰老研究提供新视角。

method: 整合健康体检数据与疾病/死亡率信息，通过无监督和半监督学习挖掘临床指标与衰老的复杂关联，构建反映健康结局的生物年龄模型。
result: 在大规模人群数据集上验证表明，该模型生成的生物年龄在区分个体疾病和死亡风险方面显著优于KDM等现有模型。
conclusion: 纳入疾病死亡率信息的深度学习框架能更准确捕捉生物年龄的临床意义，为衰老研究提供新视角。
search_text: Development of deep biological ages aware of morbidity and mortality based on unsupervised and semi-supervised deep learning approaches 基于无监督和半监督深度学习方法，发展了解发病率和死亡率的深度生物学时代 Background: While deep learning technology, which has the capability of obtaining latent representations based on large-scale data, can be a potential solution for the discovery of a novel aging biomarker, existing deep learning methods for biological age estimation usually depend on chronological ages and lack of consideration of mortality and morbidity that are the most significant outcomes of aging. Methods: This paper proposes a novel deep learning model to learn latent representations of biological aging in regard to subjects' morbidity and mortality. The model utilizes health check-up data in addition to morbidity and mortality information to learn the complex relationships between aging and measured clinical attributes. Findings: The proposed model is evaluated on a large dataset of general populations compared with KDM and other learning-based models. Results demonstrate that biological ages obtained by the proposed model have superior discriminability of subjects' morbidity and mortality. 背景：虽然深度学习技术能够基于大规模数据获取潜在表示，可以成为发现新型衰老生物标志物的潜在解决方案，但现有的生物年龄估计深度学习方法通​​常依赖于实际年龄，而缺乏对死亡率和发病率这一衰老最重要结果的考虑。方法：本文提出了一种新颖的深度学习模型，用于学习生物衰老在受试者发病率和死亡率方面的潜在表征。该模型利用健康检查数据以及发病率和死亡率信息来了解衰老与测量的临床属性之间的复杂关系。结果：与 KDM 和其他基于学习的模型相比，所提出的模型在一般人群的大型数据集上进行了评估。结果表明，通过所提出的模型获得的生物学年龄对受试者的发病率和死亡率具有优异的辨别力。 本文提出一种基于无监督和半监督深度学习的新型模型，用于开发能反映疾病和死亡率的深度生物年龄指标。 Seong-Eun Moon,Ji Won Yoon,Shinyoung Joo,Yoohyung Kim,Jae Hyun Bae,Seokho Yoon,Haanju Yoo,Young Min Cho cs.LG,cs.AI,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Jian Dong,Yisong Yu,Yapeng Zhang,Yimin Lv,Shuli Wang,Beihong Jin,Yongkang Wang,Xingxing Wang,Dong Wang
title: A Deep Behavior Path Matching Network for Click-Through Rate Prediction
title_zh: 用于点击率预测的深度行为路径匹配网络
abstract: User behaviors on an e-commerce app not only contain different kinds of feedback on items but also sometimes imply the cognitive clue of the user's decision-making. For understanding the psychological procedure behind user decisions, we present the behavior path and propose to match the user's current behavior path with historical behavior paths to predict user behaviors on the app. Further, we design a deep neural network for behavior path matching and solve three difficulties in modeling behavior paths: sparsity, noise interference, and accurate matching of behavior paths. In particular, we leverage contrastive learning to augment user behavior paths, provide behavior path self-activation to alleviate the effect of noise, and adopt a two-level matching mechanism to identify the most appropriate candidate. Our model shows excellent performance on two real-world datasets, outperforming the state-of-the-art CTR model. Moreover, our model has been deployed on the Meituan food delivery platform and has accumulated 1.6% improvement in CTR and 1.8% improvement in advertising revenue.
summary: User behaviors on an e-commerce app not only contain different kinds of feedback on items but also sometimes imply the cognitive clue of the user's decision-making. For understanding the psychological procedure behind user decisions, we present the behavior path and propose to match the user's current behavior path with historical behavior paths to predict user behaviors on the app. Further, we design a deep neural network for behavior path matching and solve three difficulties in modeling behavior paths: sparsity, noise interference, and accurate matching of behavior paths. In particular, we leverage contrastive learning to augment user behavior paths, provide behavior path self-activation to alleviate the effect of noise, and adopt a two-level matching mechanism to identify the most appropriate candidate. Our model shows excellent performance on two real-world datasets, outperforming the state-of-the-art CTR model. Moreover, our model has been deployed on the Meituan food delivery platform and has accumulated 1.6% improvement in CTR and 1.8% improvement in advertising revenue.
abstract_zh: 电商应用上的用户行为不仅包含对商品的各种反馈，有时还隐含着用户决策的认知线索。为了理解用户决策背后的心理过程，我们提出了行为路径，并建议将用户当前的行为路径与历史行为路径进行匹配，以预测用户在应用程序上的行为。此外，我们设计了用于行为路径匹配的深度神经网络，解决了行为路径建模的三个难点：稀疏性、噪声干扰和行为路径的精确匹配。特别是，我们利用对比学习来增强用户行为路径，提供行为路径自激活来减轻噪声的影响，并采用两级匹配机制来识别最合适的候选者。我们的模型在两个真实数据集上显示出出色的性能，优于最先进的 CTR 模型。此外，我们的模型已部署在美团外卖平台上，累计点击率提升1.6%，广告收入提升1.8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度行为路径匹配网络，用于通过匹配用户当前行为路径与历史行为路径来预测点击率（CTR）。
AI.motivation: 用户行为不仅包含对商品的反馈，还隐含决策心理线索。现有模型难以有效处理行为路径的稀疏性、噪声干扰及精准匹配问题，需改进CTR预测。
AI.method: 设计深度神经网络，结合对比学习增强行为路径、行为路径自激活减少噪声影响，并采用双层匹配机制筛选最匹配候选。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上表现优于现有CTR模型，部署于美团外卖平台后CTR提升1.6%，广告收入提升1.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效解决了行为路径建模中的关键难题，显著提升了CTR预测效果及实际业务指标。

authors_text: Lucrezia Valeriani,Diego Doimo,Francesca Cuturello,Alessandro Laio,Alessio Ansuini,Alberto Cazzaniga
title: The geometry of hidden representations of large transformer models
title_zh: 大型变压器模型隐藏表示的几何结构
abstract: Large transformers are powerful architectures used for self-supervised data analysis across various data types, including protein sequences, images, and text. In these models, the semantic structure of the dataset emerges from a sequence of transformations between one representation and the next. We characterize the geometric and statistical properties of these representations and how they change as we move through the layers. By analyzing the intrinsic dimension (ID) and neighbor composition, we find that the representations evolve similarly in transformers trained on protein language tasks and image reconstruction tasks. In the first layers, the data manifold expands, becoming high-dimensional, and then contracts significantly in the intermediate layers. In the last part of the model, the ID remains approximately constant or forms a second shallow peak. We show that the semantic information of the dataset is better expressed at the end of the first peak, and this phenomenon can be observed across many models trained on diverse datasets. Based on our findings, we point out an explicit strategy to identify, without supervision, the layers that maximize semantic content: representations at intermediate layers corresponding to a relative minimum of the ID profile are more suitable for downstream learning tasks.
summary: Large transformers are powerful architectures used for self-supervised data analysis across various data types, including protein sequences, images, and text. In these models, the semantic structure of the dataset emerges from a sequence of transformations between one representation and the next. We characterize the geometric and statistical properties of these representations and how they change as we move through the layers. By analyzing the intrinsic dimension (ID) and neighbor composition, we find that the representations evolve similarly in transformers trained on protein language tasks and image reconstruction tasks. In the first layers, the data manifold expands, becoming high-dimensional, and then contracts significantly in the intermediate layers. In the last part of the model, the ID remains approximately constant or forms a second shallow peak. We show that the semantic information of the dataset is better expressed at the end of the first peak, and this phenomenon can be observed across many models trained on diverse datasets. Based on our findings, we point out an explicit strategy to identify, without supervision, the layers that maximize semantic content: representations at intermediate layers corresponding to a relative minimum of the ID profile are more suitable for downstream learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 大型转换器是强大的架构，用于跨各种数据类型（包括蛋白质序列、图像和文本）进行自监督数据分析。在这些模型中，数据集的语义结构来自一个表示与下一个表示之间的一系列转换。我们描述这些表示的几何和统计特性，以及它们在我们穿过各层时如何变化。通过分析内在维度（ID）和邻居组成，我们发现在蛋白质语言任务和图像重建任务训练的 Transformer 中，表示的演变类似。在第一层中，数据流形扩展，变得高维，然后在中间层中显着收缩。在模型的最后部分，ID 保持大致恒定或形成第二个浅峰。我们表明，数据集的语义信息在第一个峰值结束时得到了更好的表达，并且可以在不同数据集上训练的许多模型中观察到这种现象。根据我们的发现，我们提出了一种明确的策略，可以在没有监督的情况下识别最大化语义内容的层：对应于 ID 配置文件的相对最小值的中间层的表示更适合下游学习任务。

AI.tldr: 研究大型Transformer模型隐藏表示的几何和统计特性，分析其层间变化规律，并提出无监督策略以识别最大化语义信息的层。
AI.motivation: 理解Transformer模型中语义结构如何通过层间转换形成，以及如何优化隐藏表示以提升下游任务性能。
AI.method: 通过分析内在维度（ID）和邻域组成，比较蛋白质语言任务与图像重建任务中隐藏表示的几何特性变化。
AI.result: 初始层数据流形扩展至高维，中间层显著收缩，末层ID稳定或形成第二峰；语义信息在首个峰值结束时最优，且该现象跨任务通用。
AI.conclusion: 通过ID曲线的相对最小值可无监督识别最优中间层，其表示更适配下游学习任务。

ai_content.tldr: 研究大型Transformer模型隐藏表示的几何和统计特性，分析其层间变化规律，并提出无监督策略以识别最大化语义信息的层。

title: Development of Real-time Rendering Technology for High-Precision Models in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶高精度模型实时渲染技术开发
abstract: Our autonomous driving simulation lab produces a high-precision 3D model simulating the parking lot. However, the current model still has poor rendering quality in some aspects. In this work, we develop a system to improve the rendering of the model and evaluate the quality of the rendered model.
summary: Our autonomous driving simulation lab produces a high-precision 3D model simulating the parking lot. However, the current model still has poor rendering quality in some aspects. In this work, we develop a system to improve the rendering of the model and evaluate the quality of the rendered model.
abstract_zh: 我们的自动驾驶模拟实验室可制作模拟停车场的高精度 3D 模型。但目前的模型在某些方面渲染质量仍然较差。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个系统来改进模型的渲染并评估渲染模型的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种实时渲染技术，旨在提升自动驾驶仿真中高精度3D模型的渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 当前高精度3D模型在渲染质量上存在不足，影响自动驾驶仿真效果，需改进渲染技术以提高模拟真实性。
AI.method: 设计并实现一种实时渲染系统，优化模型细节处理与渲染算法，同时建立评估指标验证改进效果。
AI.result: 成功提升模型渲染质量，通过评估验证了改进后的系统在细节表现和实时性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的渲染技术有效解决了高精度模型的渲染缺陷，为自动驾驶仿真提供了更可靠的视觉支持。

search_text: Development of Real-time Rendering Technology for High-Precision Models in Autonomous Driving 自动驾驶高精度模型实时渲染技术开发 Our autonomous driving simulation lab produces a high-precision 3D model simulating the parking lot. However, the current model still has poor rendering quality in some aspects. In this work, we develop a system to improve the rendering of the model and evaluate the quality of the rendered model. 我们的自动驾驶模拟实验室可制作模拟停车场的高精度 3D 模型。但目前的模型在某些方面渲染质量仍然较差。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个系统来改进模型的渲染并评估渲染模型的质量。 本文开发了一种实时渲染技术，旨在提升自动驾驶仿真中高精度3D模型的渲染质量。 Zhang Wencheng,Wang Chengyi cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Yinghui Xing,Shuo Yang,Song Wang,Shizhou Zhang,Guoqiang Liang,Xiuwei Zhang,Yanning Zhang
title: MS-DETR: Multispectral Pedestrian Detection Transformer with Loosely Coupled Fusion and Modality-Balanced Optimization
title_zh: MS-DETR：具有松耦合融合和模态平衡优化的多光谱行人检测变压器
comment: The paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
comments: The paper has been accepted by IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
abstract: Multispectral pedestrian detection is an important task for many around-the-clock applications, since the visible and thermal modalities can provide complementary information especially under low light conditions. Due to the presence of two modalities, misalignment and modality imbalance are the most significant issues in multispectral pedestrian detection. In this paper, we propose M ulti S pectral pedestrian DE tection TR ansformer (MS-DETR) to fix above issues. MS-DETR consists of two modality-specific backbones and Transformer encoders, followed by a multi-modal Transformer decoder, and the visible and thermal features are fused in the multi-modal Transformer decoder. To well resist the misalignment between multi-modal images, we design a loosely coupled fusion strategy by sparsely sampling some keypoints from multi-modal features independently and fusing them with adaptively learned attention weights. Moreover, based on the insight that not only different modalities, but also different pedestrian instances tend to have different confidence scores to final detection, we further propose an instance-aware modality-balanced optimization strategy, which preserves visible and thermal decoder branches and aligns their predicted slots through an instance-wise dynamic loss. Our end-to-end MS-DETR shows superior performance on the challenging KAIST, CVC-14 and LLVIP benchmark datasets. The source code is available at https://github.com/YinghuiXing/MS-DETR.
summary: Multispectral pedestrian detection is an important task for many around-the-clock applications, since the visible and thermal modalities can provide complementary information especially under low light conditions. Due to the presence of two modalities, misalignment and modality imbalance are the most significant issues in multispectral pedestrian detection. In this paper, we propose M ulti S pectral pedestrian DE tection TR ansformer (MS-DETR) to fix above issues. MS-DETR consists of two modality-specific backbones and Transformer encoders, followed by a multi-modal Transformer decoder, and the visible and thermal features are fused in the multi-modal Transformer decoder. To well resist the misalignment between multi-modal images, we design a loosely coupled fusion strategy by sparsely sampling some keypoints from multi-modal features independently and fusing them with adaptively learned attention weights. Moreover, based on the insight that not only different modalities, but also different pedestrian instances tend to have different confidence scores to final detection, we further propose an instance-aware modality-balanced optimization strategy, which preserves visible and thermal decoder branches and aligns their predicted slots through an instance-wise dynamic loss. Our end-to-end MS-DETR shows superior performance on the challenging KAIST, CVC-14 and LLVIP benchmark datasets. The source code is available at https://github.com/YinghuiXing/MS-DETR.
abstract_zh: 多光谱行人检测对于许多全天候应用来说是一项重要任务，因为可见光和热模态可以提供补充信息，尤其是在弱光条件下。由于存在两种模态，未对准和模态不平衡是多光谱行人检测中最重要的问题。在本文中，我们提出了多光谱行人检测 TR 变换器（MS-DETR）来解决上述问题。 MS-DETR由两个特定于模态的主干和Transformer编码器组成，后面是多模态Transformer解码器，可见光和热特征被融合在多模态Transformer解码器中。为了很好地抵抗多模态图像之间的错位，我们设计了一种松耦合的融合策略，通过独立地从多模态特征中稀疏采样一些关键点并将它们与自适应学习的注意力权重融合。此外，基于不仅不同的模态，而且不同的行人实例对于最终检测往往具有不同的置信度分数的见解，我们进一步提出了一种实例感知模态平衡优化策略，该策略保留可见和热解码器分支，并通过实例动态损失来对齐它们的预测槽。我们的端到端 MS-DETR 在具有挑战性的 KAIST、CVC-14 和 LLVIP 基准数据集上显示出卓越的性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/YinghuiXing/MS-DETR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MS-DETR的多光谱行人检测模型，旨在解决多模态图像中的对齐问题和模态不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 多光谱行人检测在全天候应用中非常重要，但由于可见光和热成像模态之间的对齐问题和模态不平衡，检测效果受到限制。
AI.method: MS-DETR包含两个模态特定的骨干网络和Transformer编码器，随后是多模态Transformer解码器。通过稀疏采样关键点并使用自适应注意力权重进行融合，设计了松耦合融合策略，并提出了实例感知的模态平衡优化策略。
AI.result: MS-DETR在KAIST、CVC-14和LLVIP基准数据集上表现出色，代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: MS-DETR通过松耦合融合和模态平衡优化策略有效解决了多光谱行人检测中的对齐和模态不平衡问题，具有良好的性能。

authors_text: Kin Wai Cheuk,Keunwoo Choi,Qiuqiang Kong,Bochen Li,Minz Won,Ju-Chiang Wang,Yun-Ning Hung,Dorien Herremans
title: Jointist: Simultaneous Improvement of Multi-instrument Transcription and Music Source Separation via Joint Training
title_zh: Jointist：通过联合训练同时提高多乐器转录和音源分离
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.10805
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.10805
abstract: In this paper, we introduce Jointist, an instrument-aware multi-instrument framework that is capable of transcribing, recognizing, and separating multiple musical instruments from an audio clip. Jointist consists of an instrument recognition module that conditions the other two modules: a transcription module that outputs instrument-specific piano rolls, and a source separation module that utilizes instrument information and transcription results. The joint training of the transcription and source separation modules serves to improve the performance of both tasks. The instrument module is optional and can be directly controlled by human users. This makes Jointist a flexible user-controllable framework. Our challenging problem formulation makes the model highly useful in the real world given that modern popular music typically consists of multiple instruments. Its novelty, however, necessitates a new perspective on how to evaluate such a model. In our experiments, we assess the proposed model from various aspects, providing a new evaluation perspective for multi-instrument transcription. Our subjective listening study shows that Jointist achieves state-of-the-art performance on popular music, outperforming existing multi-instrument transcription models such as MT3. We conducted experiments on several downstream tasks and found that the proposed method improved transcription by more than 1 percentage points (ppt.), source separation by 5 SDR, downbeat detection by 1.8 ppt., chord recognition by 1.4 ppt., and key estimation by 1.4 ppt., when utilizing transcription results obtained from Jointist. Demo available at \url{https://jointist.github.io/Demo}.
summary: In this paper, we introduce Jointist, an instrument-aware multi-instrument framework that is capable of transcribing, recognizing, and separating multiple musical instruments from an audio clip. Jointist consists of an instrument recognition module that conditions the other two modules: a transcription module that outputs instrument-specific piano rolls, and a source separation module that utilizes instrument information and transcription results. The joint training of the transcription and source separation modules serves to improve the performance of both tasks. The instrument module is optional and can be directly controlled by human users. This makes Jointist a flexible user-controllable framework. Our challenging problem formulation makes the model highly useful in the real world given that modern popular music typically consists of multiple instruments. Its novelty, however, necessitates a new perspective on how to evaluate such a model. In our experiments, we assess the proposed model from various aspects, providing a new evaluation perspective for multi-instrument transcription. Our subjective listening study shows that Jointist achieves state-of-the-art performance on popular music, outperforming existing multi-instrument transcription models such as MT3. We conducted experiments on several downstream tasks and found that the proposed method improved transcription by more than 1 percentage points (ppt.), source separation by 5 SDR, downbeat detection by 1.8 ppt., chord recognition by 1.4 ppt., and key estimation by 1.4 ppt., when utilizing transcription results obtained from Jointist. Demo available at \url{https://jointist.github.io/Demo}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Jointist，这是一种乐器感知的多乐器框架，能够从音频剪辑中转录、识别和分离多种乐器。 Jointist 由一个乐器识别模块组成，该模块调节其他两个模块：输出特定于乐器的钢琴卷帘的转录模块，以及利用乐器信息和转录结果的源分离模块。转录和源分离模块的联合训练有助于提高这两项任务的性能。仪器模块是可选的，可以由人类用户直接控制。这使得 Jointist 成为一个灵活的用户可控框架。鉴于现代流行音乐通常由多种乐器组成，我们具有挑战性的问题表述使得该模型在现实世界中非常有用。然而，它的新颖性需要对如何评估这种模型有新的视角。在我们的实验中，我们从各个方面评估了所提出的模型，为多仪器转录提供了新的评估视角。我们的主观聆听研究表明，Jointist 在流行音乐方面实现了最先进的性能，优于 MT3 等现有的多乐器转录模型。我们对几个下游任务进行了实验，发现当利用从 Jointist 获得的转录结果时，所提出的方法将转录提高了 1 个百分点以上 (ppt.)，源分离提高了 5 SDR，强拍检测提高了 1.8 个百分点，和弦识别提高了 1.4 个百分点，调估计提高了 1.4 个百分点。演示可在 \url{https://jointist.github.io/Demo} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Jointist框架，通过联合训练同时提升多乐器音频转录和音乐源分离性能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以有效处理包含多种乐器的现代流行音乐，需开发兼顾转录与分离的灵活框架以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 构建包含乐器识别模块、乐器特异性转录模块和利用乐器信息的源分离模块的联合训练框架，支持用户控制乐器模块。
AI.result: 在转录任务提升1ppt、源分离提升5SDR等指标超越MT3等模型，下游任务如节拍检测、和弦识别等均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 联合训练策略有效提升多乐器处理性能，为多任务音频分析提供新视角和实用框架。

motivation: 现有模型难以有效处理包含多种乐器的现代流行音乐，需开发兼顾转录与分离的灵活框架以满足实际需求。
method: 构建包含乐器识别模块、乐器特异性转录模块和利用乐器信息的源分离模块的联合训练框架，支持用户控制乐器模块。
result: 在转录任务提升1ppt、源分离提升5SDR等指标超越MT3等模型，下游任务如节拍检测、和弦识别等均有显著提升。
conclusion: 联合训练策略有效提升多乐器处理性能，为多任务音频分析提供新视角和实用框架。
search_text: Jointist: Simultaneous Improvement of Multi-instrument Transcription and Music Source Separation via Joint Training Jointist：通过联合训练同时提高多乐器转录和音源分离 In this paper, we introduce Jointist, an instrument-aware multi-instrument framework that is capable of transcribing, recognizing, and separating multiple musical instruments from an audio clip. Jointist consists of an instrument recognition module that conditions the other two modules: a transcription module that outputs instrument-specific piano rolls, and a source separation module that utilizes instrument information and transcription results. The joint training of the transcription and source separation modules serves to improve the performance of both tasks. The instrument module is optional and can be directly controlled by human users. This makes Jointist a flexible user-controllable framework. Our challenging problem formulation makes the model highly useful in the real world given that modern popular music typically consists of multiple instruments. Its novelty, however, necessitates a new perspective on how to evaluate such a model. In our experiments, we assess the proposed model from various aspects, providing a new evaluation perspective for multi-instrument transcription. Our subjective listening study shows that Jointist achieves state-of-the-art performance on popular music, outperforming existing multi-instrument transcription models such as MT3. We conducted experiments on several downstream tasks and found that the proposed method improved transcription by more than 1 percentage points (ppt.), source separation by 5 SDR, downbeat detection by 1.8 ppt., chord recognition by 1.4 ppt., and key estimation by 1.4 ppt., when utilizing transcription results obtained from Jointist. Demo available at \url{https://jointist.github.io/Demo}. 在本文中，我们介绍了 Jointist，这是一种乐器感知的多乐器框架，能够从音频剪辑中转录、识别和分离多种乐器。 Jointist 由一个乐器识别模块组成，该模块调节其他两个模块：输出特定于乐器的钢琴卷帘的转录模块，以及利用乐器信息和转录结果的源分离模块。转录和源分离模块的联合训练有助于提高这两项任务的性能。仪器模块是可选的，可以由人类用户直接控制。这使得 Jointist 成为一个灵活的用户可控框架。鉴于现代流行音乐通常由多种乐器组成，我们具有挑战性的问题表述使得该模型在现实世界中非常有用。然而，它的新颖性需要对如何评估这种模型有新的视角。在我们的实验中，我们从各个方面评估了所提出的模型，为多仪器转录提供了新的评估视角。我们的主观聆听研究表明，Jointist 在流行音乐方面实现了最先进的性能，优于 MT3 等现有的多乐器转录模型。我们对几个下游任务进行了实验，发现当利用从 Jointist 获得的转录结果时，所提出的方法将转录提高了 1 个百分点以上 (ppt.)，源分离提高了 5 SDR，强拍检测提高了 1.8 个百分点，和弦识别提高了 1.4 个百分点，调估计提高了 1.4 个百分点。演示可在 \url{https://jointist.github.io/Demo} 获取。 本文提出Jointist框架，通过联合训练同时提升多乐器音频转录和音乐源分离性能。 Kin Wai Cheuk,Keunwoo Choi,Qiuqiang Kong,Bochen Li,Minz Won,Ju-Chiang Wang,Yun-Ning Hung,Dorien Herremans cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Sanath Kumar Krishnamurthy,Tanmay Gangwani,Sumeet Katariya,Branislav Kveton,Shrey Modi,Anshuka Rangi
title: Selective Uncertainty Propagation in Offline RL
title_zh: 离线强化学习中的选择性不确定性传播
abstract: We consider the finite-horizon offline reinforcement learning (RL) setting, and are motivated by the challenge of learning the policy at any step h in dynamic programming (DP) algorithms. To learn this, it is sufficient to evaluate the treatment effect of deviating from the behavioral policy at step h after having optimized the policy for all future steps. Since the policy at any step can affect next-state distributions, the related distributional shift challenges can make this problem far more statistically hard than estimating such treatment effects in the stochastic contextual bandit setting. However, the hardness of many real-world RL instances lies between the two regimes. We develop a flexible and general method called selective uncertainty propagation for confidence interval construction that adapts to the hardness of the associated distribution shift challenges. We show benefits of our approach on toy environments and demonstrate the benefits of these techniques for offline policy learning.
summary: We consider the finite-horizon offline reinforcement learning (RL) setting, and are motivated by the challenge of learning the policy at any step h in dynamic programming (DP) algorithms. To learn this, it is sufficient to evaluate the treatment effect of deviating from the behavioral policy at step h after having optimized the policy for all future steps. Since the policy at any step can affect next-state distributions, the related distributional shift challenges can make this problem far more statistically hard than estimating such treatment effects in the stochastic contextual bandit setting. However, the hardness of many real-world RL instances lies between the two regimes. We develop a flexible and general method called selective uncertainty propagation for confidence interval construction that adapts to the hardness of the associated distribution shift challenges. We show benefits of our approach on toy environments and demonstrate the benefits of these techniques for offline policy learning.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑有限范围离线强化学习 (RL) 设置，并受到在动态规划 (DP) 算法中的任何步骤 h 学习策略的挑战的激励。要了解这一点，在优化所有未来步骤的策略后，评估偏离步骤 h 的行为策略的治疗效果就足够了。由于任何步骤的政策都可能影响下一状态的分布，因此相关的分布转变挑战可能会使这个问题在统计上比在随机上下文强盗环境中估计此类处理效果更加困难。然而，许多现实世界的强化学习实例的难度介于这两种制度之间。我们开发了一种灵活且通用的方法，称为选择性不确定性传播，用于构建置信区间，以适应相关分布转移挑战的难度。我们展示了我们的方法在玩具环境中的优点，并展示了这些技术对离线策略学习的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文研究离线强化学习中动态规划步骤的策略学习问题，提出一种名为选择性不确定性传播的方法以应对分布偏移挑战。
AI.motivation: 在动态规划算法中，每一步策略学习需评估偏离行为策略的处理效应，但分布偏移问题使该任务比带宽设置更困难，而现实问题难度介于两者之间。
AI.method: 开发选择性不确定性传播方法，通过构建自适应置信区间来应对不同分布偏移难度的挑战。
AI.result: 在玩具环境中验证了方法有效性，并证明其对离线策略学习的提升作用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效适应分布偏移难度，为离线强化学习提供更稳健的策略学习框架。

title: Anti-unification and Generalization: A Survey
title_zh: 反统一与泛化：调查
abstract: Anti-unification (AU) is a fundamental operation for generalization computation used for inductive inference. It is the dual operation to unification, an operation at the foundation of automated theorem proving. Interest in AU from the AI and related communities is growing, but without a systematic study of the concept nor surveys of existing work, investigations often resort to developing application-specific methods that existing approaches may cover. We provide the first survey of AU research and its applications and a general framework for categorizing existing and future developments.
summary: Anti-unification (AU) is a fundamental operation for generalization computation used for inductive inference. It is the dual operation to unification, an operation at the foundation of automated theorem proving. Interest in AU from the AI and related communities is growing, but without a systematic study of the concept nor surveys of existing work, investigations often resort to developing application-specific methods that existing approaches may cover. We provide the first survey of AU research and its applications and a general framework for categorizing existing and future developments.
abstract_zh: 反统一（AU）是用于归纳推理的泛化计算的基本操作。它是对偶运算到统一，是自动化定理证明的基础运算。人工智能和相关社区对 AU 的兴趣与日俱增，但如果没有对概念进行系统研究，也没有对现有工作进行调查，调查往往会诉诸于开发现有方法可能涵盖的特定于应用程序的方法。我们首次对 AU 研究及其应用进行了调查，并提供了对现有和未来发展进行分类的总体框架。

AI.tldr: 综述反统一（AU）的研究及其应用，并提供一个分类现有和未来发展的通用框架。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏系统综述，导致应用特定方法的重复开发，需统一框架整合现有成果。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和分类框架，系统整理AU的研究进展和应用场景。
AI.result: 首次系统梳理AU研究，提出分类框架，明确未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: AU是归纳推理的关键，需进一步研究以推动其在AI中的应用。

title: Learning Generalized Zero-Shot Learners for Open-Domain Image Geolocalization
title_zh: 学习开放域图像地理定位的通用零样本学习器
abstract: Image geolocalization is the challenging task of predicting the geographic coordinates of origin for a given photo. It is an unsolved problem relying on the ability to combine visual clues with general knowledge about the world to make accurate predictions across geographies. We present $\href{https://huggingface.co/geolocal/StreetCLIP}{\text{StreetCLIP}}$, a robust, publicly available foundation model not only achieving state-of-the-art performance on multiple open-domain image geolocalization benchmarks but also doing so in a zero-shot setting, outperforming supervised models trained on more than 4 million images. Our method introduces a meta-learning approach for generalized zero-shot learning by pretraining CLIP from synthetic captions, grounding CLIP in a domain of choice. We show that our method effectively transfers CLIP's generalized zero-shot capabilities to the domain of image geolocalization, improving in-domain generalized zero-shot performance without finetuning StreetCLIP on a fixed set of classes.
summary: Image geolocalization is the challenging task of predicting the geographic coordinates of origin for a given photo. It is an unsolved problem relying on the ability to combine visual clues with general knowledge about the world to make accurate predictions across geographies. We present $\href{https://huggingface.co/geolocal/StreetCLIP}{\text{StreetCLIP}}$, a robust, publicly available foundation model not only achieving state-of-the-art performance on multiple open-domain image geolocalization benchmarks but also doing so in a zero-shot setting, outperforming supervised models trained on more than 4 million images. Our method introduces a meta-learning approach for generalized zero-shot learning by pretraining CLIP from synthetic captions, grounding CLIP in a domain of choice. We show that our method effectively transfers CLIP's generalized zero-shot capabilities to the domain of image geolocalization, improving in-domain generalized zero-shot performance without finetuning StreetCLIP on a fixed set of classes.
abstract_zh: 图像地理定位是预测给定照片的原点地理坐标的一项具有挑战性的任务。这是一个尚未解决的问题，依赖于将视觉线索与关于世界的常识相结合以跨地域做出准确预测的能力。我们提出了 $\href{https://huggingface.co/geolocal/StreetCLIP}{\text{StreetCLIP}}$，这是一个强大的、公开可用的基础模型，不仅在多个开放域图像地理定位基准上实现了最先进的性能，而且还在零样本设置中实现了这一点，优于在超过 400 万张图像上训练的监督模型。我们的方法引入了一种用于广义零样本学习的元学习方法，通过从合成字幕中预训练 CLIP，将 CLIP 扎根于所选领域。我们表明，我们的方法有效地将 CLIP 的广义零样本能力转移到图像地理定位领域，提高了域内广义零样本性能，而无需在一组固定的类上微调 StreetCLIP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为StreetCLIP的基础模型，用于在零样本设置下实现开放领域图像地理定位，无需针对特定类别进行微调。
AI.motivation: 现有图像地理定位方法依赖大量标注数据训练的监督模型，难以适应开放领域和零样本场景。作者旨在开发一种无需特定类别微调即可泛化到新地理区域的模型。
AI.method: 通过元学习框架对CLIP进行预训练，利用合成描述文本将其锚定到目标领域，实现跨领域的零样本能力迁移。
AI.result: StreetCLIP在多个开放领域地理定位基准测试中超越了使用400万以上图像训练的监督模型，在零样本设置下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了通过预训练CLIP实现通用零样本地理定位的有效性，为开放领域场景提供了无需微调的解决方案。

search_text: Learning Generalized Zero-Shot Learners for Open-Domain Image Geolocalization 学习开放域图像地理定位的通用零样本学习器 Image geolocalization is the challenging task of predicting the geographic coordinates of origin for a given photo. It is an unsolved problem relying on the ability to combine visual clues with general knowledge about the world to make accurate predictions across geographies. We present $\href{https://huggingface.co/geolocal/StreetCLIP}{\text{StreetCLIP}}$, a robust, publicly available foundation model not only achieving state-of-the-art performance on multiple open-domain image geolocalization benchmarks but also doing so in a zero-shot setting, outperforming supervised models trained on more than 4 million images. Our method introduces a meta-learning approach for generalized zero-shot learning by pretraining CLIP from synthetic captions, grounding CLIP in a domain of choice. We show that our method effectively transfers CLIP's generalized zero-shot capabilities to the domain of image geolocalization, improving in-domain generalized zero-shot performance without finetuning StreetCLIP on a fixed set of classes. 图像地理定位是预测给定照片的原点地理坐标的一项具有挑战性的任务。这是一个尚未解决的问题，依赖于将视觉线索与关于世界的常识相结合以跨地域做出准确预测的能力。我们提出了 $\href{https://huggingface.co/geolocal/StreetCLIP}{\text{StreetCLIP}}$，这是一个强大的、公开可用的基础模型，不仅在多个开放域图像地理定位基准上实现了最先进的性能，而且还在零样本设置中实现了这一点，优于在超过 400 万张图像上训练的监督模型。我们的方法引入了一种用于广义零样本学习的元学习方法，通过从合成字幕中预训练 CLIP，将 CLIP 扎根于所选领域。我们表明，我们的方法有效地将 CLIP 的广义零样本能力转移到图像地理定位领域，提高了域内广义零样本性能，而无需在一组固定的类上微调 StreetCLIP。 本文提出了一种名为StreetCLIP的基础模型，用于在零样本设置下实现开放领域图像地理定位，无需针对特定类别进行微调。 Lukas Haas,Silas Alberti,Michal Skreta cs.CV,cs.LG

title: W2SAT: Learning to generate SAT instances from Weighted Literal Incidence Graphs
title_zh: W2SAT：学习从加权文字发生率图生成 SAT 实例
comment: After further review and reflection on the methodology presented, we have concluded that the approach described is more appropriate for a different task than initially proposed in the current submission
comments: After further review and reflection on the methodology presented, we have concluded that the approach described is more appropriate for a different task than initially proposed in the current submission
abstract: The Boolean Satisfiability (SAT) problem stands out as an attractive NP-complete problem in theoretic computer science and plays a central role in a broad spectrum of computing-related applications. Exploiting and tuning SAT solvers under numerous scenarios require massive high-quality industry-level SAT instances, which unfortunately are quite limited in the real world. To address the data insufficiency issue, in this paper, we propose W2SAT, a framework to generate SAT formulas by learning intrinsic structures and properties from given real-world/industrial instances in an implicit fashion. To this end, we introduce a novel SAT representation called Weighted Literal Incidence Graph (WLIG), which exhibits strong representation ability and generalizability against existing counterparts, and can be efficiently generated via a specialized learning-based graph generative model. Decoding from WLIGs into SAT problems is then modeled as finding overlapping cliques with a novel hill-climbing optimization method termed Optimal Weight Coverage (OWC). Experiments demonstrate the superiority of our WLIG-induced approach in terms of graph metrics, efficiency, and scalability in comparison to previous methods. Additionally, we discuss the limitations of graph-based SAT generation for real-world applications, especially when utilizing generated instances for SAT solver parameter-tuning, and pose some potential directions.

Exploiting and tuning SAT solvers under numerous scenarios require massive high-quality industry-level SAT instances, which unfortunately are quite limited in the real world. To address the data insufficiency issue, in this paper, we propose W2SAT, a framework to generate SAT formulas by learning intrinsic structures and properties from given real-world/industrial instances in an implicit fashion. To this end, we introduce a novel SAT representation called Weighted Literal Incidence Graph (WLIG), which exhibits strong representation ability and generalizability against existing counterparts, and can be efficiently generated via a specialized learning-based graph generative model. Decoding from WLIGs into SAT problems is then modeled as finding overlapping cliques with a novel hill-climbing optimization method termed Optimal Weight Coverage (OWC). Experiments demonstrate the superiority of our WLIG-induced approach in terms of graph metrics, efficiency, and scalability in comparison to previous methods. Additionally, we discuss the limitations of graph-based SAT generation for real-world applications, especially when utilizing generated instances for SAT solver parameter-tuning, and pose some potential directions.
abstract_zh: 布尔可满足性 (SAT) 问题作为理论计算机科学中一个有吸引力的 NP 完全问题脱颖而出，并在广泛的计算相关应用中发挥着核心作用。在多种场景下开发和调整 SAT 求解器需要大量高质量的行业级 SAT 实例，但不幸的是，这些实例在现实世界中非常有限。为了解决数据不足问题，在本文中，我们提出了 W2SAT，这是一种通过以隐式方式从给定的现实世界/工业实例中学习内在结构和属性来生成 SAT 公式的框架。为此，我们引入了一种新颖的 SAT 表示，称为加权文字关联图（WLIG），它相对于现有的对应物表现出强大的表示能力和泛化性，并且可以通过专门的基于学习的图生成模型有效地生成。然后，将 WLIG 解码为 SAT 问题，然后将其建模为使用称为最佳权重覆盖 (OWC) 的新型爬山优化方法来查找重叠派系。实验证明，与之前的方法相比，我们的 WLIG 诱导方法在图指标、效率和可扩展性方面具有优越性。此外，我们还讨论了基于图的 SAT 生成在实际应用中的局限性，特别是在利用生成的实例进行 SAT 求解器参数调整时，并提出了一些潜在的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出W2SAT框架，通过学习真实世界SAT实例的内在结构，生成高质量的SAT问题实例。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中高质量工业级SAT实例稀缺，限制了SAT求解器的优化与调参，亟需有效生成方法。
AI.method: 引入加权文字关联图（WLIG）表示，结合学习驱动的图生成模型与最优权重覆盖（OWC）算法解码生成SAT问题。
AI.result: 在图指标、效率和可扩展性上优于现有方法，同时指出图基生成在实际求解器调参中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: WLIG方法在SAT实例生成中表现优异，但需进一步探索其在工业场景中的参数优化适用性。

authors_text: Mengdi Li,Xufeng Zhao,Jae Hee Lee,Cornelius Weber,Stefan Wermter
title: Internally Rewarded Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 内部奖励强化学习
comment: Accepted at ICML 2023. Update: adopt the term "reward model" instead of using "critic" to prevent confusion with the term "critic" in actor-critic algorithms. Project webpage at https://ir-rl.github.io
comments: Accepted at ICML 2023. Update: adopt the term "reward model" instead of using "critic" to prevent confusion with the term "critic" in actor-critic algorithms. Project webpage at https://ir-rl.github.io
abstract: We study a class of reinforcement learning problems where the reward signals for policy learning are generated by an internal reward model that is dependent on and jointly optimized with the policy. This interdependence between the policy and the reward model leads to an unstable learning process because reward signals from an immature reward model are noisy and impede policy learning, and conversely, an under-optimized policy impedes reward estimation learning. We call this learning setting $\textit{Internally Rewarded Reinforcement Learning}$ (IRRL) as the reward is not provided directly by the environment but $\textit{internally}$ by a reward model. In this paper, we formally formulate IRRL and present a class of problems that belong to IRRL. We theoretically derive and empirically analyze the effect of the reward function in IRRL and based on these analyses propose the clipped linear reward function. Experimental results show that the proposed reward function can consistently stabilize the training process by reducing the impact of reward noise, which leads to faster convergence and higher performance compared with baselines in diverse tasks.
summary: We study a class of reinforcement learning problems where the reward signals for policy learning are generated by an internal reward model that is dependent on and jointly optimized with the policy. This interdependence between the policy and the reward model leads to an unstable learning process because reward signals from an immature reward model are noisy and impede policy learning, and conversely, an under-optimized policy impedes reward estimation learning. We call this learning setting $\textit{Internally Rewarded Reinforcement Learning}$ (IRRL) as the reward is not provided directly by the environment but $\textit{internally}$ by a reward model. In this paper, we formally formulate IRRL and present a class of problems that belong to IRRL. We theoretically derive and empirically analyze the effect of the reward function in IRRL and based on these analyses propose the clipped linear reward function. Experimental results show that the proposed reward function can consistently stabilize the training process by reducing the impact of reward noise, which leads to faster convergence and higher performance compared with baselines in diverse tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们研究一类强化学习问题，其中策略学习的奖励信号是由依赖于策略并与策略共同优化的内部奖励模型生成的。策略和奖励模型之间的这种相互依赖会导致学习过程不稳定，因为来自不成熟奖励模型的奖励信号是有噪声的并阻碍策略学习，相反，优化不足的策略会阻碍奖励估计学习。我们将这种学习设置称为 $\textit{内部奖励强化学习}$ (IRRL)，因为奖励不是由环境直接提供，而是 $\textit{内部}$ 由奖励模型提供。在本文中，我们正式制定了 IRRL 并提出了一类属于 IRRL 的问题。我们从理论上推导并实证分析了 IRRL 中奖励函数的影响，并基于这些分析提出了截断线性奖励函数。实验结果表明，所提出的奖励函数可以通过减少奖励噪声的影响来持续稳定训练过程，与不同任务的基线相比，这会导致更快的收敛和更高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了一种强化学习问题，其中策略学习的奖励信号由内部奖励模型生成，并与策略联合优化，提出了剪裁线性奖励函数以稳定训练过程。
AI.motivation: 内部奖励模型与策略的相互依赖导致学习过程不稳定，未成熟的奖励模型会产生噪声干扰策略学习，而欠优化的策略又会阻碍奖励估计。
AI.method: 形式化定义IRRL问题，理论推导奖励函数的影响，并提出剪裁线性奖励函数，通过实验分析其效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提奖励函数通过降低奖励噪声影响，使训练过程更稳定，收敛速度更快且性能优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 剪裁线性奖励函数有效解决了IRRL中的不稳定性问题，在多种任务中实现了更优的收敛与性能表现。

In this paper, we formally formulate IRRL and present a class of problems that belong to IRRL. We theoretically derive and empirically analyze the effect of the reward function in IRRL and based on these analyses propose the clipped linear reward function. Experimental results show that the proposed reward function can consistently stabilize the training process by reducing the impact of reward noise, which leads to faster convergence and higher performance compared with baselines in diverse tasks. 我们研究一类强化学习问题，其中策略学习的奖励信号是由依赖于策略并与策略共同优化的内部奖励模型生成的。策略和奖励模型之间的这种相互依赖会导致学习过程不稳定，因为来自不成熟奖励模型的奖励信号是有噪声的并阻碍策略学习，相反，优化不足的策略会阻碍奖励估计学习。我们将这种学习设置称为 $\textit{内部奖励强化学习}$ (IRRL)，因为奖励不是由环境直接提供，而是 $\textit{内部}$ 由奖励模型提供。在本文中，我们正式制定了 IRRL 并提出了一类属于 IRRL 的问题。我们从理论上推导并实证分析了 IRRL 中奖励函数的影响，并基于这些分析提出了截断线性奖励函数。实验结果表明，所提出的奖励函数可以通过减少奖励噪声的影响来持续稳定训练过程，与不同任务的基线相比，这会导致更快的收敛和更高的性能。 本文研究了一种强化学习问题，其中策略学习的奖励信号由内部奖励模型生成，并与策略联合优化，提出了剪裁线性奖励函数以稳定训练过程。 Mengdi Li,Xufeng Zhao,Jae Hee Lee,Cornelius Weber,Stefan Wermter cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Kaifeng Gao,Long Chen,Hanwang Zhang,Jun Xiao,Qianru Sun
title: Compositional Prompt Tuning with Motion Cues for Open-vocabulary Video Relation Detection
title_zh: 使用运动提示进行构图提示调整，用于开放词汇视频关系检测
abstract: Prompt tuning with large-scale pretrained vision-language models empowers open-vocabulary predictions trained on limited base categories, e.g., object classification and detection. In this paper, we propose compositional prompt tuning with motion cues: an extended prompt tuning paradigm for compositional predictions of video data. In particular, we present Relation Prompt (RePro) for Open-vocabulary Video Visual Relation Detection (Open-VidVRD), where conventional prompt tuning is easily biased to certain subject-object combinations and motion patterns. To this end, RePro addresses the two technical challenges of Open-VidVRD: 1) the prompt tokens should respect the two different semantic roles of subject and object, and 2) the tuning should account for the diverse spatio-temporal motion patterns of the subject-object compositions. Without bells and whistles, our RePro achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on two VidVRD benchmarks of not only the base training object and predicate categories, but also the unseen ones. Extensive ablations also demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed compositional and multi-mode design of prompts. Code is available at https://github.com/Dawn-LX/OpenVoc-VidVRD.
summary: Prompt tuning with large-scale pretrained vision-language models empowers open-vocabulary predictions trained on limited base categories, e.g., object classification and detection. In this paper, we propose compositional prompt tuning with motion cues: an extended prompt tuning paradigm for compositional predictions of video data. In particular, we present Relation Prompt (RePro) for Open-vocabulary Video Visual Relation Detection (Open-VidVRD), where conventional prompt tuning is easily biased to certain subject-object combinations and motion patterns. To this end, RePro addresses the two technical challenges of Open-VidVRD: 1) the prompt tokens should respect the two different semantic roles of subject and object, and 2) the tuning should account for the diverse spatio-temporal motion patterns of the subject-object compositions. Without bells and whistles, our RePro achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on two VidVRD benchmarks of not only the base training object and predicate categories, but also the unseen ones. Extensive ablations also demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed compositional and multi-mode design of prompts. Code is available at https://github.com/Dawn-LX/OpenVoc-VidVRD.
abstract_zh: 使用大规模预训练视觉语言模型进行及时调整，可以在有限的基本类别（例如对象分类和检测）上进行开放词汇预测。在本文中，我们提出了带有运动提示的合成提示调整：用于视频数据合成预测的扩展提示调整范例。特别是，我们提出了用于开放词汇视频视觉关系检测（Open-VidVRD）的关系提示（RePro），其中传统的提示调整很容易偏向于某些主客体组合和运动模式。为此，RePro 解决了 Open-VidVRD 的两个技术挑战：1）提示标记应尊重主体和客体两种不同的语义角色，2）调整应考虑主体-客体组合的不同时空运动模式。没有花里胡哨的东西，我们的 RePro 在两个 VidVRD 基准测试上实现了新的最先进的性能，不仅包括基本训练对象和谓词类别，还包括不可见的类别。广泛的消融也证明了所提出的提示组合和多模式设计的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Dawn-LX/OpenVoc-VidVRD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合运动线索的组合提示调优方法RePro，用于开放词汇的视频视觉关系检测任务。
AI.motivation: 传统提示调优在视频关系检测中易受主客体组合和运动模式偏差影响，难以处理开放词汇场景下的语义角色区分和时空动态多样性。
AI.method: 设计Relation Prompt（RePro）框架，通过分离主语/宾语语义角色的组合提示，并融合多模态运动特征来建模时空关系。
AI.result: 在两个VidVRD基准测试中，RePro在基础类和未见类均达到新SOTA，消融实验证明组合结构与运动线索的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 组合提示调优与运动特征融合能有效解决开放词汇视频关系检测的语义角色混淆和动态模式多样性挑战。

title: A Nearly-Optimal Bound for Fast Regression with $\ell_\infty$ Guarantee
title_zh: 具有 $\ell_\infty$ 保证的快速回归的近乎最优界限
comment: Abstract shortened to meet arxiv requirement
comments: Abstract shortened to meet arxiv requirement
abstract: Given a matrix $A\in \mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ and a vector $b\in \mathbb{R}^n$, we consider the regression problem with $\ell_\infty$ guarantees: finding a vector $x'\in \mathbb{R}^d$ such that $ \|x'-x^*\|_\infty \leq \fracε{\sqrt{d}}\cdot \|Ax^*-b\|_2\cdot \|A^\dagger\|$ where $x^*=\arg\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^d}\|Ax-b\|_2$. One popular approach for solving such $\ell_2$ regression problem is via sketching: picking a structured random matrix $S\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$ with $m\ll n$ and $SA$ can be quickly computed, solve the ``sketched'' regression problem $\arg\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^d} \|SAx-Sb\|_2$. In this paper, we show that in order to obtain such $\ell_\infty$ guarantee for $\ell_2$ regression, one has to use sketching matrices that are dense. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first user case in which dense sketching matrices are necessary. On the algorithmic side, we prove that there exists a distribution of dense sketching matrices with $m=ε^{-2}d\log^3(n/δ)$ such that solving the sketched regression problem gives the $\ell_\infty$ guarantee, with probability at least $1-δ$. Moreover, the matrix $SA$ can be computed in time $O(nd\log n)$. Our row count is nearly-optimal up to logarithmic factors, and significantly improves the result in [Price, Song and Woodruff, ICALP'17], in which a super-linear in $d$ rows, $m=Ω(ε^{-2}d^{1+γ})$ for $γ=Θ(\sqrt{\frac{\log\log n}{\log d}})$ is required. We also develop a novel analytical framework for $\ell_\infty$ guarantee regression that utilizes the Oblivious Coordinate-wise Embedding (OCE) property introduced in [Song and Yu, ICML'21]. Our analysis is arguably much simpler and more general than [Price, Song and Woodruff, ICALP'17], and it extends to dense sketches for tensor product of vectors.

One popular approach for solving such $\ell_2$ regression problem is via sketching: picking a structured random matrix $S\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$ with $m\ll n$ and $SA$ can be quickly computed, solve the ``sketched'' regression problem $\arg\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^d} \|SAx-Sb\|_2$. In this paper, we show that in order to obtain such $\ell_\infty$ guarantee for $\ell_2$ regression, one has to use sketching matrices that are dense. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first user case in which dense sketching matrices are necessary. On the algorithmic side, we prove that there exists a distribution of dense sketching matrices with $m=ε^{-2}d\log^3(n/δ)$ such that solving the sketched regression problem gives the $\ell_\infty$ guarantee, with probability at least $1-δ$. Moreover, the matrix $SA$ can be computed in time $O(nd\log n)$. Our row count is nearly-optimal up to logarithmic factors, and significantly improves the result in [Price, Song and Woodruff, ICALP'17], in which a super-linear in $d$ rows, $m=Ω(ε^{-2}d^{1+γ})$ for $γ=Θ(\sqrt{\frac{\log\log n}{\log d}})$ is required. We also develop a novel analytical framework for $\ell_\infty$ guarantee regression that utilizes the Oblivious Coordinate-wise Embedding (OCE) property introduced in [Song and Yu, ICML'21]. Our analysis is arguably much simpler and more general than [Price, Song and Woodruff, ICALP'17], and it extends to dense sketches for tensor product of vectors.
abstract_zh: 给定矩阵 $A\in \mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ 和向量 $b\in \mathbb{R}^n$，我们考虑 $\ell_\infty$ 保证的回归问题：找到向量 $x'\in \mathbb{R}^d$ 使得 $ \|x'-x^*\|_\infty \leq \fracε{\sqrt{d}}\cdot \|Ax^*-b\|_2\cdot \|A^\dagger\|$ 其中 $x^*=\arg\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^d}\|Ax-b\|_2$。解决此类 $\ell_2$ 回归问题的一种流行方法是通过草图：选择一个结构化随机矩阵 $S\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$ 以及 $m\ll n$ 和 $SA$ 可以快速计算，解决“草图”回归问题 $\arg\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^d} \|SAx-Sb\|_2$。在本文中，我们表明，为了获得 $\ell_2$ 回归的 $\ell_\infty$ 保证，必须使用稠密的草图矩阵。据我们所知，这是第一个需要密集草图矩阵的用户案例。在算法方面，我们证明存在 $m=ε^{-2}d\log^3(n/δ)$ 的密集草图矩阵分布，这样解决草图回归问题就可以得到 $\ell_\infty$ 保证，概率至少为 $1-δ$。此外，矩阵$SA$可以在$O(nd\log n)$时间内计算出来。我们的行数在对数因子上几乎是最佳的，并且显着改善了 [Price, Song and Woodruff, ICALP'17] 中的结果，其中需要 $d$ 行中的超线性，$m=Ω(ε^{-2}d^{1+γ})$ for $γ=θ(\sqrt{\frac{\log\log n}{\log d}})$。我们还为 $\ell_\infty$ 保证回归开发了一种新颖的分析框架，该框架利用了 [Song 和 Yu，ICML'21] 中引入的不经意坐标嵌入 (OCE) 属性。我们的分析可以说比 [Price，Song 和 Woodruff，ICALP'17] 更简单、更通用，并且它扩展到向量张量积的密集草图。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在ℓ₂回归问题中实现ℓ∞保证的快速回归方法，证明了必须使用密集型随机投影矩阵，并提出了相应的算法框架。
AI.motivation: 传统回归问题常通过稀疏随机投影矩阵进行近似，但现有方法无法满足ℓ∞误差保证。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，证明密集矩阵的必要性并提供高效算法。
AI.method: 设计了一种密集型随机投影矩阵分布，结合Oblivious Coordinate-wise Embedding (OCE)分析框架，通过控制投影矩阵行数和计算复杂度实现ℓ∞误差保证。
AI.result: 证明了实现ℓ∞保证需要Ω(ε⁻²d log³(n/δ))行的密集矩阵，时间复杂度为O(nd log n)，显著优于之前Ω(ε⁻²d¹+γ)的超线性结果。
AI.conclusion: 密集型投影矩阵是实现ℓ∞保证的必要条件，所提方法在理论界和计算效率上均优于现有工作，且框架可扩展至张量积场景。

One popular approach for solving such $\ell_2$ regression problem is via sketching: picking a structured random matrix $S\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$ with $m\ll n$ and $SA$ can be quickly computed, solve the ``sketched'' regression problem $\arg\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^d} \|SAx-Sb\|_2$. In this paper, we show that in order to obtain such $\ell_\infty$ guarantee for $\ell_2$ regression, one has to use sketching matrices that are dense. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first user case in which dense sketching matrices are necessary. On the algorithmic side, we prove that there exists a distribution of dense sketching matrices with $m=ε^{-2}d\log^3(n/δ)$ such that solving the sketched regression problem gives the $\ell_\infty$ guarantee, with probability at least $1-δ$. Moreover, the matrix $SA$ can be computed in time $O(nd\log n)$. Our row count is nearly-optimal up to logarithmic factors, and significantly improves the result in [Price, Song and Woodruff, ICALP'17], in which a super-linear in $d$ rows, $m=Ω(ε^{-2}d^{1+γ})$ for $γ=Θ(\sqrt{\frac{\log\log n}{\log d}})$ is required. We also develop a novel analytical framework for $\ell_\infty$ guarantee regression that utilizes the Oblivious Coordinate-wise Embedding (OCE) property introduced in [Song and Yu, ICML'21]. Our analysis is arguably much simpler and more general than [Price, Song and Woodruff, ICALP'17], and it extends to dense sketches for tensor product of vectors. 给定矩阵 $A\in \mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ 和向量 $b\in \mathbb{R}^n$，我们考虑 $\ell_\infty$ 保证的回归问题：找到向量 $x'\in \mathbb{R}^d$ 使得 $ \|x'-x^*\|_\infty \leq \fracε{\sqrt{d}}\cdot \|Ax^*-b\|_2\cdot \|A^\dagger\|$ 其中 $x^*=\arg\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^d}\|Ax-b\|_2$。解决此类 $\ell_2$ 回归问题的一种流行方法是通过草图：选择一个结构化随机矩阵 $S\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times n}$ 以及 $m\ll n$ 和 $SA$ 可以快速计算，解决“草图”回归问题 $\arg\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^d} \|SAx-Sb\|_2$。在本文中，我们表明，为了获得 $\ell_2$ 回归的 $\ell_\infty$ 保证，必须使用稠密的草图矩阵。据我们所知，这是第一个需要密集草图矩阵的用户案例。在算法方面，我们证明存在 $m=ε^{-2}d\log^3(n/δ)$ 的密集草图矩阵分布，这样解决草图回归问题就可以得到 $\ell_\infty$ 保证，概率至少为 $1-δ$。此外，矩阵$SA$可以在$O(nd\log n)$时间内计算出来。我们的行数在对数因子上几乎是最佳的，并且显着改善了 [Price, Song and Woodruff, ICALP'17] 中的结果，其中需要 $d$ 行中的超线性，$m=Ω(ε^{-2}d^{1+γ})$ for $γ=θ(\sqrt{\frac{\log\log n}{\log d}})$。我们还为 $\ell_\infty$ 保证回归开发了一种新颖的分析框架，该框架利用了 [Song 和 Yu，ICML'21] 中引入的不经意坐标嵌入 (OCE) 属性。我们的分析可以说比 [Price，Song 和 Woodruff，ICALP'17] 更简单、更通用，并且它扩展到向量张量积的密集草图。 本文研究了在ℓ₂回归问题中实现ℓ∞保证的快速回归方法，证明了必须使用密集型随机投影矩阵，并提出了相应的算法框架。 Zhao Song,Mingquan Ye,Junze Yin,Lichen Zhang cs.DS,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Ziji Shi,Le Jiang,Ang Wang,Jie Zhang,Chencan Wu,Yong Li,Xiaokui Xiao,Wei Lin,Jialin Li
title: TAPAS: Fast and Automatic Derivation of Tensor Parallel Strategies for Large Neural Networks
title_zh: TAPAS：大型神经网络张量并行策略的快速自动推导
comment: Accepted by 54th International Conference on Parallel Processing (ICPP'25)
comments: Accepted by 54th International Conference on Parallel Processing (ICPP'25)
abstract: Tensor parallelism is an essential technique for distributed training of large neural networks. However, automatically determining an optimal tensor parallel strategy is challenging due to the gigantic search space, which grows exponentially with model size and tensor dimension. This prohibits the adoption of auto-parallel systems on larger models. We observe that neural networks usually contain repeated substructures, and build an automatic parallelism framework named TAPAS that eliminates redundant search efforts. TAPAS employs a divide-and-conquer approach that efficiently folds the search space by identifying those unique substructures. As a result, it runs at sub-linear complexity concerning the model size, making it a scalable solution for training large-scale networks. Our evaluations demonstrate that TAPAS outperforms the state-of-the-art automatic parallelism frameworks by up to $160\times$ in search speed on a wide range of models, and the performance of derived strategies is competitive or even better compared with the expert-engineered Megatron-LM library.
summary: Tensor parallelism is an essential technique for distributed training of large neural networks. However, automatically determining an optimal tensor parallel strategy is challenging due to the gigantic search space, which grows exponentially with model size and tensor dimension. This prohibits the adoption of auto-parallel systems on larger models. We observe that neural networks usually contain repeated substructures, and build an automatic parallelism framework named TAPAS that eliminates redundant search efforts. TAPAS employs a divide-and-conquer approach that efficiently folds the search space by identifying those unique substructures. As a result, it runs at sub-linear complexity concerning the model size, making it a scalable solution for training large-scale networks. Our evaluations demonstrate that TAPAS outperforms the state-of-the-art automatic parallelism frameworks by up to $160\times$ in search speed on a wide range of models, and the performance of derived strategies is competitive or even better compared with the expert-engineered Megatron-LM library.
abstract_zh: 张量并行是大型神经网络分布式训练的一项重要技术。然而，由于搜索空间巨大，自动确定最佳张量并行策略具有挑战性，搜索空间随着模型大小和张量维度呈指数增长。这阻碍了在较大模型上采用自动并行系统。我们观察到神经网络通常包含重复的子结构，并构建了一个名为 TAPAS 的自动并行框架，消除了冗余的搜索工作。 TAPAS 采用分而治之的方法，通过识别那些独特的子结构来有效地折叠搜索空间。因此，它以与模型大小相关的次线性复杂度运行，使其成为训练大规模网络的可扩展解决方案。我们的评估表明，TAPAS 在各种模型上的搜索速度比最先进的自动并行框架高出 160 倍，并且与专家设计的 Megatron-LM 库相比，派生策略的性能具有竞争力甚至更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAPAS框架，通过自动推导张量并行策略来加速大规模神经网络的分布式训练。
AI.motivation: 现有自动并行系统因搜索空间随模型规模指数级增长而难以处理大型模型，且冗余计算效率低下。
AI.method: 基于神经网络中重复子结构的观察，采用分治策略折叠搜索空间，实现子线性复杂度的并行策略生成。
AI.result: 在多种模型上搜索速度较现有最佳框架提升最高160倍，生成策略性能与专家设计的Megatron-LM库相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: TAPAS通过结构化搜索空间压缩实现了可扩展的大规模模型自动并行方案，显著优于现有方法。

title: Agility and Target Distribution in the Dynamic Stochastic Traveling Salesman Problem
title_zh: 动态随机旅行商问题中的敏捷性和目标分布
abstract: An important variant of the classic Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) is the Dynamic TSP, in which a system with dynamic constraints is tasked with visiting a set of n target locations (in any order) in the shortest amount of time. Such tasks arise naturally in many robotic motion planning problems, particularly in exploration, surveillance and reconnaissance, and classical TSP algorithms on graphs are typically inapplicable in this setting. An important question about such problems is: if the target points are random, what is the length of the tour (either in expectation or as a concentration bound) as n grows? This problem is the Dynamic Stochastic TSP (DSTSP), and has been studied both for specific important vehicle models and for general dynamic systems; however, in general only the order of growth is known. In this work, we explore the connection between the distribution from which the targets are drawn and the dynamics of the system, yielding a more precise lower bound on tour length as well as a matching upper bound for the case of symmetric (or driftless) systems. We then extend the symmetric dynamics results to the case when the points are selected by a (non-random) adversary whose goal is to maximize the length, thus showing worst-case bounds on the tour length.
summary: An important variant of the classic Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) is the Dynamic TSP, in which a system with dynamic constraints is tasked with visiting a set of n target locations (in any order) in the shortest amount of time. Such tasks arise naturally in many robotic motion planning problems, particularly in exploration, surveillance and reconnaissance, and classical TSP algorithms on graphs are typically inapplicable in this setting. An important question about such problems is: if the target points are random, what is the length of the tour (either in expectation or as a concentration bound) as n grows? This problem is the Dynamic Stochastic TSP (DSTSP), and has been studied both for specific important vehicle models and for general dynamic systems; however, in general only the order of growth is known. In this work, we explore the connection between the distribution from which the targets are drawn and the dynamics of the system, yielding a more precise lower bound on tour length as well as a matching upper bound for the case of symmetric (or driftless) systems. We then extend the symmetric dynamics results to the case when the points are selected by a (non-random) adversary whose goal is to maximize the length, thus showing worst-case bounds on the tour length.
abstract_zh: 经典旅行商问题 (TSP) 的一个重要变体是动态 TSP，其中具有动态约束的系统的任务是在最短的时间内访问一组 n 个目标位置（以任意顺序）。此类任务在许多机器人运动规划问题中自然出现，特别是在探索、监视和侦察中，而图上的经典 TSP 算法通常不适用于这种情况。关于此类问题的一个重要问题是：如果目标点是随机的，那么随着 n 的增长，旅行的长度（无论是期望的还是作为浓度界限）是多少？这个问题就是动态随机 TSP（DSTSP），并且已经针对特定的重要车辆模型和一般动态系统进行了研究；然而，一般来说，只知道增长的顺序。在这项工作中，我们探索了绘制目标的分布与系统动力学之间的联系，从而得出更精确的行程长度下限以及对称（或无漂移）系统情况下的匹配上限。然后，我们将对称动力学结果扩展到由（非随机）对手选择点的情况，其目标是最大化长度，从而显示旅行长度的最坏情况边界。

AI.tldr: 本文研究动态随机旅行商问题（DSTSP），分析目标分布与系统动态之间的关系，以确定随目标数量增长的路径长度下界和上界。
AI.motivation: 经典TSP算法难以应对动态约束下的机器人路径规划问题，而现有DSTSP研究仅了解路径长度的增长阶数，缺乏精确分析。
AI.method: 通过理论分析目标分布特性与系统动态的关联，推导对称系统的路径长度下界和上界，并扩展至对抗性目标选择场景。
AI.result: 为对称系统建立了精确的路径长度界，并证明了对抗性目标下的最坏情况路径长度界。
AI.conclusion: 目标分布与系统动态的关联分析为动态路径规划提供了理论依据，有助于优化机器人等动态系统的任务效率。

title: Bridging Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Reinforcement Learning: Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Proximal Policy Optimization (HJBPPO)
title_zh: 将物理信息神经网络与强化学习联系起来：Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman 近端策略优化 (HJBPPO)
abstract: This paper introduces the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Proximal Policy Optimization (HJBPPO) algorithm into reinforcement learning. The Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation is used in control theory to evaluate the optimality of the value function. Our work combines the HJB equation with reinforcement learning in continuous state and action spaces to improve the training of the value network. We treat the value network as a Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) to solve for the HJB equation by computing its derivatives with respect to its inputs exactly. The Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)-Clipped algorithm is improvised with this implementation as it uses a value network to compute the objective function for its policy network. The HJBPPO algorithm shows an improved performance compared to PPO on the MuJoCo environments.
summary: This paper introduces the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Proximal Policy Optimization (HJBPPO) algorithm into reinforcement learning. The Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation is used in control theory to evaluate the optimality of the value function. Our work combines the HJB equation with reinforcement learning in continuous state and action spaces to improve the training of the value network. We treat the value network as a Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) to solve for the HJB equation by computing its derivatives with respect to its inputs exactly. The Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)-Clipped algorithm is improvised with this implementation as it uses a value network to compute the objective function for its policy network. The HJBPPO algorithm shows an improved performance compared to PPO on the MuJoCo environments.
abstract_zh: 本文将 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman 近端策略优化（HJBPPO）算法引入强化学习中。 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) 方程在控制理论中用于评估价值函数的最优性。我们的工作将 HJB 方程与连续状态和动作空间中的强化学习相结合，以改进价值​​网络的训练。我们将价值网络视为物理信息神经网络 (PINN)，通过精确计算其相对于输入的导数来求解 HJB 方程。近端策略优化 (PPO)-Clipped 算法是通过此实现临时改进的，因为它使用价值网络来计算其策略网络的目标函数。与 MuJoCo 环境中的 PPO 相比，HJBPPO 算法显示出改进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合物理信息神经网络（PINN）与近端策略优化（PPO）的强化学习算法HJBPPO，通过引入哈密顿-雅可比-贝尔曼（HJB）方程改进连续状态和动作空间中的价值网络训练。
AI.motivation: 传统PPO算法在连续控制任务中存在价值网络训练效率低的问题，而HJB方程能精确评估价值函数的最优性，结合PINN可提升求解精度。
AI.method: 将价值网络设计为PINN以精确计算HJB方程的输入导数，并基于PPO-Clipped算法改进目标函数，实现HJB方程约束下的策略优化。
AI.result: HJBPPO在MuJoCo环境中相比PPO展现出更高的训练效率和任务完成性能。
AI.conclusion: HJBPPO通过物理方程约束与深度强化学习的结合，为连续控制问题提供了更优的求解框架。

authors_text: Mingqing Xiao,Qingyan Meng,Zongpeng Zhang,Yisen Wang,Zhouchen Lin
title: SPIDE: A Purely Spike-based Method for Training Feedback Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: SPIDE：一种纯粹基于尖峰的训练反馈尖峰神经网络的方法
abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) with event-based computation are promising brain-inspired models for energy-efficient applications on neuromorphic hardware. However, most supervised SNN training methods, such as conversion from artificial neural networks or direct training with surrogate gradients, require complex computation rather than spike-based operations of spiking neurons during training. In this paper, we study spike-based implicit differentiation on the equilibrium state (SPIDE) that extends the recently proposed training method, implicit differentiation on the equilibrium state (IDE), for supervised learning with purely spike-based computation, which demonstrates the potential for energy-efficient training of SNNs. Specifically, we introduce ternary spiking neuron couples and prove that implicit differentiation can be solved by spikes based on this design, so the whole training procedure, including both forward and backward passes, is made as event-driven spike computation, and weights are updated locally with two-stage average firing rates. Then we propose to modify the reset membrane potential to reduce the approximation error of spikes. With these key components, we can train SNNs with flexible structures in a small number of time steps and with firing sparsity during training, and the theoretical estimation of energy costs demonstrates the potential for high efficiency. Meanwhile, experiments show that even with these constraints, our trained models can still achieve competitive results on MNIST, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and CIFAR10-DVS. Our code is available at https://github.com/pkuxmq/SPIDE-FSNN.
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) with event-based computation are promising brain-inspired models for energy-efficient applications on neuromorphic hardware. However, most supervised SNN training methods, such as conversion from artificial neural networks or direct training with surrogate gradients, require complex computation rather than spike-based operations of spiking neurons during training. In this paper, we study spike-based implicit differentiation on the equilibrium state (SPIDE) that extends the recently proposed training method, implicit differentiation on the equilibrium state (IDE), for supervised learning with purely spike-based computation, which demonstrates the potential for energy-efficient training of SNNs. Specifically, we introduce ternary spiking neuron couples and prove that implicit differentiation can be solved by spikes based on this design, so the whole training procedure, including both forward and backward passes, is made as event-driven spike computation, and weights are updated locally with two-stage average firing rates. Then we propose to modify the reset membrane potential to reduce the approximation error of spikes. With these key components, we can train SNNs with flexible structures in a small number of time steps and with firing sparsity during training, and the theoretical estimation of energy costs demonstrates the potential for high efficiency. Meanwhile, experiments show that even with these constraints, our trained models can still achieve competitive results on MNIST, CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and CIFAR10-DVS. Our code is available at https://github.com/pkuxmq/SPIDE-FSNN.
abstract_zh: 具有基于事件计算的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是一种很有前景的大脑启发模型，可用于神经形态硬件上的节能应用。然而，大多数有监督的 SNN 训练方法，例如从人工神经网络转换或使用代理梯度直接训练，在训练过程中需要复杂的计算，而不是基于尖峰神经元的操作。在本文中，我们研究了基于尖峰的平衡状态隐式微分（SPIDE），它扩展了最近提出的训练方法，即平衡状态隐式微分（IDE），用于具有纯粹基于尖峰的计算的监督学习，这展示了 SNN 节能训练的潜力。具体来说，我们引入了三元尖峰神经元对，并证明隐式微分可以通过基于此设计的尖峰来解决，因此整个训练过程，包括前向和后向传递，都是事件驱动的尖峰计算，并且权重以两阶段平均放电率进行本地更新。然后我们建议修改重置膜电位以减少尖峰的近似误差。有了这些关键组件，我们可以在少量的时间步长内训练具有灵活结构的 SNN，并且在训练期间具有稀疏性，并且能量成本的理论估计展示了高效率的潜力。同时，实验表明，即使有这些限制，我们训练的模型仍然可以在 MNIST、CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 CIFAR10-DVS 上取得有竞争力的结果。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/pkuxmq/SPIDE-FSNN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种纯脉冲基的训练方法SPIDE，用于反馈型脉冲神经网络（SNN）的训练，以实现高效能的事件驱动计算。
AI.motivation: 现有监督训练SNN的方法依赖复杂计算而非脉冲操作，难以满足神经形态硬件的能效需求，需开发纯脉冲基的训练方法。
AI.method: 基于隐式微分平衡态（IDE）扩展SPIDE方法，引入三元脉冲神经元对并利用脉冲实现隐式微分，通过两阶段平均发放率进行局部权重更新，并调整膜电位重置以降低近似误差。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10/100及CIFAR10-DVS数据集上达到竞争力结果，且训练过程具有稀疏发放和少量时间步的高效特性。
AI.conclusion: SPIDE方法通过纯脉冲计算实现了灵活结构SNN的高效训练，理论能耗分析与实验结果均验证了其能效优势。

title: The Past, Current, and Future of Neonatal Intensive Care Units with Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 人工智能新生儿重症监护病房的过去、现在和未来
abstract: Machine learning and deep learning are two subsets of artificial intelligence that involve teaching computers to learn and make decisions from any sort of data. Most recent developments in artificial intelligence are coming from deep learning, which has proven revolutionary in almost all fields, from computer vision to health sciences. The effects of deep learning in medicine have changed the conventional ways of clinical application significantly. Although some sub-fields of medicine, such as pediatrics, have been relatively slow in receiving the critical benefits of deep learning, related research in pediatrics has started to accumulate to a significant level, too. Hence, in this paper, we review recently developed machine learning and deep learning-based solutions for neonatology applications. We systematically evaluate the roles of both classical machine learning and deep learning in neonatology applications, define the methodologies, including algorithmic developments, and describe the remaining challenges in the assessment of neonatal diseases by using PRISMA 2020 guidelines. To date, the primary areas of focus in neonatology regarding AI applications have included survival analysis, neuroimaging, analysis of vital parameters and biosignals, and retinopathy of prematurity diagnosis. We have categorically summarized 106 research articles from 1996 to 2022 and discussed their pros and cons, respectively. In this systematic review, we aimed to further enhance the comprehensiveness of the study. We also discuss possible directions for new AI models and the future of neonatology with the rising power of AI, suggesting roadmaps for the integration of AI into neonatal intensive care units.

In this systematic review, we aimed to further enhance the comprehensiveness of the study. We also discuss possible directions for new AI models and the future of neonatology with the rising power of AI, suggesting roadmaps for the integration of AI into neonatal intensive care units.
abstract_zh: 机器学习和深度学习是人工智能的两个子集，涉及教导计算机从任何类型的数据中学习并做出决策。人工智能的最新发展来自深度学习，事实证明深度学习在从计算机视觉到健康科学的几乎所有领域都具有革命性。深度学习在医学中的作用显着改变了临床应用的常规方式。尽管儿科等医学子领域在获得深度学习的关键益处方面相对较慢，但儿科的相关研究也已开始积累到显着水平。因此，在本文中，我们回顾了最近开发的用于新生儿学应用的机器学习和基于深度学习的解决方案。我们系统地评估了经典机器学习和深度学习在新生儿学应用中的作用，定义了方法，包括算法开发，并使用 PRISMA 2020 指南描述了新生儿疾病评估中剩余的挑战。迄今为止，新生儿学中人工智能应用的主要关注领域包括生存分析、神经影像、生命参数和生物信号分析以及早产儿视网膜病变诊断。我们分类总结了 1996 年至 2022 年的 106 篇研究文章，并分别讨论了它们的优缺点。在本次系统综述中，我们旨在进一步增强研究的全面性。我们还讨论了新的人工智能模型的可能方向，以及随着人工智能力量的不断增强，新生儿学的未来，并提出了将人工智能整合到新生儿重症监护病房的路线图。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能在新生儿重症监护中的应用，系统评估了机器学习和深度学习在新生儿疾病诊断中的作用，并探讨了未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 尽管人工智能在医学领域取得显著进展，但新生儿科的应用仍相对滞后，需系统梳理现有研究以推动AI在新生儿重症监护中的落地。
AI.method: 基于PRISMA 2020指南，对1996-2022年间106篇相关文献进行系统性回顾，分类分析经典机器学习与深度学习方法在新生儿疾病中的应用及挑战。
AI.result: 总结出AI在新生儿存活率预测、神经影像分析、生命体征监测及早产儿视网膜病变诊断等领域的应用现状，并指出数据质量、模型可解释性等核心挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需开发更适应新生儿数据的AI模型，建立标准化评估体系，并通过多学科协作推动AI技术在新生儿重症监护中的临床转化。

search_text: The Past, Current, and Future of Neonatal Intensive Care Units with Artificial Intelligence 人工智能新生儿重症监护病房的过去、现在和未来 Machine learning and deep learning are two subsets of artificial intelligence that involve teaching computers to learn and make decisions from any sort of data. Most recent developments in artificial intelligence are coming from deep learning, which has proven revolutionary in almost all fields, from computer vision to health sciences. The effects of deep learning in medicine have changed the conventional ways of clinical application significantly. Although some sub-fields of medicine, such as pediatrics, have been relatively slow in receiving the critical benefits of deep learning, related research in pediatrics has started to accumulate to a significant level, too. Hence, in this paper, we review recently developed machine learning and deep learning-based solutions for neonatology applications. We systematically evaluate the roles of both classical machine learning and deep learning in neonatology applications, define the methodologies, including algorithmic developments, and describe the remaining challenges in the assessment of neonatal diseases by using PRISMA 2020 guidelines. To date, the primary areas of focus in neonatology regarding AI applications have included survival analysis, neuroimaging, analysis of vital parameters and biosignals, and retinopathy of prematurity diagnosis. We have categorically summarized 106 research articles from 1996 to 2022 and discussed their pros and cons, respectively. In this systematic review, we aimed to further enhance the comprehensiveness of the study. We also discuss possible directions for new AI models and the future of neonatology with the rising power of AI, suggesting roadmaps for the integration of AI into neonatal intensive care units. 机器学习和深度学习是人工智能的两个子集，涉及教导计算机从任何类型的数据中学习并做出决策。人工智能的最新发展来自深度学习，事实证明深度学习在从计算机视觉到健康科学的几乎所有领域都具有革命性。深度学习在医学中的作用显着改变了临床应用的常规方式。尽管儿科等医学子领域在获得深度学习的关键益处方面相对较慢，但儿科的相关研究也已开始积累到显着水平。因此，在本文中，我们回顾了最近开发的用于新生儿学应用的机器学习和基于深度学习的解决方案。我们系统地评估了经典机器学习和深度学习在新生儿学应用中的作用，定义了方法，包括算法开发，并使用 PRISMA 2020 指南描述了新生儿疾病评估中剩余的挑战。迄今为止，新生儿学中人工智能应用的主要关注领域包括生存分析、神经影像、生命参数和生物信号分析以及早产儿视网膜病变诊断。我们分类总结了 1996 年至 2022 年的 106 篇研究文章，并分别讨论了它们的优缺点。在本次系统综述中，我们旨在进一步增强研究的全面性。我们还讨论了新的人工智能模型的可能方向，以及随着人工智能力量的不断增强，新生儿学的未来，并提出了将人工智能整合到新生儿重症监护病房的路线图。 本文综述了人工智能在新生儿重症监护中的应用，系统评估了机器学习和深度学习在新生儿疾病诊断中的作用，并探讨了未来发展方向。 Elif Keles,Ulas Bagci cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Human Fall Detection- Multimodality Approach
title_zh: 人体跌倒检测 - 多模态方法
abstract: Falls have become more frequent in recent years, which has been harmful for senior citizens.Therefore detecting falls have become important and several data sets and machine learning model have been introduced related to fall detection. In this project report, a human fall detection method is proposed using a multi modality approach. We used the UP-FALL detection data set which is collected by dozens of volunteers using different sensors and two cameras. We use wrist sensor with acclerometer data keeping labels to binary classification, namely fall and no fall from the data set.We used fusion of camera and sensor data to increase performance. The experimental results shows that using only wrist data as compared to multi sensor for binary classification did not impact the model prediction performance for fall detection.
summary: Falls have become more frequent in recent years, which has been harmful for senior citizens.Therefore detecting falls have become important and several data sets and machine learning model have been introduced related to fall detection. In this project report, a human fall detection method is proposed using a multi modality approach. We used the UP-FALL detection data set which is collected by dozens of volunteers using different sensors and two cameras. We use wrist sensor with acclerometer data keeping labels to binary classification, namely fall and no fall from the data set.We used fusion of camera and sensor data to increase performance. The experimental results shows that using only wrist data as compared to multi sensor for binary classification did not impact the model prediction performance for fall detection.
abstract_zh: 近年来，跌倒变得越来越频繁，这对老年人造成了伤害。因此，跌倒检测变得非常重要，并且引入了与跌倒检测相关的多个数据集和机器学习模型。在本项目报告中，提出了一种使用多模态方法的人体跌倒检测方法。我们使用了 UP-FALL 检测数据集，该数据集是由数十名志愿者使用不同的传感器和两个摄像头收集的。我们使用带有加速度计数据的手腕传感器，将标签保持为二元分类，即数据集中的跌倒和不跌倒。我们使用相机和传感器数据的融合来提高性能。实验结果表明，与多传感器数据进行二元分类相比，仅使用手腕数据不会影响跌倒检测的模型预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多模态方法的跌倒检测系统，结合腕部传感器与摄像头数据进行二分类任务。
AI.motivation: 老年人跌倒事件频发，现有检测方法存在性能不足，需探索更有效的多模态解决方案。
AI.method: 采用UP-FALL数据集，融合腕部加速度计传感器数据与摄像头视觉信息，进行跌倒/非跌倒二分类建模。
AI.result: 实验表明仅使用腕部传感器数据的模型性能与多模态融合方案无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 单一模态数据已能实现有效跌倒检测，但多模态方法仍具研究价值以提升鲁棒性。
