authors_text: Subash Neupane,Ivan A. Fernandez,Wilson Patterson,Sudip Mittal,Milan Parmar,Shahram Rahimi
title: TwinExplainer: Explaining Predictions of an Automotive Digital Twin
title_zh: TwinExplainer：解释汽车数字孪生的预测
abstract: Vehicles are complex Cyber Physical Systems (CPS) that operate in a variety of environments, and the likelihood of failure of one or more subsystems, such as the engine, transmission, brakes, and fuel, can result in unscheduled downtime and incur high maintenance or repair costs. In order to prevent these issues, it is crucial to continuously monitor the health of various subsystems and identify abnormal sensor channel behavior. Data-driven Digital Twin (DT) systems are capable of such a task. Current DT technologies utilize various Deep Learning (DL) techniques that are constrained by the lack of justification or explanation for their predictions. This inability of these opaque systems can influence decision-making and raises user trust concerns. This paper presents a solution to this issue, where the TwinExplainer system, with its three-layered architectural pipeline, explains the predictions of an automotive DT. Such a system can assist automotive stakeholders in understanding the global scale of the sensor channels and how they contribute towards generic DT predictions. TwinExplainer can also visualize explanations for both normal and abnormal local predictions computed by the DT.
summary: Vehicles are complex Cyber Physical Systems (CPS) that operate in a variety of environments, and the likelihood of failure of one or more subsystems, such as the engine, transmission, brakes, and fuel, can result in unscheduled downtime and incur high maintenance or repair costs. In order to prevent these issues, it is crucial to continuously monitor the health of various subsystems and identify abnormal sensor channel behavior. Data-driven Digital Twin (DT) systems are capable of such a task. Current DT technologies utilize various Deep Learning (DL) techniques that are constrained by the lack of justification or explanation for their predictions. This inability of these opaque systems can influence decision-making and raises user trust concerns. This paper presents a solution to this issue, where the TwinExplainer system, with its three-layered architectural pipeline, explains the predictions of an automotive DT. Such a system can assist automotive stakeholders in understanding the global scale of the sensor channels and how they contribute towards generic DT predictions. TwinExplainer can also visualize explanations for both normal and abnormal local predictions computed by the DT.
abstract_zh: 车辆是在各种环境中运行的复杂信息物理系统 (CPS)，一个或多个子系统（例如发动机、变速箱、制动器和燃油）发生故障的可能性可能会导致计划外停机并产生高昂的维护或维修成本。为了防止这些问题，持续监控各个子系统的运行状况并识别异常的传感器通道行为至关重要。数据驱动的数字孪生（DT）系统能够完成这样的任务。当前的 DT 技术利用各种深度学习 (DL) 技术，但这些技术因其预测缺乏合理性或解释而受到限制。这些不透明系统的无能可能会影响决策并引发用户信任问题。本文提出了这个问题的解决方案，其中 TwinExplainer 系统及其三层架构管道解释了汽车 DT 的预测。这样的系统可以帮助汽车利益相关者了解传感器通道的全球规模以及它们如何为通用 DT 预测做出贡献。 TwinExplainer 还可以对 DT 计算的正常和异常局部预测进行可视化解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TwinExplainer的三层架构系统，用于解释汽车数字孪生（DT）的预测结果，以提高预测透明度和用户信任度。
AI.motivation: 当前基于深度学习的数字孪生系统缺乏预测解释能力，导致用户信任度下降且影响决策可靠性，需解决此问题以提升系统实用性。
AI.method: 设计TwinExplainer三层架构管道，结合传感器数据特征分析与可视化技术，解释数字孪生系统的全局和局部预测结果。
AI.result: 系统能够有效解释正常与异常预测的传感器通道贡献，并通过可视化增强汽车利益相关者对预测结果的理解。
AI.conclusion: TwinExplainer通过提供可解释性，弥补了数字孪生系统的透明度缺陷，为汽车健康监测与维护决策提供了可靠支持。

ai_content_json.method: 设计TwinExplainer三层架构管道，结合传感器数据特征分析与可视化技术，解释数字孪生系统的全局和局部预测结果。
ai_content_json.result: 系统能够有效解释正常与异常预测的传感器通道贡献，并通过可视化增强汽车利益相关者对预测结果的理解。
ai_content_json.conclusion: TwinExplainer通过提供可解释性，弥补了数字孪生系统的透明度缺陷，为汽车健康监测与维护决策提供了可靠支持。

search_text: TwinExplainer: Explaining Predictions of an Automotive Digital Twin TwinExplainer：解释汽车数字孪生的预测 Vehicles are complex Cyber Physical Systems (CPS) that operate in a variety of environments, and the likelihood of failure of one or more subsystems, such as the engine, transmission, brakes, and fuel, can result in unscheduled downtime and incur high maintenance or repair costs. In order to prevent these issues, it is crucial to continuously monitor the health of various subsystems and identify abnormal sensor channel behavior. Data-driven Digital Twin (DT) systems are capable of such a task. Current DT technologies utilize various Deep Learning (DL) techniques that are constrained by the lack of justification or explanation for their predictions. This inability of these opaque systems can influence decision-making and raises user trust concerns. This paper presents a solution to this issue, where the TwinExplainer system, with its three-layered architectural pipeline, explains the predictions of an automotive DT. Such a system can assist automotive stakeholders in understanding the global scale of the sensor channels and how they contribute towards generic DT predictions. TwinExplainer can also visualize explanations for both normal and abnormal local predictions computed by the DT. 车辆是在各种环境中运行的复杂信息物理系统 (CPS)，一个或多个子系统（例如发动机、变速箱、制动器和燃油）发生故障的可能性可能会导致计划外停机并产生高昂的维护或维修成本。为了防止这些问题，持续监控各个子系统的运行状况并识别异常的传感器通道行为至关重要。数据驱动的数字孪生（DT）系统能够完成这样的任务。当前的 DT 技术利用各种深度学习 (DL) 技术，但这些技术因其预测缺乏合理性或解释而受到限制。这些不透明系统的无能可能会影响决策并引发用户信任问题。本文提出了这个问题的解决方案，其中 TwinExplainer 系统及其三层架构管道解释了汽车 DT 的预测。这样的系统可以帮助汽车利益相关者了解传感器通道的全球规模以及它们如何为通用 DT 预测做出贡献。 TwinExplainer 还可以对 DT 计算的正常和异常局部预测进行可视化解释。 本文提出了一种名为TwinExplainer的三层架构系统，用于解释汽车数字孪生（DT）的预测结果，以提高预测透明度和用户信任度。 Subash Neupane,Ivan A. Fernandez,Wilson Patterson,Sudip Mittal,Milan Parmar,Shahram Rahimi cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.NE

authors_text: Joshua P. Zitovsky,Daniel de Marchi,Rishabh Agarwal,Michael R. Kosorok
title: Revisiting Bellman Errors for Offline Model Selection
title_zh: 重新审视离线模型选择的贝尔曼错误
abstract: Offline model selection (OMS), that is, choosing the best policy from a set of many policies given only logged data, is crucial for applying offline RL in real-world settings. One idea that has been extensively explored is to select policies based on the mean squared Bellman error (MSBE) of the associated Q-functions. However, previous work has struggled to obtain adequate OMS performance with Bellman errors, leading many researchers to abandon the idea. To this end, we elucidate why previous work has seen pessimistic results with Bellman errors and identify conditions under which OMS algorithms based on Bellman errors will perform well. Moreover, we develop a new estimator of the MSBE that is more accurate than prior methods. Our estimator obtains impressive OMS performance on diverse discrete control tasks, including Atari games.
summary: Offline model selection (OMS), that is, choosing the best policy from a set of many policies given only logged data, is crucial for applying offline RL in real-world settings. One idea that has been extensively explored is to select policies based on the mean squared Bellman error (MSBE) of the associated Q-functions. However, previous work has struggled to obtain adequate OMS performance with Bellman errors, leading many researchers to abandon the idea. To this end, we elucidate why previous work has seen pessimistic results with Bellman errors and identify conditions under which OMS algorithms based on Bellman errors will perform well. Moreover, we develop a new estimator of the MSBE that is more accurate than prior methods. Our estimator obtains impressive OMS performance on diverse discrete control tasks, including Atari games.
abstract_zh: 离线模型选择 (OMS)，即仅根据记录的数据从一组许多策略中选择最佳策略，对于在现实环境中应用离线 RL 至关重要。已被广泛探索的一种想法是根据相关 Q 函数的均方贝尔曼误差 (MSBE) 选择策略。然而，之前的工作一直难以在贝尔曼误差的情况下获得足够的 OMS 性能，导致许多研究人员放弃了这个想法。为此，我们阐明了为什么之前的工作会看到贝尔曼误差带来的悲观结果，并确定基于贝尔曼误差的 OMS 算法表现良好的条件。此外，我们开发了一种新的 MSBE 估计器，它比以前的方法更准确。我们的估算器在各种离散控制任务（包括 Atari 游戏）上获得了令人印象深刻的 OMS 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视Bellman误差在离线模型选择中的应用，提出改进方法以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管均方Bellman误差（MSBE）被广泛用于离线模型选择，但先前方法效果不佳，导致研究者放弃该方向。
AI.method: 分析Bellman误差效果不佳的原因，确定其适用条件，并设计更精确的MSBE估计器。
AI.result: 新估计器在多个离散控制任务（如Atari游戏）中显著提升离线模型选择性能。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的Bellman误差方法可有效用于离线模型选择，为未来研究提供理论与实践指导。

authors_text: Ilya Trofimov,Daniil Cherniavskii,Eduard Tulchinskii,Nikita Balabin,Evgeny Burnaev,Serguei Barannikov
title: Learning Topology-Preserving Data Representations
title_zh: 学习拓扑保留数据表示
comment: ef:11th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2023)
comments: ef:11th International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2023)
abstract: We propose a method for learning topology-preserving data representations (dimensionality reduction). The method aims to provide topological similarity between the data manifold and its latent representation via enforcing the similarity in topological features (clusters, loops, 2D voids, etc.) and their localization. The core of the method is the minimization of the Representation Topology Divergence (RTD) between original high-dimensional data and low-dimensional representation in latent space. RTD minimization provides closeness in topological features with strong theoretical guarantees. We develop a scheme for RTD differentiation and apply it as a loss term for the autoencoder. The proposed method "RTD-AE" better preserves the global structure and topology of the data manifold than state-of-the-art competitors as measured by linear correlation, triplet distance ranking accuracy, and Wasserstein distance between persistence barcodes.
summary: We propose a method for learning topology-preserving data representations (dimensionality reduction). The method aims to provide topological similarity between the data manifold and its latent representation via enforcing the similarity in topological features (clusters, loops, 2D voids, etc.) and their localization. The core of the method is the minimization of the Representation Topology Divergence (RTD) between original high-dimensional data and low-dimensional representation in latent space. RTD minimization provides closeness in topological features with strong theoretical guarantees. We develop a scheme for RTD differentiation and apply it as a loss term for the autoencoder. The proposed method "RTD-AE" better preserves the global structure and topology of the data manifold than state-of-the-art competitors as measured by linear correlation, triplet distance ranking accuracy, and Wasserstein distance between persistence barcodes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种学习拓扑保留数据表示（降维）的方法。该方法旨在通过加强拓扑特征（簇、环、二维空洞等）及其定位的相似性来提供数据流形及其潜在表示之间的拓扑相似性。该方法的核心是最小化原始高维数据与潜在空间中低维表示之间的表示拓扑散度（RTD）。 RTD 最小化为拓扑特征的接近性提供了强有力的理论保证。我们开发了一种 RTD 微分方案，并将其用作自动编码器的损失项。通过线性相关性、三元组距离排序精度和持久性条形码之间的 Wasserstein 距离来衡量，所提出的方法“RTD-AE”比最先进的竞争对手更好地保留了数据流形的全局结构和拓扑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过最小化表示拓扑分歧（RTD）的自编码器方法（RTD-AE），用于学习保持数据流形拓扑结构的低维表示。
AI.motivation: 现有降维方法难以有效保持数据的全局拓扑特征（如聚类、环状结构等），需开发具有强理论保证的拓扑保持方法。
AI.method: 通过构建RTD度量数据流形与潜在空间的拓扑差异，设计其微分方案并作为自编码器损失项，实现拓扑特征相似性约束。
AI.result: RTD-AE在保持全局结构和拓扑指标（线性相关性、三元组距离排名、Wasserstein距离）上优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: RTD-AE通过理论保证的拓扑分歧最小化，能有效保持数据流形的全局拓扑结构，为拓扑保持表示学习提供新思路。

title: Durable Algorithms for Writable LL/SC and CAS with Dynamic Joining
title_zh: 具有动态连接的可写 LL/SC 和 CAS 的耐用算法
comment: 36 pages: 15 page main body + References + Appendix
comments: 36 pages: 15 page main body + References + Appendix
abstract: We present durable implementations for two well known universal primitives -- CAS (compare-and-swap), and its ABA-free counter-part LLSC (load-linked, store-conditional). All our implementations are: writable, meaning they support a Write() operation; have constant time complexity per operation; allow for dynamic joining, meaning newly created processes (a.k.a. threads) of arbitrary names can join a protocol and access our implementations; and have adaptive space complexities, meaning the space use scales in the number of processes $n$ that actually use the objects, as opposed to previous protocols which are designed for a maximum number of processes $N$. Our durable Writable-CAS implementation, DuraCAS, requires $O(m + n)$ space to support $m$ objects that get accessed by $n$ processes, improving on the state-of-the-art $O(m + N^2)$. By definition, LLSC objects must store "contexts" in addition to object values. Our Writable-LLSC implementation, DuraLL, requires $O(m + n + C)$ space, where $C$ is the number of "contexts" stored across all the objects. While LLSC has an advantage over CAS due to being ABA-free, the object definition seems to require additional space usage. To address this trade-off, we define an External Context (EC) variant of LLSC. Our EC Writable-LLSC implementation is ABA-free and has a space complexity of just $O(m + n)$. To our knowledge, we are the first to present durable CAS algorithms that allow for dynamic joining, and our algorithms are the first to exhibit adaptive space complexities. To our knowledge, we are the first to implement any type of durable LLSC objects.

Our durable Writable-CAS implementation, DuraCAS, requires $O(m + n)$ space to support $m$ objects that get accessed by $n$ processes, improving on the state-of-the-art $O(m + N^2)$. By definition, LLSC objects must store "contexts" in addition to object values. Our Writable-LLSC implementation, DuraLL, requires $O(m + n + C)$ space, where $C$ is the number of "contexts" stored across all the objects. While LLSC has an advantage over CAS due to being ABA-free, the object definition seems to require additional space usage. To address this trade-off, we define an External Context (EC) variant of LLSC. Our EC Writable-LLSC implementation is ABA-free and has a space complexity of just $O(m + n)$. To our knowledge, we are the first to present durable CAS algorithms that allow for dynamic joining, and our algorithms are the first to exhibit adaptive space complexities. To our knowledge, we are the first to implement any type of durable LLSC objects.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了两个众所周知的通用原语的持久实现——CAS（比较和交换）及其无 ABA 的对应部分 LLSC（加载链接、条件存储）​​。我们所有的实现都是： 可写，这意味着它们支持 Write() 操作；每个操作的时间复杂度恒定；允许动态加入，这意味着新创建的任意名称的进程（也称为线程）可以加入协议并访问我们的实现；并且具有自适应空间复杂性，这意味着空间使用按实际使用对象的进程 $n$ 的数量进行缩放，这与之前为最大进程数 $N$ 设计的协议不同。我们的持久可写 CAS 实现 DuraCAS 需要 $O(m + n)$ 空间来支持由 $n$ 进程访问的 $m$ 个对象，从而改进了最先进的 $O(m + N^2)$。根据定义，LLSC 对象除了对象值之外还必须存储“上下文”。我们的可写 LLSC 实现 DuraLL 需要 $O(m + n + C)$ 空间，其中 $C$ 是跨所有对象存储的“上下文”数量。虽然 LLSC 由于不依赖 ABA 而比 CAS 有优势，但对象定义似乎需要额外的空间使用。为了解决这种权衡问题，我们定义了 LLSC 的外部上下文 (EC) 变体。我们的 EC Writable-LLSC 实现不依赖 ABA，空间复杂度仅为 $O(m + n)$。据我们所知，我们是第一个提出允许动态连接的耐用 CAS 算法的人，并且我们的算法是第一个展示自适应空间复杂性的算法。据我们所知，我们是第一个实现任何类型的持久 LLSC 对象的人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出支持动态加入和可写的持久化CAS和LLSC算法，优化空间复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有CAS和LLSC实现无法动态扩展或空间复杂度过高，依赖预设进程数导致效率低下。
AI.method: 设计DuraCAS和DuraLL算法，引入外部上下文机制，实现常数时间操作与自适应空间复杂度O(m+n)。
AI.result: 首次实现支持动态加入的持久化CAS/LLSC，空间复杂度从O(m+N²)降至O(m+n)，并解决LLSC的ABA问题。
AI.conclusion: 提出首个自适应空间复杂度的持久化原子操作算法，显著提升动态环境下的资源利用效率。

search_text: Durable Algorithms for Writable LL/SC and CAS with Dynamic Joining 具有动态连接的可写 LL/SC 和 CAS 的耐用算法 We present durable implementations for two well known universal primitives -- CAS (compare-and-swap), and its ABA-free counter-part LLSC (load-linked, store-conditional). All our implementations are: writable, meaning they support a Write() operation; have constant time complexity per operation; allow for dynamic joining, meaning newly created processes (a.k.a. threads) of arbitrary names can join a protocol and access our implementations; and have adaptive space complexities, meaning the space use scales in the number of processes $n$ that actually use the objects, as opposed to previous protocols which are designed for a maximum number of processes $N$. Our durable Writable-CAS implementation, DuraCAS, requires $O(m + n)$ space to support $m$ objects that get accessed by $n$ processes, improving on the state-of-the-art $O(m + N^2)$. By definition, LLSC objects must store "contexts" in addition to object values. Our Writable-LLSC implementation, DuraLL, requires $O(m + n + C)$ space, where $C$ is the number of "contexts" stored across all the objects. While LLSC has an advantage over CAS due to being ABA-free, the object definition seems to require additional space usage. To address this trade-off, we define an External Context (EC) variant of LLSC. Our EC Writable-LLSC implementation is ABA-free and has a space complexity of just $O(m + n)$. To our knowledge, we are the first to present durable CAS algorithms that allow for dynamic joining, and our algorithms are the first to exhibit adaptive space complexities. To our knowledge, we are the first to implement any type of durable LLSC objects. 我们提出了两个众所周知的通用原语的持久实现——CAS（比较和交换）及其无 ABA 的对应部分 LLSC（加载链接、条件存储）​​。我们所有的实现都是： 可写，这意味着它们支持 Write() 操作；每个操作的时间复杂度恒定；允许动态加入，这意味着新创建的任意名称的进程（也称为线程）可以加入协议并访问我们的实现；并且具有自适应空间复杂性，这意味着空间使用按实际使用对象的进程 $n$ 的数量进行缩放，这与之前为最大进程数 $N$ 设计的协议不同。我们的持久可写 CAS 实现 DuraCAS 需要 $O(m + n)$ 空间来支持由 $n$ 进程访问的 $m$ 个对象，从而改进了最先进的 $O(m + N^2)$。根据定义，LLSC 对象除了对象值之外还必须存储“上下文”。我们的可写 LLSC 实现 DuraLL 需要 $O(m + n + C)$ 空间，其中 $C$ 是跨所有对象存储的“上下文”数量。虽然 LLSC 由于不依赖 ABA 而比 CAS 有优势，但对象定义似乎需要额外的空间使用。为了解决这种权衡问题，我们定义了 LLSC 的外部上下文 (EC) 变体。我们的 EC Writable-LLSC 实现不依赖 ABA，空间复杂度仅为 $O(m + n)$。据我们所知，我们是第一个提出允许动态连接的耐用 CAS 算法的人，并且我们的算法是第一个展示自适应空间复杂性的算法。据我们所知，我们是第一个实现任何类型的持久 LLSC 对象的人。 本文提出支持动态加入和可写的持久化CAS和LLSC算法，优化空间复杂度。 Prasad Jayanti,Siddhartha Jayanti,Sucharita Jayanti cs.DC,cs.DS

authors_text: Samuel Triest,Mateo Guaman Castro,Parv Maheshwari,Matthew Sivaprakasam,Wenshan Wang,Sebastian Scherer
title: Learning Risk-Aware Costmaps via Inverse Reinforcement Learning for Off-Road Navigation
title_zh: 通过越野导航的逆强化学习学习风险意识成本图
abstract: The process of designing costmaps for off-road driving tasks is often a challenging and engineering-intensive task. Recent work in costmap design for off-road driving focuses on training deep neural networks to predict costmaps from sensory observations using corpora of expert driving data. However, such approaches are generally subject to over-confident mispredictions and are rarely evaluated in-the-loop on physical hardware. We present an inverse reinforcement learning-based method of efficiently training deep cost functions that are uncertainty-aware. We do so by leveraging recent advances in highly parallel model-predictive control and robotic risk estimation. In addition to demonstrating improvement at reproducing expert trajectories, we also evaluate the efficacy of these methods in challenging off-road navigation scenarios. We observe that our method significantly outperforms a geometric baseline, resulting in 44% improvement in expert path reconstruction and 57% fewer interventions in practice. We also observe that varying the risk tolerance of the vehicle results in qualitatively different navigation behaviors, especially with respect to higher-risk scenarios such as slopes and tall grass.
summary: The process of designing costmaps for off-road driving tasks is often a challenging and engineering-intensive task. Recent work in costmap design for off-road driving focuses on training deep neural networks to predict costmaps from sensory observations using corpora of expert driving data. However, such approaches are generally subject to over-confident mispredictions and are rarely evaluated in-the-loop on physical hardware. We present an inverse reinforcement learning-based method of efficiently training deep cost functions that are uncertainty-aware. We do so by leveraging recent advances in highly parallel model-predictive control and robotic risk estimation. In addition to demonstrating improvement at reproducing expert trajectories, we also evaluate the efficacy of these methods in challenging off-road navigation scenarios. We observe that our method significantly outperforms a geometric baseline, resulting in 44% improvement in expert path reconstruction and 57% fewer interventions in practice. We also observe that varying the risk tolerance of the vehicle results in qualitatively different navigation behaviors, especially with respect to higher-risk scenarios such as slopes and tall grass.
abstract_zh: 设计越野驾驶任务成本图的过程通常是一项具有挑战性的工程密集型任务。越野驾驶成本图设计的最新工作重点是训练深度神经网络，以使用专家驾驶数据语料库根据感官观察来预测成本图。然而，此类方法通常会受到过于自信的错误预测的影响，并且很少在物理硬件上进行循环评估。我们提出了一种基于逆强化学习的方法，可以有效地训练不确定性感知的深度成本函数。我们通过利用高度并行模型预测控制和机器人风险估计方面的最新进展来实现这一目标。除了展示再现专家轨迹方面的改进之外，我们还评估了这些方法在具有挑战性的越野导航场景中的有效性。我们观察到，我们的方法显着优于几何基线，从而使专家路径重建提高了 44%，实践中干预减少了 57%。我们还观察到，改变车辆的风险承受能力会导致导航行为发生质的不同，特别是在斜坡和高草等高风险场景下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于逆强化学习的方法，用于生成风险感知的成本图以提升越野导航的路径规划能力。
AI.motivation: 现有成本图设计方法在越野场景中存在过度自信预测问题，且缺乏实际硬件验证，需更可靠的风险感知机制保障导航安全。
AI.method: 结合逆强化学习与并行模型预测控制，通过机器人风险估计技术训练具有不确定性感知能力的深度成本函数。
AI.result: 相较几何基线方法，专家路径重建提升44%，实际干预减少57%，且风险容忍度调整显著影响高风险场景（如斜坡、高草）的导航行为。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了越野导航的风险处理能力，通过动态调整风险参数可实现更适应复杂地形的导航策略。

title: Sublinear Approximation Schemes for Scheduling Precedence Graphs of Bounded Depth
title_zh: 有界深度优先图调度的次线性近似方案
abstract: We study the classical scheduling problem on parallel machines %with precedence constraints where the precedence graph has the bounded depth $h$. Our goal is to minimize the maximum completion time. We focus on developing approximation algorithms that use only sublinear space or sublinear time. We develop the first one-pass streaming approximation schemes using sublinear space when all jobs' processing times differ no more than a constant factor $c$ and the number of machines $m$ is at most $\tfrac {2n ε}{3 h c }$. This is so far the best approximation we can have in terms of $m$, since no polynomial time approximation better than $\tfrac{4}{3}$ exists when $m = \tfrac{n}{3}$ unless P=NP. %the problem cannot be approximated within a factor of $\tfrac{4}{3}$ when $m = \tfrac{n}{3}$ even if all jobs have equal processing time. The algorithms are then extended to the more general problem where the largest $αn$ jobs have no more than $c$ factor difference. % for some constant $0 < α\le 1$. We also develop the first sublinear time algorithms for both problems. For the more general problem, when $ m \le \tfrac { αn ε}{20 c^2 \cdot h } $, our algorithm is a randomized $(1+ε)$-approximation scheme that runs in sublinear time. This work not only provides an algorithmic solution to the studied problem under big data % and cloud computing environment, but also gives a methodological framework for designing sublinear approximation algorithms for other scheduling problems.
summary: We study the classical scheduling problem on parallel machines %with precedence constraints where the precedence graph has the bounded depth $h$. Our goal is to minimize the maximum completion time. We focus on developing approximation algorithms that use only sublinear space or sublinear time. We develop the first one-pass streaming approximation schemes using sublinear space when all jobs' processing times differ no more than a constant factor $c$ and the number of machines $m$ is at most $\tfrac {2n ε}{3 h c }$. This is so far the best approximation we can have in terms of $m$, since no polynomial time approximation better than $\tfrac{4}{3}$ exists when $m = \tfrac{n}{3}$ unless P=NP. %the problem cannot be approximated within a factor of $\tfrac{4}{3}$ when $m = \tfrac{n}{3}$ even if all jobs have equal processing time. The algorithms are then extended to the more general problem where the largest $αn$ jobs have no more than $c$ factor difference. % for some constant $0 < α\le 1$. We also develop the first sublinear time algorithms for both problems. For the more general problem, when $ m \le \tfrac { αn ε}{20 c^2 \cdot h } $, our algorithm is a randomized $(1+ε)$-approximation scheme that runs in sublinear time. This work not only provides an algorithmic solution to the studied problem under big data % and cloud computing environment, but also gives a methodological framework for designing sublinear approximation algorithms for other scheduling problems.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有优先级约束的并行机上的经典调度问题，其中优先级图具有有界深度 $h$。我们的目标是最小化最大完成时间。我们专注于开发仅使用次线性空间或次线性时间的近似算法。当所有作业的处理时间差异不超过常数因子 $c$ 并且机器数量 $m$ 最多为 $\tfrac {2n ε}{3 h c }$ 时，我们使用次线性空间开发第一个单遍流近似方案。这是迄今为止我们可以用 $m$ 得到的最佳近似值，因为当 $m = \tfrac{n}{3}$ 时，不存在比 $\tfrac{4}{3}$ 更好的多项式时间近似值，除非 P=NP。 %当 $m = \tfrac{n}{3}$ 时，即使所有作业具有相同的处理时间，该问题也无法在 $\tfrac{4}{3}$ 的范围内近似计算。然后将算法扩展到更普遍的问题，其中最大的 $αn$ 作业的因子差异不超过 $c$。 % 对于某个常数 $0 < α\le 1$。我们还针对这两个问题开发了第一个亚线性时间算法。对于更一般的问题，当 $ m \le \tfrac { αn ε}{20 c^2 \cdot h } $ 时，我们的算法是在亚线性时间内运行的随机 $(1+ε)$ 近似方案。这项工作不仅为所研究的问题在大数据和云计算环境下提供了算法解决方案，而且为设计其他调度问题的次线性逼近算法提供了方法框架。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在并行机器上调度具有有界深度的优先级图问题，目标是开发使用亚线性空间或时间的近似算法。
AI.motivation: 传统调度算法在处理大规模数据或云计算环境时面临时间和空间限制，需设计更高效的亚线性近似方案。
AI.method: 提出单次流式近似方案及亚线性时间算法，针对作业处理时间差异不超过常数因子且机器数量受限的情况进行扩展。
AI.result: 首次实现亚线性空间流式算法及亚线性时间随机近似方案，适用于更广泛的问题场景并提供性能保证。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为大数据环境下的调度问题提供了算法解决方案，并为其他调度问题的亚线性近似算法设计奠定了方法论框架。

search_text: Sublinear Approximation Schemes for Scheduling Precedence Graphs of Bounded Depth 有界深度优先图调度的次线性近似方案 We study the classical scheduling problem on parallel machines %with precedence constraints where the precedence graph has the bounded depth $h$. Our goal is to minimize the maximum completion time. We focus on developing approximation algorithms that use only sublinear space or sublinear time. We develop the first one-pass streaming approximation schemes using sublinear space when all jobs' processing times differ no more than a constant factor $c$ and the number of machines $m$ is at most $\tfrac {2n ε}{3 h c }$. This is so far the best approximation we can have in terms of $m$, since no polynomial time approximation better than $\tfrac{4}{3}$ exists when $m = \tfrac{n}{3}$ unless P=NP. %the problem cannot be approximated within a factor of $\tfrac{4}{3}$ when $m = \tfrac{n}{3}$ even if all jobs have equal processing time. The algorithms are then extended to the more general problem where the largest $αn$ jobs have no more than $c$ factor difference. % for some constant $0 < α\le 1$. We also develop the first sublinear time algorithms for both problems. For the more general problem, when $ m \le \tfrac { αn ε}{20 c^2 \cdot h } $, our algorithm is a randomized $(1+ε)$-approximation scheme that runs in sublinear time. This work not only provides an algorithmic solution to the studied problem under big data % and cloud computing environment, but also gives a methodological framework for designing sublinear approximation algorithms for other scheduling problems. 我们研究具有优先级约束的并行机上的经典调度问题，其中优先级图具有有界深度 $h$。我们的目标是最小化最大完成时间。我们专注于开发仅使用次线性空间或次线性时间的近似算法。当所有作业的处理时间差异不超过常数因子 $c$ 并且机器数量 $m$ 最多为 $\tfrac {2n ε}{3 h c }$ 时，我们使用次线性空间开发第一个单遍流近似方案。这是迄今为止我们可以用 $m$ 得到的最佳近似值，因为当 $m = \tfrac{n}{3}$ 时，不存在比 $\tfrac{4}{3}$ 更好的多项式时间近似值，除非 P=NP。 %当 $m = \tfrac{n}{3}$ 时，即使所有作业具有相同的处理时间，该问题也无法在 $\tfrac{4}{3}$ 的范围内近似计算。然后将算法扩展到更普遍的问题，其中最大的 $αn$ 作业的因子差异不超过 $c$。 % 对于某个常数 $0 < α\le 1$。我们还针对这两个问题开发了第一个亚线性时间算法。对于更一般的问题，当 $ m \le \tfrac { αn ε}{20 c^2 \cdot h } $ 时，我们的算法是在亚线性时间内运行的随机 $(1+ε)$ 近似方案。这项工作不仅为所研究的问题在大数据和云计算环境下提供了算法解决方案，而且为设计其他调度问题的次线性逼近算法提供了方法框架。 本文研究在并行机器上调度具有有界深度的优先级图问题，目标是开发使用亚线性空间或时间的近似算法。 Bin Fu,Yumei Huo,Hairong Zhao cs.DS

title: Design and Implementation of A Soccer Ball Detection System with Multiple Cameras
title_zh: 多摄像头足球检测系统的设计与实现
abstract: The detection of small and medium-sized objects in three dimensions has always been a frontier exploration problem. This technology has a very wide application in sports analysis, games, virtual reality, human animation and other fields. The traditional three-dimensional small target detection technology has the disadvantages of high cost, low precision and inconvenience, so it is difficult to apply in practice. With the development of machine learning and deep learning, the technology of computer vision algorithms is becoming more mature. Creating an immersive media experience is considered to be a very important research work in sports. The main work is to explore and solve the problem of football detection under the multiple cameras, aiming at the research and implementation of the live broadcast system of football matches. Using multi cameras detects a target ball and determines its position in three dimension with the occlusion, motion, low illumination of the target object. This paper designed and implemented football detection system under multiple cameras for the detection and capture of targets in real-time matches. The main work mainly consists of three parts, football detector, single camera detection, and multi-cameras detection. The system used bundle adjustment to obtain the three-dimensional position of the target, and the GPU to accelerates data pre-processing and achieve accurate real-time capture of the target. By testing the system, it shows that the system can accurately detect and capture the moving targets in 3D. In addition, the solution in this paper is reusable for large-scale competitions, like basketball and soccer. The system framework can be well transplanted into other similar engineering project systems. It has been put into the market.

In addition, the solution in this paper is reusable for large-scale competitions, like basketball and soccer. The system framework can be well transplanted into other similar engineering project systems. It has been put into the market.
abstract_zh: 三维中小型物体的检测一直是一个前沿探索问题。该技术在运动分析、游戏、虚拟现实、人体动画等领域有着非常广泛的应用。传统的三维小目标检测技术存在成本高、精度低、不便等缺点，难以在实际中应用。随着机器学习和深度学习的发展，计算机视觉算法技术日趋成熟。创建沉浸式媒体体验被认为是体育领域一项非常重要的研究工作。主要工作是探索并解决多摄像机下的足球检测问题，旨在足球比赛直播系统的研究与实现。利用多摄像机检测目标球，并根据目标物体的遮挡、运动、低照度确定其三维位置。本文设计并实现了多摄像机下的足球检测系统，用于实时比赛中目标的检测和捕捉。主要工作主要由足球检测器、单摄像头检测、多摄像头检测三部分组成。系统通过束平差获得目标的三维位置，并利用GPU加速数据预处理，实现对目标的精确实时捕捉。通过对系统进行测试，表明系统能够准确地检测并捕捉3D运动目标。此外，本文的解决方案可重复用于篮球和足球等大型比赛。该系统框架可以很好地移植到其他类似的工程项目系统中。现已投入市场。

AI.tldr: 设计并实现一个多摄像头足球检测系统，用于实时捕捉比赛中的足球位置。
AI.motivation: 传统三维小目标检测技术存在成本高、精度低、实用性差等问题，需借助机器学习和深度学习提升体育赛事直播中的实时检测能力。
AI.method: 采用多摄像头协同检测、束调整算法计算三维位置，并利用GPU加速预处理以实现实时精准捕捉。
AI.result: 系统可准确检测三维运动目标，适用于篮球、足球等大型赛事，且框架可移植至其他工程系统。
AI.conclusion: 该方案有效解决了多摄像头下的足球检测问题，具备市场应用价值和工程复用潜力。

title: Chance-Constrained Trajectory Optimization for High-DOF Robots in Uncertain Environments
title_zh: 不确定环境中高自由度机器人的机会约束轨迹优化
abstract: Many practical applications of robotics require systems that can operate safely despite uncertainty. In the context of motion planning, two types of uncertainty are particularly important when planning safe robot trajectories. The first is environmental uncertainty -- uncertainty in the locations of nearby obstacles, stemming from sensor noise or (in the case of obstacles' future locations) prediction error. The second class of uncertainty is uncertainty in the robots own state, typically caused by tracking or estimation error. To achieve high levels of safety, it is necessary for robots to consider both of these sources of uncertainty. In this paper, we propose a risk-bounded trajectory optimization algorithm, known as Sequential Convex Optimization with Risk Optimization (SCORA), to solve chance-constrained motion planning problems despite both environmental uncertainty and tracking error. Through experiments in simulation, we demonstrate that SCORA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art risk-aware motion planners both in planning time and in the safety of the resulting trajectories.
summary: Many practical applications of robotics require systems that can operate safely despite uncertainty. In the context of motion planning, two types of uncertainty are particularly important when planning safe robot trajectories. The first is environmental uncertainty -- uncertainty in the locations of nearby obstacles, stemming from sensor noise or (in the case of obstacles' future locations) prediction error. The second class of uncertainty is uncertainty in the robots own state, typically caused by tracking or estimation error. To achieve high levels of safety, it is necessary for robots to consider both of these sources of uncertainty. In this paper, we propose a risk-bounded trajectory optimization algorithm, known as Sequential Convex Optimization with Risk Optimization (SCORA), to solve chance-constrained motion planning problems despite both environmental uncertainty and tracking error. Through experiments in simulation, we demonstrate that SCORA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art risk-aware motion planners both in planning time and in the safety of the resulting trajectories.
abstract_zh: 机器人技术的许多实际应用都需要系统能够在不确定的情况下安全运行。在运动规划的背景下，在规划安全的机器人轨迹时，有两种类型的不确定性特别重要。第一个是环境不确定性——附近障碍物位置的不确定性，源于传感器噪声或（在障碍物未来位置的情况下）预测误差。第二类不确定性是机器人自身状态的不确定性，通常是由跟踪或估计误差引起的。为了实现高水平的安全性，机器人有必要考虑这两个不确定性来源。在本文中，我们提出了一种风险有界轨迹优化算法，称为带有风险优化的顺序凸优化（SCORA），用于解决机会约束的运动规划问题，尽管存在环境不确定性和跟踪误差。通过模拟实验，我们证明 SCORA 在规划时间和最终轨迹的安全性方面都显着优于最先进的风险感知运动规划器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SCORA的轨迹优化算法，用于在存在环境不确定性和机器人自身状态不确定性的高自由度机器人运动规划中实现安全轨迹生成。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中机器人需在不确定环境中安全运行，但现有方法难以同时处理环境障碍物位置不确定性和机器人自身跟踪误差带来的双重风险。
AI.method: 开发了基于序列凸优化与风险优化的SCORA算法，通过机会约束规划框架同时考虑环境预测误差和跟踪误差的影响。
AI.result: 仿真实验表明，SCORA在规划时间和轨迹安全性方面均优于现有最先进的风险感知运动规划器。
AI.conclusion: SCORA算法有效解决了高自由度机器人在双重不确定性下的安全轨迹规划问题，为实际应用提供了更可靠的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SCORA的轨迹优化算法，用于在存在环境不确定性和机器人自身状态不确定性的高自由度机器人运动规划中实现安全轨迹生成。
motivation: 实际应用中机器人需在不确定环境中安全运行，但现有方法难以同时处理环境障碍物位置不确定性和机器人自身跟踪误差带来的双重风险。
method: 开发了基于序列凸优化与风险优化的SCORA算法，通过机会约束规划框架同时考虑环境预测误差和跟踪误差的影响。
result: 仿真实验表明，SCORA在规划时间和轨迹安全性方面均优于现有最先进的风险感知运动规划器。
conclusion: SCORA算法有效解决了高自由度机器人在双重不确定性下的安全轨迹规划问题，为实际应用提供了更可靠的解决方案。
search_text: Chance-Constrained Trajectory Optimization for High-DOF Robots in Uncertain Environments 不确定环境中高自由度机器人的机会约束轨迹优化 Many practical applications of robotics require systems that can operate safely despite uncertainty. In the context of motion planning, two types of uncertainty are particularly important when planning safe robot trajectories. The first is environmental uncertainty -- uncertainty in the locations of nearby obstacles, stemming from sensor noise or (in the case of obstacles' future locations) prediction error. The second class of uncertainty is uncertainty in the robots own state, typically caused by tracking or estimation error. To achieve high levels of safety, it is necessary for robots to consider both of these sources of uncertainty. In this paper, we propose a risk-bounded trajectory optimization algorithm, known as Sequential Convex Optimization with Risk Optimization (SCORA), to solve chance-constrained motion planning problems despite both environmental uncertainty and tracking error. Through experiments in simulation, we demonstrate that SCORA significantly outperforms state-of-the-art risk-aware motion planners both in planning time and in the safety of the resulting trajectories. 机器人技术的许多实际应用都需要系统能够在不确定的情况下安全运行。在运动规划的背景下，在规划安全的机器人轨迹时，有两种类型的不确定性特别重要。第一个是环境不确定性——附近障碍物位置的不确定性，源于传感器噪声或（在障碍物未来位置的情况下）预测误差。第二类不确定性是机器人自身状态的不确定性，通常是由跟踪或估计误差引起的。为了实现高水平的安全性，机器人有必要考虑这两个不确定性来源。在本文中，我们提出了一种风险有界轨迹优化算法，称为带有风险优化的顺序凸优化（SCORA），用于解决机会约束的运动规划问题，尽管存在环境不确定性和跟踪误差。通过模拟实验，我们证明 SCORA 在规划时间和最终轨迹的安全性方面都显着优于最先进的风险感知运动规划器。 本文提出了一种名为SCORA的轨迹优化算法，用于在存在环境不确定性和机器人自身状态不确定性的高自由度机器人运动规划中实现安全轨迹生成。 Charles Dawson,Ashkan Jasour,Andreas Hofmann,Brian Williams cs.RO

title: Real Estate Property Valuation using Self-Supervised Vision Transformers
title_zh: 使用自监督视觉转换器进行房地产估价
abstract: The use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the real estate market has been growing in recent years. In this paper, we propose a new method for property valuation that utilizes self-supervised vision transformers, a recent breakthrough in computer vision and deep learning. Our proposed algorithm uses a combination of machine learning, computer vision and hedonic pricing models trained on real estate data to estimate the value of a given property. We collected and pre-processed a data set of real estate properties in the city of Boulder, Colorado and used it to train, validate and test our algorithm. Our data set consisted of qualitative images (including house interiors, exteriors, and street views) as well as quantitative features such as the number of bedrooms, bathrooms, square footage, lot square footage, property age, crime rates, and proximity to amenities. We evaluated the performance of our model using metrics such as Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE). Our findings indicate that these techniques are able to accurately predict the value of properties, with a low RMSE. The proposed algorithm outperforms traditional appraisal methods that do not leverage property images and has the potential to be used in real-world applications.
summary: The use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the real estate market has been growing in recent years. In this paper, we propose a new method for property valuation that utilizes self-supervised vision transformers, a recent breakthrough in computer vision and deep learning. Our proposed algorithm uses a combination of machine learning, computer vision and hedonic pricing models trained on real estate data to estimate the value of a given property. We collected and pre-processed a data set of real estate properties in the city of Boulder, Colorado and used it to train, validate and test our algorithm. Our data set consisted of qualitative images (including house interiors, exteriors, and street views) as well as quantitative features such as the number of bedrooms, bathrooms, square footage, lot square footage, property age, crime rates, and proximity to amenities. We evaluated the performance of our model using metrics such as Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE). Our findings indicate that these techniques are able to accurately predict the value of properties, with a low RMSE. The proposed algorithm outperforms traditional appraisal methods that do not leverage property images and has the potential to be used in real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能（AI）在房地产市场的应用不断增长。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用自监督视觉变换器进行财产评估的新方法，这是计算机视觉和深度学习领域的最新突破。我们提出的算法结合了机器学习、计算机视觉和基于房地产数据训练的特征定价模型来估计给定房产的价值。我们收集并预处理了科罗拉多州博尔德市的房地产数据集，并用它来训练、验证和测试我们的算法。我们的数据集包括定性图像（包括房屋内部、外部和街景）以及定量特征，例如卧室、浴室的数量、平方英尺、地块面积、房产年龄、犯罪率和便利设施的接近程度。我们使用均方根误差 (RMSE) 等指标评估模型的性能。我们的研究结果表明，这些技术能够准确预测房产的价值，且 RMSE 较低。所提出的算法优于不利用财产图像的传统评估方法，并且具有在实际应用中使用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督视觉Transformer的房地产估价方法，结合图像与量化特征进行房产价值预测。
AI.motivation: 传统估价方法未充分利用房产图像信息，导致评估准确性不足，需探索结合视觉特征与量化数据的新型估价模型。
AI.method: 融合自监督视觉Transformer、机器学习及享乐定价模型，使用博尔德市房产数据集（含室内外图像与面积、犯罪率等量化指标）训练模型，并通过RMSE评估性能。
AI.result: 模型实现较低RMSE，优于传统非图像依赖的估价方法，在房地产估值任务中展现良好预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 自监督视觉Transformer有效整合图像与量化特征，为房地产估价提供更精准的解决方案，具备实际应用潜力。

title: Control-Tree Optimization: an approach to MPC under discrete Partial Observability
title_zh: 控制树优化：离散部分可观测性下的 MPC 方法
abstract: This paper presents a new approach to Model Predictive Control for environments where essential, discrete variables are partially observed. Under this assumption, the belief state is a probability distribution over a finite number of states. We optimize a \textit{control-tree} where each branch assumes a given state-hypothesis. The control-tree optimization uses the probabilistic belief state information. This leads to policies more optimized with respect to likely states than unlikely ones, while still guaranteeing robust constraint satisfaction at all times. We apply the method to both linear and non-linear MPC with constraints. The optimization of the \textit{control-tree} is decomposed into optimization subproblems that are solved in parallel leading to good scalability for high number of state-hypotheses. We demonstrate the real-time feasibility of the algorithm on two examples and show the benefits compared to a classical MPC scheme optimizing w.r.t. one single hypothesis.
summary: This paper presents a new approach to Model Predictive Control for environments where essential, discrete variables are partially observed. Under this assumption, the belief state is a probability distribution over a finite number of states. We optimize a \textit{control-tree} where each branch assumes a given state-hypothesis. The control-tree optimization uses the probabilistic belief state information. This leads to policies more optimized with respect to likely states than unlikely ones, while still guaranteeing robust constraint satisfaction at all times. We apply the method to both linear and non-linear MPC with constraints. The optimization of the \textit{control-tree} is decomposed into optimization subproblems that are solved in parallel leading to good scalability for high number of state-hypotheses. We demonstrate the real-time feasibility of the algorithm on two examples and show the benefits compared to a classical MPC scheme optimizing w.r.t. one single hypothesis.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的模型预测控制方法，适用于部分观察到基本离散变量的环境。在此假设下，置信状态是有限数量状态的概率分布。我们优化一个 \textit{control-tree}，其中每个分支都假设给定的状态假设。控制树优化使用概率置信状态信息。这使得政策对于可能的状态比不可能的状态更加优化，同时仍然保证始终满足稳健的约束。我们将该方法应用于带有约束的线性和非线性 MPC。 \textit{control-tree} 的优化被分解为并行解决的优化子问题，从而为大量状态假设提供良好的可扩展性。我们通过两个示例证明了该算法的实时可行性，并展示了与经典 MPC 方案优化 w.r.t. 相比的优势。一个单一的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于部分可观测离散变量环境的模型预测控制（MPC）新方法，通过优化控制树结构实现对可能状态的高效决策。
AI.motivation: 传统MPC在部分可观测环境中难以有效处理离散变量的不确定性，需在保证约束满足的同时优化对高概率状态的控制策略。
AI.method: 构建基于概率信念状态的控制树，每个分支对应一个状态假设，通过并行求解子问题分解优化过程，提升高假设数量下的可扩展性。
AI.result: 在两个实例中验证了算法的实时可行性，相较于单一假设的经典MPC方案，展示了更高的优化效率和约束满足能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多假设并行优化有效解决了部分可观测MPC的挑战，在保持鲁棒性的同时提升了复杂系统的控制性能。

authors_text: Prince E. Kuevor,Maani Ghaffari,Ella M. Atkins,James W. Cutler
title: Fast and Noise-Resilient Magnetic Field Mapping on a Low-Cost UAV Using Gaussian Process Regression
title_zh: 使用高斯过程回归对低成本无人机进行快速且抗噪声的磁场测绘
abstract: This work presents a number of techniques to improve the ability to create magnetic field maps on a UAV which can be used to quickly and reliably gather magnetic field observations at multiple altitudes in a workspace. Unfortunately, the electronics on the UAV can introduce their own magnetic fields, distorting the resultant magnetic field map. We show methods of reducing and working with UAV-induced noise to better enable magnetic fields as a sensing modality for indoor navigation. First, some gains in our flight controller create high-frequency motor commands that introduce large noise in the measured magnetic field. Next, we implement a common noise reduction method of distancing the magnetometer from other components on our UAV. Finally, we introduce what we call a compromise GPR (Gaussian process regression) map that can be trained on multiple flight tests to learn any flight-by-flight variations between UAV observation tests. We investigate the spatial density of observations used to train a GPR map then use the compromise map to define a consistency test that can indicate whether or not the magnetometer data and corresponding GPR map are appropriate to use for state estimation. The interventions we introduce in this work facilitate indoor position localization of a UAV whose estimates we found to be quite sensitive to noise generated by the UAV.
summary: This work presents a number of techniques to improve the ability to create magnetic field maps on a UAV which can be used to quickly and reliably gather magnetic field observations at multiple altitudes in a workspace. Unfortunately, the electronics on the UAV can introduce their own magnetic fields, distorting the resultant magnetic field map. We show methods of reducing and working with UAV-induced noise to better enable magnetic fields as a sensing modality for indoor navigation. First, some gains in our flight controller create high-frequency motor commands that introduce large noise in the measured magnetic field. Next, we implement a common noise reduction method of distancing the magnetometer from other components on our UAV. Finally, we introduce what we call a compromise GPR (Gaussian process regression) map that can be trained on multiple flight tests to learn any flight-by-flight variations between UAV observation tests. We investigate the spatial density of observations used to train a GPR map then use the compromise map to define a consistency test that can indicate whether or not the magnetometer data and corresponding GPR map are appropriate to use for state estimation. The interventions we introduce in this work facilitate indoor position localization of a UAV whose estimates we found to be quite sensitive to noise generated by the UAV.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了多种技术来提高在无人机上创建磁场地图的能力，这些技术可用于快速可靠地收集工作空间中多个高度的磁场观测结果。不幸的是，无人机上的电子设备可能会引入自己的磁场，从而扭曲合成的磁场图。我们展示了减少和处理无人机引起的噪声的方法，以更好地使磁场成为室内导航的传感方式。首先，我们的飞行控制器中的一些增益会产生高频电机命令，从而在测量的磁场中引入较大的噪声。接下来，我们实施一种常见的降噪方法，将磁力计与无人机上的其他组件保持距离。最后，我们介绍了所谓的折衷 GPR（高斯过程回归）图，可以在多次飞行测试中进行训练，以了解无人机观测测试之间的任何飞行变化。我们研究用于训练 GPR 图的观测值的空间密度，然后使用折衷图来定义一致性测试，该测试可以指示磁力计数据和相应的 GPR 图是否适合用于状态估计。我们在这项工作中引入的干预措施有助于无人机的室内位置定位，我们发现其估计对无人机产生的噪声非常敏感。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在低成本无人机上快速且抗噪的磁场映射方法，利用高斯过程回归（GPR）处理无人机自身电子设备引起的干扰。
AI.motivation: 无人机电子设备产生的磁场噪声会干扰磁场映射，影响室内导航的可靠性，需解决噪声问题以提升磁场作为感知模态的实用性。
AI.method: 通过调整飞行控制器参数降低高频电机噪声、物理隔离磁力计与干扰源，并设计基于多飞行测试的妥协型GPR模型，结合空间观测密度进行一致性验证。
AI.result: 有效抑制了无人机噪声干扰，生成的磁场地图能稳定用于室内定位，验证了方法在不同飞行条件下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的噪声抑制与GPR建模方法显著提升了无人机依赖磁场的室内定位精度，为低成本自主导航提供了可行方案。

title: Adding an Edge in a $P_4$-sparse Graph
title_zh: 在 $P_4$ 稀疏图中添加边
abstract: The minimum completion (fill-in) problem is defined as follows: Given a graph family $\mathcal{F}$ (more generally, a property $Π$) and a graph $G$, the completion problem asks for the minimum number of non-edges needed to be added to $G$ so that the resulting graph belongs to the graph family $\mathcal{F}$ (or has property $Π$). This problem is NP-complete for many subclasses of perfect graphs and polynomial solutions are available only for minimal completion sets. We study the minimum completion problem of a $P_4$-sparse graph $G$ with an added edge. For any optimal solution of the problem, we prove that there is an optimal solution whose form is of one of a small number of possibilities. This along with the solution of the problem when the added edge connects two non-adjacent vertices of a spider or connects two vertices in different connected components of the graph enables us to present a polynomial-time algorithm for the problem.
summary: The minimum completion (fill-in) problem is defined as follows: Given a graph family $\mathcal{F}$ (more generally, a property $Π$) and a graph $G$, the completion problem asks for the minimum number of non-edges needed to be added to $G$ so that the resulting graph belongs to the graph family $\mathcal{F}$ (or has property $Π$). This problem is NP-complete for many subclasses of perfect graphs and polynomial solutions are available only for minimal completion sets. We study the minimum completion problem of a $P_4$-sparse graph $G$ with an added edge. For any optimal solution of the problem, we prove that there is an optimal solution whose form is of one of a small number of possibilities. This along with the solution of the problem when the added edge connects two non-adjacent vertices of a spider or connects two vertices in different connected components of the graph enables us to present a polynomial-time algorithm for the problem.
abstract_zh: 最小补全（填充）问题定义如下：给定图族$\mathcal{F}$（更一般地，属性$Π$）和图$G$，补全问题要求需要添加到$G$的非边的最小数量，以便生成的图属于图族$\mathcal{F}$（或具有属性$Π$）。对于完美图的许多子类来说，这个问题是 NP 完全的，并且多项式解仅适用于最小完成集。我们研究带有附加边的 $P_4$ 稀疏图 $G$ 的最小完成问题。对于问题的任何最优解，我们证明存在一个最优解，其形式是少数可能性之一。当添加的边连接蜘蛛的两个不相邻顶点或连接图的不同连接组件中的两个顶点时，这与问题的解决方案一起使我们能够为该问题提出多项式时间算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在P4-sparse图中添加一条边后的最小完成问题，并设计了一个多项式时间算法。
AI.motivation: 最小完成问题在许多完美图子类中是NP难的，而现有多项式解法仅适用于最小完成集。针对P4-sparse图这一特定结构，寻找更高效的算法具有理论价值。
AI.method: 通过证明最优解的结构具有有限种可能性，并结合蜘蛛图顶点连接及跨连通分量边的特殊情况，构建多项式时间算法框架。
AI.result: 提出了一种多项式时间算法，能够有效解决P4-sparse图添加边后的最小完成问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文为P4-sparse图的最小完成问题提供了新的多项式解法，扩展了该领域的问题解决范围。

authors_text: Yilun Du,Mengjiao Yang,Bo Dai,Hanjun Dai,Ofir Nachum,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Dale Schuurmans,Pieter Abbeel
title: Learning Universal Policies via Text-Guided Video Generation
title_zh: 通过文本引导视频生成学习通用政策
abstract: A goal of artificial intelligence is to construct an agent that can solve a wide variety of tasks. Recent progress in text-guided image synthesis has yielded models with an impressive ability to generate complex novel images, exhibiting combinatorial generalization across domains. Motivated by this success, we investigate whether such tools can be used to construct more general-purpose agents. Specifically, we cast the sequential decision making problem as a text-conditioned video generation problem, where, given a text-encoded specification of a desired goal, a planner synthesizes a set of future frames depicting its planned actions in the future, after which control actions are extracted from the generated video. By leveraging text as the underlying goal specification, we are able to naturally and combinatorially generalize to novel goals. The proposed policy-as-video formulation can further represent environments with different state and action spaces in a unified space of images, which, for example, enables learning and generalization across a variety of robot manipulation tasks. Finally, by leveraging pretrained language embeddings and widely available videos from the internet, the approach enables knowledge transfer through predicting highly realistic video plans for real robots.
summary: A goal of artificial intelligence is to construct an agent that can solve a wide variety of tasks. Recent progress in text-guided image synthesis has yielded models with an impressive ability to generate complex novel images, exhibiting combinatorial generalization across domains. Motivated by this success, we investigate whether such tools can be used to construct more general-purpose agents. Specifically, we cast the sequential decision making problem as a text-conditioned video generation problem, where, given a text-encoded specification of a desired goal, a planner synthesizes a set of future frames depicting its planned actions in the future, after which control actions are extracted from the generated video. By leveraging text as the underlying goal specification, we are able to naturally and combinatorially generalize to novel goals. The proposed policy-as-video formulation can further represent environments with different state and action spaces in a unified space of images, which, for example, enables learning and generalization across a variety of robot manipulation tasks. Finally, by leveraging pretrained language embeddings and widely available videos from the internet, the approach enables knowledge transfer through predicting highly realistic video plans for real robots.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的目标是构建一个可以解决各种任务的代理。文本引导图像合成的最新进展已经产生了具有生成复杂新颖图像的令人印象深刻的能力的模型，展示了跨领域的组合泛化。受这一成功的激励，我们研究了此类工具是否可用于构建更通用的代理。具体来说，我们将顺序决策问题转化为文本条件视频生成问题，其中，给定期望目标的文本编码规范，规划器合成一组描述其未来计划动作的未来帧，之后从生成的视频中提取控制动作。通过利用文本作为潜在的目标规范，我们能够自然地、组合地推广到新的目标。所提出的策略视频公式可以进一步在统一的图像空间中表示具有不同状态和动作空间的环境，例如，可以实现跨各种机器人操作任务的学习和泛化。最后，通过利用预训练的语言嵌入和互联网上广泛使用的视频，该方法通过预测真实机器人的高度逼真的视频计划来实现知识转移。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过文本引导的视频生成学习通用策略，使智能体能解决多种任务。
AI.motivation: 受文本生成图像技术成功的启发，旨在构建能处理广泛任务的通用智能体，通过文本作为目标规范实现跨领域的组合泛化。
AI.method: 将序列决策问题转化为文本条件视频生成问题，根据文本生成未来动作的视频帧，再从中提取控制动作，并利用预训练语言嵌入和互联网视频实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 方法能在不同状态和动作空间的环境中统一表示，成功泛化到多种机器人操作任务，并生成真实感强的视频计划用于实际机器人。
AI.conclusion: 文本引导的视频生成策略框架为学习通用智能体提供了新思路，通过跨模态表示和知识迁移实现了高效的任务泛化能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出通过文本引导的视频生成学习通用策略，使智能体能解决多种任务。
ai_content.motivation: 受文本生成图像技术成功的启发，旨在构建能处理广泛任务的通用智能体，通过文本作为目标规范实现跨领域的组合泛化。

ai_content.result: 方法能在不同状态和动作空间的环境中统一表示，成功泛化到多种机器人操作任务，并生成真实感强的视频计划用于实际机器人。

search_text: Learning Universal Policies via Text-Guided Video Generation 通过文本引导视频生成学习通用政策 A goal of artificial intelligence is to construct an agent that can solve a wide variety of tasks. Recent progress in text-guided image synthesis has yielded models with an impressive ability to generate complex novel images, exhibiting combinatorial generalization across domains. Motivated by this success, we investigate whether such tools can be used to construct more general-purpose agents. Specifically, we cast the sequential decision making problem as a text-conditioned video generation problem, where, given a text-encoded specification of a desired goal, a planner synthesizes a set of future frames depicting its planned actions in the future, after which control actions are extracted from the generated video. By leveraging text as the underlying goal specification, we are able to naturally and combinatorially generalize to novel goals. The proposed policy-as-video formulation can further represent environments with different state and action spaces in a unified space of images, which, for example, enables learning and generalization across a variety of robot manipulation tasks. Finally, by leveraging pretrained language embeddings and widely available videos from the internet, the approach enables knowledge transfer through predicting highly realistic video plans for real robots. 人工智能的目标是构建一个可以解决各种任务的代理。文本引导图像合成的最新进展已经产生了具有生成复杂新颖图像的令人印象深刻的能力的模型，展示了跨领域的组合泛化。受这一成功的激励，我们研究了此类工具是否可用于构建更通用的代理。具体来说，我们将顺序决策问题转化为文本条件视频生成问题，其中，给定期望目标的文本编码规范，规划器合成一组描述其未来计划动作的未来帧，之后从生成的视频中提取控制动作。通过利用文本作为潜在的目标规范，我们能够自然地、组合地推广到新的目标。所提出的策略视频公式可以进一步在统一的图像空间中表示具有不同状态和动作空间的环境，例如，可以实现跨各种机器人操作任务的学习和泛化。最后，通过利用预训练的语言嵌入和互联网上广泛使用的视频，该方法通过预测真实机器人的高度逼真的视频计划来实现知识转移。 本文提出通过文本引导的视频生成学习通用策略，使智能体能解决多种任务。 Yilun Du,Mengjiao Yang,Bo Dai,Hanjun Dai,Ofir Nachum,Joshua B. Tenenbaum,Dale Schuurmans,Pieter Abbeel cs.AI

title: Truthful Incentive Mechanism for Federated Learning with Crowdsourced Data Labeling
title_zh: 众包数据标签联邦学习的真实激励机制
abstract: Federated learning (FL) has emerged as a promising paradigm that trains machine learning (ML) models on clients' devices in a distributed manner without the need of transmitting clients' data to the FL server. In many applications of ML, the labels of training data need to be generated manually by human agents. In this paper, we study FL with crowdsourced data labeling where the local data of each participating client of FL are labeled manually by the client. We consider the strategic behavior of clients who may not make desired effort in their local data labeling and local model computation and may misreport their local models to the FL server. We characterize the performance bounds on the training loss as a function of clients' data labeling effort, local computation effort, and reported local models. We devise truthful incentive mechanisms which incentivize strategic clients to make truthful efforts and report true local models to the server. The truthful design exploits the non-trivial dependence of the training loss on clients' efforts and local models. Under the truthful mechanisms, we characterize the server's optimal local computation effort assignments. We evaluate the proposed FL algorithms with crowdsourced data labeling and the incentive mechanisms using experiments.
summary: Federated learning (FL) has emerged as a promising paradigm that trains machine learning (ML) models on clients' devices in a distributed manner without the need of transmitting clients' data to the FL server. In many applications of ML, the labels of training data need to be generated manually by human agents. In this paper, we study FL with crowdsourced data labeling where the local data of each participating client of FL are labeled manually by the client. We consider the strategic behavior of clients who may not make desired effort in their local data labeling and local model computation and may misreport their local models to the FL server. We characterize the performance bounds on the training loss as a function of clients' data labeling effort, local computation effort, and reported local models. We devise truthful incentive mechanisms which incentivize strategic clients to make truthful efforts and report true local models to the server. The truthful design exploits the non-trivial dependence of the training loss on clients' efforts and local models. Under the truthful mechanisms, we characterize the server's optimal local computation effort assignments. We evaluate the proposed FL algorithms with crowdsourced data labeling and the incentive mechanisms using experiments.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习 (FL) 已成为一种有前途的范例，它以分布式方式在客户端设备上训练机器学习 (ML) 模型，而无需将客户端数据传输到 FL 服务器。在机器学习的许多应用中，训练数据的标签需要由人工代理手动生成。在本文中，我们通过众包数据标记来研究 FL，其中每个参与 FL 的客户端的本地数据由客户端手动标记。我们考虑客户的战略行为，他们可能没有在本地数据标记和本地模型计算方面做出预期的努力，并且可能会向 FL 服务器错误报告其本地模型。我们将训练损失的性能界限描述为客户数据标记工作、本地计算工作和报告的本地模型的函数。我们设计了真实的激励机制，激励战略客户做出真实的努力，并向服务器报告真实的本地模型。真实的设计利用了训练损失对客户的努力和本地模型的重要依赖性。在真实机制下，我们描述了服务器的最佳本地计算工作分配。我们通过实验评估了所提出的具有众包数据标记和激励机制的 FL 算法。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种激励机制，解决联邦学习中客户端在众包数据标注和模型报告中的策略行为问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端可能因利益驱动而减少数据标注努力或虚假报告模型，影响训练效果，需设计激励机制确保诚实参与。
AI.method: 分析训练损失与客户端努力及模型报告的依赖关系，构建激励机制以促进诚实行为，并确定服务器最优计算分配策略。
AI.result: 实验验证了所提算法和激励机制在提升数据标注质量与模型收敛效率方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该机制通过关联训练损失与客户端行为，成功激励其诚实参与，提升了联邦学习的整体性能。

In many applications of ML, the labels of training data need to be generated manually by human agents. In this paper, we study FL with crowdsourced data labeling where the local data of each participating client of FL are labeled manually by the client. We consider the strategic behavior of clients who may not make desired effort in their local data labeling and local model computation and may misreport their local models to the FL server. We characterize the performance bounds on the training loss as a function of clients' data labeling effort, local computation effort, and reported local models. We devise truthful incentive mechanisms which incentivize strategic clients to make truthful efforts and report true local models to the server. The truthful design exploits the non-trivial dependence of the training loss on clients' efforts and local models. Under the truthful mechanisms, we characterize the server's optimal local computation effort assignments. authors_text: Simiao Ren,Saad Lahrichi,Yang Deng,Willie J. Padilla,Leslie Collins,Jordan Malof
title: Does Deep Active Learning Work in the Wild?
title_zh: 深度主动学习在野外有效吗？
abstract: Deep active learning (DAL) methods have shown significant improvements in sample efficiency compared to simple random sampling. While these studies are valuable, they nearly always assume that optimal DAL hyperparameter (HP) settings are known in advance, or optimize the HPs through repeating DAL several times with different HP settings. Here, we argue that in real-world settings, or in the wild, there is significant uncertainty regarding good HPs, and their optimization contradicts the premise of using DAL (i.e., we require labeling efficiency). In this study, we evaluate the performance of eleven modern DAL methods on eight benchmark problems as we vary a key HP shared by all methods: the pool ratio. Despite adjusting only one HP, our results indicate that eight of the eleven DAL methods sometimes underperform relative to simple random sampling and some frequently perform worse. Only three methods always outperform random sampling (albeit narrowly), and we find that these methods all utilize diversity to select samples - a relatively simple criterion. Our findings reveal the limitations of existing DAL methods when deployed in the wild, and present this as an important new open problem in the field.
summary: Deep active learning (DAL) methods have shown significant improvements in sample efficiency compared to simple random sampling. While these studies are valuable, they nearly always assume that optimal DAL hyperparameter (HP) settings are known in advance, or optimize the HPs through repeating DAL several times with different HP settings. Here, we argue that in real-world settings, or in the wild, there is significant uncertainty regarding good HPs, and their optimization contradicts the premise of using DAL (i.e., we require labeling efficiency). In this study, we evaluate the performance of eleven modern DAL methods on eight benchmark problems as we vary a key HP shared by all methods: the pool ratio. Despite adjusting only one HP, our results indicate that eight of the eleven DAL methods sometimes underperform relative to simple random sampling and some frequently perform worse. Only three methods always outperform random sampling (albeit narrowly), and we find that these methods all utilize diversity to select samples - a relatively simple criterion. Our findings reveal the limitations of existing DAL methods when deployed in the wild, and present this as an important new open problem in the field.
abstract_zh: 与简单随机抽样相比，深度主动学习 (DAL) 方法在样本效率方面显示出显着提高。虽然这些研究很有价值，但他们几乎总是假设最佳 DAL 超参数 (HP) 设置是预先已知的，或者通过使用不同的 HP 设置多次重复 DAL 来优化 HP。在这里，我们认为，在现实环境中，或者在野外，良好的 HP 存在很大的不确定性，并且它们的优化与使用 DAL 的前提相矛盾（即我们需要标记效率）。在本研究中，我们评估了 11 种现代 DAL 方法在 8 个基准问题上的性能，因为我们改变了所有方法共享的关键 HP：池比率。尽管只调整了一项 HP，但我们的结果表明，十一种 DAL 方法中的八种有时相对于简单随机抽样表现不佳，而且有些方法经常表现更差。只有三种方法总是优于随机抽样（尽管差距很小），而且我们发现这些方法都利用多样性来选择样本——这是一个相对简单的标准。我们的研究结果揭示了现有 DAL 方法在野外部署时的局限性，并将其作为该领域一个重要的新开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了11种深度主动学习方法在真实场景中的性能，重点分析超参数不确定性对样本选择效率的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设深度主动学习的超参数已知或通过多次迭代优化，但实际应用中超参数优化会违背主动学习的标注效率目标，需验证其在真实环境的可行性。
AI.method: 在8个基准数据集上测试11种现代DAL方法，仅调整共享超参数'池比例'，评估其相对于随机抽样的性能表现。
AI.result: 8种方法在部分情况下表现劣于随机抽样，仅3种方法始终优于随机抽样，且这些方法均采用基于多样性的简单样本选择准则。
AI.conclusion: 现有DAL方法在超参数不确定的真实场景中存在显著局限性，如何设计鲁棒的主动学习框架是亟待解决的新问题。

Despite adjusting only one HP, our results indicate that eight of the eleven DAL methods sometimes underperform relative to simple random sampling and some frequently perform worse. Only three methods always outperform random sampling (albeit narrowly), and we find that these methods all utilize diversity to select samples - a relatively simple criterion. Our findings reveal the limitations of existing DAL methods when deployed in the wild, and present this as an important new open problem in the field. 与简单随机抽样相比，深度主动学习 (DAL) 方法在样本效率方面显示出显着提高。虽然这些研究很有价值，但他们几乎总是假设最佳 DAL 超参数 (HP) 设置是预先已知的，或者通过使用不同的 HP 设置多次重复 DAL 来优化 HP。在这里，我们认为，在现实环境中，或者在野外，良好的 HP 存在很大的不确定性，并且它们的优化与使用 DAL 的前提相矛盾（即我们需要标记效率）。在本研究中，我们评估了 11 种现代 DAL 方法在 8 个基准问题上的性能，因为我们改变了所有方法共享的关键 HP：池比率。尽管只调整了一项 HP，但我们的结果表明，十一种 DAL 方法中的八种有时相对于简单随机抽样表现不佳，而且有些方法经常表现更差。只有三种方法总是优于随机抽样（尽管差距很小），而且我们发现这些方法都利用多样性来选择样本——这是一个相对简单的标准。我们的研究结果揭示了现有 DAL 方法在野外部署时的局限性，并将其作为该领域一个重要的新开放问题。 本文评估了11种深度主动学习方法在真实场景中的性能，重点分析超参数不确定性对样本选择效率的影响。 Simiao Ren,Saad Lahrichi,Yang Deng,Willie J. Padilla,Leslie Collins,Jordan Malof cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Venkatesh Sivaraman,Leigh A. Bukowski,Joel Levin,Jeremy M. Kahn,Adam Perer
title: Ignore, Trust, or Negotiate: Understanding Clinician Acceptance of AI-Based Treatment Recommendations in Health Care
title_zh: 忽略、信任或谈判：了解临床医生对医疗保健中基于人工智能的治疗建议的接受程度
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) in healthcare has the potential to improve patient outcomes, but clinician acceptance remains a critical barrier. We developed a novel decision support interface that provides interpretable treatment recommendations for sepsis, a life-threatening condition in which decisional uncertainty is common, treatment practices vary widely, and poor outcomes can occur even with optimal decisions. This system formed the basis of a mixed-methods study in which 24 intensive care clinicians made AI-assisted decisions on real patient cases. We found that explanations generally increased confidence in the AI, but concordance with specific recommendations varied beyond the binary acceptance or rejection described in prior work. Although clinicians sometimes ignored or trusted the AI, they also often prioritized aspects of the recommendations to follow, reject, or delay in a process we term "negotiation." These results reveal novel barriers to adoption of treatment-focused AI tools and suggest ways to better support differing clinician perspectives.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) in healthcare has the potential to improve patient outcomes, but clinician acceptance remains a critical barrier. We developed a novel decision support interface that provides interpretable treatment recommendations for sepsis, a life-threatening condition in which decisional uncertainty is common, treatment practices vary widely, and poor outcomes can occur even with optimal decisions. This system formed the basis of a mixed-methods study in which 24 intensive care clinicians made AI-assisted decisions on real patient cases. We found that explanations generally increased confidence in the AI, but concordance with specific recommendations varied beyond the binary acceptance or rejection described in prior work. Although clinicians sometimes ignored or trusted the AI, they also often prioritized aspects of the recommendations to follow, reject, or delay in a process we term "negotiation." These results reveal novel barriers to adoption of treatment-focused AI tools and suggest ways to better support differing clinician perspectives.
abstract_zh: 医疗保健领域的人工智能 (AI) 有潜力改善患者的治疗结果，但临床医生的接受程度仍然是一个关键障碍。我们开发了一种新颖的决策支持界面，为脓毒症提供可解释的治疗建议，脓毒症是一种危及生命的疾病，其中决策不确定性很常见，治疗实践差异很大，即使做出最佳决策也可能会出现不良结果。该系统构成了一项混合方法研究的基础，其中 24 名重症监护临床医生根据真实患者病例做出人工智能辅助决策。我们发现，解释通常会增加对人工智能的信心，但与具体建议的一致性超出了先前工作中描述的二元接受或拒绝。尽管临床医生有时会忽视或信任人工智能，但他们也经常在我们称之为“谈判”的过程中优先考虑要遵循、拒绝或延迟的建议的各个方面。这些结果揭示了采用以治疗为中心的人工智能工具的新障碍，并提出了更好地支持不同临床医生观点的方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了临床医生对基于人工智能的治疗建议的接受程度，并探讨了他们在实际医疗决策中如何与AI系统进行互动。
AI.motivation: 尽管人工智能在医疗领域有潜力改善患者预后，但临床医生的接受程度仍然是关键障碍。因此，研究旨在了解临床医生如何接受和使用AI提供的治疗建议。
AI.method: 研究开发了一种新的决策支持界面，用于提供可解释的治疗建议，并通过混合方法研究，让24名重症监护临床医生在真实患者案例中进行AI辅助决策。
AI.result: 研究发现，解释通常会增加对AI的信任，但临床医生对具体建议的接受程度存在差异，他们有时会忽略、信任或优先考虑AI的建议，这一过程被描述为“协商”。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了治疗导向型AI工具采用中的新障碍，并提出了更好地支持不同临床医生视角的方法。

authors_text: Sarabjeet Singh,Xiong Fan,Ananth Krishna Prasad,Lin Jia,Anirban Nag,Rajeev Balasubramonian,Mahdi Nazm Bojnordi,Elaine Shi
title: XCRYPT: Accelerating Lattice Based Cryptography with Memristor Crossbar Arrays
title_zh: XCRYPT：使用忆阻器交叉阵列加速基于晶格的加密
abstract: This paper makes a case for accelerating lattice-based post quantum cryptography (PQC) with memristor based crossbars, and shows that these inherently error-tolerant algorithms are a good fit for noisy analog MAC operations in crossbars. We compare different NIST round-3 lattice-based candidates for PQC, and identify that SABER is not only a front-runner when executing on traditional systems, but it is also amenable to acceleration with crossbars. SABER is a module-LWR based approach, which performs modular polynomial multiplications with rounding. We map the polynomial multiplications in SABER on crossbars and show that analog dot-products can yield a $1.7-32.5\times$ performance and energy efficiency improvement, compared to recent hardware proposals. This initial design combines the innovations in multiple state-of-the-art works -- the algorithm in SABER and the memristive acceleration principles proposed in ISAAC (for deep neural network acceleration). We then identify the bottlenecks in this initial design and introduce several additional techniques to improve its efficiency. These techniques are synergistic and especially benefit from SABER's power-of-two modulo operation. First, we show that some of the software techniques used in SABER, that are effective on CPU platforms, are unhelpful in crossbar-based accelerators. Relying on simpler algorithms further improves our efficiencies by $1.3-3.6\times$. Second, we exploit the nature of SABER's computations to stagger the operations in crossbars and share a few variable precision ADCs, resulting in up to $1.8\times$ higher efficiency. Third, to further reduce ADC pressure, we propose a simple analog Shift-and-Add technique, which results in a $1.3-6.3\times$ increase in the efficiency. Overall, our designs achieve $3-15\times$ higher efficiency over initial design, and $3-51\times$ higher than prior work.

We compare different NIST round-3 lattice-based candidates for PQC, and identify that SABER is not only a front-runner when executing on traditional systems, but it is also amenable to acceleration with crossbars. We map the polynomial multiplications in SABER on crossbars and show that analog dot-products can yield a $1.7-32.5\times$ performance and energy efficiency improvement, compared to recent hardware proposals. This initial design combines the innovations in multiple state-of-the-art works -- the algorithm in SABER and the memristive acceleration principles proposed in ISAAC (for deep neural network acceleration). We then identify the bottlenecks in this initial design and introduce several additional techniques to improve its efficiency. These techniques are synergistic and especially benefit from SABER's power-of-two modulo operation. First, we show that some of the software techniques used in SABER, that are effective on CPU platforms, are unhelpful in crossbar-based accelerators. Relying on simpler algorithms further improves our efficiencies by $1.3-3.6\times$. Second, we exploit the nature of SABER's computations to stagger the operations in crossbars and share a few variable precision ADCs, resulting in up to $1.8\times$ higher efficiency. Third, to further reduce ADC pressure, we propose a simple analog Shift-and-Add technique, which results in a $1.3-6.3\times$ increase in the efficiency. Overall, our designs achieve $3-15\times$ higher efficiency over initial design, and $3-51\times$ higher than prior work.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了使用基于忆阻器的交叉开关来加速基于格的后量子密码 (PQC) 的案例，并表明这些固有的容错算法非常适合交叉开关中的噪声模拟 MAC 操作。我们比较了不同的基于 NIST 第 3 轮网格的 PQC 候选方案，并发现 SABRE 不仅是在传统系统上执行时的领先者，而且还适合通过交叉开关进行加速。 SABRE 是一种基于模块 LWR 的方法，它执行带舍入的模多项式乘法。我们将 SABRE 中的多项式乘法映射到交叉开关上，并表明与最近的硬件提案相比，模拟点积可以产生 $1.7-32.5\times$ 的性能和能效改进。这个初始设计结合了多个最先进作品的创新——SABRE中的算法和ISAAC（用于深度神经网络加速）中提出的忆阻加速原理。然后，我们确定了初始设计中的瓶颈，并引入了几种附加技术来提高其效率。这些技术具有协同作用，尤其受益于 SABRE 的二次幂模运算。首先，我们表明 SABRE 中使用的一些软件技术在 CPU 平台上有效，但在基于交叉开关的加速器上却无济于事。依靠更简单的算法，我们的效率进一步提高了 $1.3-3.6\times$。其次，我们利用 SABRE 计算的性质来交错交叉开关中的操作并共享一些可变精度 ADC，从而实现高达 1.8 倍的效率提升。第三，为了进一步降低 ADC 压力，我们提出了一种简单的模拟移位加法技术，这使得效率提高了 1.3-6.3 倍。总体而言，我们的设计实现了比初始设计高 3-15 倍的效率，比之前的工作高 3-51 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XCRYPT方案，利用忆阻器交叉阵列加速格基后量子密码学（PQC），重点优化SABER算法在交叉阵列上的实现效率。
AI.motivation: 后量子密码学需应对量子计算威胁，但传统硬件实现效率不足。忆阻器交叉阵列的模拟计算特性与格基算法的容错性匹配，可提升能效。
AI.method: 将SABER的模多项式乘法映射到交叉阵列，利用模拟点积加速；通过简化算法、操作交错、ADC共享及模拟Shift-and-Add技术优化效率。
AI.result: 相比初始设计效率提升3-15倍，较现有方案提升3-51倍，能耗效率达1.7-32.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 忆阻器交叉阵列可有效加速格基密码，SABER的二进制模运算特性与交叉阵列协同优化，为PQC硬件设计提供新方向。

Overall, our designs achieve $3-15\times$ higher efficiency over initial design, and $3-51\times$ higher than prior work. 本文提出了使用基于忆阻器的交叉开关来加速基于格的后量子密码 (PQC) 的案例，并表明这些固有的容错算法非常适合交叉开关中的噪声模拟 MAC 操作。我们比较了不同的基于 NIST 第 3 轮网格的 PQC 候选方案，并发现 SABRE 不仅是在传统系统上执行时的领先者，而且还适合通过交叉开关进行加速。 SABRE 是一种基于模块 LWR 的方法，它执行带舍入的模多项式乘法。我们将 SABRE 中的多项式乘法映射到交叉开关上，并表明与最近的硬件提案相比，模拟点积可以产生 $1.7-32.5\times$ 的性能和能效改进。这个初始设计结合了多个最先进作品的创新——SABRE中的算法和ISAAC（用于深度神经网络加速）中提出的忆阻加速原理。然后，我们确定了初始设计中的瓶颈，并引入了几种附加技术来提高其效率。这些技术具有协同作用，尤其受益于 SABRE 的二次幂模运算。首先，我们表明 SABRE 中使用的一些软件技术在 CPU 平台上有效，但在基于交叉开关的加速器上却无济于事。依靠更简单的算法，我们的效率进一步提高了 $1.3-3.6\times$。其次，我们利用 SABRE 计算的性质来交错交叉开关中的操作并共享一些可变精度 ADC，从而实现高达 1.8 倍的效率提升。第三，为了进一步降低 ADC 压力，我们提出了一种简单的模拟移位加法技术，这使得效率提高了 1.3-6.3 倍。总体而言，我们的设计实现了比初始设计高 3-15 倍的效率，比之前的工作高 3-51 倍。 本文提出XCRYPT方案，利用忆阻器交叉阵列加速格基后量子密码学（PQC），重点优化SABER算法在交叉阵列上的实现效率。 Sarabjeet Singh,Xiong Fan,Ananth Krishna Prasad,Lin Jia,Anirban Nag,Rajeev Balasubramonian,Mahdi Nazm Bojnordi,Elaine Shi cs.AR,cs.CR,cs.ET

authors_text: Son Quoc Tran,Phong Nguyen-Thuan Do,Uyen Le,Matt Kretchmar
title: The Impacts of Unanswerable Questions on the Robustness of Machine Reading Comprehension Models
title_zh: 无法回答的问题对机器阅读理解模型鲁棒性的影响
comment: Accepted atThe 17th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (EACL 2023)
comments: Accepted atThe 17th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (EACL 2023)
abstract: Pretrained language models have achieved super-human performances on many Machine Reading Comprehension (MRC) benchmarks. Nevertheless, their relative inability to defend against adversarial attacks has spurred skepticism about their natural language understanding. In this paper, we ask whether training with unanswerable questions in SQuAD 2.0 can help improve the robustness of MRC models against adversarial attacks. To explore that question, we fine-tune three state-of-the-art language models on either SQuAD 1.1 or SQuAD 2.0 and then evaluate their robustness under adversarial attacks. Our experiments reveal that current models fine-tuned on SQuAD 2.0 do not initially appear to be any more robust than ones fine-tuned on SQuAD 1.1, yet they reveal a measure of hidden robustness that can be leveraged to realize actual performance gains. Furthermore, we find that the robustness of models fine-tuned on SQuAD 2.0 extends to additional out-of-domain datasets. Finally, we introduce a new adversarial attack to reveal artifacts of SQuAD 2.0 that current MRC models are learning.
summary: Pretrained language models have achieved super-human performances on many Machine Reading Comprehension (MRC) benchmarks. Nevertheless, their relative inability to defend against adversarial attacks has spurred skepticism about their natural language understanding. In this paper, we ask whether training with unanswerable questions in SQuAD 2.0 can help improve the robustness of MRC models against adversarial attacks. To explore that question, we fine-tune three state-of-the-art language models on either SQuAD 1.1 or SQuAD 2.0 and then evaluate their robustness under adversarial attacks. Our experiments reveal that current models fine-tuned on SQuAD 2.0 do not initially appear to be any more robust than ones fine-tuned on SQuAD 1.1, yet they reveal a measure of hidden robustness that can be leveraged to realize actual performance gains. Furthermore, we find that the robustness of models fine-tuned on SQuAD 2.0 extends to additional out-of-domain datasets. Finally, we introduce a new adversarial attack to reveal artifacts of SQuAD 2.0 that current MRC models are learning.
abstract_zh: 预训练语言模型在许多机器阅读理解 (MRC) 基准测试中取得了超人类的表现。然而，它们相对无力防御对抗性攻击，这引发了人们对其自然语言理解的怀疑。在本文中，我们询问在 SQuAD 2.0 中使用无法回答的问题进行训练是否有助于提高 MRC 模型针对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。为了探索这个问题，我们在 SQuAD 1.1 或 SQuAD 2.0 上微调了三种最先进的语言模型，然后评估它们在对抗性攻击下的鲁棒性。我们的实验表明，在 SQuAD 2.0 上微调的当前模型最初似乎并不比在 SQuAD 1.1 上微调的模型更稳健，但它们揭示了一种隐藏的鲁棒性度量，可用于实现实际的性能增益。此外，我们发现在 SQuAD 2.0 上微调的模型的稳健性扩展到其他域外数据集。最后，我们引入了一种新的对抗性攻击，以揭示当前 MRC 模型正在学习的 SQuAD 2.0 的工件。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在机器阅读理解模型训练中加入无法回答的问题（如SQuAD 2.0）是否能提升其对抗对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练模型在MRC任务中表现优异，但其对对抗攻击的脆弱性引发对其理解能力的质疑，因此研究如何通过训练数据增强模型鲁棒性具有重要意义。
AI.method: 对三个先进模型分别在SQuAD 1.1和SQuAD 2.0上微调，评估其在对抗攻击下的鲁棒性，并设计新攻击方法验证模型学习到的伪影。
AI.result: 实验发现SQuAD 2.0微调模型初期鲁棒性无显著提升，但存在可挖掘的潜在鲁棒性，且鲁棒性泛化到其他数据集，新攻击方法揭示了模型在SQuAD 2.0中的学习伪影。
AI.conclusion: 使用包含无法回答问题的数据集训练可增强模型鲁棒性，但需进一步研究其机制与优化方法。

authors_text: Freda Shi,Xinyun Chen,Kanishka Misra,Nathan Scales,David Dohan,Ed Chi,Nathanael Schärli,Denny Zhou
title: Large Language Models Can Be Easily Distracted by Irrelevant Context
title_zh: 大型语言模型很容易被不相关的上下文分散注意力
abstract: Large language models have achieved impressive performance on various natural language processing tasks. However, so far they have been evaluated primarily on benchmarks where all information in the input context is relevant for solving the task. In this work, we investigate the distractibility of large language models, i.e., how the model problem-solving accuracy can be influenced by irrelevant context. In particular, we introduce Grade-School Math with Irrelevant Context (GSM-IC), an arithmetic reasoning dataset with irrelevant information in the problem description. We use this benchmark to measure the distractibility of cutting-edge prompting techniques for large language models, and find that the model performance is dramatically decreased when irrelevant information is included. We also identify several approaches for mitigating this deficiency, such as decoding with self-consistency and adding to the prompt an instruction that tells the language model to ignore the irrelevant information.
summary: Large language models have achieved impressive performance on various natural language processing tasks. However, so far they have been evaluated primarily on benchmarks where all information in the input context is relevant for solving the task. In this work, we investigate the distractibility of large language models, i.e., how the model problem-solving accuracy can be influenced by irrelevant context. In particular, we introduce Grade-School Math with Irrelevant Context (GSM-IC), an arithmetic reasoning dataset with irrelevant information in the problem description. We use this benchmark to measure the distractibility of cutting-edge prompting techniques for large language models, and find that the model performance is dramatically decreased when irrelevant information is included. We also identify several approaches for mitigating this deficiency, such as decoding with self-consistency and adding to the prompt an instruction that tells the language model to ignore the irrelevant information.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型在各种自然语言处理任务上取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，到目前为止，它们主要是根据基准进行评估的，其中输入上下文中的所有信息都与解决任务相关。在这项工作中，我们研究了大型语言模型的分散性，即模型解决问题的准确性如何受到不相关上下文的影响。特别是，我们引入了具有不相关上下文的小学数学（GSM-IC），这是一个在问题描述中包含不相关信息的算术推理数据集。我们使用这个基准来衡量大型语言模型的尖端提示技术的分散性，发现当包含不相关信息时，模型性能会急剧下降。我们还确定了几种缓解这种缺陷的方法，例如自我一致性解码以及在提示中添加一条指示语言模型忽略不相关信息的指令。

AI.tldr: 研究大语言模型在存在不相关上下文时的表现，并提出缓解方法
AI.motivation: 现有评估主要基于相关上下文，但实际场景中可能存在不相关信息，需研究模型的易分心性
AI.method: 引入包含不相关信息的数学数据集GSM-IC，测试提示技术效果，并提出缓解方法如自一致性解码和添加忽略指令
AI.result: 模型性能在存在不相关信息时显著下降，缓解方法能有效提升表现
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型易受无关信息干扰，需通过特定方法缓解
