title: Mind the (optimality) Gap: A Gap-Aware Learning Rate Scheduler for Adversarial Nets
title_zh: 注意（最优）差距：对抗网络的差距感知学习率调度程序
abstract: Adversarial nets have proved to be powerful in various domains including generative modeling (GANs), transfer learning, and fairness. However, successfully training adversarial nets using first-order methods remains a major challenge. Typically, careful choices of the learning rates are needed to maintain the delicate balance between the competing networks. In this paper, we design a novel learning rate scheduler that dynamically adapts the learning rate of the adversary to maintain the right balance. The scheduler is driven by the fact that the loss of an ideal adversarial net is a constant known a priori. The scheduler is thus designed to keep the loss of the optimized adversarial net close to that of an ideal network. We run large-scale experiments to study the effectiveness of the scheduler on two popular applications: GANs for image generation and adversarial nets for domain adaptation. Our experiments indicate that adversarial nets trained with the scheduler are less likely to diverge and require significantly less tuning. For example, on CelebA, a GAN with the scheduler requires only one-tenth of the tuning budget needed without a scheduler. Moreover, the scheduler leads to statistically significant improvements in model quality, reaching up to $27\%$ in Frechet Inception Distance for image generation and $3\%$ in test accuracy for domain adaptation.
summary: Adversarial nets have proved to be powerful in various domains including generative modeling (GANs), transfer learning, and fairness. However, successfully training adversarial nets using first-order methods remains a major challenge. Typically, careful choices of the learning rates are needed to maintain the delicate balance between the competing networks. In this paper, we design a novel learning rate scheduler that dynamically adapts the learning rate of the adversary to maintain the right balance. The scheduler is driven by the fact that the loss of an ideal adversarial net is a constant known a priori. The scheduler is thus designed to keep the loss of the optimized adversarial net close to that of an ideal network. We run large-scale experiments to study the effectiveness of the scheduler on two popular applications: GANs for image generation and adversarial nets for domain adaptation. Our experiments indicate that adversarial nets trained with the scheduler are less likely to diverge and require significantly less tuning. For example, on CelebA, a GAN with the scheduler requires only one-tenth of the tuning budget needed without a scheduler. Moreover, the scheduler leads to statistically significant improvements in model quality, reaching up to $27\%$ in Frechet Inception Distance for image generation and $3\%$ in test accuracy for domain adaptation.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，对抗网络在生成模型 (GAN)、迁移学习和公平性等各个领域都具有强大的功能。然而，使用一阶方法成功训练对抗网络仍然是一个重大挑战。通常，需要仔细选择学习率以维持竞争网络之间的微妙平衡。在本文中，我们设计了一种新颖的学习率调度器，可以动态调整对手的学习率以保持适当的平衡。调度程序的驱动因素是，理想对抗网络的损失是一个先验已知的常数。因此，调度器的设计目的是使优化后的对抗网络的损失保持接近理想网络的损失。我们进行了大规模实验来研究调度程序在两种流行应用中的有效性：用于图像生成的 GAN 和用于域适应的对抗网络。我们的实验表明，使用调度程序训练的对抗网络不太可能发散，并且需要的调整要少得多。例如，在 CelebA 上，带有调度器的 GAN 只需要不带调度器所需调整预算的十分之一。此外，调度程序导致模型质量在统计上显着提高，图像生成的 Frechet 起始距离达到 $27\%$，域适应的测试精度达到 $3\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于优化间隙的自适应学习率调度器，用于改善对抗网络（如GAN）的训练稳定性与性能。
AI.motivation: 对抗网络训练中，手动调整学习率以保持生成器与判别器平衡耗时且困难，传统方法易导致模型发散或收敛不足。
AI.method: 设计动态学习率调度器，通过维持优化后对抗网络的损失接近理想恒定值，自动调整对抗网络的学习率以保持平衡。
AI.result: 在CelebA图像生成任务中，调度器使调优成本降低至原方法的1/10；FID指标提升27%，领域自适应任务测试准确率提升3%。
AI.conclusion: 该调度器有效缓解对抗网络训练中的不稳定性，减少人工调参需求，显著提升模型生成质量与适应能力。

search_text: Mind the (optimality) Gap: A Gap-Aware Learning Rate Scheduler for Adversarial Nets 注意（最优）差距：对抗网络的差距感知学习率调度程序 Adversarial nets have proved to be powerful in various domains including generative modeling (GANs), transfer learning, and fairness. However, successfully training adversarial nets using first-order methods remains a major challenge. Typically, careful choices of the learning rates are needed to maintain the delicate balance between the competing networks. In this paper, we design a novel learning rate scheduler that dynamically adapts the learning rate of the adversary to maintain the right balance. The scheduler is driven by the fact that the loss of an ideal adversarial net is a constant known a priori. The scheduler is thus designed to keep the loss of the optimized adversarial net close to that of an ideal network. We run large-scale experiments to study the effectiveness of the scheduler on two popular applications: GANs for image generation and adversarial nets for domain adaptation. Our experiments indicate that adversarial nets trained with the scheduler are less likely to diverge and require significantly less tuning. For example, on CelebA, a GAN with the scheduler requires only one-tenth of the tuning budget needed without a scheduler. Moreover, the scheduler leads to statistically significant improvements in model quality, reaching up to $27\%$ in Frechet Inception Distance for image generation and $3\%$ in test accuracy for domain adaptation. 事实证明，对抗网络在生成模型 (GAN)、迁移学习和公平性等各个领域都具有强大的功能。然而，使用一阶方法成功训练对抗网络仍然是一个重大挑战。通常，需要仔细选择学习率以维持竞争网络之间的微妙平衡。在本文中，我们设计了一种新颖的学习率调度器，可以动态调整对手的学习率以保持适当的平衡。调度程序的驱动因素是，理想对抗网络的损失是一个先验已知的常数。因此，调度器的设计目的是使优化后的对抗网络的损失保持接近理想网络的损失。我们进行了大规模实验来研究调度程序在两种流行应用中的有效性：用于图像生成的 GAN 和用于域适应的对抗网络。我们的实验表明，使用调度程序训练的对抗网络不太可能发散，并且需要的调整要少得多。例如，在 CelebA 上，带有调度器的 GAN 只需要不带调度器所需调整预算的十分之一。此外，调度程序导致模型质量在统计上显着提高，图像生成的 Frechet 起始距离达到 $27\%$，域适应的测试精度达到 $3\%$。 本文提出一种基于优化间隙的自适应学习率调度器，用于改善对抗网络（如GAN）的训练稳定性与性能。 Hussein Hazimeh,Natalia Ponomareva cs.LG,cs.AI

title: A New Approach to Sonification of Astrophysical Data: The User Centred Design of SonoUno
title_zh: 天体物理数据声音化的新方法：SonoUno 以用户为中心的设计
abstract: Even when actual technologies present the potential to augment inclusion and the United Nations has been stablished the digital access to information as a human right, people with disabilities continuously faced barriers in their profession. In many cases, in sciences, the lack of accessible and user centred tools left behind researches with disabilities and not facilitate them to conduct front-line research by using their respective strengths. In this contribution, we discuss some hurdles and solutions relevant for using new technology for data analysis, analysing the barriers found by final users. A focus group session was conducted with nine people with and without visual impairment, using the tool sonoUno with one linear function and an astronomical data set downloaded from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey. As a result of the focus group study, incorporating data analysis using sonification, we conclude that functionally diverse people require tools to be autonomous, thereby enabling precision, certainty, effectiveness and efficiency in their work, resulting in enhanced equity. This can be achieved by pursuing a user-centred design approach as integral to software development, and by adapting resources according to the research objectives. Development of tools that empower people with wide-ranging abilities to not only access data using multi-sensorial techniques, but also address the current lack of inclusion, is sorely needed.
summary: Even when actual technologies present the potential to augment inclusion and the United Nations has been stablished the digital access to information as a human right, people with disabilities continuously faced barriers in their profession. In many cases, in sciences, the lack of accessible and user centred tools left behind researches with disabilities and not facilitate them to conduct front-line research by using their respective strengths. In this contribution, we discuss some hurdles and solutions relevant for using new technology for data analysis, analysing the barriers found by final users. A focus group session was conducted with nine people with and without visual impairment, using the tool sonoUno with one linear function and an astronomical data set downloaded from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey. As a result of the focus group study, incorporating data analysis using sonification, we conclude that functionally diverse people require tools to be autonomous, thereby enabling precision, certainty, effectiveness and efficiency in their work, resulting in enhanced equity. This can be achieved by pursuing a user-centred design approach as integral to software development, and by adapting resources according to the research objectives. Development of tools that empower people with wide-ranging abilities to not only access data using multi-sensorial techniques, but also address the current lack of inclusion, is sorely needed.
abstract_zh: 即使实际技术具有增强包容性的潜力，并且联合国已将数字化获取信息确定为一项人权，但残疾人在其职业中仍然面临障碍。在许多情况下，在科学领域，缺乏易于使用和以用户为中心的工具导致了残疾人的研究，并且不利于他们利用各自的优势进行一线研究。在这篇文章中，我们讨论了与使用新技术进行数据分析相关的一些障碍和解决方案，分析了最终用户发现的障碍。使用带有一个线性函数的 sonoUno 工具和从斯隆数字巡天下载的天文数据集，对九名有或没有视力障碍的人进行了焦点小组会议。通过焦点小组研究，结合使用可听化的数据分析，我们得出结论，功能多样化的人需要自主的工具，从而实现工作的精确性、确定性、有效性和效率，从而提高公平性。这可以通过追求以用户为中心的设计方法作为软件开发的一部分，并根据研究目标调整资源来实现。迫切需要开发工具，使人们具有广泛的能力，不仅能够使用多感官技术访问数据，而且能够解决当前缺乏包容性的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于用户中心设计的天体物理数据声音化新方法，通过开发SonoUno工具帮助残障研究者更自主地进行数据分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管数字信息获取被联合国列为基本人权，但残障人士在科学领域仍面临工具不无障碍的困境，现有技术未能充分满足其多样化需求。
AI.method: 通过九人焦点小组测试SonoUno工具，使用SDSS天文数据集和单一线性函数，对比视觉障碍与非障碍用户的数据分析体验。
AI.result: 功能多样化用户需要自主性强的工具以提升分析精度与效率，用户中心设计能有效促进科研公平性。
AI.conclusion: 必须开发多感官技术工具并采用用户中心设计，才能解决当前科研领域的包容性缺失问题。

authors_text: Gonzalo De La Vega,Leonardo Martin Exequiel Dominguez,Johanna Casado,Beatriz García
title: SonoUno web: an innovative user centred web interface
title_zh: SonoUno web：以用户为中心的创新网络界面
comment: 7 pages, 3 figures, HCII2022 conference, Supported by the Project REINFORCE (GA 872859) with the support of the EC Research Innovation Action under the H2020 Programme SwafS-2019-1the REINFORCE (https://www.reinforceeu.eu)
comments: 7 pages, 3 figures, HCII2022 conference, Supported by the Project REINFORCE (GA 872859) with the support of the EC Research Innovation Action under the H2020 Programme SwafS-2019-1the REINFORCE (https://www.reinforceeu.eu)
abstract: Sonification as a complement of visualization is been under research for decades as a new ways of data deployment. ICAD conferences, gather together specialists from different disciplines to discuss about sonification. Different tools as sonoUno, starSound and Web Sandbox are attempt to reach a tool to open astronomical data sets and sonify it in conjunction to visualization. In this contribution, the sonoUno web version is presented, this version allows user to explore data sets without any installation. The data can be uploaded or a pre-loaded file can be opened, the sonification and the visual characteristics of the plot can be customized on the same window. The plot, sound and marks can be saved. The web interface were tested with the main used screen readers in order to confirm their good performance.
summary: Sonification as a complement of visualization is been under research for decades as a new ways of data deployment. ICAD conferences, gather together specialists from different disciplines to discuss about sonification. Different tools as sonoUno, starSound and Web Sandbox are attempt to reach a tool to open astronomical data sets and sonify it in conjunction to visualization. In this contribution, the sonoUno web version is presented, this version allows user to explore data sets without any installation. The data can be uploaded or a pre-loaded file can be opened, the sonification and the visual characteristics of the plot can be customized on the same window. The plot, sound and marks can be saved. The web interface were tested with the main used screen readers in order to confirm their good performance.
abstract_zh: 可听化作为可视化的补充，作为一种新的数据部署方式已经研究了几十年。 ICAD 会议聚集了来自不同学科的专家来讨论可听化问题。 sonoUno、starSound 和 Web Sandbox 等不同工具都试图提供一种打开天文数据集并将其与可视化相结合的工具。在本次贡献中，提出了 sonoUno 网络版本，该版本允许用户无需任何安装即可探索数据集。可以上传数据或打开预加载的文件，可以在同一窗口上自定义绘图的声音和视觉特征。可以保存情节、声音和标记。使用主要使用的屏幕阅读器对网络界面进行了测试，以确认其良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SonoUno网页版，这是一个无需安装即可探索天文数据集的用户友好型网页界面，支持数据上传、声学化与可视化定制及保存。
AI.motivation: 现有天文数据声学化工具需安装或缺乏用户友好界面，限制了其普及与可访问性，需开发更便捷的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发基于网页的交互界面，支持数据上传或预加载，集成声学化参数与可视化设置调整功能，并兼容主流屏幕阅读器进行无障碍测试。
AI.result: 实现数据可视化、声学化参数同步调整及结果保存功能，通过主流屏幕阅读器测试验证了界面的可访问性与兼容性。
AI.conclusion: SonoUno网页版提升了天文数据探索的可访问性与交互性，为跨学科数据可视化与声学化研究提供了实用工具。

search_text: SonoUno web: an innovative user centred web interface SonoUno web：以用户为中心的创新网络界面 Sonification as a complement of visualization is been under research for decades as a new ways of data deployment. ICAD conferences, gather together specialists from different disciplines to discuss about sonification. Different tools as sonoUno, starSound and Web Sandbox are attempt to reach a tool to open astronomical data sets and sonify it in conjunction to visualization. In this contribution, the sonoUno web version is presented, this version allows user to explore data sets without any installation. The data can be uploaded or a pre-loaded file can be opened, the sonification and the visual characteristics of the plot can be customized on the same window. The plot, sound and marks can be saved. The web interface were tested with the main used screen readers in order to confirm their good performance. 可听化作为可视化的补充，作为一种新的数据部署方式已经研究了几十年。 ICAD 会议聚集了来自不同学科的专家来讨论可听化问题。 sonoUno、starSound 和 Web Sandbox 等不同工具都试图提供一种打开天文数据集并将其与可视化相结合的工具。在本次贡献中，提出了 sonoUno 网络版本，该版本允许用户无需任何安装即可探索数据集。可以上传数据或打开预加载的文件，可以在同一窗口上自定义绘图的声音和视觉特征。可以保存情节、声音和标记。使用主要使用的屏幕阅读器对网络界面进行了测试，以确认其良好的性能。 本文介绍了SonoUno网页版，这是一个无需安装即可探索天文数据集的用户友好型网页界面，支持数据上传、声学化与可视化定制及保存。 Gonzalo De La Vega,Leonardo Martin Exequiel Dominguez,Johanna Casado,Beatriz García astro-ph.IM,cs.HC,physics.ed-ph

title: GANravel: User-Driven Direction Disentanglement in Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: GANravel：生成对抗网络中用户驱动的方向解缠
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have many application areas including image editing, domain translation, missing data imputation, and support for creative work. However, GANs are considered 'black boxes'. Specifically, the end-users have little control over how to improve editing directions through disentanglement. Prior work focused on new GAN architectures to disentangle editing directions. Alternatively, we propose GANravel a user-driven direction disentanglement tool that complements the existing GAN architectures and allows users to improve editing directions iteratively. In two user studies with 16 participants each, GANravel users were able to disentangle directions and outperformed the state-of-the-art direction discovery baselines in disentanglement performance. In the second user study, GANravel was used in a creative task of creating dog memes and was able to create high-quality edited images and GIFs.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have many application areas including image editing, domain translation, missing data imputation, and support for creative work. However, GANs are considered 'black boxes'. Specifically, the end-users have little control over how to improve editing directions through disentanglement. Prior work focused on new GAN architectures to disentangle editing directions. Alternatively, we propose GANravel a user-driven direction disentanglement tool that complements the existing GAN architectures and allows users to improve editing directions iteratively. In two user studies with 16 participants each, GANravel users were able to disentangle directions and outperformed the state-of-the-art direction discovery baselines in disentanglement performance. In the second user study, GANravel was used in a creative task of creating dog memes and was able to create high-quality edited images and GIFs.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）有许多应用领域，包括图像编辑、域翻译、缺失数据插补以及对创造性工作的支持。然而，GAN 被认为是“黑匣子”。具体来说，最终用户几乎无法控制如何通过解开来改进编辑方向。之前的工作重点是新的 GAN 架构，以理清编辑方向。或者，我们提出 GANravel 是一种用户驱动的方向解开工具，它补充了现有的 GAN 架构，并允许用户迭代地改进编辑方向。在两项分别有 16 名参与者的用户研究中，GANravel 用户能够解开方向，并在解开性能方面超越了最先进的方向发现基线。在第二项用户研究中，GANravel 被用于创建狗表情包的创意任务，并能够创建高质量的编辑图像和 GIF。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用户驱动的生成对抗网络（GAN）方向解耦工具GANravel，旨在提升用户对图像编辑方向的控制能力。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN架构在方向解耦上效果有限，用户难以直接控制编辑方向，且传统方法过度依赖模型架构改进而非用户交互。
AI.method: 开发用户交互式工具GANravel，允许用户通过迭代反馈优化编辑方向，无需修改原有GAN架构。
AI.result: 两组用户实验显示，GANravel在解耦性能上优于现有方法，并成功生成高质量狗表情包图像和GIF。
AI.conclusion: GANravel通过用户驱动方式有效提升GAN编辑可控性，为创意图像生成提供实用工具。

title: Personalized Privacy Auditing and Optimization at Test Time
title_zh: 测试时的个性化隐私审核和优化
abstract: A number of learning models used in consequential domains, such as to assist in legal, banking, hiring, and healthcare decisions, make use of potentially sensitive users' information to carry out inference. Further, the complete set of features is typically required to perform inference. This not only poses severe privacy risks for the individuals using the learning systems, but also requires companies and organizations massive human efforts to verify the correctness of the released information. This paper asks whether it is necessary to require \emph{all} input features for a model to return accurate predictions at test time and shows that, under a personalized setting, each individual may need to release only a small subset of these features without impacting the final decisions. The paper also provides an efficient sequential algorithm that chooses which attributes should be provided by each individual. Evaluation over several learning tasks shows that individuals may be able to report as little as 10\% of their information to ensure the same level of accuracy of a model that uses the complete users' information.
summary: A number of learning models used in consequential domains, such as to assist in legal, banking, hiring, and healthcare decisions, make use of potentially sensitive users' information to carry out inference. Further, the complete set of features is typically required to perform inference. This not only poses severe privacy risks for the individuals using the learning systems, but also requires companies and organizations massive human efforts to verify the correctness of the released information. This paper asks whether it is necessary to require \emph{all} input features for a model to return accurate predictions at test time and shows that, under a personalized setting, each individual may need to release only a small subset of these features without impacting the final decisions. The paper also provides an efficient sequential algorithm that chooses which attributes should be provided by each individual. Evaluation over several learning tasks shows that individuals may be able to report as little as 10\% of their information to ensure the same level of accuracy of a model that uses the complete users' information.
abstract_zh: 许多用于后续领域的学习模型，例如协助法律、银行、招聘和医疗保健决策，都利用潜在敏感用户的信息来进行推理。此外，通常需要完整的特征集来执行推理。这不仅给使用学习系统的个人带来了严重的隐私风险，而且还需要公司和组织付出大量的人力来验证发布信息的正确性。本文询问模型是否有必要要求 \emph{all} 输入特征才能在测试时返回准确的预测，并表明，在个性化设置下，每个人可能只需要释放这些特征的一小部分，而不影响最终决策。该论文还提供了一种有效的顺序算法，用于选择每个人应提供哪些属性。对多项学习任务的评估表明，个人可能能够报告少至 10% 的信息，以确保使用完整用户信息的模型具有相同水平的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在测试阶段通过个性化隐私审计与优化，减少用户需提供的敏感特征数量以保障隐私并维持模型准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型需完整特征集进行推理，导致隐私泄露风险与人工验证成本高昂，亟需在保证预测精度的前提下降低敏感信息暴露。
AI.method: 设计高效序列算法，根据个体特征重要性动态选择最小必要属性子集，实现个性化隐私保护与模型性能平衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，用户仅需披露10%的原始特征即可保持与完整特征集相当的模型预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过个性化特征选择机制，可在不牺牲模型效果的前提下显著降低隐私风险，为隐私保护与模型实用性提供新思路。

authors_text: Ching-Yao Chuang,Varun Jampani,Yuanzhen Li,Antonio Torralba,Stefanie Jegelka
title: Debiasing Vision-Language Models via Biased Prompts
title_zh: 通过有偏差的提示消除视觉语言模型的偏差
abstract: Machine learning models have been shown to inherit biases from their training datasets. This can be particularly problematic for vision-language foundation models trained on uncurated datasets scraped from the internet. The biases can be amplified and propagated to downstream applications like zero-shot classifiers and text-to-image generative models. In this study, we propose a general approach for debiasing vision-language foundation models by projecting out biased directions in the text embedding. In particular, we show that debiasing only the text embedding with a calibrated projection matrix suffices to yield robust classifiers and fair generative models. The proposed closed-form solution enables easy integration into large-scale pipelines, and empirical results demonstrate that our approach effectively reduces social bias and spurious correlation in both discriminative and generative vision-language models without the need for additional data or training.
summary: Machine learning models have been shown to inherit biases from their training datasets. This can be particularly problematic for vision-language foundation models trained on uncurated datasets scraped from the internet. The biases can be amplified and propagated to downstream applications like zero-shot classifiers and text-to-image generative models. In this study, we propose a general approach for debiasing vision-language foundation models by projecting out biased directions in the text embedding. In particular, we show that debiasing only the text embedding with a calibrated projection matrix suffices to yield robust classifiers and fair generative models. The proposed closed-form solution enables easy integration into large-scale pipelines, and empirical results demonstrate that our approach effectively reduces social bias and spurious correlation in both discriminative and generative vision-language models without the need for additional data or training.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型已被证明会继承训练数据集的偏差。对于在从互联网上抓取的未经整理的数据集进行训练的视觉语言基础模型来说，这可能尤其成问题。这些偏差可以被放大并传播到下游应用程序，例如零样本分类器和文本到图像生成模型。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种通过投影文本嵌入中的偏差方向来消除视觉语言基础模型偏差的通用方法。特别是，我们表明仅使用校准的投影矩阵对文本嵌入进行去偏就足以产生鲁棒的分类器和公平的生成模型。所提出的封闭式解决方案可以轻松集成到大规模管道中，并且实证结果表明，我们的方法有效地减少了判别性和生成视觉语言模型中的社会偏见和虚假相关性，而无需额外的数据或培训。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过投影文本嵌入中的有偏方向来去偏视觉-语言模型的方法。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型可能继承训练数据中的偏见，导致下游应用中的偏见和虚假相关性，需有效去偏方法。
AI.method: 通过校准的投影矩阵对文本嵌入进行去偏，无需额外数据或训练。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法有效减少判别和生成模型中的社会偏见和虚假相关性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效去偏，且易于集成到大规模流程中，无需额外数据或训练。

search_text: Debiasing Vision-Language Models via Biased Prompts 通过有偏差的提示消除视觉语言模型的偏差 Machine learning models have been shown to inherit biases from their training datasets. This can be particularly problematic for vision-language foundation models trained on uncurated datasets scraped from the internet. The biases can be amplified and propagated to downstream applications like zero-shot classifiers and text-to-image generative models. In this study, we propose a general approach for debiasing vision-language foundation models by projecting out biased directions in the text embedding. In particular, we show that debiasing only the text embedding with a calibrated projection matrix suffices to yield robust classifiers and fair generative models. The proposed closed-form solution enables easy integration into large-scale pipelines, and empirical results demonstrate that our approach effectively reduces social bias and spurious correlation in both discriminative and generative vision-language models without the need for additional data or training. 机器学习模型已被证明会继承训练数据集的偏差。对于在从互联网上抓取的未经整理的数据集进行训练的视觉语言基础模型来说，这可能尤其成问题。这些偏差可以被放大并传播到下游应用程序，例如零样本分类器和文本到图像生成模型。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种通过投影文本嵌入中的偏差方向来消除视觉语言基础模型偏差的通用方法。特别是，我们表明仅使用校准的投影矩阵对文本嵌入进行去偏就足以产生鲁棒的分类器和公平的生成模型。所提出的封闭式解决方案可以轻松集成到大规模管道中，并且实证结果表明，我们的方法有效地减少了判别性和生成视觉语言模型中的社会偏见和虚假相关性，而无需额外的数据或培训。 提出一种通过投影文本嵌入中的有偏方向来去偏视觉-语言模型的方法。 Ching-Yao Chuang,Varun Jampani,Yuanzhen Li,Antonio Torralba,Stefanie Jegelka cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Evaluating Temporal Observation-Based Causal Discovery Techniques Applied to Road Driver Behaviour
title_zh: 评估应用于道路驾驶员行为的基于时间观察的因果发现技术
comment: 26 Pages = 13 Pages (Main Content) + 5 Pages (References) + 8 Pages (Appendix), 2 Figures, To be published in the Proceedings of the 2nd Conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning as part of the Journal of Machine Learning Research Workshop and Conference Proceedings series, Final submission version; Updated from initial to final submission version
comments: 26 Pages = 13 Pages (Main Content) + 5 Pages (References) + 8 Pages (Appendix), 2 Figures, To be published in the Proceedings of the 2nd Conference on Causal Learning and Reasoning as part of the Journal of Machine Learning Research Workshop and Conference Proceedings series, Final submission version; Updated from initial to final submission version
abstract: Autonomous robots are required to reason about the behaviour of dynamic agents in their environment. The creation of models to describe these relationships is typically accomplished through the application of causal discovery techniques. However, as it stands observational causal discovery techniques struggle to adequately cope with conditions such as causal sparsity and non-stationarity typically seen during online usage in autonomous agent domains. Meanwhile, interventional techniques are not always feasible due to domain restrictions. In order to better explore the issues facing observational techniques and promote further discussion of these topics we carry out a benchmark across 10 contemporary observational temporal causal discovery methods in the domain of autonomous driving. By evaluating these methods upon causal scenes drawn from real world datasets in addition to those generated synthetically we highlight where improvements need to be made in order to facilitate the application of causal discovery techniques to the aforementioned use-cases. Finally, we discuss potential directions for future work that could help better tackle the difficulties currently experienced by state of the art techniques.
summary: Autonomous robots are required to reason about the behaviour of dynamic agents in their environment. The creation of models to describe these relationships is typically accomplished through the application of causal discovery techniques. However, as it stands observational causal discovery techniques struggle to adequately cope with conditions such as causal sparsity and non-stationarity typically seen during online usage in autonomous agent domains. Meanwhile, interventional techniques are not always feasible due to domain restrictions. In order to better explore the issues facing observational techniques and promote further discussion of these topics we carry out a benchmark across 10 contemporary observational temporal causal discovery methods in the domain of autonomous driving. By evaluating these methods upon causal scenes drawn from real world datasets in addition to those generated synthetically we highlight where improvements need to be made in order to facilitate the application of causal discovery techniques to the aforementioned use-cases. Finally, we discuss potential directions for future work that could help better tackle the difficulties currently experienced by state of the art techniques.
abstract_zh: 自主机器人需要推理其环境中动态代理的行为。描述这些关系的模型的创建通常是通过应用因果发现技术来完成的。然而，就目前情况而言，观察因果发现技术很难充分应对自治代理领域在线使用过程中常见的因果稀疏性和非平稳性等条件。同时，由于领域限制，介入技术并不总是可行。为了更好地探索观测技术面临的问题并促进对这些主题的进一步讨论，我们对自动驾驶领域的 10 种当代观测时间因果发现方法进行了基准测试。通过根据从现实世界数据集提取的因果场景以及综合生成的因果场景来评估这些方法，我们强调了需要进行改进的地方，以促进因果发现技术在上述用例中的应用。最后，我们讨论了未来工作的潜在方向，这些方向可以帮助更好地解决当前最先进技术所遇到的困难。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了10种基于时间观测的因果发现技术在自动驾驶场景中对驾驶行为建模的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有观测性因果发现技术难以处理自动驾驶中的因果稀疏性、非平稳性问题，而干预性方法常受领域限制。
AI.method: 通过真实世界数据集和合成数据，对10种现代观测性时间因果发现方法进行基准测试与对比分析。
AI.result: 发现当前方法在处理动态环境中的因果关系时存在显著局限性，需改进以适应自动驾驶的实际需求。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究提升观测性因果发现技术鲁棒性的方法，以应对自动驾驶场景中的复杂动态特性。

title: Interaction and Decision Making-aware Motion Planning using Branch Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 使用分支模型预测控制的交互和决策感知运动规划
abstract: Motion planning for autonomous vehicles sharing the road with human drivers remains challenging. The difficulty arises from three challenging aspects: human drivers are 1) multi-modal, 2) interacting with the autonomous vehicle, and 3) actively making decisions based on the current state of the traffic scene. We propose a motion planning framework based on Branch Model Predictive Control to deal with these challenges. The multi-modality is addressed by considering multiple future outcomes associated with different decisions taken by the human driver. The interactive nature of humans is considered by modeling them as reactive agents impacted by the actions of the autonomous vehicle. Finally, we consider a model developed in human neuroscience studies as a possible way of encoding the decision making process of human drivers. We present simulation results in various scenarios, showing the advantages of the proposed method and its ability to plan assertive maneuvers that convey intent to humans.
summary: Motion planning for autonomous vehicles sharing the road with human drivers remains challenging. The difficulty arises from three challenging aspects: human drivers are 1) multi-modal, 2) interacting with the autonomous vehicle, and 3) actively making decisions based on the current state of the traffic scene. We propose a motion planning framework based on Branch Model Predictive Control to deal with these challenges. The multi-modality is addressed by considering multiple future outcomes associated with different decisions taken by the human driver. The interactive nature of humans is considered by modeling them as reactive agents impacted by the actions of the autonomous vehicle. Finally, we consider a model developed in human neuroscience studies as a possible way of encoding the decision making process of human drivers. We present simulation results in various scenarios, showing the advantages of the proposed method and its ability to plan assertive maneuvers that convey intent to humans.
abstract_zh: 与人类驾驶员共享道路的自动驾驶汽车的运动规划仍然具有挑战性。困难来自三个具有挑战性的方面：人类驾驶员 1) 多模式，2) 与自动驾驶车辆交互，3) 根据交通场景的当前状态主动做出决策。我们提出了一种基于分支模型预测控制的运动规划框架来应对这些挑战。通过考虑与人类驾驶员做出的不同决策相关的多种未来结果来解决多模态问题。通过将人类建模为受自动驾驶车辆行为影响的反应代理来考虑人类的交互本质。最后，我们考虑在人类神经科学研究中开发的模型作为编码人类驾驶员决策过程的可能方式。我们展示了各种场景下的模拟结果，展示了所提出的方法的优点及其规划向人类传达意图的果断动作的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分支模型预测控制的运动规划框架，以应对自动驾驶车辆与人类驾驶员交互时的多模态、互动性和决策制定挑战。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在与人类驾驶员共享道路时面临三大挑战：人类驾驶员行为的多模态性、与自动驾驶车辆的互动性以及基于交通场景状态的主动决策过程。
AI.method: 通过分支模型预测控制（BMPC）框架，考虑人类驾驶员不同决策对应的多种未来结果，将人类建模为受自动驾驶车辆动作影响的反应型代理，并引入神经科学中的决策模型编码人类决策过程。
AI.result: 在多种场景的仿真结果表明，该方法能够规划出具有主动意图传达能力的机动策略，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: BMPC框架有效解决了自动驾驶车辆在复杂交通场景中与人类驾驶员交互及决策制定的挑战。

Finally, we consider a model developed in human neuroscience studies as a possible way of encoding the decision making process of human drivers. We present simulation results in various scenarios, showing the advantages of the proposed method and its ability to plan assertive maneuvers that convey intent to humans. 与人类驾驶员共享道路的自动驾驶汽车的运动规划仍然具有挑战性。困难来自三个具有挑战性的方面：人类驾驶员 1) 多模式，2) 与自动驾驶车辆交互，3) 根据交通场景的当前状态主动做出决策。我们提出了一种基于分支模型预测控制的运动规划框架来应对这些挑战。通过考虑与人类驾驶员做出的不同决策相关的多种未来结果来解决多模态问题。通过将人类建模为受自动驾驶车辆行为影响的反应代理来考虑人类的交互本质。最后，我们考虑在人类神经科学研究中开发的模型作为编码人类驾驶员决策过程的可能方式。我们展示了各种场景下的模拟结果，展示了所提出的方法的优点及其规划向人类传达意图的果断动作的能力。 本文提出一种基于分支模型预测控制的运动规划框架，以应对自动驾驶车辆与人类驾驶员交互时的多模态、互动性和决策制定挑战。 Rui Oliveira,Siddharth H. Nair,Bo Wahlberg cs.RO,eess.SY

title: NASiam: Efficient Representation Learning using Neural Architecture Search for Siamese Networks
title_zh: NASiam：使用连体网络的神经架构搜索进行高效表示学习
abstract: Siamese networks are one of the most trending methods to achieve self-supervised visual representation learning (SSL). Since hand labeling is costly, SSL can play a crucial part by allowing deep learning to train on large unlabeled datasets. Meanwhile, Neural Architecture Search (NAS) is becoming increasingly important as a technique to discover novel deep learning architectures. However, early NAS methods based on reinforcement learning or evolutionary algorithms suffered from ludicrous computational and memory costs. In contrast, differentiable NAS, a gradient-based approach, has the advantage of being much more efficient and has thus retained most of the attention in the past few years. In this article, we present NASiam, a novel approach that uses for the first time differentiable NAS to improve the multilayer perceptron projector and predictor (encoder/predictor pair) architectures inside siamese-networks-based contrastive learning frameworks (e.g., SimCLR, SimSiam, and MoCo) while preserving the simplicity of previous baselines. We crafted a search space designed explicitly for multilayer perceptrons, inside which we explored several alternatives to the standard ReLU activation function. We show that these new architectures allow ResNet backbone convolutional models to learn strong representations efficiently. NASiam reaches competitive performance in both small-scale (i.e., CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100) and large-scale (i.e., ImageNet) image classification datasets while costing only a few GPU hours. We discuss the composition of the NAS-discovered architectures and emit hypotheses on why they manage to prevent collapsing behavior. Our code is available at https://github.com/aheuillet/NASiam.
summary: Siamese networks are one of the most trending methods to achieve self-supervised visual representation learning (SSL). Since hand labeling is costly, SSL can play a crucial part by allowing deep learning to train on large unlabeled datasets. Meanwhile, Neural Architecture Search (NAS) is becoming increasingly important as a technique to discover novel deep learning architectures. However, early NAS methods based on reinforcement learning or evolutionary algorithms suffered from ludicrous computational and memory costs. In contrast, differentiable NAS, a gradient-based approach, has the advantage of being much more efficient and has thus retained most of the attention in the past few years. In this article, we present NASiam, a novel approach that uses for the first time differentiable NAS to improve the multilayer perceptron projector and predictor (encoder/predictor pair) architectures inside siamese-networks-based contrastive learning frameworks (e.g., SimCLR, SimSiam, and MoCo) while preserving the simplicity of previous baselines. We crafted a search space designed explicitly for multilayer perceptrons, inside which we explored several alternatives to the standard ReLU activation function. We show that these new architectures allow ResNet backbone convolutional models to learn strong representations efficiently. NASiam reaches competitive performance in both small-scale (i.e., CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100) and large-scale (i.e., ImageNet) image classification datasets while costing only a few GPU hours. We discuss the composition of the NAS-discovered architectures and emit hypotheses on why they manage to prevent collapsing behavior. Our code is available at https://github.com/aheuillet/NASiam.
abstract_zh: 连体网络是实现自监督视觉表示学习（SSL）最流行的方法之一。由于手工标记成本高昂，SSL 可以通过允许深度学习在大型未标记数据集上进行训练来发挥至关重要的作用。与此同时，神经架构搜索（NAS）作为一种发现新颖深度学习架构的技术变得越来越重要。然而，早期基于强化学习或进化算法的 NAS 方法面临着可笑的计算和内存成本。相比之下，可微 NAS（一种基于梯度的方法）具有效率更高的优势，因此在过去几年中受到了大部分关注。在本文中，我们提出了 NASiam，这是一种新颖的方法，首次使用可微 NAS 来改进基于孪生网络的对比学习框架（例如 SimCLR、SimSiam 和 MoCo）内的多层感知器投影器和预测器（编码器/预测器对）架构，同时保留先前基线的简单性。我们精心设计了一个专门为多层感知器设计的搜索空间，在其中探索了标准 ReLU 激活函数的几种替代方案。我们表明，这些新架构允许 ResNet 主干卷积模型有效地学习强表示。 NASiam 在小规模（即 CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100）和大规模（即 ImageNet）图像分类数据集上都达到了有竞争力的性能，而仅花费几个 GPU 小时。我们讨论了 NAS 发现的架构的组成，并提出了关于它们为何能够防止崩溃行为的假设。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/aheuillet/NASiam 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NASiam方法，首次将可微分神经架构搜索（NAS）应用于基于孪生网络的对比学习框架，以优化多层感知机的投影器和预测器架构，提升自监督视觉表征学习效率。
AI.motivation: 传统NAS方法计算成本高，而可微分NAS更高效。孪生网络在自监督学习中表现优异，但其架构设计依赖人工经验，缺乏系统优化。本文旨在通过可微分NAS自动发现更优的MLP架构，提升模型性能并降低计算成本。
AI.method: 设计针对MLP的搜索空间，探索替代ReLU的激活函数，结合可微分NAS优化孪生网络中的编码器-预测器对架构，并集成到SimCLR、SimSiam等对比学习框架中。
AI.result: NASiam在CIFAR-10/100和ImageNet数据集上达到竞争力的分类性能，仅需少量GPU小时，且分析了NAS发现的架构防止表征坍塌的原因。
AI.conclusion: NASiam通过高效可微分NAS优化孪生网络架构，在保持简单性的同时显著提升表征学习效果，为自监督学习提供了新的架构设计思路。

title: Exploring Wedges of an Oriented Grid by an Automaton with Pebbles
title_zh: 通过带有卵石的自动机探索定向网格的楔子
abstract: A mobile agent, modeled as a deterministic finite automaton, navigates in the infinite anonymous oriented grid $\mathbb{Z} \times \mathbb{Z}$. It has to explore a given infinite subgraph of the grid by visiting all of its nodes. We focus on the simplest subgraphs, called {\em wedges}, spanned by all nodes of the grid located between two half-lines in the plane, with a common origin. Many wedges turn out to be impossible to explore by an automaton that cannot mark nodes of the grid. Hence, we study the following question: Given a wedge $W$, what is the smallest number $p$ of (movable) pebbles for which there exists an automaton that can explore $W$ using $p$ pebbles? Our main contribution is a complete solution of this problem. For each wedge $W$ we determine this minimum number $p$, show an automaton that explores it using $p$ pebbles and show that fewer pebbles are not enough. We show that this smallest number of pebbles can vary from 0 to 3, depending on the angle between half-lines limiting the wedge and depending on whether the automaton can cross these half-lines or not.
summary: A mobile agent, modeled as a deterministic finite automaton, navigates in the infinite anonymous oriented grid $\mathbb{Z} \times \mathbb{Z}$. It has to explore a given infinite subgraph of the grid by visiting all of its nodes. We focus on the simplest subgraphs, called {\em wedges}, spanned by all nodes of the grid located between two half-lines in the plane, with a common origin. Many wedges turn out to be impossible to explore by an automaton that cannot mark nodes of the grid. Hence, we study the following question: Given a wedge $W$, what is the smallest number $p$ of (movable) pebbles for which there exists an automaton that can explore $W$ using $p$ pebbles? Our main contribution is a complete solution of this problem. For each wedge $W$ we determine this minimum number $p$, show an automaton that explores it using $p$ pebbles and show that fewer pebbles are not enough. We show that this smallest number of pebbles can vary from 0 to 3, depending on the angle between half-lines limiting the wedge and depending on whether the automaton can cross these half-lines or not.
abstract_zh: 建模为确定性有限自动机的移动代理在无限匿名导向网格 $\mathbb{Z} \times \mathbb{Z}$ 中导航。它必须通过访问网格的所有节点来探索网格的给定无限子图。我们关注最简单的子图，称为{\em 楔形}，由位于平面中两条半线之间的网格的所有节点跨越，具有共同的原点。事实证明，无法标记网格节点的自动机无法探索许多楔子。因此，我们研究以下问题：给定一个楔子$W$，存在可以使用$p$卵石探索$W$的自动机的（可移动）卵石的最小数量$p$是多少？我们的主要贡献是这个问题的完整解决方案。对于每个楔子 $W$，我们确定这个最小数量 $p$，显示一个使用 $p$ 卵石探索它的自动机，并表明较少的卵石是不够的。我们表明，卵石的最小数量可以从 0 到 3 变化，具体取决于限制楔形的半线之间的角度以及自动机是否可以穿过这些半线。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无限定向网格中，使用带有可移动石子的自动机探索楔形区域所需的最少石子数量。
AI.motivation: 在无法标记网格节点的情况下，某些楔形区域无法被自动机探索，因此需确定不同角度楔形区域所需的最小石子数。
AI.method: 通过分析楔形角度及自动机能否跨越边界线，设计自动机并证明不同情况下石子数的上下界。
AI.result: 证明了楔形区域所需最少石子数介于0到3之间，具体取决于角度及边界线跨越能力。
AI.conclusion: 完全解决了楔形探索的石子数量问题，为不同情况提供了精确的最小值及对应算法。

We show that this smallest number of pebbles can vary from 0 to 3, depending on the angle between half-lines limiting the wedge and depending on whether the automaton can cross these half-lines or not. 建模为确定性有限自动机的移动代理在无限匿名导向网格 $\mathbb{Z} \times \mathbb{Z}$ 中导航。它必须通过访问网格的所有节点来探索网格的给定无限子图。我们关注最简单的子图，称为{\em 楔形}，由位于平面中两条半线之间的网格的所有节点跨越，具有共同的原点。事实证明，无法标记网格节点的自动机无法探索许多楔子。因此，我们研究以下问题：给定一个楔子$W$，存在可以使用$p$卵石探索$W$的自动机的（可移动）卵石的最小数量$p$是多少？我们的主要贡献是这个问题的完整解决方案。对于每个楔子 $W$，我们确定这个最小数量 $p$，显示一个使用 $p$ 卵石探索它的自动机，并表明较少的卵石是不够的。我们表明，卵石的最小数量可以从 0 到 3 变化，具体取决于限制楔形的半线之间的角度以及自动机是否可以穿过这些半线。 本文研究了在无限定向网格中，使用带有可移动石子的自动机探索楔形区域所需的最少石子数量。 Subhash Bhagat,Andrzej Pelc cs.DS

title: Probabilistic Point Cloud Modeling via Self-Organizing Gaussian Mixture Models
title_zh: 通过自组织高斯混合模型进行概率点云建模
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, to appear in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: 8 pages, 6 figures, to appear in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: This letter presents a continuous probabilistic modeling methodology for spatial point cloud data using finite Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) where the number of components are adapted based on the scene complexity. Few hierarchical and adaptive methods have been proposed to address the challenge of balancing model fidelity with size. Instead, state-of-the-art mapping approaches require tuning parameters for specific use cases, but do not generalize across diverse environments. To address this gap, we utilize a self-organizing principle from information-theoretic learning to automatically adapt the complexity of the GMM model based on the relevant information in the sensor data. The approach is evaluated against existing point cloud modeling techniques on real-world data with varying degrees of scene complexity.
summary: This letter presents a continuous probabilistic modeling methodology for spatial point cloud data using finite Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) where the number of components are adapted based on the scene complexity. Few hierarchical and adaptive methods have been proposed to address the challenge of balancing model fidelity with size. Instead, state-of-the-art mapping approaches require tuning parameters for specific use cases, but do not generalize across diverse environments. To address this gap, we utilize a self-organizing principle from information-theoretic learning to automatically adapt the complexity of the GMM model based on the relevant information in the sensor data. The approach is evaluated against existing point cloud modeling techniques on real-world data with varying degrees of scene complexity.
abstract_zh: 这封信提出了一种使用有限高斯混合模型 (GMM) 的空间点云数据连续概率建模方法，其中组件的数量根据场景复杂性进行调整。很少有人提出分层和自适应方法来解决平衡模型保真度与尺寸的挑战。相反，最先进的映射方法需要针对特定​​用例调整参数，但不能在不同的环境中推广。为了解决这一差距，我们利用信息论学习中的自组织原理，根据传感器数据中的相关信息自动调整 GMM 模型的复杂性。该方法根据具有不同场景复杂程度的真实世界数据的现有点云建模技术进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自组织高斯混合模型的概率点云建模方法，能根据场景复杂度自动调整模型组件数量。
AI.motivation: 现有点云建模方法需手动调整参数以适应不同环境，缺乏通用性，难以平衡模型精度与规模。
AI.method: 利用信息论学习中的自组织原理，通过传感器数据中的相关信息自动调节GMM组件数量，实现模型复杂度自适应。
AI.result: 在不同复杂度的真实场景数据集上验证，证明该方法在保持模型精度的同时具有更好的环境适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了点云建模中模型复杂度自适应问题，为多场景应用提供了更通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Jacob Imola,Alessandro Epasto,Mohammad Mahdian,Vincent Cohen-Addad,Vahab Mirrokni
title: Differentially-Private Hierarchical Clustering with Provable Approximation Guarantees
title_zh: 具有可证明近似保证的差分私有层次聚类
abstract: Hierarchical Clustering is a popular unsupervised machine learning method with decades of history and numerous applications. We initiate the study of differentially private approximation algorithms for hierarchical clustering under the rigorous framework introduced by (Dasgupta, 2016). We show strong lower bounds for the problem: that any $ε$-DP algorithm must exhibit $O(|V|^2/ ε)$-additive error for an input dataset $V$. Then, we exhibit a polynomial-time approximation algorithm with $O(|V|^{2.5}/ ε)$-additive error, and an exponential-time algorithm that meets the lower bound. To overcome the lower bound, we focus on the stochastic block model, a popular model of graphs, and, with a separation assumption on the blocks, propose a private $1+o(1)$ approximation algorithm which also recovers the blocks exactly. Finally, we perform an empirical study of our algorithms and validate their performance.
summary: Hierarchical Clustering is a popular unsupervised machine learning method with decades of history and numerous applications. We initiate the study of differentially private approximation algorithms for hierarchical clustering under the rigorous framework introduced by (Dasgupta, 2016). We show strong lower bounds for the problem: that any $ε$-DP algorithm must exhibit $O(|V|^2/ ε)$-additive error for an input dataset $V$. Then, we exhibit a polynomial-time approximation algorithm with $O(|V|^{2.5}/ ε)$-additive error, and an exponential-time algorithm that meets the lower bound. To overcome the lower bound, we focus on the stochastic block model, a popular model of graphs, and, with a separation assumption on the blocks, propose a private $1+o(1)$ approximation algorithm which also recovers the blocks exactly. Finally, we perform an empirical study of our algorithms and validate their performance.
abstract_zh: 层次聚类是一种流行的无监督机器学习方法，具有数十年的历史和众多的应用。我们在（Dasgupta，2016）引入的严格框架下发起了层次聚类的差分隐私近似算法的研究。我们展示了该问题的强下限：任何 $ε$-DP 算法对于输入数据集 $V$ 都必须表现出 $O(|V|^2/ ε)$-可加误差。然后，我们展示了具有 $O(|V|^{2.5}/ ε)$ 加性误差的多项式时间逼近算法，以及满足下界的指数时间算法。为了克服下限，我们关注随机块模型（一种流行的图模型），并且通过对块的分离假设，提出一种私有的 $1+o(1)$ 近似算法，该算法也可以准确地恢复块。最后，我们对我们的算法进行实证研究并验证其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究差分隐私框架下的分层聚类近似算法，提供理论保证并设计多项式时间算法。
AI.motivation: 分层聚类应用广泛，但缺乏差分隐私保护的近似算法理论分析，需填补该领域空白。
AI.method: 建立误差下界，设计多项式时间算法与指数时间算法，针对随机块模型提出近似算法并进行实证验证。
AI.result: 提出多项式时间算法误差为O(|V|².⁵/ε)，指数时间算法达到下界，随机块模型下实现1+o(1)近似并准确恢复块结构。
AI.conclusion: 为差分隐私分层聚类奠定理论基础，未来可扩展模型假设或优化算法效率。

authors_text: Mehedi H. Raju,Lee Friedman,Troy M. Bouman,Oleg V. Komogortsev
title: Determining Which Sine Wave Frequencies Correspond to Signal and Which Correspond to Noise in Eye-Tracking Time-Series
title_zh: 确定眼动追踪时间序列中哪些正弦波频率对应于信号，哪些对应于噪声
comment: Pages-16, Figures-11, Tables-4. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.07657
comments: Pages-16, Figures-11, Tables-4. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2209.07657
abstract: The Fourier theorem states that any time-series can be decomposed into a set of sinusoidal frequencies, each with its own phase and amplitude. The literature suggests that some frequencies are important to reproduce key qualities of eye-movements ("signal") and some of frequencies are not important ("noise"). To investigate what is signal and what is noise, we analyzed our dataset in three ways: (1) visual inspection of plots of saccade, microsaccade and smooth pursuit exemplars; (2) analysis of the percentage of variance accounted for (PVAF) in 1,033 unfiltered saccade trajectories by each frequency band; (3) analyzing the main sequence relationship between saccade peak velocity and amplitude, based on a power law fit. Visual inspection suggested that frequencies up to 75 Hz are required to represent microsaccades. Our PVAF analysis indicated that signals in the 0-25 Hz band account for nearly 100% of the variance in saccade trajectories. Power law coefficients (a, b) return to unfiltered levels for signals low-pass filtered at 75 Hz or higher. We conclude that to maintain eye movement signal and reduce noise, a cutoff frequency of 75 Hz is appropriate. We explain why, given this finding, a minimum sampling rate of 750 Hz is suggested.
summary: The Fourier theorem states that any time-series can be decomposed into a set of sinusoidal frequencies, each with its own phase and amplitude. The literature suggests that some frequencies are important to reproduce key qualities of eye-movements ("signal") and some of frequencies are not important ("noise"). To investigate what is signal and what is noise, we analyzed our dataset in three ways: (1) visual inspection of plots of saccade, microsaccade and smooth pursuit exemplars; (2) analysis of the percentage of variance accounted for (PVAF) in 1,033 unfiltered saccade trajectories by each frequency band; (3) analyzing the main sequence relationship between saccade peak velocity and amplitude, based on a power law fit. Visual inspection suggested that frequencies up to 75 Hz are required to represent microsaccades. Our PVAF analysis indicated that signals in the 0-25 Hz band account for nearly 100% of the variance in saccade trajectories. Power law coefficients (a, b) return to unfiltered levels for signals low-pass filtered at 75 Hz or higher. We conclude that to maintain eye movement signal and reduce noise, a cutoff frequency of 75 Hz is appropriate. We explain why, given this finding, a minimum sampling rate of 750 Hz is suggested.
abstract_zh: 傅里叶定理指出，任何时间序列都可以分解为一组正弦频率，每个正弦频率都有自己的相位和幅度。文献表明，某些频率对于再现眼球运动的关键质量（“信号”）很重要，而某些频率则不重要（“噪声”）。为了研究什么是信号，什么是噪声，我们通过三种方式分析了我们的数据集：（1）目视检查扫视、微扫视和平滑追踪示例的图； (2) 按每个频段分析 1,033 个未滤波的眼跳轨迹中的方差百分比 (PVAF)； (3)基于幂律拟合分析眼跳峰值速度与幅度之间的主序关系。目视检查表明需要高达 75 Hz 的频率来表示微跳视。我们的 PVAF 分析表明，0-25 Hz 频带内的信号几乎占眼跳轨迹变化的 100%。对于在 75 Hz 或更高频率下进行低通滤波的信号，幂律系数 (a、b) 返回到未滤波的水平。我们得出的结论是，为了保持眼球运动信号并减少噪声，75 Hz 的截止频率是合适的。鉴于这一发现，我们解释了为什么建议最小采样率为 750 Hz。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在确定眼动追踪时间序列中哪些正弦波频率属于信号，哪些属于噪声。
AI.motivation: 通过区分信号与噪声频率，可提高眼动数据的分析准确性，减少冗余信息干扰。
AI.method: 采用三种方法：（1）可视化检查眼动轨迹图；（2）分析1,033条未过滤轨迹的方差解释率（PVAF）；（3）基于幂律拟合分析眼动峰值速度与振幅的主序列关系。
AI.result: 视觉检查显示75Hz以下频率可表征微观眼动；PVAF分析表明0-25Hz频段解释了眼动轨迹近100%的方差；75Hz低通滤波后幂律参数恢复至原始水平。
AI.conclusion: 建议采用75Hz截止频率以保留信号并抑制噪声，对应采样率应不低于750Hz。

search_text: Determining Which Sine Wave Frequencies Correspond to Signal and Which Correspond to Noise in Eye-Tracking Time-Series 确定眼动追踪时间序列中哪些正弦波频率对应于信号，哪些对应于噪声 The Fourier theorem states that any time-series can be decomposed into a set of sinusoidal frequencies, each with its own phase and amplitude. The literature suggests that some frequencies are important to reproduce key qualities of eye-movements ("signal") and some of frequencies are not important ("noise"). To investigate what is signal and what is noise, we analyzed our dataset in three ways: (1) visual inspection of plots of saccade, microsaccade and smooth pursuit exemplars; (2) analysis of the percentage of variance accounted for (PVAF) in 1,033 unfiltered saccade trajectories by each frequency band; (3) analyzing the main sequence relationship between saccade peak velocity and amplitude, based on a power law fit. Visual inspection suggested that frequencies up to 75 Hz are required to represent microsaccades. Our PVAF analysis indicated that signals in the 0-25 Hz band account for nearly 100% of the variance in saccade trajectories. Power law coefficients (a, b) return to unfiltered levels for signals low-pass filtered at 75 Hz or higher. We conclude that to maintain eye movement signal and reduce noise, a cutoff frequency of 75 Hz is appropriate. We explain why, given this finding, a minimum sampling rate of 750 Hz is suggested. 傅里叶定理指出，任何时间序列都可以分解为一组正弦频率，每个正弦频率都有自己的相位和幅度。文献表明，某些频率对于再现眼球运动的关键质量（“信号”）很重要，而某些频率则不重要（“噪声”）。为了研究什么是信号，什么是噪声，我们通过三种方式分析了我们的数据集：（1）目视检查扫视、微扫视和平滑追踪示例的图； (2) 按每个频段分析 1,033 个未滤波的眼跳轨迹中的方差百分比 (PVAF)； (3)基于幂律拟合分析眼跳峰值速度与幅度之间的主序关系。目视检查表明需要高达 75 Hz 的频率来表示微跳视。我们的 PVAF 分析表明，0-25 Hz 频带内的信号几乎占眼跳轨迹变化的 100%。对于在 75 Hz 或更高频率下进行低通滤波的信号，幂律系数 (a、b) 返回到未滤波的水平。我们得出的结论是，为了保持眼球运动信号并减少噪声，75 Hz 的截止频率是合适的。鉴于这一发现，我们解释了为什么建议最小采样率为 750 Hz。 本文旨在确定眼动追踪时间序列中哪些正弦波频率属于信号，哪些属于噪声。 Mehedi H. Raju,Lee Friedman,Troy M. Bouman,Oleg V. Komogortsev cs.HC

title: On the Within-Group Fairness of Screening Classifiers
title_zh: 论筛选分类器的组内公平性
abstract: Screening classifiers are increasingly used to identify qualified candidates in a variety of selection processes. In this context, it has been recently shown that, if a classifier is calibrated, one can identify the smallest set of candidates which contains, in expectation, a desired number of qualified candidates using a threshold decision rule. This lends support to focusing on calibration as the only requirement for screening classifiers. In this paper, we argue that screening policies that use calibrated classifiers may suffer from an understudied type of within-group unfairness -- they may unfairly treat qualified members within demographic groups of interest. Further, we argue that this type of unfairness can be avoided if classifiers satisfy within-group monotonicity, a natural monotonicity property within each of the groups. Then, we introduce an efficient post-processing algorithm based on dynamic programming to minimally modify a given calibrated classifier so that its probability estimates satisfy within-group monotonicity. We validate our algorithm using US Census survey data and show that within-group monotonicity can be often achieved at a small cost in terms of prediction granularity and shortlist size.
summary: Screening classifiers are increasingly used to identify qualified candidates in a variety of selection processes. In this context, it has been recently shown that, if a classifier is calibrated, one can identify the smallest set of candidates which contains, in expectation, a desired number of qualified candidates using a threshold decision rule. This lends support to focusing on calibration as the only requirement for screening classifiers. In this paper, we argue that screening policies that use calibrated classifiers may suffer from an understudied type of within-group unfairness -- they may unfairly treat qualified members within demographic groups of interest. Further, we argue that this type of unfairness can be avoided if classifiers satisfy within-group monotonicity, a natural monotonicity property within each of the groups. Then, we introduce an efficient post-processing algorithm based on dynamic programming to minimally modify a given calibrated classifier so that its probability estimates satisfy within-group monotonicity. We validate our algorithm using US Census survey data and show that within-group monotonicity can be often achieved at a small cost in terms of prediction granularity and shortlist size.
abstract_zh: 筛选分类器越来越多地用于在各种选拔过程中识别合格的候选人。在这种情况下，最近已经表明，如果对分类器进行校准，则可以使用阈值决策规则识别出预期包含所需数量的合格候选者的最小候选者集合。这支持将校准作为筛选分类器的唯一要求。在本文中，我们认为使用校准分类器的筛选政策可能会受到一种未经充分研究的群体内不公平的影响——它们可能会不公平地对待感兴趣的人口群体中的合格成员。此外，我们认为，如果分类器满足组内单调性（每个组内的自然单调性属性），则可以避免这种类型的不公平。然后，我们引入一种基于动态规划的高效后处理算法，以最小程度地修改给定的校准分类器，使其概率估计满足组内单调性。我们使用美国人口普查调查数据验证我们的算法，并表明在预测粒度和候选名单大小方面通常可以以较小的成本实现组内单调性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究筛选分类器的组内公平性问题，提出通过校准分类器并引入组内单调性约束以减少对特定群体合格成员的不公平待遇。
AI.motivation: 尽管校准分类器能保证整体预测准确性，但其可能对特定群体中的合格成员产生未被充分研究的组内不公平性，需寻找新的公平性约束条件。
AI.method: 提出基于动态规划的后处理算法，对校准分类器的概率估计进行最小化调整，使其满足组内单调性约束。
AI.result: 在US Census数据集验证显示，该算法可在保持预测粒度和短名单规模较小代价的前提下，有效实现组内单调性。
AI.conclusion: 组内单调性是缓解筛选分类器组内不公平性的有效条件，通过动态规划算法可高效实现该约束。

title: Low Complexity Approaches for End-to-End Latency Prediction
title_zh: 端到端延迟预测的低复杂性方法
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2301.13536
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2301.13536
abstract: Software Defined Networks have opened the door to statistical and AI-based techniques to improve efficiency of networking. Especially to ensure a certain Quality of Service (QoS) for specific applications by routing packets with awareness on content nature (VoIP, video, files, etc.) and its needs (latency, bandwidth, etc.) to use efficiently resources of a network. Predicting various Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) at any level may handle such problems while preserving network bandwidth. The question addressed in this work is the design of efficient and low-cost algorithms for KPI prediction, implementable at the local level. We focus on end-to-end latency prediction, for which we illustrate our approaches and results on a public dataset from the recent international challenge on GNN [1]. We propose several low complexity, locally implementable approaches, achieving significantly lower wall time both for training and inference, with marginally worse prediction accuracy compared to state-of-the-art global GNN solutions.
summary: Software Defined Networks have opened the door to statistical and AI-based techniques to improve efficiency of networking. Especially to ensure a certain Quality of Service (QoS) for specific applications by routing packets with awareness on content nature (VoIP, video, files, etc.) and its needs (latency, bandwidth, etc.) to use efficiently resources of a network. Predicting various Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) at any level may handle such problems while preserving network bandwidth. The question addressed in this work is the design of efficient and low-cost algorithms for KPI prediction, implementable at the local level. We focus on end-to-end latency prediction, for which we illustrate our approaches and results on a public dataset from the recent international challenge on GNN [1]. We propose several low complexity, locally implementable approaches, achieving significantly lower wall time both for training and inference, with marginally worse prediction accuracy compared to state-of-the-art global GNN solutions.
abstract_zh: 软件定义网络为基于统计和人工智能的技术提高网络效率打开了大门。特别是通过了解内容性质（VoIP、视频、文件等）及其需求（延迟、带宽等）来路由数据包，以确保特定应用程序具有一定的服务质量 (QoS)，从而有效地使用网络资源。预测任何级别的各种关键绩效指标 (KPI) 都可以解决此类问题，同时保留网络带宽。这项工作解决的问题是设计可在本地层面实施的高效且低成本的 KPI 预测算法。我们专注于端到端延迟预测，为此我们在最近的 GNN 国际挑战赛的公共数据集上说明了我们的方法和结果 [1]。我们提出了几种低复杂度、本地可实现的方法，显着缩短了训练和推理的时间，与最先进的全局 GNN 解决方案相比，预测精度稍差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出低复杂度算法用于软件定义网络中的端到端时延预测，以提高网络资源利用效率。
AI.motivation: 软件定义网络需通过预测关键性能指标（如时延）保障服务质量，但现有全局图神经网络方法计算成本高，难以本地部署。
AI.method: 基于公开数据集设计多种本地可实施的低复杂度预测方法，并与全局GNN方案对比验证性能。
AI.result: 所提方法在训练和推理耗时上显著优于全局GNN，仅略微牺牲预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 低复杂度算法能在保证预测效果的前提下，有效降低计算开销，适合网络边缘设备部署。
